rows.original: Atani’s tent is mostly dominated by a bed of comfortable furs, and the scent of a breedable mare is heavy in the air despite the chieftain’s otherwise-innocent expression. Pillows to rest against are settled at the back, and a series of wooden luggage-chests no doubt contain her worldly possessions. Only one hangs actually open, and you can see that it’s full of books in various languages. At least the first few are in the common tongue, judging by what you can make out of them. It’s not a massive living space, but it’s tall enough to accommodate the chieftain’s prodigious height. It’s comfortably warm, and the gentle breeze outside doesn’t do a thing to flap the tent’s walls.
rows.translation: 阿塔尼的帐篷里，最显眼的是那张铺着柔软毛皮的床，空气中弥漫着可繁殖母马的气味，尽管这位首领的表情看起来十分平静。帐篷后面摆放着可供休息的枕头，而一排木制行李箱里无疑装着她所有的财物。其中只有一个箱子是敞开的，里面摆满了各种语言的书籍。从书名来看，至少前几本是用通用语言写的。这个帐篷空间并不宽敞，但高度足够让这位身材高大的首领居住其中。帐篷里温暖舒适，外面的微风也不会让帐篷的墙壁产生任何震动。
rows.raw: "\n    Atani’s tent is mostly dominated by a bed of comfortable furs, and the scent of a breedable mare is heavy in the air despite the chieftain’s otherwise-innocent expression. Pillows to rest against are settled at the back, and a series of wooden luggage-chests no doubt contain her worldly possessions. Only one hangs actually open, and you can see that it’s full of books in various languages. At least the first few are in the common tongue, judging by what you can make out of them. It’s not a massive living space, but it’s tall enough to accommodate the chieftain’s prodigious height. It’s comfortably warm, and the gentle breeze outside doesn’t do a thing to flap the tent’s walls."

rows.original: These two she-mares need some thorough relief. However, it’s going to be on your terms how they get off as you jerk and suck them. Maybe Atani will even get a peek?
rows.translation: 这两匹母马确实需要彻底的放松。不过，如何让它们得到满足，就要完全按照 你的方式来进行了——你得一边抽插它们一边进行口交。也许阿塔尼还能偷看一眼呢？
rows.raw: "These two she-mares need some thorough relief. However, it’s going to be on your terms how they get off as you jerk and suck them. Maybe Atani will even get a peek?"

rows.original: You aren't getting any fun time without winning Atani's hand and heart. Maybe try a little romance with the mare for some extra fun?
rows.translation: 如果不赢得阿塔尼的芳心，你是根本享受不到任何乐趣的。或许可以试着和她发展一点浪漫关系，这样会更有意思吧？
rows.raw: "You aren't getting any fun time without winning Atani's hand and heart. Maybe try a little romance with the mare for some extra fun?"

rows.original: As you enter the chieftain’s tent, you’re struck by a number of things; firstly is that the majority of the space is dominated by thick cozy furs, followed rather quickly by the enticing scent of a mare in heat. Sat at the back of the tent in those furs, propped up against a series of thick pillows is the woman you suspect to be chieftain. Her fur is the sun-dappled gold and white of a palomino steed, and her clothing is of a thin colorful wool that does little to hide her curves from you. Her hair is a similar golden blonde that hangs in thick curls, along with the typical horsey tail. The cloth resting on her shoulders is little more than a cape, still leaving hefty H-cup tits bare to the open air with their thick pink nipples. Her legs are gently crossed over, hooves out and pointed towards you. Her skirt similarly doesn’t hide much; the chieftain has enormous hips and thick muscular thighs, but you could swear you can see the barest hint of dark lips beneath. She blinks in surprise and puts down the book in her lap, hugging her chest for a moment and taking a deep, steadying breath. ...It’s not exactly what you expected for a chieftain’s reaction to seeing you, she looks positively nervous, in fact. When she stands up you can actually appreciate how incredibly tall she is though, and the way that thick muscles move and shift beneath her otherwise squishy-looking body. "Greetings, traveler," she says. Her voice is rather weak, and — if you’re reading her body language correctly — rather tired. "My name is A— ahem, Chieftain Atani. I bid you welcome to our village..." Atani looks you up and down appraisingly for a moment, rubbing her horsie-[silly|snoot|muzzle]. "Forgive me if you’re feeling a little overwhelmed, or my guards have treated you with any impropriety... they are very protective, especially now." [pc.dcb|"Not exactly like I got a welcome at all."|"It’s not exactly an easy journey to this village in the first place. You’d think they’d be at least a little welcoming."|"It’s like, fine. Whatever..."] you huff, hands on hips. "I... apologize. And please, what is your name?" "[pc.name]." The chieftain nods, beginning to pace gently side-to-side in her tent. "Very well. [pc.name]... I was not the original chieftain here; that was my mother, up until recently when those horribly corrupted centaurs stole her away..." She shivers uncomfortably, but to her credit keeps eye-contact with you. "You look like a strong adventurer, you [party.som||and your companion |and your companions ]would be able to enter their depths with more stealth. Please... please help bring back my mother..."
rows.translation: 当你走进酋长的帐篷时，有几样东西立刻吸引了你的注意：首先，帐篷内的空间大部分都被厚厚的、柔软的毛皮所占据；其次，你还能闻到一股雌马发情时散发出来的诱人气味。坐在帐篷后部、靠在那些毛皮上、身后垫着几个厚枕头的女人，很可能就是那位酋长。 她的毛色如同被阳光染成金黄与白色的帕洛米诺马，而她的服装则由柔软的彩色羊毛制成，这种材料几乎无法掩盖她的身材曲线。她的头发也是同样的金黄色，呈浓密的卷曲状垂下，还搭配着典型的马尾造型。 搭在她肩上的那块布料几乎只能算是一块披肩，因此她那丰满的H罩杯胸部仍然完全暴露在空气中，粉红色的乳头清晰可见。她的双腿轻轻交叉着，脚趾朝外指着你。她的裙子同样没有起到什么遮盖作用——这位女首领有着宽大的臀部以及结实结实的大腿，但你能隐约看到她大腿内侧那微微露出的皮肤。 她惊讶地眨了眨眼，把放在腿上的书放下，抱住胸口片刻，然后深吸一口气，努力让自己平静下来。 ……其实，对于一位首领见到你时应有的反应来说，这完全不是你预想中的样子——她看起来简直紧张极了。 当她站起来的时候，你真的会意识到她有多么令人惊叹。 高大的 她的身体确实如此，那些结实的肌肉在她那看起来柔软的身体下不断运动、移动。“欢迎来到这里，旅行者，”她说。她的声音听起来有些虚弱，而且——如果你正确理解了她的身势语言的话——她显然非常疲惫。“我的名字是阿……咳，阿塔尼族长。欢迎来到我们的村庄……” 阿塔尼族长上下打量了你一番，然后揉了揉她的马……[silly|傲慢的态度|封口处]如果你们感到有些不知所措，或者我的守卫们有什么不当的举动，请原谅我……他们现在格外警惕，保护意识也非常强。 [pc.dcb|其实我得到的欢迎程度可远远算不上高。|本来来到这个村庄就已经不是一件容易的事了。你可能会觉得，他们至少应该表现出一些欢迎的态度才对。|算了，随便吧……] 你气得双手叉腰。 “我……真的很抱歉。请问，您叫什么名字？[pc.name]酋长点了点头，然后在帐篷里开始来回踱步。“好吧。 [pc.name]……我并不是这里最初的族长；那个位置一直由我的母亲担任，直到最近那些被腐蚀得面目全非的半人马将她带走了……”她不禁颤抖起来，但值得称赞的是，她始终保持着与你的视线接触。“你看起来像是个强大的冒险者，你…… [party.som||以及你的同伴 |以及你的同伴们 ]我将能够更加隐秘地深入它们的内部。求您了……请帮帮我，让我的母亲回来吧……

"You look like a strong adventurer, you [party.som||and your companion |and your companions ]would be able to enter their depths with more stealth. Please... please help bring back my mother..."'

rows.original:
As if you could leave Atani here like this, the marefolk looks literally terrified of what the future holds. Relief visibly floods her at your acceptance, and she clutches your hands tightly before drawing them into her chest. "Th-thank you, [pc.name]. Anything you can do to help would be hugely important to me..."

        She begins to sniffle, releasing you to dab her eyes. "S-sorry, would you please come back in a little? I need a few moments to... pull myself together. My guards will get... I don’t want them to hear me cry."
rows.translation:
“你以为可以把阿塔尼就这样留在这里吗？这些马人显然非常害怕未来会发生什么。当你同意帮助她时，她脸上明显露出了如释重负的表情，她紧紧握住你的手，然后将它们贴在自己的胸口。‘谢谢你，[pc.name]……你能做的任何帮助对我来说都意义重大……’”

 “她开始抽泣起来，你便让她擦了擦眼泪。‘对不起，请你再等一会儿吧……我需要一些时间来……让自己冷静下来。我的守卫们不会在这里的……我可不想让他们听到我哭。
rows.raw:
'
        As if you could leave Atani here like this, the marefolk looks literally terrified of what the future holds. Relief visibly floods her at your acceptance, and she clutches your hands tightly before drawing them into her chest. "Th-thank you, [pc.name]. Anything you can do to help would be hugely important to me..."

        She begins to sniffle, releasing you to dab her eyes. "S-sorry, would you please come back in a little? I need a few moments to... pull myself together. My guards will get... I don’t want them to hear me cry." '

rows.original: As if you could leave this poor daughter to her fate.
rows.translation: 好像你们就能让这个可怜的女孩自生自灭似的。
rows.raw: "As if you could leave this poor daughter to her fate."

rows.original:
You apologize and shake your head, declining before she can truly try to pour on the guilt... unfortunately she bursts into tears. Before you can respond to her sudden outburst, you’re gripped hard on the shoulders by thick marefolk fingers, and hauled bodily from the tent.

        "You made her cry! You absolute piece of shit. Go on, get. And don’t even think about coming back unless it’s to help." The marefolk guard looks horribly offended, and her ears flap back as though they could hide away from the sound of their chieftain crying. 
        
        They don’t give you a chance to respond, outright kicking you from the village. The other guard slips into the tent, making what soothing sounds that she can.
rows.translation:
你连忙道歉并摇头拒绝，就在她准备继续让你感到内疚之前……不幸的是，她突然哭了起来。还没等你反应过来，那些粗壮的马人女性的手指就紧紧抓住了你的肩膀，将你从帐篷里拽了出去。



 “是你让她哭的！你这个混蛋！快滚吧，别想再回来，除非是来帮忙的。”那个马人女性卫兵显得非常愤怒，她的耳朵都快耷拉下来了，仿佛想躲开自己首领哭泣的声音。


 


 他们根本不给你任何回应的机会，直接把你赶出了村子。另一个卫兵则溜进了帐篷，尽力用各种声音来安抚她。
rows.raw:
'
        You apologize and shake your head, declining before she can truly try to pour on the guilt... unfortunately she bursts into tears. Before you can respond to her sudden outburst, you’re gripped hard on the shoulders by thick marefolk fingers, and hauled bodily from the tent.

        "You made her cry! You absolute piece of shit. Go on, get. And don’t even think about coming back unless it’s to help." The marefolk guard looks horribly offended, and her ears flap back as though they could hide away from the sound of their chieftain crying. 
        
        They don’t give you a chance to respond, outright kicking you from the village. The other guard slips into the tent, making what soothing sounds that she can.'

rows.original: There are plenty of dangers in the world; you can’t handle this one too.
rows.translation: 这个世界上充满了危险，而你却连这样的危险都应付不了。
rows.raw: "There are plenty of dangers in the world; you can’t handle this one too."

rows.original: You’re stopped before you can enter the Chieftain’s tent by the two towering marefolk. "You’re back. Have you had a change of heart?"
rows.translation: 在你即将进入酋长帐篷之前，两名高大的马人拦住了你。“你回来了。难道你改变主意了吗？
rows.raw: '\n    You’re stopped before you can enter the Chieftain’s tent by the two towering marefolk. "You’re back. Have you had a change of heart?"'

rows.original:
"I’m sorry," You begin, scratching the back of your head. "Yes, I’ve reconsidered. I’d like to help."

        The guards both stare at you long and hard before one lets out a weary sigh and slips into the tent. It’s not exactly sound-proof, and you can hear half of the chieftain’s relieved words. The guard returns, a frown planted firmly on her muzzle, but she steps aside and permits you entry. "I'm gutting you if you make her cry again, fair warning."
        
        ...They must really love her.
rows.translation:
“对不起，”你挠了挠后脑勺说道，“是的，我重新考虑过了，我想帮忙。”



 两名守卫都紧紧地盯着你看了一会儿，其中一名终于叹了口气，走进了帐篷。这个帐篷并不隔音，你能听到首领那如释重负的话语。守卫回来时，眉头紧锁，但还是让你们进了帐篷。“警告你，如果再让她哭，我可不会轻饶你。”


 


 

……他们一定非常爱她。
rows.raw:
'
        "I’m sorry," You begin, scratching the back of your head. "Yes, I’ve reconsidered. I’d like to help."

        The guards both stare at you long and hard before one lets out a weary sigh and slips into the tent. It’s not exactly sound-proof, and you can hear half of the chieftain’s relieved words. The guard returns, a frown planted firmly on her muzzle, but she steps aside and permits you entry. "I'm gutting you if you make her cry again, fair warning."
        
        ...They must really love her.'

rows.original:
Chieftain Atani’s dabbing the corners of her eyes, standing to her feet once more. There’s a look of visible relief on her face, and she quickly reaches down to take your hands in hers. Once more you’re struck by the size of her, and not just the titanic size of her pink-nippled tits...

            "Thank you, [pc.name], for changing your mind... I understand that it’s a hard task to undertake, but any little will help. Please, if you would return in a few minutes... I just need to get my wits together." She smiles apologetically, rubbing her eyes again.
            
            Considering what her bursting into tears would mean, you step back outside the tent. The guards still watch you carefully, but do not bar you from exploring the village while their chieftain pulls herself together.
rows.translation:
阿塔尼酋长揉了揉眼角，再次站了起来。她的脸上明显带着如释重负的神情，迅速伸出手来握住了你的手。你再次被她的体型所震撼——不仅仅是她那双粉嫩的乳头所展现出的惊人尺寸……

“谢谢你，[pc.name]，你改变了主意……我知道这是个艰难的决定，但任何一点帮助都是值得的。请再等几分钟回来吧……我需要稍微整理一下思绪。”她带着歉意的微笑，又揉了揉眼睛。

考虑到如果她突然哭出来会意味着什么，你便走出了帐篷。守卫们依然在密切注视着你，但在他们的酋长整理好情绪之前，并没有阻止你探索这个村庄。
rows.raw:
'
            Chieftain Atani’s dabbing the corners of her eyes, standing to her feet once more. There’s a look of visible relief on her face, and she quickly reaches down to take your hands in hers. Once more you’re struck by the size of her, and not just the titanic size of her pink-nippled tits...

            "Thank you, [pc.name], for changing your mind... I understand that it’s a hard task to undertake, but any little will help. Please, if you would return in a few minutes... I just need to get my wits together." She smiles apologetically, rubbing her eyes again.
            
            Considering what her bursting into tears would mean, you step back outside the tent. The guards still watch you carefully, but do not bar you from exploring the village while their chieftain pulls herself together.'

rows.original: Okay, maybe you feel a bit bad.
rows.translation: 好吧，也许你会感到有点内疚。
rows.raw: "Okay, maybe you feel a bit bad."

rows.original: You’re barely finished telling them no; you just want to see the Chieftain, before you’re booted back out on your ass. Quite literally, if the hoofprint on your rear is to be believed.
rows.translation: 你才刚拒绝他们，就迫不及待地想见首领，生怕马上又被赶出去。说真的，如果那些留在你屁股后面的马蹄印是可信的话，那就真是这么回事了。
rows.raw: "\n        You’re barely finished telling them no; you just want to see the Chieftain, before you’re booted back out on your ass. Quite literally, if the hoofprint on your rear is to be believed."

rows.original:
[atani.romance|Atani smiles softly at you, bowing her head politely. "Greetings, [pc.name]. I’m glad to see you return."|Atani’s smile all but warms up the room. She clasps her hands together and bounces on her hooves. "[pc.name]! Welcome back."|Atani blushes at you when you enter, rubbing her thighs together. "[pc.name]... I missed you."]
    
    How very sweet.
rows.translation:
[atani.romance|阿塔尼温柔地对你微笑，礼貌地低下头：“问候您，[pc.name]。很高兴看到您回来。”|阿塔尼的微笑仿佛让整个房间都变得温暖起来。她双手交叠，用蹄子轻点地面：“[pc.name]！欢迎回来。”|当你走进来时，阿塔尼的脸颊泛起了红晕，她揉了揉大腿：“[pc.name]……我好想您。”]

真是太甜蜜了。
rows.raw:
'
    [atani.romance|Atani smiles softly at you, bowing her head politely. "Greetings, [pc.name]. I’m glad to see you return."|Atani’s smile all but warms up the room. She clasps her hands together and bounces on her hooves. "[pc.name]! Welcome back."|Atani blushes at you when you enter, rubbing her thighs together. "[pc.name]... I missed you."]
    
    How very sweet.'

rows.original: Don't forget: if you want to make good on marrying Atani, you need to bring Cait with you so she can perform the ceremony!
rows.translation: 别忘了：如果你真的想和阿塔尼结婚，就必须带上凯特，让她来主持仪式才行！
rows.raw: "\n Don't forget: if you want to make good on marrying Atani, you need to bring Cait with you so she can perform the ceremony!"

rows.original:
You take the opportunity to get a really good look at Atani. She must be easily eight feet tall, with broad shoulders and hips. Her short fur is the color of honey gold and sunshine of a palomino steed, dappled with white from the elbows and knees down. The only clothing she wears are some fine woolen wrappings; a small cape that rests on her shoulders and covers only a portion of her titanic tits, and a short skirt that stops at her thighs. Golden-blonde hair flows from her head in luscious curls, while a thick equine tail of that same warm hue swishes gently from side-to-side above her ass.

        When she breathes you can watch the way her massive H-cup tits rise and fall, [atani.pregnant|milk gently beads on her thick pink nipples occasionally when she bounces|and to your surprise her nipples are thick and pink]; just begging to be teased. You’re sure that if she bent over you’d be able to see a dewy black-lipped cunt, but for now it’s trapped between her thighs. Lastly your attention returns to her cute muzzle and bright blue eyes; everything about her body is squish and curve despite her towering stature and the muscles it must take to keep her upright. [atani.pregnant|You could swear her breasts have gotten larger actually, no doubt blameable on her pregnant tummy. Just a gentle squeeze would be all it takes to make the cream flow.]
        
        [atani.pregnant|Your lover’s usually potent breeder scent seems all the stronger despite her obvious pregnancy. She gently strokes her plump belly with obvious pride.|Last of all is the scent, it’s not just in the room; the scent of a horny breeding mare is so strong in the room it’s amazing that you can’t see juices trickling down her thighs.] It must be unbearable for the marefolk guards outside, considering they both seemed to be packing a foot of equine prick each. As it is there’s a definite flush in your depths when you look at her, unbidden or otherwise. [atani.romance|She smiles politely at you and tries to avoid eye contact when she catches you looking.|There’s a charming little grin on her face when she catches you staring, although she glances away with a flick of her tail.|Atani catches you looking, shuffling nervously before crossing her arms closely enough to make her heaving cleavage pop out enticingly at you. The cutie mare gives you a little wink while waiting you out.]
rows.translation:
你趁这个机会仔细观察了阿塔尼。她的身高肯定有八英尺左右，肩膀和臀部都非常宽厚。她的短毛呈现出蜂蜜金和帕洛米诺马匹阳光般的颜色，但从肘部到膝盖处却分布着白色的斑点。 她身上唯一穿的衣物，是一些质地精美的羊毛围巾；一件披在肩上的小斗篷，仅能遮住她那巨大的胸部的一部分；还有一条及大腿中部的短裙。金色的长发呈卷曲状从她头上垂下，而一条同样呈暖色调的浓密马尾则在她臀部上方轻轻摇摆着。

        每当她呼吸时，你都能看到她那巨大的H罩杯胸部随之上下起伏。 [atani.pregnant|当她蹦跳时，她那厚实的粉红色乳头上偶尔会有一滴一滴的乳汁轻轻滑落。|令你惊讶的是，她的乳头又厚又呈粉红色。]简直就是让人忍不住想逗弄她。你肯定觉得，如果她弯下腰来，你就能看到她那双湿润的、嘴唇呈黑色的阴部了，但现在它还被她的双腿紧紧夹在中间呢。最后，你的目光又落在了她那可爱的小嘴和亮蓝色的眼睛上；尽管她的身高很高，也需要强大的肌肉力量才能保持直立，但她的身体每一个部位都充满了柔美与曲线美。 [atani.pregnant|你简直可以发誓，她的胸部确实变大了，这肯定是因为她怀孕了。只要轻轻捏一下，乳汁就会流出来。]
        
        [atani.pregnant|尽管她明显怀孕了，但你爱人的那种浓烈的繁殖本能气息似乎变得更加浓烈了。她满怀自豪地轻轻抚摸着自己圆滚滚的腹部。|最后就是那股气味了——它并非仅仅存在于房间里；一头性欲旺盛的母马散发出的气味如此浓烈，以至于你甚至能想象到那些汁液正从它的大腿上流淌下来。] 对于那些在外面的马人卫兵来说，这种情况肯定让人难以忍受——因为看到她的时候，他们的脸上都会不由自主地浮现出红晕，无论这是出于自愿还是无意识的反应。 [atani.romance|她礼貌地向你微笑，但当你注意到她在看你的时候，她会尽量避免与你的眼神接触。|当她发现你在注视她时，脸上会浮现出一种迷人的微笑，不过她很快就会转开视线，同时轻轻摆动着尾巴。|阿塔尼注意到你在看她，便紧张地挪动着脚步，然后双臂紧紧交叉在胸前，使得她那迷人的胸脯更加显眼地呈现在你面前。这只可爱的母马在等你离开的时候，还向你眨了眨眼睛。]
rows.raw:
"
        You take the opportunity to get a really good look at Atani. She must be easily eight feet tall, with broad shoulders and hips. Her short fur is the color of honey gold and sunshine of a palomino steed, dappled with white from the elbows and knees down. The only clothing she wears are some fine woolen wrappings; a small cape that rests on her shoulders and covers only a portion of her titanic tits, and a short skirt that stops at her thighs. Golden-blonde hair flows from her head in luscious curls, while a thick equine tail of that same warm hue swishes gently from side-to-side above her ass.

        When she breathes you can watch the way her massive H-cup tits rise and fall, [atani.pregnant|milk gently beads on her thick pink nipples occasionally when she bounces|and to your surprise her nipples are thick and pink]; just begging to be teased. You’re sure that if she bent over you’d be able to see a dewy black-lipped cunt, but for now it’s trapped between her thighs. Lastly your attention returns to her cute muzzle and bright blue eyes; everything about her body is squish and curve despite her towering stature and the muscles it must take to keep her upright. [atani.pregnant|You could swear her breasts have gotten larger actually, no doubt blameable on her pregnant tummy. Just a gentle squeeze would be all it takes to make the cream flow.]
        
        [atani.pregnant|Your lover’s usually potent breeder scent seems all the stronger despite her obvious pregnancy. She gently strokes her plump belly with obvious pride.|Last of all is the scent, it’s not just in the room; the scent of a horny breeding mare is so strong in the room it’s amazing that you can’t see juices trickling down her thighs.] It must be unbearable for the marefolk guards outside, considering they both seemed to be packing a foot of equine prick each. As it is there’s a definite flush in your depths when you look at her, unbidden or otherwise. [atani.romance|She smiles politely at you and tries to avoid eye contact when she catches you looking.|There’s a charming little grin on her face when she catches you staring, although she glances away with a flick of her tail.|Atani catches you looking, shuffling nervously before crossing her arms closely enough to make her heaving cleavage pop out enticingly at you. The cutie mare gives you a little wink while waiting you out.]"

rows.original: Okay don’t make it weird, you’ve been staring.
rows.translation: 好吧，别搞得太奇怪了，你一直都在盯着我看呢。
rows.raw: "Okay don’t make it weird, you’ve been staring."

rows.original: You can’t get tired of drinking her in.
rows.translation: 你永远喝不够她带来的美妙感觉。
rows.raw: "You can’t get tired of drinking her in."

rows.original:
[flags.CQ_CLEAR
            |Atani smiles faintly, toying with a lock of golden hair. "They've been keeping mostly to themselves, but... I guess that's a good thing? It'll take a while to mend the rift between us, I'm sure." She folds her arms beneath her heaving chest and whips her equine tail around. "I miss seeing groups of visiting 'taur traders... when I was a kid it was so exciting when they came by and did a great big cook-out. Hopefully one day we can have that again."
            |Atani’s expression turns dark when you ask her about the centaurs. She hugs herself and shivers, taking her time to consider a response. "They’re... traitors. We have a lot in common, that much is obvious. What with some of us having..." [pc.hasCock|She gestures towards your crotch, blushing.|She awkwardly mimes the shape of a prick on herself.] "And often enough, uhm... the centaurs were only too happy to flaunt them. As you might expect, we had good reason to get along."

            "I can’t hate them despite what they’ve done; I expect it’s the way they’ve developed in order to be around us, that’s made them so... corruptible?" Atani shrugs helplessly, still hugging herself and pacing in the tent. "They’re strong, and they’d always been rather... potent in pheromones. They’ve only grown more powerful and... lust-inducing since their corruption. We fight them where we can, but often enough we are brought low by the raw..." Her nose flares and she squirms for a moment, rubbing her thick thighs together. "Scent of them. Only our, uh, most resilient warriors can stand against them for long."
            
            She clears her throat awkwardly. "Even if it’s just because they’d like to be 'on top' in the end..."
            
            [pc.dcb|"I guess that explains your dickgirl-guards."|"Is that why your guards both have, uh..."|"Oh! Does that mean your guards last super long in bed?"]
            
            Atani blushes deeply enough that it’s just barely seen as a darkening beneath her light fur. "W-what? No! No, they’re... they’re just my friends, and the strongest. Would that I could spare them to help fight out there, and I know they want to... but they’re honor-bound to remain." She clears her throat again, tossing out her hair. "Anyway! You were asking about the centaurs." Maybe it’s a bit mean, but it’s just so easy to tease the chieftain. "I myself haven’t had the chance to spend any time with them, outside of briefly meeting their chief's daughter a few years ago."
        ]
rows.translation:
[flags.CQ_CLEAR
            |阿塔尼微微一笑，拨弄着自己的一缕金发。“他们一直都独来独往，不过……我想这也算是件好事吧？要修复我们之间的隔阂，肯定需要一些时间。”她将双臂交叉在隆起的胸前，甩动着那条像马尾巴一样的长发。“我真的很怀念那些来访的‘牛人商人’们……小时候，每当他们来到这里举办盛大的烧烤聚会，我都会感到无比兴奋。希望有朝一日，我们还能再次拥有这样的时光。
            |当你问阿塔尼关于半人马的事情时，她的表情变得阴沉起来。她紧紧抱住自己，颤抖着，花了一些时间才考虑该如何回答。“他们是……叛徒。我们之间确实有很多共同点，这一点显而易见。毕竟我们当中有些人也…… [pc.hasCock|她红着脸，指向你的裆部。|她笨拙地模仿着在自己身上做出“刺”的动作。] 而且，嗯……半人马们也非常乐意炫耀这些东西。正如你所能想象的，我们之所以能相处得很好，当然是有原因的。”

“尽管他们做了那些事，我还是无法恨他们；我想，正是他们为了能够与我们共处而形成的这种性格，才让他们变成了这样的样子吧。……真的会堕落吗？”阿塔尼无奈地耸了耸肩，仍然抱着自己，在帐篷里来回踱步。“他们实力强大，而且在信息素方面也一直都相当……有影响力。自从他们堕落之后，这种影响力反而变得更大了，也更容易引发欲望了。 我们在一切可能的地方与他们战斗，但往往还是会被他们那股强烈的……气味所压制。“她的鼻子微微皱起，挣扎了一会儿，然后开始揉搓自己粗壮的大腿。“只有我们那些意志最为坚定的战士，才能长时间抵抗他们的攻击。她尴尬地清了清嗓子，说道：“哪怕只是因为他们想在最后占据上风……
            
            [pc.dcb|我想，这就解释了为什么你会派那些女人来保护你吧。|这就是为什么你们的守卫们都戴着……|哦！这是不是意味着你们的守卫在床上能坚持很长时间啊？]
            
            阿塔尼的脸颊涨得通红，那暗淡的颜色几乎只能在她浅色的毛皮下隐约看到。“什、什么？不！不，他们只是我的朋友，也是最强大的伙伴。要是我能让他们去帮忙战斗该多好，我知道他们也很愿意去的。但是他们出于荣誉感，必须留在那里。”她又清了清嗓子，甩了甩头发，“总之！你之前是在问关于半人马的事情吧。”也许这样有点刻薄，但逗弄那位首领确实是一件很容易的事。“我自己其实并没有机会和他们相处过，除了几年前有幸短暂见过他们首领的女儿之外。"
        ]

rows.original: You’ve asked this, don’t be a bully.
rows.translation: 你都这么问了，别当霸道的人嘛。
rows.raw: "You’ve asked this, don’t be a bully."

rows.original: So what’s the deal with these jerks?
rows.translation: 这些混蛋到底怎么回事？
rows.raw: "So what’s the deal with these jerks?"

rows.original:
[flags.CQ_CLEAR
            |Atani turns into a ray of pure sunshine, bouncing on her hooves in a way that proves to be most distracting. "Mother's doing really well! She, uh, has her difficult moments, but luckily Edessari and Wredi are always happy to go and help her out." The mare chieftain sounds casual enough about the fact, but a faint blush creeping in beneath her light-colored fur tells you that she's probably aware of just what that entails. "We get to drink tea, and talk about stories, and hug. I've always been close to her, and... well, as long as she's recently been seen to and then had a chance to wash up, it's easy to just spend hours cuddling up in the room."
            
            [atani.numKids 1|She pauses and grins at you. "Plus, she loves being around kids. Especially when they have a lovely little [pc.raceCute] to thank for them... I swear it makes her younger every time she sees them, it's... I don't have words to express how wonderful that is."]
            |When the conversation turns to Atani's mother she visibly wilts, taking a deep breath afterwards. "My Mother, yes..." she sighs and rubs her arm. "She's a beautiful woman. Strong and proud, but she's everyone's mother. Every day with her in those horrid centaurs' clutches is like a stabbing pain." 

            Atani pauses before pacing across the furs. "I miss her so much, and I feel like I never got a chance to tell her I love her. She spent so much time being a mother to everyone that maybe I felt a little left out." The mare snorts for a moment, hugging her chest until it's practically pillowing out. "A silly thing to be worried about, I know..." 
            
            "Oh, I... didn't even say her name. Sorry. Heck, I feel like everyone called her Mom, or Mother. She's the real Chieftain, even now I think. Chieftain Asani. Yes, we have very similar names." Atani clears her throat. "You can just call me Atani, if you'd like. I prefer it! Really!"
            
            "Okay Atani..." You say, trying not to grin when it makes her blush instinctively with enough force to be barely visible through her short fur. Again there's the smell of a horny mare flowing off of her; how easy is she to trigger? 
            
            She takes a deep breath and slaps her cheeks, mastering herself once more. "Yes, well... thanks. It's hard to say anything specific about her; she was captured during a raid. She uses a great big studded quarterstaff as a weapon... uh, just like this one." Atani reaches behind a couple of the belongings chests, pulling out an eight foot stick of thick hefty-looking wood covered from end-to-end in metallic studs that look scuffed with use. "This is a training one, her usual one is far bigger and heavier than this stick."
            
            Considering that 'stick' looks far too weighty and unwieldy for you in the first place, the image that's starting to be painted is a far more muscular marefolk... then again, Atani seems to be toying with its weight with similar ease before she clears her throat and puts the staff away. Maybe hiding muscles under cuddle-able squish just runs in the family.
            
            Atani doesn't have much else to say about the particulars of that event, and considering there's a chance of her settling into the melancholy you let her trail off so that you can change the subject.
        ]
rows.translation:
[flags.CQ_CLEAR
            |阿塔尼仿佛化作了一道纯净的阳光，她用蹄子蹦跳的方式，实在让人无法分心。“妈妈现在过得很好！虽然她也会遇到一些困难，但幸运的是，埃德萨里和雷迪总是乐于去帮助她。这位母马首领表面上显得很淡然，但她那浅色的毛皮下隐约透露出的红晕，说明她其实很清楚这意味着什么。“我们可以一起喝茶，讲故事，还可以拥抱彼此。 我一直以来都和她关系很亲密，而且……嗯，既然最近有人看到她了，她也有机会洗漱干净，那么我们就可以在房间里一起依偎着度过好几个小时了。
            
            [atani.numKids 1|她停顿了一下，然后对你笑了笑：“而且，她非常喜欢和孩子们在一起。尤其是当那些孩子们还那么可爱、那么活泼的时候…… [pc.raceCute] 要感谢这些东西……我发誓，每次看到它们，她看起来都会年轻一些，真的……我简直找不到词语来形容这有多么美好。]
            |当谈话涉及到阿塔尼的母亲时，她的神情明显变得萎靡下来，说完后还深深地吸了一口气。“我的母亲，嗯……”她叹息着，揉了揉手臂，“她是个美丽的女人，坚强而骄傲，但她也是所有人的母亲。每天都被关在那些可怕的半人马的掌控之中，那种感觉就像是被刺了一样痛苦。 

            阿塔尼停顿了一下，然后穿过那些毛皮走了过去。“我非常想念她，总觉得自己从未有机会告诉她我有多爱她。她把太多时间都花在了照顾大家上，也许因此我感觉自己有点被忽视了。”那匹母马哼了一声，把胸脯紧紧贴在身上，仿佛要把胸脯压扁一样。“我知道，这种担心其实很愚蠢…… 
            
            哦，我……甚至都没叫出她的名字。对不起。其实，我觉得大家都叫她‘妈妈’或‘母亲’。她才是真正的族长，现在想来也是。阿萨尼族长。对，我们的名字确实很相似。”阿塔尼清了清嗓子，“如果你愿意的话，可以直接叫我阿塔尼。我更喜欢这样称呼呢！真的！
            
            好吧，阿塔尼……”你说道，努力忍住笑意——因为她的脸颊瞬间变得通红，那红晕几乎要透过她那短短的毛发显现出来。她身上又散发着那种令人心动的香气……她真是太容易让人产生这种反应了啊…… 
            
            她深吸一口气，轻轻拍打自己的脸颊，再次控制住了自己的情绪。“嗯，谢谢……关于她，实在很难说些什么具体的；她是在一次突袭行动中被抓走的。她使用的武器是一根装饰着钉子的长棍。嗯，就是这样的。”阿塔尼从几个储物箱后面拿出一根八英尺长的粗木棍，这根木棍的两端都装满了金属钉，这些金属钉看起来因为长期使用而有些磨损。“这是用来训练的，她平时用的木棍要比这根大得多，也重得多。"
            
            考虑到“棍棒”这种武器对你来说显然太笨重且不便使用了，因此在我脑海中浮现出的形象，应该是一匹肌肉更加发达的雌性马人……不过，阿塔尼在清了清嗓子并将手杖收起来之前，似乎也能轻松地操控这种武器的重量。也许，将强健的肌肉隐藏在那些看起来柔软可抱的身体之下，确实是这个家族的遗传特性吧。
            
            阿塔尼对于那次事件的细节并没有太多要说的。考虑到她可能会陷入忧郁之中，你便让她暂时停止谈论，这样你就可以转移话题了。
        ]

rows.original: You just asked, don’t be a dick.
rows.translation: 你刚才才问的，别犯傻了。
rows.raw: "You just asked, don’t be a dick."

rows.original: You settle in with your [atani.married|wife|lover] and get comfortable in the furs, immediately diving right into divesting the latest nitty gritty details of your [silly|dangerous sex-retard adventures|daring quest]. Atani is enraptured, horsey-ears at attention with an adorable little 'fwip' each time you reach a particularly raunchy or threatening part. For her part it's mostly about taking care of the village, sharing books to the children trading food and resources — apparently the pupperidge farm pups are doing better business now that there're fewer threats in the hills — and other things she assures you are painfully boring... but you make sure she divests anyway; if only because she seems to be enjoying her time with you. When your talk comes to a close, Atani pulls you up into her lap and nibbles your ear before giving you a kiss. "Thank you for keeping me company, [pc.name]."
rows.translation: 你安顿下来，与你的……一起生活。 [atani.married|妻子|恋人] 然后舒舒服服地躺在毛皮上，立刻开始详细讨论最新的各种细节吧。 [silly|充满危险与滑稽的性爱冒险|大胆的挑战]阿塔尼听得入迷了，她那可爱的小耳朵竖得老高，全神贯注地听着。 fwip 每次当你读到那些特别露骨或充满威胁的内容时…… 至于她，她的主要精力都放在照顾村庄上：给孩子们分享书籍，交换食物和资源——显然，由于山里的威胁减少了，Pupperidge农场的狗狗们现在生意也更好了——还有其他一些她声称极其无聊的事情。但是你还是要确保她最终会放弃那些东西；至少是因为她看起来很享受和你在一起的时光。 当你们的谈话结束时，阿塔尼会把你拉到她的腿上，轻咬你的耳朵，然后亲你一下。 谢谢你陪我度过了这些时光， [pc.name]."
rows.raw: " You settle in with your [atani.married|wife|lover] and get comfortable in the furs, immediately diving right into divesting the latest nitty gritty details of your [silly|dangerous sex-retard adventures|daring quest]. Atani is enraptured, horsey-ears at attention with an adorable little 'fwip' each time you reach a particularly raunchy or threatening part. For her part it's mostly about taking care of the village, sharing books to the children trading food and resources — apparently the pupperidge farm pups are doing better business now that there're fewer threats in the hills — and other things she assures you are painfully boring... but you make sure she divests anyway; if only because she seems to be enjoying her time with you. When your talk comes to a close, Atani pulls you up into her lap and nibbles your ear before giving you a kiss. "Thank you for keeping me company, [pc.name].""

rows.original:
[flags.ATANI_TALK_HERSELF
            |[atani.fucked
                |[atani.romance||"Awww, asking after me again [pc.name]?" Atani smiles and rubs her thighs together. "I’m always okay when you’re around." |"A-ah! Well... I can tell you one thing that’s on my mind..." ]Atani mumbles, settling down into the furs and all but drawing you down into her lap. She plants a series of soft kisses along your neck before leaning back into the propped up pillows. With your head otherwise buried in her pillowy chest, you regale her with tales of your (mis)adventures. For all that Atani confesses being poor at small talk, she does her best to remain engaged; when you turn the conversation back on her she tells you excitedly about a few of the books she’s been reading.

                Eventually all good things must come to an end however, and the conversation dies out between you both. "Is... there anything else you’d like, [pc.name]?"
                
                ...The scent of horny mare is suddenly all but washing over you from your perch in her lap.
                |Atani seems delighted to settle in for a conversation; despite her insistence that she’s terrible at small talk, the mare chieftain eats up the tales of your most recent (mis)adventures. There’s very little that she can describe about her own daily activities, but you ask her regardless and make sure that she’s doing okay. [atani.romance|There’s a winsome shyness about her, but she still excitedly describes the latest books she’s red and still reading.|Much to your surprise, the mare settles down into her furs and sits you beside her so that you can be somewhere a little more comfortable. There’s a soft smile on her face, although it turns into a gentle sigh when you both run out of topics. When you get back up again there’s a comforting warmth in the mare-hormone-tainted air, but bringing it up would probably spoil the mood.|Atani pauses you for a moment before you can get properly invested in conversation however, sitting herself down in the furs so that your company can be enjoyed in the midst of a comfy cuddle. When your talk comes to a close, Atani pulls you up into her lap and nibbles your ear before giving you a kiss. "Thank you for keeping me company, [pc.name]."]
            ]
            |Chieftain Atani glances around nervously. "You want to know about me, [pc.name]? Goodness... I don’t know where to begin. For the woman who’s supposed to be in charge I don’t think I’m terribly interesting." She wilts a little under your level stare, before letting out an exasperated sigh. "Okay! Fine... uh..."

            She holds up her hand and begins counting off factoids on her fingers. "I was born in the heart of summer and came of age two years ago, my mother was chieftain and my... unfortunately passed father was also a mother. Quite a rare occurrence, or... at least, it was back then! I’ve never had a partner, I was promised to be married to the centaurs but that was, erm... cancelled. I’m acting chieftain. I love sugary fruits, and curling up in furs and napping. My guards are Edessari and Wredi, and I’ve known them since I was a tiny thing."
            
            Atani takes a deep breath — which does wonderful things to her jiggly chest — and lets it all out, shoulders visibly slumping. "There. Done... sorry, I’m not very good at small talk so I just try and do it all at once." The mare may insist that she’s no good at small talk, but she has you regale her with your own tales and history all the same. By the time both of you run out of topics, she’s practically beaming.
            
            [pc.dcb|"I guess you must get starved for attention trapped in here."|"You made great conversation, thank you. I’ll try and do my best to keep you company in the future too."|"Awww, do you get lonely in here, perhaps? I can come by lots and lots if you’d like!"]
            
            "Ah!" Atani blinks a few times, hugging herself and squirming on the spot. "Well... yes. I’d love the company whenever you’re available. For now is there anything else you’d like?"
        ]
rows.translation:
[flags.ATANI_TALK_HERSELF
            |[atani.fucked
                |[atani.romance||哎呀，又来关心我啦…… [pc.name]？”阿塔尼微笑着，把大腿相互摩擦着。“有你在身边，我总是觉得一切都很好。 |啊……嗯……有件事我真的很想跟你说…… ]阿塔尼低声呢喃着，舒适地蜷缩在毛皮中，几乎将你拉到了她的怀中。她在你的脖子上轻轻吻了几下，然后靠在垫着的枕头上。你的头埋在她的胸脯里，于是你开始向她讲述自己那些（种种）冒险经历。 尽管阿塔尼承认自己不擅长闲聊，但她还是会尽力保持对话的进行；当你把话题重新引向她时，她会兴奋地告诉你自己最近读过的一些书。

然而，所有美好的事情终究都会有结束的时候，你们的对话也渐渐陷入了沉默。 还有其他什么你想要的吗？ [pc.name]……当你坐在她腿上时，那股雌马散发出的气味突然几乎完全包围了你。
                |阿塔尼似乎很乐意坐下来聊天；尽管她坚称自己不擅长闲聊，但这位女马首领还是兴致勃勃地听你讲述最近那些或成功或失败的冒险经历。关于她自己的日常活动，她能说的内容其实很少，但你还是会不时询问她，确保她一切都好。 [atani.romance|她身上带着一种迷人的羞涩，但仍然兴致勃勃地讲述着自己最近读过、现在仍在继续阅读的最新书籍。|令你惊讶的是，那匹母马安静地躺下，把你也让到它身边，这样你就能坐得更加舒适一些。它的脸上带着温柔的微笑，不过当你们俩无话可说时，那微笑便变成了轻轻的叹息。当你再次站起来的时候，空气中弥漫着一种由母马分泌的荷尔蒙带来的温暖气息，不过如果提起这件事，恐怕就会破坏这种美好的氛围了。|然而，在你能够完全投入到谈话中之前，阿塔尼会暂停一会儿，然后坐到毛皮毯子上，这样你们就可以在舒适地依偎在一起的时候继续聊天了。当谈话结束时，阿塔尼会把你拉到她的腿上，轻咬你的耳朵，然后亲吻你。“谢谢你陪我聊天。 [pc.name]."]
            ]
            |阿塔尼酋长紧张地环顾四周，说道：“你们想了解关于我的事情…… [pc.name]天哪……我都不知道该从哪里说起。对于一个本应该负责大局的女性来说，我觉得自己实在没什么吸引力吧。”在你坚定的目光注视下，她显得有些局促不安，最终无奈地叹了口气：“好吧！算了。嗯……”

她举起手，用手指一一数着这些事实。“我出生在盛夏时节，两年前才成年。我的母亲是部落的首领，而我的……不幸已经离世的父亲，其实也像母亲一样，承担着许多责任。 这种事情真是相当罕见，或者……至少在那个时候是如此！我从来没有交过伴侣，本来应该和半人马们结婚的，但那个计划，呃……被取消了。我现在正在担任首领一职。我喜欢甜味的水果，也喜欢裹着毛皮蜷缩起来小睡一会儿。 我的护卫是埃德萨里和韦迪，我从小就认识他们了。”

阿塔尼深吸一口气——这一举动让她的胸部明显地晃动了几下——然后又将气全部呼了出来，她的肩膀明显地耷了下来。 好了，完成了……抱歉，我不太擅长闲聊，所以总是试图一次性把想说的话都说完。”虽然这匹母马坚称自己不擅长闲聊，但你也还是把她自己的故事和经历讲给了她听。等到你们俩都没有话题可聊的时候，她简直高兴得不得了。
            
            [pc.dcb|我想，被困在这里，你肯定非常渴望得到关注吧。|你的谈吐非常精彩，谢谢。今后我也会尽力陪你一起聊天。|哎呀，你在这里会不会觉得孤单呢？如果你愿意的话，我可以经常来看你哦！]
            
            啊！”阿塔尼眨了几下眼睛，双手抱住自己，在原地扭来扭去。“嗯……是的。只要你有时间，我非常乐意和你一起。那么，现在还有其他你想要的东西吗？
        ]

rows.original: [flags.PIYARI_NAME|Play with [piyari.name].|Introduce yourself to your lovely [silly|hons|mare] daughter.]
rows.translation: [flags.PIYARI_NAME|一起玩吧 [piyari.name].|向你的爱人做一下自我介绍吧。 [silly|荣誉|母马] 女儿。]
rows.raw: "[flags.PIYARI_NAME|Play with [piyari.name].|Introduce yourself to your lovely [silly|hons|mare] daughter.]"

rows.original:
"[pc.dcb|Yeahhhh, about the centaur chief's daughter,|Speaking of the centaur chieftain's daughter,|So, like, speaking of adorably breedable horses,] she needs some help. She's been running from her own people for a while now, and I was wondering if you'd be willing to give her shelter while I work out how to stop this mess from spreading," you ask, rubbing the back of your neck awkwardly. Atani meets your gaze with a conflicted stare, working over a response for some time before she replies.

    "I don't know how you can expect me to trust any of the centaurs with what's going on, but..." she lets out a sigh as she turns toward her mother's things.
    
    "[atani.romance|If you think she might be of use in stopping the evil that stems from her home, then...|If you think she's telling the truth, then what can I do?|If she's someone you trust, then how am I supposed to say no?] She may enter the village, but bring her here first. She might get some [silly|mad shade tossed her direction|hateful glances] if the mares don't know who she is," Atani smiles, bidding you retrieve Ahmri as soon as possible.
    
    It doesn't take long, sitting around a temporary campfire, for Ahmri to come trotting along and toss her arms around you in a big hug. You tell her about the marefolk right away, and she seems more excited than you would've thought at the prospect.
    
    "Well yeah! I've always wanted to actually see the marefolk. The chieftain sounds super nice, and I can't wait to meet her!" She pats her tauric forelegs as she talks, waiting for you to lead the way. You hadn't traveled far, so it doesn't take you long to make your way back to the village. It does, however, take some skillful maneuvering to help Ahmri safely down the treacherous entrance path to the village proper. She holds your arms the whole way, and remains glued to your shoulder till you reach Atani's yurt. 
    
    You don't get as many cold stares as Atani seemed to expect, but Ahmri does seem less than comfortable from even the myriad curious glances the two of you get along the way. Even Atani's bodyguard pair don't have real contempt in their eyes. Both of them sigh as they open the tent for you, trying not to make the centauress more stressed. Atani paces near her cushioned seat, turning toward you when you enter and trying her best to look stern. 
    
    "Uh, h-hi. I'm Ahmri. I think we met once when my dad invited your family to the harvest feast. I, uh, said hi and went to my room. Sorry about that, b-but I was reading a good book and I didn't want to put it down. I'm sure we could g-get to know each other now," Ahmri stumbles over her words, steepling and lacing her fingers together as she flushes red. Atani visibly struggles to retain her taciturn bearing.
    
    It doesn’t take long for her to crack, hurriedly waving her hands. "Stop! How am I supposed to be suspicious of you like this? You're no older than I am, and obviously no more corrupt... I was expecting some kind of slutty conniving monster, but you sound just as sad as I am." Atani collapses backward onto her pillows, rubbing her temples and trying to drive the weariness from her face. Ahmri looks around, still beet red with awkward nerves, before her eyes settle on the small stack of books to one side of the throne of cushions.
    
    "D-do you read too? Is that 'The Tales of Baron Wellguard'? I like the story where he discovers that the princess and the dragon were in love, and helps stage a kidnapping so they can elope without the dragon being suspected." Ahmri trots over to the half-open chest where Atani stores her books, marveling at the leather bound tomes and loose manuscripts. She makes no move to touch them, but you can see the twitch of her fingers as she twirls her hair, turning imaginary pages in her mind.
    
    "Too? My mother made sure I could read so I'd know not to get swindled by traders. I kept up with it. I'm probably the most skilled reader in the village! A-and I prefer the story where the Baron flirts with death for long enough that the prince can reach the village priestess with his plague-stricken love." Atani joins Ahmri beside the chest, picking up the book and holding it over her chest. The volume is thick, but still manages scarce little coverage of her assets. 
    
    "Ah! That one is adorable! I had to learn to read the letters my mom sends from up in the Far North, but my daddy would stamp his horseshoes off if he knew the kind of stuff I read from the traders," Ahmri giggles for a moment before growing somber. The taller equine woman puts a hand on her shoulder. 
    
    "Hey. I won't have any of that. If you start crying then I'll start crying and then [pc.isBimbo|[pc.name] will start crying too|[pc.name] will roll [pc.hisHer] eyes] and we won't get anywhere. You can stay here as long as you need. Especially if you can help get [pc.name] into your village. [pc.HeShe]'ll get my mom back and get your dad back to normal no problem. It'll be like our very own Baron Wellguard story," she promises, pulling the busty 'taur into a full hug. Ahmri lets herself be hugged, breaking an oncoming sob with a laugh as she wipes a spattering of tears from her cheeks.
    
    "Ok. Let's do it."
rows.translation:
"[pc.dcb|是啊，关于那个半人马首领的女儿……|说到那个半人马首领的女儿……|那么，说到那些非常可爱、可以繁殖的马匹……] 她需要一些帮助。她已经逃避自己的族人有一段时间了，我在想你是否愿意在她暂时躲藏起来时，帮她提供一个庇护所，等我想出办法来阻止这种混乱继续蔓延。”你边说边尴尬地揉着后颈。阿塔尼用一种充满矛盾的眼神看着你，思考了好一会儿才回答道：

“我不知道在目前这种情况下，你还能指望我信任那些半人马……”她叹了口气，然后转向她母亲的东西。[atani.romance|如果你认为她或许能在阻止那些源自她家乡的邪恶势力方面发挥作用，那么……|如果你认为她说的是实话，那我又能做什么呢？|如果她是你信任的人，那我怎么可能拒绝她呢？] 她可以进入村子，但先把她带到这里来。她可能会得到一些东西。 [silly|有人故意针对她，故意刁难她。|充满敌意的目光] 如果那些母马们不认识她的话……”阿塔尼微笑着，叮嘱你尽快把艾姆丽找回来。

没过多久，围坐在临时搭建的篝火旁，艾姆丽就小跑着回来了，紧紧地抱住了你。你立刻告诉她关于那些母马族人的事情，她对此表现出的兴奋程度超出了你的预料。
    
    嗯，没错！我一直都很想亲眼看看那些马人。那位女首领听起来人非常好，我迫不及待想见到她了！”她边说边轻拍着自己那双牛蹄状的前腿，等待着你带路。你们并没有走太远，所以很快就回到了村庄。不过，在帮助阿姆里安全地穿过通往村庄内部的险要通道时，还是需要一些巧妙的技巧。在整个过程中，她都紧紧抓住你的手臂，一直紧贴着你的肩膀，直到你们来到了阿塔尼的帐篷前。 
    
    你并没有收到阿塔尼预想中的那么多冷眼，但啊姆里显然也因为你们一路上所受到的那些好奇目光而感到很不自在。就连阿塔尼的两名保镖，眼中也并没有真正的轻蔑。他们为你们打开帐篷时都叹了口气，尽量不让这位半人马女性感到更加紧张。当你走进去时，阿塔尼在她的软垫座椅旁来回走动，转向你时，她也在尽力表现出严肃的表情。 
    
    呃，嗨。我是阿姆里。我想我们之前见过面，那时候我爸爸邀请你们全家来参加丰收节聚会。我当时打了声招呼，然后就回房间了。实在抱歉，不过我当时正在读一本很有趣的书，实在不想停下来。现在我们肯定可以更好地了解彼此了。”阿姆里结结巴巴地说着，双手紧握在一起，脸上泛起了红晕。而阿塔尼则明显在努力保持自己一贯的沉默寡言。
    
    她没过多久就崩溃了，慌忙地挥着手说：“别这样！我怎么可能怀疑你呢？你年纪也不比我大，显然也没有那么腐败……我原本以为你会是个阴险狡诈、贪图享乐的人，但听起来你和我一样可怜啊。阿塔尼向后倒在枕头上，揉着太阳穴，试图驱散脸上的疲惫。阿姆里环顾四周，脸上仍带着尴尬的红晕，最终将目光落在垫子堆成的小书堆上。
    
    你也会读书吗？那是《威尔加德男爵的故事》吗？我特别喜欢那个情节：他发现公主和那条龙其实是相爱的，于是帮忙策划了一场绑架事件，让他们能够私奔而不会引起龙的怀疑。”阿姆里快步走到阿塔尼存放书籍的半开箱子前，看着那些皮封的书本和散落的手稿，眼中充满了赞叹。她并没有动手去触碰它们，但你可以看到她的手指在转动头发的同时，也在脑海中一页页“翻阅”着那些故事。
    
    也是吗？我妈妈一直督促我学习阅读，就是为了让我知道如何避免被商贩欺骗。我一直坚持学习，现在恐怕是村里最擅长阅读的人了！而且，我更喜欢那种故事——在这种故事里，男爵会与死亡周旋足够长的时间，这样王子就能带着他那患了瘟疫的爱人，及时赶到村里的女祭司那里。”阿塔尼走到阿姆里身边，拿起那本书，把它举在胸前。这本书很厚，但即便如此，也还是勉强能遮住她的胸部。 
    
    啊！那个太可爱了！我不得不学会阅读妈妈从遥远的北方寄来的信，不过要是我爸爸知道我读了那些商人寄来的东西，他肯定会生气的……”阿姆里咯咯笑了片刻，随后表情又变得严肃起来。那位身材高大的马人女性将手放在她的肩上。 
    
    嘿，我可不想那样。如果你开始哭，那我也会跟着哭的，然后…… [pc.isBimbo|[pc.name] 也会开始哭起来的。|[pc.name] 将会发生 [pc.hisHer] 眼睛] 否则我们根本不会取得任何进展。你可以在这里待多久都行，尤其是如果你能帮忙的话…… [pc.name] 进入你们的村庄。 [pc.HeShe]我会把我的妈妈找回来，也会让你的爸爸恢复健康，没问题的。这就会变成我们自己的‘巴伦·韦尔加德’故事了，”她承诺道，然后紧紧抱住了那个身材丰满的“公牛”。阿姆里任由她拥抱，强忍住即将涌出的泪水，转而笑了起来，同时擦去了脸颊上的一些泪痕。

“好吧，那就开始行动吧。
rows.raw:
"
    "[pc.dcb|Yeahhhh, about the centaur chief's daughter,|Speaking of the centaur chieftain's daughter,|So, like, speaking of adorably breedable horses,] she needs some help. She's been running from her own people for a while now, and I was wondering if you'd be willing to give her shelter while I work out how to stop this mess from spreading," you ask, rubbing the back of your neck awkwardly. Atani meets your gaze with a conflicted stare, working over a response for some time before she replies.

    "I don't know how you can expect me to trust any of the centaurs with what's going on, but..." she lets out a sigh as she turns toward her mother's things.
    
    "[atani.romance|If you think she might be of use in stopping the evil that stems from her home, then...|If you think she's telling the truth, then what can I do?|If she's someone you trust, then how am I supposed to say no?] She may enter the village, but bring her here first. She might get some [silly|mad shade tossed her direction|hateful glances] if the mares don't know who she is," Atani smiles, bidding you retrieve Ahmri as soon as possible.
    
    It doesn't take long, sitting around a temporary campfire, for Ahmri to come trotting along and toss her arms around you in a big hug. You tell her about the marefolk right away, and she seems more excited than you would've thought at the prospect.
    
    "Well yeah! I've always wanted to actually see the marefolk. The chieftain sounds super nice, and I can't wait to meet her!" She pats her tauric forelegs as she talks, waiting for you to lead the way. You hadn't traveled far, so it doesn't take you long to make your way back to the village. It does, however, take some skillful maneuvering to help Ahmri safely down the treacherous entrance path to the village proper. She holds your arms the whole way, and remains glued to your shoulder till you reach Atani's yurt. 
    
    You don't get as many cold stares as Atani seemed to expect, but Ahmri does seem less than comfortable from even the myriad curious glances the two of you get along the way. Even Atani's bodyguard pair don't have real contempt in their eyes. Both of them sigh as they open the tent for you, trying not to make the centauress more stressed. Atani paces near her cushioned seat, turning toward you when you enter and trying her best to look stern. 
    
    "Uh, h-hi. I'm Ahmri. I think we met once when my dad invited your family to the harvest feast. I, uh, said hi and went to my room. Sorry about that, b-but I was reading a good book and I didn't want to put it down. I'm sure we could g-get to know each other now," Ahmri stumbles over her words, steepling and lacing her fingers together as she flushes red. Atani visibly struggles to retain her taciturn bearing.
    
    It doesn’t take long for her to crack, hurriedly waving her hands. "Stop! How am I supposed to be suspicious of you like this? You're no older than I am, and obviously no more corrupt... I was expecting some kind of slutty conniving monster, but you sound just as sad as I am." Atani collapses backward onto her pillows, rubbing her temples and trying to drive the weariness from her face. Ahmri looks around, still beet red with awkward nerves, before her eyes settle on the small stack of books to one side of the throne of cushions.
    
    "D-do you read too? Is that 'The Tales of Baron Wellguard'? I like the story where he discovers that the princess and the dragon were in love, and helps stage a kidnapping so they can elope without the dragon being suspected." Ahmri trots over to the half-open chest where Atani stores her books, marveling at the leather bound tomes and loose manuscripts. She makes no move to touch them, but you can see the twitch of her fingers as she twirls her hair, turning imaginary pages in her mind.
    
    "Too? My mother made sure I could read so I'd know not to get swindled by traders. I kept up with it. I'm probably the most skilled reader in the village! A-and I prefer the story where the Baron flirts with death for long enough that the prince can reach the village priestess with his plague-stricken love." Atani joins Ahmri beside the chest, picking up the book and holding it over her chest. The volume is thick, but still manages scarce little coverage of her assets. 
    
    "Ah! That one is adorable! I had to learn to read the letters my mom sends from up in the Far North, but my daddy would stamp his horseshoes off if he knew the kind of stuff I read from the traders," Ahmri giggles for a moment before growing somber. The taller equine woman puts a hand on her shoulder. 
    
    "Hey. I won't have any of that. If you start crying then I'll start crying and then [pc.isBimbo|[pc.name] will start crying too|[pc.name] will roll [pc.hisHer] eyes] and we won't get anywhere. You can stay here as long as you need. Especially if you can help get [pc.name] into your village. [pc.HeShe]'ll get my mom back and get your dad back to normal no problem. It'll be like our very own Baron Wellguard story," she promises, pulling the busty 'taur into a full hug. Ahmri lets herself be hugged, breaking an oncoming sob with a laugh as she wipes a spattering of tears from her cheeks.
    
    "Ok. Let's do it."
    
    "

When at last her hands begin to [pc.hasHair|tousle your hair|stroke your scalp] you sink right down into her breasts again, letting your eyes slide closed.]
        
        It’s obvious that she’s trying to get you to fall asleep... but it’s hard to care now that you’re being taken care of so sweetly. [atani.romance||"Mmm... I do love a nice cuddle, don’t you [pc.name]?"|"Hey, [pc.name]... if we could do this every day, I think I would probably be the happiest woman in the land..."] You smile and bury yourself in deeper by way of answer, and she giggles gently. "Good..." she sighs, pausing to reach over and steal away her blankets. "How about a nap?"

        Darkness takes you quickly, with hands stroking you and soft humming filling you with warmth. It’s almost a pain when you’re gently nudged awake again. [party.som|"[pc.name]? It’s time to wake up. I’m sure I shouldn’t keep you any longer... even if I really, really want to."|"[pc.name]? [companion.name] is asking after you. It looks like I’ve held onto you for long enough.|"[pc.name]? Your friends are asking for you. It seems I’ve kept my hold on you for long enough."] You groan and grumble, but Atani is no doubt correct. You open your eyes blearily and look up at her, receiving [atani.romance||a kiss on the forehead from the comfy mare.|a kiss square on the lips from the cozy chieftain.] 
        
        She stays sprawled out even after you get up, watching you re-dress with a lazy smile on her muzzle. As with every interaction you have with Atani, her uniquely potent fuck-me scent has been rubbed onto every inch of your body. When you leave her tent, the guards are stood next to each other instead of either side of the tent’s entrance... the reason for why becomes apparently obvious by the fact that they’ve got a hand in one another’s kilts, jerking off their equine pricks. "C-come again," one of them gasps, tail flicking from side-to-side. The other guard grins faintly; there’s no need to explain what their chieftain’s scent does to them. It’s probably best you leave the girls to it.

[atani.romance||阿塔尼听到你的建议后轻轻一笑，然后躺在她的毛皮上，上下打量着你。你可不想被烤得失去意识，于是赶紧脱掉了衣服。当你故意扭动臀部展示一下时，这匹母马的脸颊更是红得发亮。|阿塔尼明显变得开心起来，她急忙脱掉衣服——其实她并没有这个必要——然后钻进了毛皮中。你也同样脱掉了衣服，不过在脱衣服的过程中，你特意让这个可爱的小家伙看到了你的身体。当你完全脱光衣服后，她发出了轻轻的、充满渴望的呜咽声。] 你几乎能闻到她身上散发出的那种性欲的气息，但此刻，你的欲望却更加……炽热。

来一场温暖舒适的拥抱吧。[atani.pregnant| 和你的孩子妈妈一起]虽然阿塔尼是一匹相当温顺的母马，但在需要依偎在一起的时候，它还是会主动采取行动。至少在这样一种情况下，它会展现出它应有的强势与主导地位——它会用双手将你抱起来，然后让你骑到它的背上，这种感觉还挺不错的。 当你的裸体紧贴着她时，她全身会不由自主地产生一阵愉悦的颤动，她的双臂也会环绕着你，然后轻轻地将你抱紧。人们很容易忘记，在这柔软的怀抱之下，她其实拥有一副多么强壮的体魄——如果你她真的使出全力，那你肯定会被彻底压得喘不过气来。

        很明显，她是在试图让你入睡……但既然有人如此温柔地照顾你，你就不会再在意这些了。 [atani.romance||嗯……我确实很喜欢被人紧紧抱在怀里，你不也是吗？ [pc.name]?"|嘿， [pc.name]……如果我们每天都能这样度过，我想我一定会成为这个世界上最幸福的女人……] 你微笑着，将身体进一步埋进被子里作为回应，而她则轻轻地笑了起来。“很好……”她叹息着，伸手拿走了自己的毯子。“小睡一会儿怎么样？ [atani.pregnant|就在你这么想的瞬间，你会感觉到她的肚子轻轻一动，仿佛在告诉你：“看吧？现在绝对是该小睡一会儿的时间了。]

[companion.name] 有人在找你。看来我耽搁你的时间够长了。|"[pc.name]你的朋友们都在找你呢。看来，我耽搁你的时间已经够长了。] 你抱怨连连，但阿塔尼的说法无疑是对的。你朦胧地睁开眼睛，抬头看着她，然后说道…… [atani.romance||那匹温顺的马在你的额头上轻轻一吻。|那位和蔼的酋长在她的嘴唇上轻吻了一下。] 
        
        即使你已经起床，它依然懒洋洋地躺在那儿，用那副懒散的表情看着你重新穿衣。每一次与Atani的互动，它那独特而诱人的气味都会附着在你的身体每一处。 当你离开她的帐篷时，守卫们并不是站在帐篷入口的两侧，而是并排站立……原因很快就变得显而易见了——因为他们互相握着对方的裙摆，一起抚摸着自己身上的那些凸起物。 再、再过来吧，”其中一个守卫喘着气说道，尾巴不停地左右摆动。另一个守卫则淡淡地笑了起来；他们的首领散发出的气味对这些人产生了怎样的影响，根本不需要解释。或许，你最好让这些女孩自己处理这件事吧。

rows.original:
This time when you enter Atani’s tent, you can feel something special in the air. Maybe it’s because your mare lover is reading a book upside-down, but she’s probably nervous. When she sees you though it’s like watching a sunrise. Her whole expression brightens up and her warm blue eyes drink in your every detail before she puts her book down. "[pc.name]! Welcome back. Uh. I was just doing some reading..."

    [pc.dcb|"Yeah upside-down. Something wrong?"|"You looked a little distracted, is everything okay?"|"Uh huh! Didn’t look like much reading to me."]
    
    Atani blushes and twiddles her fingers together. "I needed to tell you something, and I’ve been thinking about how to do so before, but... uh. I could use a hug first." The golden mare gives you her best doe-eyes, spreading her arms. With [pc.dcb|snort|grin|giggle] you sink right into her embrace and let her bury your face into her tits. You can all but hear her heart bounding in her chest as she soaks you in. Eventually she [pc.hasHair|buries her muzzle into your hair|nuzzles your scalp] and speaks up. "Okay, much better... are you ready?"
    
    The chieftain gently releases you, shuffling awkwardly on one hoof before taking in a deep breath. "I love you."
    
    You blink in surprise a few times. "I already knew that."
    
    Her fur darkens at the cheeks, and she hugs her body. "N-no... not like that. I mean I really love you, [pc.name]. You were my first, and maybe that’s just me being naive again... but when I look at you I can feel my stomach flip over, and I get giddy and my heart pounds so hard I think I might not even be able to bear it." Atani wrings her hands together for a moment, staring into your eyes with utmost sincerity. "And then we hold each other and all of that nervousness doesn’t matter, I just want to spend my whole life there telling you I love you. Sometimes I don’t even think it’s fair; I know there are more people in your life, and maybe when you look at them you feel the same way... but I had to say it anyway. That I don’t care about all of that so long as I get to have a piece of you to hold and love just as much as anyone else ever could."
    
    She stops to catch her breath, still blushing and squirming. It’s definitely one of the more intense confessions you’ve ever heard; how long has she been letting this eat her up?
    
    After Atani has re-mastered herself she resumes, eyes bright with hope. "Would you marry me, [pc.name]? Will you take me as your wife?"

            Wredi smiles too, folding her arms beneath her chest. "She’s still definitely feeling... off, after her capture. Something like this will really brighten her day. I’m sure she’ll say yes."

当你离开帐篷时，阿塔尼的卫兵们伸出手来，面带淡淡的微笑拦住了你。“我们……想感谢你，因为是你让她变得快乐。”埃德萨里说道，随后又放下了手。“当你去见阿塔尼的母亲时，需要我们替你传达这个消息吗？”

韦迪也笑了，双臂交叉抱在胸前。“她被抓之后，心情肯定还是很低落的。这样的好事肯定能让她的心情好起来。我相信她一定会同意的。
rows.raw:
'
            When you leave the tent, Atani’s guards hold you up with outstretched hands and faint smiles. "We... wanted to thank you, for making her happy," Edessari says, dropping her hand again. "Would you like us to speak for you when you go to see Atani’s mother?"

            Wredi smiles too, folding her arms beneath her chest. "She’s still definitely feeling... off, after her capture. Something like this will really brighten her day. I’m sure she’ll say yes."'

rows.original:
You’re not sure what expression you have on your face, but you can actually see Atani’s heart plummet before you can even open your mouth.

        "D-don’t say it..." she whispers, hugging herself. "Sorry, I shouldn’t... it’s fine. Uhm." The mare girl gulps, biting her lip. "Pretend I didn’t say anything. That— oh it was probably so embarrassing..."
        
        Before the gloom can grow too intense you back up and leave the tent, doing everything you can not to look at her guards as they glare at you... you probably aren’t getting any personal time with Atani from now on. Just looking at her might be difficult...
rows.translation:
你甚至不确定自己脸上露出了什么表情，但就在你开口之前，你已经看到阿塔尼的心脏仿佛坠入了深渊。

“不、不要这么说……”她抱着自己轻声说道，“对不起，我不应该这样的…… 没关系……嗯。”那个马娘吞了口唾沫，咬着嘴唇说道，“就当我什么都没说吧。那个……哦，那场面肯定很尴尬吧……”

在阴郁的气氛变得过于浓重之前，你赶紧退了出去，尽量不去看那些正盯着你看的守卫们。从现在开始，你可能再也无法与阿塔尼拥有属于你们两人的私人时光了。甚至只是看她的面容，也可能变得十分困难……

rows.translation: 道歉然后拒绝吧，之后你们俩很可能不会再有什么瓜葛了。
rows.raw: "Apologize and reject; it’s unlikely you two are going to be fucking much after this."

rows.original:
You’re barely a foot into Atani’s tent before you’re all but bowled over, dragged into a boob-cuddle that pratically crushes the air from you[atani.pregnant| even as it has your mare lover’s tits squirting precious milk]. "Mommy said yes! Oh [pc.name]! We can marry!" She nuzzles your neck, horsey tail swishing cheerfully from side-to-side. "Oooh I have no idea how to prepare now! You have a priestess friend, right?"

    After wriggling out of her grasp you give her a gentle pet on the head. "Yeah, Cait. She’d love to do it, I’m sure... as long as we promise to have lots of children, I imagine."
    
    Atani blushes and smiles, pulling you into a hard kiss. "And I would love that... but first comes putting a ring on you. And I have just the one in mind..."
    
    [pc.dcb|"I wasn’t expecting a sex joke..."|"A sex joke? Oooh, naughty."|"Hehe, is that the butthole? It’s very cute afterall!"] 
    
    Her blush only deepens at that, and she nervously wriggles on the spot. "N-no, an actual ring... but if you play your cards right on the wedding night..."
rows.translation:
你刚走进阿塔尼的帐篷不到一英尺，就几乎被她扑倒，然后被紧紧搂在怀里，那种拥抱力度之大，几乎让你喘不过气来。[atani.pregnant| 即便你的那位喜欢母马的情人那对乳房正在喷出珍贵的乳汁……]妈妈答应了！哦…… [pc.name]我们可以结婚了！”她把头靠在你的脖子上，马尾辫欢快地左右摆动。“哦，我现在完全不知道该准备些什么呢！你有个女祭司朋友吧？”

你从她的怀抱中挣脱出来，轻轻拍了拍她的头：“有啊，Cait。她肯定很乐意帮忙的……只要我们答应她会生很多孩子，我想她应该会同意的。”

Atani的脸颊顿时红了，她笑着紧紧吻了你一下：“我也希望这样……但首先，我们得给你戴上戒指。而我心里已经想好了那个戒指该是什么样子了……
    
    [pc.dcb|我可没料到会听到这样一个关于性的笑话……|一个关于性的笑话？哦哦，真调皮。|呵呵，那就是那个屁股吗？其实还挺可爱的嘛！] 
    
    听到这话，她的脸红得更厉害了，紧张地在原地坐立不安。“不……我是说，一枚真正的戒指……不过如果你能在婚礼当晚表现出色的话……

rows.original: "Hey, Cait..." you begin, earning a surprised yelp out of your buxom priestess companion. She pauses and blushes, shifting from foot-to-foot. "Something the matter, Cait?" "N-no, I was just thinking about some important stuff. Nothing you need to worry about?" "Are you sure?" you ask, squinting and leaning in. But Cait only giggles and pats you on the head. "Okay fine, whatever. I was thinking about how nice my boobs look when I jump, okay?" she explains, giving you a pointed bounce for good measure. Honestly? It’s hard to tell if that’s the truth or not. Pressing her on that fact would probably be rude. "It just feels silly to say that out loud." Especially if it really is just your pink kitty thinking about titty. In fact now you are having a hard time thinking about anything but bouncing boobs. What were you here for again? Fortunately you’re brought back to reality by Cait’s fingers snapping in your face. "Heh, come back to us [pc.name]. Was there something you wanted in the first place?" "Right... well. I’m getting married to Chieftain Atani, her mother gave us the okay as well." "Ooooh! That’s super exciting! When? Where? Is she [atani.pregnant|double pregnant? Oh you should have even more! I bet they’ll all be so cute!"|pregnant yet are you gonna have lots of kids? You totally should! They’d be so cute! And think of how big her boobs are!" Well, now you’re thinking about boobs again.] You slow her down with a wave of your hands, trying to slow her down before you’re barreled over by imagination alone. "The time is whenever we get the chance, the where is probably the village itself... uh. But I was wondering if you’d like to officiate?" Cait’s high-pitched squeal of delight is almost enough to deafen you before you’re pounced and buried in her aforementioned bouncing breasts, while she tries to headrub you into submission. "I’d love to! I’ve never done a marriage before I bet it’ll be so fun! Are you gonna wear pretty suits and dresses?" "I... hadn’t thought about that," you confess. "Probably not. They never seem to wear much anyway..." And you’d probably tear it off immediately. "Aww... I guess that’s fair enough. Also I don’t know where we’d get the cute clothes on short notice." Cait sighs, finally releasing you[pc.hasHair| and neatening out your scruffed-up hair]. "You’re not going to go retiring after all this though right? We’ve still got an everyone to save and an all the people to fuck." She gasps again, hands on mouth. "Is she monogamous?" [pc.dcb|"Nope, she knows who I am and who I do. She just wants to be an important part of it."|"Nah, she knows that I’ve been with and will likely be with a great many people. She just wants us to have a special place in each other’s hearts."|"Nooo, she’s super great, and knows that I love sex a whole-whole lot. She just wants to make sure that we both love each other just as much!"] "That’s very sweet." Cait smiles, ears twitching. "Very well! It would be my pleasure, especially knowing that I’d not be signing away permission on sharing you with the rest of the world." She loops an arm through your own, her fluffy tail swishing around cheerfully. "C’mon, we’re gonna go do some practice rounds. I’m sure you don’t want to screw this up... or, uh. For me to screw this up."
rows.translation: 嘿，凯特……”你开口说道，结果你的那位圆润丰满的女祭司同伴突然发出一声惊讶的叫声。她停了下来，脸颊泛红，站在那里不知该往哪里走好。“怎么了，凯特？” “没、没什么，我只是在思考一些重要的事情罢了。 没什么需要你担心的吧？” “你确定吗？”你眯着眼睛，凑近问道。但凯特只是咯咯笑着，轻拍了一下你的头。 “好吧，随你便。我只是在想，当我跳跃的时候，我的胸部看起来多漂亮啊，懂吗？她这样解释着，同时还故意轻轻弹了你一下。说实话？真的很难分辨她说的是不是实话。如果再追问这个问题，可能会显得很无礼。“把这种话说出来，总觉得有点傻。” 尤其是当那些想法其实只是你那只粉红色的小猫在胡思乱想罢了的时候。 事实上，现在就是如此。 你 他们根本无暇去想其他事情，满脑子想的都是那些晃动的胸部。你当初来这里到底是干什么的？幸运的是，凯特在你们面前打了个响指，让你们重新回到了现实。“呵呵，快回到我们这边来吧。 [pc.name]你最初是不是有什么特别的需求或愿望呢？” “嗯……其实我要和阿塔尼族长结婚了，她的母亲也同意了这门婚事。” “哦哦哦！太棒了！什么时候结婚的？在哪儿举行的？她本人也在场吗？ [atani.pregnant|怀了双胞胎？哦，那你应该会拥有更多可爱的小宝宝吧！我敢打赌，它们一定会非常可爱！|你明明怀孕了，难道还不打算生很多孩子吗？你绝对应该生！那些孩子一定会非常可爱！而且想想看，她的胸部有多大啊……现在你开始想着胸部的事情了，对吧？ 再次.] 你挥了挥手，试图让她放慢速度，以免自己被过度的想象冲昏了头脑。“时间嘛，就是我们一有机会的时候；地点的话，应该就是那个村子本身吧……呃，不过我在想，你是否愿意担任裁判呢？在凯特高兴地发出尖锐的尖叫之前，你几乎就被她那扑过来、紧紧压在你身上的柔软胸部给震得听不见任何声音了，而她还在不停地用头部蹭你，试图让你屈服。“我非常愿意！我以前从来没有经历过这种事情，肯定会非常有趣吧！ 你打算穿那些漂亮的西装和裙子吗？” “我……还没考虑过这个问题，”你承认道，“大概不会吧。他们似乎从来都不怎么穿这些衣服……”而且你很可能会立刻把它们脱掉。 “哎呀……我想这也是情有可原的。 而且，我也不知道我们怎么能在这么短的时间内找到那些可爱的衣服。”凯特叹了口气，终于放开了你。[pc.hasHair| 还有把你那些乱蓬蓬的头发整理整齐。]不过，经历了这一切之后，你总不会真的去退休吧？我们还有很多人需要拯救，还有很多人需要我们去对付呢。”她再次倒吸一口凉气，双手捂住嘴，“她到底是不是只和一个人交往呢？ [pc.dcb|不，她知道我是谁，也知道我从事什么工作。她只是想成为其中重要的一部分而已。|不，她知道我曾经和很多人在一起，将来也可能还会和很多人在一起。她只是希望我们能在彼此的心中占据一个特别的位置。|不——她真的非常棒，她知道我非常喜欢性爱。她只是想确认我们两个人对彼此的爱是一样的深沉而已！] 真是太贴心了。”凯特微笑着，耳朵都快抽动起来了。“好啊！能帮上忙我当然很高兴，尤其是知道我不会因此而放弃将你介绍给全世界的人。”她挽着你的手臂，蓬松的尾巴欢快地摇来摇去，“来吧，我们去做一些练习吧。你肯定不想搞砸这件事……或者说，不想让我搞砸这件事吧。

rows.original:
Both of Atani’s guards are smiling softly at you as you enter, pausing in their conversation to wave and step aside. The source of their good cheer is immediately apparent when your ears are treated to a surprisingly deep and confident singing voice. Atani is inside her tent, sat on a chair that’s been put there in place of her usual resting furs. Her mother is right there behind her, with a thick brush in hand which she runs through Atani’s hair while she sings.

    On spotting you, they both give you uncannily identical warm smiles despite their differences in stature. Atani rubs her thighs together, and her smile turns into a cheerful grin. "Hey [pc.name]! Is everything ready?"
    
    Cait pops in from around your side, tail all a-swish and ears all a-twitch. "As it’ll ever b— wow." You blink in surprise at Cait’s reaction before noticing her eyes are very definitely on the thick swinging prick that hangs from the ex-chieftain’s form. "I, uh. Yeah. As ready as it’ll ever be. We can get started whenever you’d like!" She pauses and makes shifty eyes, leaning in to whisper in your ear. "I want to bang your hot new mom-in-law. Hook a kitty up, okay?"
    
    Both girls tilt their heads with confusion at your suddenly-coy companion before she’s already skipping back out of sight. "Is there anything you need from me?" you ask.
    
    "Some privacy! Please now, let a mother have a bit more time with her special little girl before giving her away," Naiyana scolds with a smirk, waving her hairbrush at you like a wand.
rows.translation:
当你走进去时，阿塔尼的两名护卫都正微笑着向你招手，他们暂停了谈话，让开道路。当你听到那令人惊讶的深沉而自信的歌声时，他们之所以如此高兴的原因立刻就显而易见了。 阿塔尼坐在她的帐篷里，使用的椅子是代替了她平时用来休息的毛皮垫子。她的母亲就站在她身后，手里拿着一支粗毛笔，一边唱歌一边用笔轻轻梳理着阿塔尼的头发。

当她们看到你时，尽管身材有所不同，但她们都露出了同样温暖的笑容。 阿塔尼将大腿相互摩擦着，她的笑容也变得格外灿烂。“嘿…… [pc.name]一切都准备好了吗？”

凯特从你身边突然出现，尾巴摇得飞快，耳朵也跟着一抖一抖的。“已经准备得……哇，真是太好了。”你惊讶地眨了眨眼，看着凯特的反应，这才注意到她的目光正紧紧地盯着那位前酋长身上那根粗壮的……东西。 我，呃，是的。我们已经准备好了，随时都可以开始！只要你愿意，我们随时都可以动身！”她停顿了一下，眼神躲闪地凑近你的耳朵低声说道：“我真的很想和你那位性感的新岳母来点什么，帮我们牵线搭桥吧，好吗？
    
    两个女孩都困惑地歪着头看着你那突然变得害羞的同伴，而她早已蹦蹦跳跳地跑出了视线范围。“你需要我帮忙什么吗？”你问道。

“需要一点私人空间！求你了，让一位母亲有更多时间陪她那个特别的小女儿，再把她交给别人吧。”奈亚娜坏笑着说道，同时还用她的发刷像指挥棒一样朝你挥了挥。

rows.original: You were only inside for a minute, but already by the time you exit the village seems to be a flurry of motion. Smiling Mares bring out chairs from their homes and tents, making the whole place look fuller than expected. [party.som||[companion.name] seems similarly mixed up in the crowd, helping to make preparations. |Your companions too are in the mix, helping to carry things or otherwise trying to score seats for a good view. ]When you attempt to join in and help them you’re rather quickly shooed away and made to sit in a corner with a drink in hand. With nothing to do but watch people be busy and scamper around, any nerves you had are starting to fade off... being given a drink certainly doesn’t hurt either. But all too soon the seats are placed, a nice little podium has been put together and covered with flowers, and Cait’s making her way to the front with her robes looking crisp even as they hug every available curve in a way that steals more than a few lusty glances out of the crowd. With a deep breath to steady yourself, you take to your feet and brush yourself down. All of the murmuring in the crowd goes silent as you approach the podium, and Cait’s giving you the biggest shit-eating grin. "Feeling nervous, [pc.name]? Relax, nothing can go wrong. You just have to enjoy the moment; and remember, it’s about your partner anyway, not you. Be confident for her, eeeeven if you fake it." Thankfully you aren’t left waiting on Atani for long. Naiyana steps out of the tent first, a bright smile on her face while she escorts her daughter to your side. Nothing’s been done to her appearance; it’s the same Atani you’ve always known. But she seems to glow with visible pride,[atani.pregnant| her hand gently running along her pregnant belly and] tail swishing with every step. Cait puffs up her chest, leaning gently on her makeshift altar to inspect you both. "Welcome, friends and family of the village. We meet on this momentous occasion to celebrate the matrimony of [pc.name] the Savior, and Chieftain Atani." Her confident grin gives you no room to argue her choice of title 'the savior,' but oh well. Atani’s hand gives you a little squeeze at least. "I see before me two hearts entwined, but pieces of the great picture. Love is the fire that feeds the hearth of family, and to see that love affirmed permanently is a true pleasure." Cait lowers herself a little across the altar, looking down at your hands before smiling brightly at you both. "Would the couple like to make any oaths or affirmations?" When your mouth opens, it’s to draw a blank... but you do your very best. Atani waits patiently for you to wobble your way over to her clean blankets, laying one out across the furs to function as a nice dry spot for you both. She smiles while you go through the motions, watching your every move with a soft warmth to her eyes. The rest of the blankets , you throw over Atani and crawl in to join her properly. 

    She’s a large lady, with plenty of squish to cuddle up against. The moment her arms wrap around you you’re all but swallowed up by softness, and you bury your face into her chest. Unbidden her hands stroke the back of your head, stopping at the base of your skull each time to gently rub tense muscles before stroking again. Her tail — albeit still rather sticky — swishes around while she gets comfortable, and you can hear her ears twitching and flicking against the pillow.
    
    "Mm... I could lie here like this forever." Atani whispers. Even though your eyes are closed you can hear the smile on her face, it’s enough to make your stomach flip over and feel warm. [atani.pregnant|"I can’t wait for us to cuddle like this with our child too... although we’ll need to find a separate room for her when we’re busy." You give her a little laugh, wrapping an arm around her waist and hugging her closer. ]"It feels so right to be here, you know? If you weren’t needed to be a wonderful hero everywhere I might just try and steal you for a whole day and night of spooning."
    
    She squeezes herself up against you a little tighter, still stroking you with the other hand until you can barely feel tension anymore. Atani’s grip could probably be a great cause for harm, but she’s so gentle with you.
    
    Eventually that soothing sees you right off to dreamland, and it’s a peaceful sleep unbothered by demon or magic. Just comfort. The both of you sleep for hours, [dayNight|until eventually your body’s needs have you creeping out of the blankets to stretch and see to them... of course by the time you return it seems only right sneak a little more sleep.|and eventually those hours become the whole night. [party.som||[companion.name] hopefully found themselves somewhere comfortable to sleep too, because you sure aren’t going anywhere.|Hopefully your companions found themselves somewhere comfortable to sleep, because you sure aren’t going anywhere.]]
    
    When you’re properly awake, Atani’s there too with her usual warm smile. There’s a book in her hands and she’s propped up reading it, humming softly to herself. rows.translation: 就在你走进村庄的那一刻，阿塔尼的亲卫们几乎是一路小跑着迎了上来。然而，他们并没有发出任何警告信号，也没有让你感到紧张不安，反而全都紧紧地抱住你，与你挽着手臂一起前行。 当两人突然间倾泻出的感情潮水渐渐平息后，你才好不容易挤出了一个字：“发生了什么？” 埃德萨里和韦迪似乎都在犹豫该谁先开口，最后他们决定干脆拉着你一起走，而不是让你一个人待着。 快来吧！” 当他们走近阿塔尼的帐篷时，原因就显而易见了——她确实是一位非凡的女性。甚至在帐篷的门被拉开、你们被邀请进去之前，这种感觉就已经在你内心深处产生了共鸣。 阿塔尼仿佛就是那幅象征黄金般女性魅力的画面：她坐在那里，怀中紧紧抱着一个婴儿，婴儿的嘴巴紧紧吮吸着她的乳汁。她的眼睛里闪烁着令人心动的崇拜之情，而当她抬头看着你时，那温柔而充满母性的微笑会变得格外明亮、愉悦。 她难道不珍贵吗？ [pc.dcb|你在原地尴尬地挪动了一会儿，然后勉强挤出一个微笑，坐在她旁边，将身上的装备扔到一边。“她？|尽管你已经确信了，但你的眼睛还是因为惊讶而睁得大大的，于是你把装备扔到一边，坐在她旁边的毛皮上。“她？|哎呀，爸爸！”你那响亮的叫声简直让她的耳朵都…… fwip 你轻轻地后退几步，脱下装备，然后躺在她身边的毛皮上。“那么，她是个雌性动物吗？] 嗯！至少在体型上来说是这样。那些首领们似乎也比较偏爱身材高大的女孩……看看她吧！ [silly|我们家的女孩可真是个了不起的人！我真是为她感到骄傲。|总有一天，她会变得非常强大的。]阿塔尼转过头，在你的脸颊上轻轻一吻，然后依偎过来闭上了眼睛。“我就小睡一会儿吧，亲爱的，如果你不介意的话。” 你将手伸进她那柔顺的金色长发中，看着自己的孩子安静地吃奶，而那匹庞大的母马也依偎在你的身旁睡着了。 能够在这个世界上创造出新的生命，真是令人惊叹；这是另一个你愿意不惜一切代价去守护的灵魂啊。 [party.som||[companion1.name] 她让你们俩自己处理这件事，而是去享受外面那两位高大威武的卫兵所带来的关注了。|你的同伴们让你们俩独自坐下来休息，而他们自己则去享受外面那两位高大威猛的护卫所带来的关注了。]
rows.raw: " Even as you're entering the village, Atani's personal guards are all but racing over to you. Instead of setting off warning signals and putting you on edge however, the duo all but bundle you into musky horse hugs and link arms with you. Once the sudden outpouring of affection from the two is over you manage to creep out a word edgeways, although there's definitely a lot of being-squeezed involved. "What's going on?" Edessari and Wredi both seem torn on who gets to speak up first, before settling on tugging you along instead. "Come on!" Their cause for excitement becomes readily apparent at the approach to Atani's tent; she's just such a phenomenal woman, and it stirs something deep inside you even before the tent's flap is pulled back and you're pushed in. Atani looks like the picture of golden femininity where she sits, clutching a babe in her arms where it's firmly latched onto a milky tit. Her eyes are glowing pools of heart-stirring adoration, and when she looks up at you that soft, motherly smile turns into something bright and cheerful. "Isn't she precious?" [pc.dcb|You shift awkwardly on the spot for a moment before allowing yourself a small grin and dropping down next to her in the thick furs, casting your gear aside. "She?"|Your eyes widen in surprise despite already having been sure, and you cast your gear aside in order to drop down in the furs beside her. "She?"|"Eeee babbus!" Your bright announcement is enough to make her ears 'fwip' gently back, and you toss off your gear before dropping down into the furs beside her. "She's a she then?"] "Mhm! Well, in body, at least. Chieftains are pretty predisposed to, uh, big, biiig girls too. Look at her! [silly|Our girl's a heckin' chonker! I'm so proud.|She's going to be so strong one day.]" Atani turns her head and plants a soft kiss on your cheek, snuggling up and closing her eyes. "Just going to catch a few winks, if it's all the same to you dear." You sink a hand into her luscious golden locks and watch your child suckle, even while the massive mare drifts off to sleep snuggled up against your side. It's staggering, that you can bring life into a world like this; another soul you'd fight tooth and nail to keep. [party.som||[companion1.name] leaves the two of you to it, instead indulging in the attention of the two towering mareguards outside.|Your companions leave the two of you to sit and relax, instead indulging in the attention of the two towering mareguards outside.]"

rows.original:
Eventually your comfort-time comes to an end, although not before you get a chance to hug and bounce your hefty daughter. With a mother like Atani she's probably going to stay well fed for a long time... 

        [party.som||Once you leave, there's a faint smile on [companion1.name]'s lips, and two blushing mareguards... that would explain some of the sounds you'd heard.|Once you leave, [companion1.name] and [companion2.name] are having their heads pat by two tall mares, looking unsure of how this came to happen.] "Come back soon," Edessari insists, giving you a kiss on the cheek.
rows.translation:
最终，你的休息时间也到头了，不过在那之前，你还是有机会抱抱你那个胖乎乎的女儿，和她一起玩耍呢。有像阿塔尼这样的母亲在，她应该会吃得很好，很长一段时间都不会有问题…… 

        [party.som||你一离开，那里就浮现出一丝淡淡的微笑…… [companion1.name]她的嘴唇，还有那两位面红耳赤的护卫……这些或许可以解释你之前听到的一些声音了。|你一离开， [companion1.name] 以及 [companion2.name] 他们完全搞不清楚事情是怎么发展的，简直就像是被两匹高大的母马拍打着脑袋一样，完全不知所措。] 早点回来吧，”埃德萨里坚持说道，同时在你脸上亲了一下。
rows.raw:
"
        Eventually your comfort-time comes to an end, although not before you get a chance to hug and bounce your hefty daughter. With a mother like Atani she's probably going to stay well fed for a long time... 

        [party.som||Once you leave, there's a faint smile on [companion1.name]'s lips, and two blushing mareguards... that would explain some of the sounds you'd heard.|Once you leave, [companion1.name] and [companion2.name] are having their heads pat by two tall mares, looking unsure of how this came to happen.] "Come back soon," Edessari insists, giving you a kiss on the cheek."

rows.original:
Atani turns into a regular beam of golden sunshine when you make it clear you'd like some [pc.mf
        |daddy
        |mommy
    ]-daughter time with [piyari.name]. "That's wonderful, though you can't take her away without me getting my kisses first." 
    
    "Motherhood has[pc.isBimbo
        |, like,
    ] made a needy girl of you, huh?" you tease, leaning down and giving your mare a nice long kiss on the lips. She gives you a happy sigh, following you to your daughter's cot. She's sat up against the bars and making pleased noises at seeing your approach, eyes bright and blue.
    
    "Speaking of needy girls; what shall we do today?" 
    
    [piyari.name] reacts to your voice with a happy babble, arms gesturing the well-known signal for 'uppy.' A simple enough start, and you scoop your hefty bundle of joy up and give her kisses and tickles until she giggles and tries to nibble your fingers.
rows.translation:
当你明确表示自己想要一些时，Atani就会变成一束普通的金色阳光。 [pc.mf
        |爸爸
        |妈妈
    ]与……共度亲子时光 [piyari.name]那太好了，不过在得到我的亲吻之前，你不能把她带走。”

“成为母亲意味着……[pc.isBimbo
        |就像，比如说……
    ] 把你弄得像个需要帮助的女孩了，是吧？”你开玩笑地说着，俯身在马儿的嘴唇上轻轻一吻。它开心地叹了口气，跟着你来到了你女儿的婴儿床前。它靠在床栏上，看到你走过来时，那双蓝亮的眼睛里充满了喜悦。

“说到需要帮助的女孩……今天我们该做些什么呢？ 
    
    [piyari.name] 它听到你的声音后会开心地咿咿叫着，同时用四肢做出那个大家都熟悉的“抱抱”信号。这样一个简单的互动方式就足够了——你把这只可爱的小家伙抱起来，亲亲她、挠挠她，直到她咯咯笑起来，还试图咬你的手指。

"
