    "Speaking of needy girls; what shall we do today?" 
    
    [piyari.name] reacts to your voice with a happy babble, arms gesturing the well-known signal for 'uppy.' A simple enough start, and you scoop your hefty bundle of joy up and give her kisses and tickles until she giggles and tries to nibble your fingers.
    "

rows.original:
Atani smiles up at you from the pillows she's sat on, brushing the little mop of hair back on a bundle of joy. "You know, I'm surprised she looks so much like me... welcome back love, come! Snuggle with us." 
    
    You place your belongings off to the side [party.som
        |and approach
        |while [companion.name] leaves to give you three some space
        |while your companions leave so that the three of you can enjoy some space
    ], drinking in the sight of your beautiful buttercup [silly
        |hons
        |mare
    ] playing with your daughter.
    
    As you settle down into the pillows beside her, Atani carefully cradles the baby into your arms, smiling warmly still, and flicking her tail. "Oh you look like a treat holding her..." 
    
    "Yeah?" You grin and she draws you in closer so that you can use her big milky tits for a pillow, and listen to her heartbeat while your bab babbles and coos.
    
    "Mhm, makes me all giddy inside..." Atani blushes hard enough for it to be seen through her gold-yellow fur, and rubs one of your [pc.ears]. "But I'm glad you're here; we need to pick a name for her, you know."
    
    You look down at the bundle of joy, taking in her every facet. She's a sweet little thing, with a snout still quite stubby, and tiny little ears. Her body is covered in a light, almost downy layer of soft golden fluff, and a little tail is similarly wiggling unconsciously. The baby's a hefty girl too, probably twice as heavy as the average human would be, even though she's only a little bit larger-looking right now. You suppose they're dense this early on; makes sense, the mares have a lot of growing to do. 
    
    You tickle the little girl's snoot, and her tiny little hands grip your finger for dear life. Strong thing, she is. "Have you picked a name for her?" 
    
    Atani clears her throat and strokes your [pc.hair], watching the two of you with simple glee. "I've thought of a few, though I like Piyari most. Yari's a cute nickname too, which helps. That said... I'd love it if you picked a name."
rows.translation:
阿塔尼坐在枕头上，微笑着看着你，她将那束柔软的头发轻轻梳理整齐。“你知道吗，她长得这么像我，真让我感到惊讶……欢迎回来，亲爱的，过来吧，和我们一起依偎在一起吧。”

你把自己的物品放在了一边。 [party.som
        |并采取相应的措施。
        |当……的时候 [companion.name] 给我一些空间吧。
        |当你的同伴们离开后，你们三个人就可以拥有属于自己的空间了。
    ]当着你那美丽的黄水仙的面喝酒…… [silly
        |荣誉
        |母马
    ] 和你的女儿一起玩耍。

当你躺在她身边的枕头上时，阿塔尼小心翼翼地将婴儿抱到你的怀里，脸上依然挂着温暖的笑容，同时还轻轻摇动着尾巴。“哦，你抱着她看起来真像是在享受一段美好的时光呢…… 
    
    是吗？”你微笑着，她把你拉得更近一些，这样你就可以把她那丰满的乳晕当作枕头，同时聆听她的心跳声，而你则继续轻声呢喃、低语着。

“嗯，这让我的内心感到一阵激动……”阿塔尼的脸颊涨得通红，那金黄色的毛皮几乎无法掩盖这种红晕，她轻轻揉了揉你的…… [pc.ears]不过我很高兴你在这里；我们得给她取个名字，你知道的。”

你低头看着这个可爱的小生命，仔细观察她的每一个细节。她真是个讨人喜欢的小家伙，鼻子还挺短，耳朵也小小的。 它的身体覆盖着一层柔软的金色绒毛，几乎像绒毛一样轻柔，还有一条小尾巴也在无意识地摆动着。这只小宝宝是一只体型较大的雌性，它的体重可能是普通人类体重的两倍，尽管现在它看起来还只是稍微大一些而已。 你大概觉得它们在这个阶段还太幼小了吧；确实如此，这些小母马还有很长的成长路要走呢。

你轻轻挠了挠小女孩的鼻子，她那小小的手紧紧抓住了你的手指，仿佛生怕松开一样。她可真是有力气啊。“你给她起名字了吗？阿塔尼清了清嗓子，然后轻抚着你的…… [pc.hair]看着你们两个，我心中充满了简单的喜悦。“我想了好几个名字，不过我最喜欢‘Piyari’这个。‘Yari’也是一个很可爱的昵称，也很合适。不过……如果你们能自己选择一个名字，我会更加开心的。

rows.translation: 名称长度必须为3到16个字符，且不能包含任何特殊字符。
rows.raw: "\n Name must be 3-16 characters long and may not contain any special characters.\n "

rows.original:
s chin. "She looks like a Piyari."
            
            Atani giggles and kisses you on the cheek, reaching down to also stroke the baby— Piyari. "Thank you... thank you so much."
            |"[piyari.name]? It's beautiful..." Atani smiles happily and kisses your cheek, snuggling in as deeply as she can before stroking the baby— [piyari.name].
        ]
        
        Your mare-daughter, [piyari.name].
        
        "Will she be chieftain one day?" you eventually ask, soaking in the moment still.
        
        "If she wants to be," Atani smiles. "Being in charge of everyone's happiness isn't something we can just force on someone, inherited or not. I... well, I didn't have a choice thanks to mom's situation, but after you saved her I realized I wanted to remain in this position."
        
        "Hopefully [piyari.name] doesn't have to go through the same..."
        
        "Yes... although if I do end up being filled with evil chemicals and turned into a sexual mess, you'll make sure to keep me company, right?"
        
        You grin and gently bounce [piyari.name] in your arms. "Maybe."
        
        Atani whickers and gently bops your shoulder, before snuggling back in. "I hope you'll come back lots to play with our babe... and me, of course."
        
        "Of course!"
rows.translation:
s chin. “她看起来像一个皮亚里。”
阿塔尼咯咯笑，亲吻你的脸颊，低头也抚摸了婴儿——皮亚里。“谢谢……非常感谢。”
|[piyari.name]？真美……”阿塔尼开心地微笑着，亲吻你的脸颊，尽可能地依偎在你怀里，随后轻抚婴儿—— [piyari.name].
        ]
        
        你的母马女儿， [piyari.name]她终有一天会成为酋长吗？”你最终问道，仍沉浸在这一刻。

“如果她想的话。”阿塔尼微笑着。“统领众人的喜乐并非能随意强加于人，无论是否继承。我……嘛，因为母亲的情况，我别无选择，但你在救了她之后，我意识到自己仍想留在这个位置。”

希望如此。 [piyari.name] 不用经历同样的事……”

“是啊……不过如果我真的被邪恶的化学药剂灌满，变成一团混乱的性爱场面，你一定会陪我，对吧？”

你咧嘴一笑，轻轻弹跳 [piyari.name] 在你的臂弯中。"也许。"

阿塔尼抽动鼻子，轻轻拍了下你的肩膀，又重新依偎进你怀里。"希望你常常回来和我们的孩子一起玩耍……当然还有我。"

"当然！

rows.original: Go fish at a nearby pond with [piyari.name] in your lap.
rows.translation: 去附近的池塘钓鱼吧，带上……一起吧。 [piyari.name] 就在你的怀里。
rows.raw: "Go fish at a nearby pond with [piyari.name] in your lap."

rows.translation: 去碰碰那头自大的家伙的鼻子吧。

rows.original: Give Atani's milkers a break with your own.
rows.translation: 别用自己的问题去为难阿塔尼的挤奶女工们了。
rows.raw: "Give Atani's milkers a break with your own."

rows.original: You may have nipples, but you can't milk those.
rows.translation: 你可能长有乳头，但你可没法挤奶啊。
rows.raw: "You may have nipples, but you can't milk those."

rows.original: Give Ahmri and Atani a chance to relax together while you watch [aster.name] and [piyari.name].
rows.translation: 你可以在一旁观看，让阿姆里和阿塔尼有机会一起放松一下。 [aster.name] 以及 [piyari.name].
rows.raw: "Give Ahmri and Atani a chance to relax together while you watch [aster.name] and [piyari.name]."

rows.original: There are plenty of things in Atani's tent you could use to relax, but your eye is drawn to a rudimentary fishing pole, with a tiny ceramic pot of bait. You aren't more than half a minute from a pond to fish in, and so with [piyari.name] held up on your hip, you grab the kit, and make for the pond. "I..." Atani yawns and stretches as you leave, "am going to take this opportunity to catch a nap. Have fun my precious dears." [piyari.name] babbles and bounces against the side of you, 'waving' at Atani with clenches of her little hands. It's a peaceful [dayNight |day, and it puts a little spring in your step that makes [piyari.name] giggle |night, though you make sure to bring a lantern and wrap your daughter up in a comfy blanket ]. There's plenty of space for you to sit down by the pond, although you spot the coming-and-going of the occasional mare. Only a few of them pay you any mind, and even then it's only to give you a smile and a wave before going about their days. The water of the pond looks peaceful enough, until you see just how many fish swim beneath the surface— not large, by any means, but plentiful enough to make a sport of catching. You settle [piyari.name] into your lap, crossing your legs and making sure there's no risk of the little [silly |honslet |marelet ] taking a tumble. She giggles and taps her hooves together, watching with wide-eyed curiosity as you bait your rod, and give it a gentle whip out into the pond. The silence is only interrupted by the gentle popping of colorful fish on the top-water, chasing your little bait hook around until [piyari.name] is squealing and giggling. Occasionally her hands grip your fingers, which... makes reeling the fish in a little difficult with the rudimentary bronze spool, but you appreciate the thought that she's trying to help, or interact somehow. "You're a bright girl," you mutter, leaning down to give the mare a kiss on the head. She giggles and pats your cheeks, before gasping in wide-eyed wonderment as you finally get a proper bite. "Ah-hah!" You reel back slowly and carefully; partly out of caution, and partly to avoid spooking your daughter. The little pondfish doesn't make for a particularly epic battle, but you play the moment up once your daughter appears comfortable with the commotion. Soon the giddy little mare is clapping and squeezing your arm, attempting to reach for the reel until you're in a battle to avoid bopping her on the noggin. Once you finally bring in a fish, the fuss dies down. It's an interesting moment, watching your little pony come to terms with the noise, color, and movement so abruptly come to an end. She lets out a squeal that you decide is a cheer of success, and you set her carefully aside so that you can unhook your prize catch. Just a cute little red-bellied thing; you pop the hook out of its lip, let it scarf the worm the rest of the way down, and let it slip into the water again. You still manage to get splashed despite your caution, but that only makes [piyari.name] giggle more. It's fun, hamming the moment up for her, pretending to be drenched by the little splash, but you can see the excitement's beginning to wear her out. After wiping your hands clean, you scoop her up once more, relieved when she flops entirely into your [pc.chest] and yawns with a cute little squeak. Looks like playtime's over for now. It takes a few minutes for the feeling to return to your crossed legs, but you manage to balance the fishing kit under one arm, and hold your daughter to your chest with the other before making your way back. As before, you catch a few eyes, but their only acknowledgement is with warm smiles and waves. There's happy neigh-ing leading up to Atani's tent, so you're quiet when you slip in; it's just enough to catch her in the process of brushing out her long, golden hair. A happy squeak out of your daughter soon draws the mare-mom's attention, and she spins around with a bashful smile. "Ah! Sorry I was just pampering for a little. Did you two have fun?" Atani accepts [piyari.name] with a satisfied little grin, and the babe immediately latches onto one of her tits. "I'll take that as a yes; she worked up an appetite at least." "It was nice," you nod, watching the blissful baby and her satisfied mother. "I should get going now, though." Atani clears her throat, looking at you expectantly. Once she gets her kiss, the mother looks mollified, fondly rubbing her snoot into you. "Much better. Stay safe out there, and come back soon; okay love?" "Of course."
rows.translation: 在阿塔尼的帐篷里，有很多东西可以用来放松休息，但你的目光却被一根简陋的钓鱼竿和一个小陶罐里的鱼饵吸引住了。其实，距离那里的池塘只有不到半分钟的路程，所以…… [piyari.name] 把它夹在腰间，你拿起工具包，朝着池塘方向走去。 “我……”当你离开时，阿塔尼打着哈欠伸了个懒腰，“打算趁这个机会小睡一会儿。你们玩得开心点，我亲爱的孩子们。 [piyari.name] 它咿咿呀呀地叫着，蹦蹦跳跳地撞在你的身上，用它的小手紧紧地“挥动”，仿佛在向阿塔尼示意。 真是太安静了…… [dayNight |每天都是这样，这种感觉会让你走路的步伐都变得轻快起来，真的会让人感到愉悦。 [piyari.name] 轻声笑 |晚上出门时，一定要带上灯笼，还要用一条舒适的毯子把你的女儿裹好。 ]池塘边有足够的空间让你坐下休息，不过偶尔也能看到一些母马来来去去。 只有少数几匹马会注意到你，而且它们也只是对你微笑、挥了挥手，然后继续过自己的日子。池塘的水看起来很平静，直到你发现水面下其实有那么多鱼在游动——这些鱼虽然并不大，但数量足够多，甚至可以让人把捉鱼当作一种娱乐活动。 你找了个地方坐下来…… [piyari.name] 把它放在你的腿上，双腿交叉坐着，确保这个小东西不会有任何掉落的风险。 [silly |honslet |马雷莱特 ] 她摔了个跟头，咯咯笑着，用蹄子轻敲地面，睁大眼睛充满好奇地看着你将鱼饵挂在鱼钩上，然后轻轻一甩，鱼钩便落入池塘中。 只有那些色彩斑斓的鱼儿在水面上轻轻跃动，追逐着你的小鱼饵钩，才会打破这份宁静…… [piyari.name] 她不停地尖叫着、咯咯笑着，偶尔还会握住你的手指……这让用那个简陋的青铜线轴把鱼拉上来变得有点困难，但你能感受到她是在试图帮忙，或是想以某种方式与你互动。 你真是个聪明的女孩，”你轻声说道，然后俯下身去，在那匹母马的头上亲了一下。它咯咯地笑了起来，用爪子轻拍你的脸颊，而当你终于让它真正咬了一口时，它更是瞪大了眼睛，充满了惊奇。 “啊哈！”你小心翼翼地后退着，一方面是出于安全考虑，另一方面也是为了避免吓到你的女儿。 这种小池塘鱼虽然并不能引发什么激烈的战斗，但当你的女儿开始适应这种热闹场面时，你就可以好好享受这个游戏过程了。很快，那匹兴奋的小马就会拍手、拉你的胳膊，试图够到卷线器，而你就得努力避免碰到它的脑袋。 一旦你终于抓到一条鱼，周围的喧闹声就会立刻消失。那一刻非常有趣——你可以看到你的小马儿慢慢适应那些突然消失的噪音、色彩和动静。它会发出一声尖叫，而你认为那声尖叫就是胜利的欢呼。然后你会小心翼翼地把它放到一边，以便把抓到的鱼从钩子上取下来。 只需要一只可爱的小红腹小生物而已：把钩子伸进它的嘴里，让它把虫子整个吞下去，然后再把它放回水中。 仍然 尽管你很小心，还是不可避免地被溅到了水里，但这也只能说明…… [piyari.name] 再笑一会儿吧。这样很有趣，为她营造这种欢乐的氛围，假装被那些水花溅湿了，不过你可以看出，她的兴奋情绪已经开始让她感到疲惫了。 把手擦干净后，你再次把她抱起来，看到她整个人靠在你身上时，你感到如释重负。 [pc.chest] 然后它发出一声可爱的吱吱声，打了个哈欠。看来，现在玩耍的时间结束了。 过了几分钟，你交叉的双腿才恢复了感觉，但你还是设法用一只手臂托着钓鱼工具包，另一只手臂把女儿抱在怀里，然后开始往回走。 像往常一样，你的出现吸引了一些人的注意，但他们唯一的反应就是向你投来温暖的微笑并挥了挥手。 在走到阿塔尼的帐篷附近时，你听到了马儿欢快的嘶鸣声，因此你悄悄地走了进去——正好看到她正在梳理自己那头金色的长发。 你的女儿开心地尖叫起来，立刻吸引了这位充满母爱的女性的注意。她转过身来，脸上带着害羞的微笑说道：“啊！对不起，我刚才只是在宠爱她一会儿而已。你们两个玩得开心吗？” 阿塔尼点了点头，表示同意。 [piyari.name] 她露出满足的微笑，婴儿立刻紧紧地吸住了她的乳头。“我就当这是同意了；至少她现在饿了吧。” “真是太美好了，”你一边说，一边注视着那对幸福的一母子。“不过，我该走了。” 阿塔尼清了清嗓子，期待地看着你。 得到你的吻后，这位母亲看起来满意极了，还亲昵地用鼻子蹭了你蹭。“好多了。在外面注意安全，早点回来哦，好吗，亲爱的？” “当然。
rows.raw: " There are plenty of things in Atani's tent you could use to relax, but your eye is drawn to a rudimentary fishing pole, with a tiny ceramic pot of bait. You aren't more than half a minute from a pond to fish in, and so with [piyari.name] held up on your hip, you grab the kit, and make for the pond. "I..." Atani yawns and stretches as you leave, "am going to take this opportunity to catch a nap. Have fun my precious dears." [piyari.name] babbles and bounces against the side of you, 'waving' at Atani with clenches of her little hands. It's a peaceful [dayNight |day, and it puts a little spring in your step that makes [piyari.name] giggle |night, though you make sure to bring a lantern and wrap your daughter up in a comfy blanket ]. There's plenty of space for you to sit down by the pond, although you spot the coming-and-going of the occasional mare. Only a few of them pay you any mind, and even then it's only to give you a smile and a wave before going about their days. The water of the pond looks peaceful enough, until you see just how many fish swim beneath the surface— not large, by any means, but plentiful enough to make a sport of catching. You settle [piyari.name] into your lap, crossing your legs and making sure there's no risk of the little [silly |honslet |marelet ] taking a tumble. She giggles and taps her hooves together, watching with wide-eyed curiosity as you bait your rod, and give it a gentle whip out into the pond. The silence is only interrupted by the gentle popping of colorful fish on the top-water, chasing your little bait hook around until [piyari.name] is squealing and giggling. Occasionally her hands grip your fingers, which... makes reeling the fish in a little difficult with the rudimentary bronze spool, but you appreciate the thought that she's trying to help, or interact somehow. "You're a bright girl," you mutter, leaning down to give the mare a kiss on the head. She giggles and pats your cheeks, before gasping in wide-eyed wonderment as you finally get a proper bite. "Ah-hah!" You reel back slowly and carefully; partly out of caution, and partly to avoid spooking your daughter. The little pondfish doesn't make for a particularly epic battle, but you play the moment up once your daughter appears comfortable with the commotion. Soon the giddy little mare is clapping and squeezing your arm, attempting to reach for the reel until you're in a battle to avoid bopping her on the noggin. Once you finally bring in a fish, the fuss dies down. It's an interesting moment, watching your little pony come to terms with the noise, color, and movement so abruptly come to an end. She lets out a squeal that you decide is a cheer of success, and you set her carefully aside so that you can unhook your prize catch. Just a cute little red-bellied thing; you pop the hook out of its lip, let it scarf the worm the rest of the way down, and let it slip into the water again. You still manage to get splashed despite your caution, but that only makes [piyari.name] giggle more. It's fun, hamming the moment up for her, pretending to be drenched by the little splash, but you can see the excitement's beginning to wear her out. After wiping your hands clean, you scoop her up once more, relieved when she flops entirely into your [pc.chest] and yawns with a cute little squeak. Looks like playtime's over for now. It takes a few minutes for the feeling to return to your crossed legs, but you manage to balance the fishing kit under one arm, and hold your daughter to your chest with the other before making your way back. As before, you catch a few eyes, but their only acknowledgement is with warm smiles and waves. There's happy neigh-ing leading up to Atani's tent, so you're quiet when you slip in; it's just enough to catch her in the process of brushing out her long, golden hair. A happy squeak out of your daughter soon draws the mare-mom's attention, and she spins around with a bashful smile. "Ah! Sorry I was just pampering for a little. Did you two have fun?" Atani accepts [piyari.name] with a satisfied little grin, and the babe immediately latches onto one of her tits. "I'll take that as a yes; she worked up an appetite at least." "It was nice," you nod, watching the blissful baby and her satisfied mother. "I should get going now, though." Atani clears her throat, looking at you expectantly. Once she gets her kiss, the mother looks mollified, fondly rubbing her snoot into you. "Much better. Stay safe out there, and come back soon; okay love?" "Of course." "

rows.original:
"Ah, I know..." you tickle your little honslet on the tummy and do a little wander around Atani's tent, plucking out toys and laying them out on the big rug at the room's center. Your mare partner watches with a smile once you have everything laid out, and joins you on the rugs. "Oh this is just precious," she sighs. "[pc.mf
        |Fatherhood
        |Motherhood
    ] looks so good on you, [atani.married
        |love
        |[pc.name]
    ]." Her tail swishes a few times, kicking up the familiar scent of her pheromones.
    
    It looks very good on you, you suppose. Thankfully both of you are more intent on parenting, and [piyari.name]'s happy giggles are a balm to any other needs. Her little hands pat together a few times, hoofies clicking together as she watches you set out a collection of colors and wooden shapes. You boop [piyari.name]'s cute little snoot, and she hugs your finger tightly, with that surprising mare strength. 
    
    Atani breathes a delighted sigh and snuggles up with you, sharing in the playtime. "Aw... I love you, [piyari.name], my beautiful baby." 
    
    She's a bright girl, grabbing shapes when offered them, and patting them against what she perceived as their home. Her motor skills weren't there, yet, but she tried her best. The two of you helped her out, gently holding her hands and guiding the shapes the rest of the way there. Every time she succeed, the two of you reward the mare-baby with tickles, and little boops on the [silly
        |snoot
        |nose
    ] that make her shriek with delight and wiggle her tiny horsey tail. 
    
    "You are the brightest baby, aren't you?" Atani's voice is a mixture of pride and wonderment, visibly giddy every time you get a cheerful reaction out of your daughter.
    
    The two of you keep this up for a full hour, before finally the little horse-marelet loses her steam. The giggles are interrupted more frequently with little yawns, and hungry grumbles. Atani smiles and gently scoops her up, and you go about cleaning up the tent space for [atani.married
        |your wife
        |the mare-mom
    ] hurriedly. Atani feeds [piyari.name] first, making sure she's well-fed before sleep claims her entirely. "She is the biggest drinker after playtime, she's going to be such a strong girl, and break all the boys and girls' hearts one day."
    
    It'll take a while for the duo to be finished, so you give both of them a kiss, swat Atani on the ass — and receive a returning swat back from her tail — and see yourself out.
rows.translation:
啊，我知道……”你轻轻挠了挠小霍恩莱特的肚子，然后在阿塔尼的帐篷里转了一圈，把那些玩具拿出来，摆放在房间中央的大地毯上。当你把所有玩具都摆放好后，你的母马伙伴微笑着看着你，然后也走过来坐在地毯上。“哦，这些真是太珍贵了……”她轻声说道。[pc.mf
        |父亲的身份与责任
        |母性
    ] 你穿上它看起来真漂亮。 [atani.married
        |爱
        |[pc.name]
    ]她的尾巴摆动了几下，释放出那种熟悉的费洛蒙气味。

你穿这件衣服看起来真的很漂亮。幸运的是，你们俩现在更关注的是养育孩子的事情。 [piyari.name]她那欢快的笑声总能缓解一切烦恼。她的小手轻轻拍打着，脚趾也跟着一起动来动去，一边看着你将各种颜色和木制形状摆放在面前，一边开心地笑着。你轻轻一碰…… [piyari.name]它那可爱的小鼻子，还会用那出人意料的力气紧紧地抓住你的手指。

阿塔尼开心地叹了口气，然后依偎在你身边，一起享受这段游戏时光。“哎呀……我爱你。 [piyari.name]我美丽的宝贝。”

她是个聪明的女孩，每当有人把那些形状物递给她时，她都会立刻抓住它们，并把它们轻轻放在她认为应该是它们“家”的地方。虽然她的动作技巧还不够娴熟，但她已经尽了最大努力。你们俩一直在帮助她，轻轻地握住她的手，引导她把那些形状物放到正确的位置。每次她成功完成这个动作，你们就会轻轻地挠她痒痒，或者轻轻拍拍她的头作为奖励。 [silly
        |傲慢的态度
        |鼻子
    ] 这些举动让她开心得尖叫起来，还扭动着她那小小的马尾。

“你真是最聪明的宝宝，对吧？”阿塔尼的语气中充满了骄傲和惊叹，每次看到女儿做出这样的开心反应，她都会显得格外兴奋。
    
    你们俩这样持续了整整一个小时，最后那匹小马驹终于失去了兴致。它的笑声渐渐被阵阵哈欠和饥饿的咕哝声所取代。阿塔尼微笑着轻轻把它抱起来，而你则开始收拾帐篷里的东西。 [atani.married
        |你的妻子
        |那个像母马一样强势的女人
    ] 匆忙地，阿塔尼开始进食。 [piyari.name] 首先，要确保她在睡觉前吃饱了，这样她才能安心入睡。“她可是玩耍过后最爱喝水的小家伙，将来一定会变得非常强壮，有朝一日一定会让所有男孩和女孩都为之倾心。”

这两个人需要一些时间才能吃完饭，所以你亲了他们两人一下，然后轻轻拍了一下阿塔尼的屁股——结果她竟然用尾巴回击了你一下——之后你就离开吧。

    ] that make her shriek with delight and wiggle her tiny horsey tail.

rows.original:
"You know, I'm plenty full..." you sink your fingers into your chest, and it takes only a moment to have your nipples plumping up and beading with milk.
    
    "Is that for me, or for [piyari.name]?" the mare grins, horse-tail swishing around. In response to her name, there's a little squeal-whinny, and some babbling coming from the baby's crib. "Guess I'll just have to get all big and milky while you feed her."
    
    Sounds like a win-win to you. [piyari.name]'s still giggling when you scoop her up into your arms and snuggle into the pillows beside Atani, while the mare in question goes back to reading a book about horticulture. Or she's just enjoying pretty pictures of flowers; who are you to judge?
    
    As [piyari.name] latches onto you and gets comfortable, you feel the soothing flow of milk — after some wincing. Atani glances up from her book at you and whickers softly, "She is such a big strong baby." 
    
    She is! Though once the milk flows, your daughter relaxes a little. You gently stroke the tuft of her hair, delighting in that satisfying motherhood-y feeling. The marebab's little hoofies twitch, and you can feel her tail wiggling against your arm like a puppy might wag. 
    
    It takes a long moment to realize that Atani's stopped reading, instead giving you a doe-eyed look as you feed her daughter. The mare gives you a sunshine smile and leans in to share a kiss with you, before gently tickling her tummy. "Motherhood looks good on you..."
    
    "So you say," you kiss her back with a smile.
    
    Atani giggles, watching as you finish up with [piyari.name], accepting her from your arms in order to burp her once the marelet's had her fill. "I appreciate it, and [piyari.name] does too." There's more happy burbling from your daughter before she burps, and, unbidden you find grins on both of your faces. "Well, I shall see this one back to her bed. And... thank you, we always love seeing you here." 
    
    You keep your [atani.married
        |wife
        |partner
    ] and daughter company for as long as it takes the baby to fall asleep, before she gives you a kiss — and a hug into her tits that nearly smothers you — before letting you return to your various duties.
rows.translation:
你知道吗，我已经吃得很饱了……”你将手指按在胸口，不一会儿，你的乳头便开始凸起，乳汁也开始分泌出来。

“这是给我吃的，还是给…… [piyari.name]嗯？”母马咧嘴笑了，马尾在身后甩来甩去。听到自己的名字后，婴儿的马槽里传来一阵轻微的叫声和咿呀声。“看来在我喂它的时候，我就得变得壮实一些、产更多的奶吧。”

对你来说，这似乎是个双赢的局面啊。 [piyari.name]当你把她抱在怀里，依偎在阿塔尼旁边的枕头上时，她依然会在一旁咯咯笑；而那匹母马则继续翻阅关于园艺的书籍。或者，她只是喜欢那些漂亮的花朵图片罢了——你又有资格去评判她呢？ [piyari.name] 它紧紧依附在你身上，让你感到无比舒适；在经历了一开始的些许不适之后，你终于感受到了那舒缓的乳汁流动。阿塔尼从书本上抬起头，轻声说道：“她真是个又大又强壮的宝宝呢。”

确实如此！不过一旦乳汁开始流动，你的女儿也会放松下来一些。 你轻轻抚摸着她那一簇头发，那种作为母亲的满足感令你感到无比愉悦。小马驹的小蹄子微微抽动，你能感觉到它的尾巴像小狗一样在你的手臂上晃来晃去。

过了好一会儿，你才意识到阿塔尼已经停止了阅读，而是用那双充满好奇的眼睛注视着你正在喂养她的女儿。 那匹母马向你露出了灿烂的笑容，然后凑过来与你亲吻，随后你轻轻挠了挠它的肚子。“当母亲真的很适合你……”

“是吗？”你微笑着回吻了她。

阿塔尼咯咯地笑着，看着你完成这个动作。 [piyari.name]把她从你怀里接过来，等小马吃饱后帮它拍嗝。“我很感激，真的。 [piyari.name] 也是呢。”在你的女儿打嗝之前，她又开心地咯咯笑了起来，不知不觉间，你们俩的脸上都浮现出了笑容。“好吧，我得把她送回床上去了。还有……谢谢，我们总是很高兴在这里见到你。”

你继续保持着…… [atani.married
        |妻子
        |合作伙伴
    ] 还有她的子公司，会一直陪伴着你，直到宝宝睡着为止。之后，她才会亲你一下，还会把你紧紧抱在怀里，几乎要把你闷住，之后才会让你回去继续履行你的各项职责。
rows.raw:
'
    "You know, I'm plenty full..." you sink your fingers into your chest, and it takes only a moment to have your nipples plumping up and beading with milk.
    
    "Is that for me, or for [piyari.name]?" the mare grins, horse-tail swishing around. In response to her name, there's a little squeal-whinny, and some babbling coming from the baby's crib. "Guess I'll just have to get all big and milky while you feed her."
    
    Sounds like a win-win to you. [piyari.name]'s still giggling when you scoop her up into your arms and snuggle into the pillows beside Atani, while the mare in question goes back to reading a book about horticulture. Or she's just enjoying pretty pictures of flowers; who are you to judge?
    
    As [piyari.name] latches onto you and gets comfortable, you feel the soothing flow of milk — after some wincing. Atani glances up from her book at you and whickers softly, "She is such a big strong baby." 
    
    She is! Though once the milk flows, your daughter relaxes a little. You gently stroke the tuft of her hair, delighting in that satisfying motherhood-y feeling. The marebab's little hoofies twitch, and you can feel her tail wiggling against your arm like a puppy might wag. 
    
    It takes a long moment to realize that Atani's stopped reading, instead giving you a doe-eyed look as you feed her daughter. The mare gives you a sunshine smile and leans in to share a kiss with you, before gently tickling her tummy. "Motherhood looks good on you..."
    
    "So you say," you kiss her back with a smile.
    
    Atani giggles, watching as you finish up with [piyari.name], accepting her from your arms in order to burp her once the marelet's had her fill. "I appreciate it, and [piyari.name] does too." There's more happy burbling from your daughter before she burps, and, unbidden you find grins on both of your faces. "Well, I shall see this one back to her bed. And... thank you, we always love seeing you here." 
    
    You keep your [atani.married
        |wife
        |partner
    ] and daughter company for as long as it takes the baby to fall asleep, before she gives you a kiss — and a hug into her tits that nearly smothers you — before letting you return to your various duties.
    '

rows.original:
It'll take a few minutes to arrange, but you have the perfect idea. "How about we bring Ahmri and [aster.name]? [pc.isBimbo
        |I get to snuggle the [silly
            |preshus
            |precious
        ] babbus
        |I'll keep the kids entertained
    ], and you get a chance to kick your hooves up."
    
    Atani's eyes light up, equine tail swishing. "I would love a chance to sip tea and talk books with her again, we don't see nearly enough of each other with the kids." She opens her arms towards you from the pillows, and you lower yourself down into the hug— which earns you a faceful of tit as usual. "I'll go get some tea ready, if you would like to pick a nice field spot for us all to meet you at." 
    
    The mare chieftess is positively giddy[silly
        |-up
    ] with excitement, and you head out to fetch your other equine half.
rows.translation:
需要几分钟来安排这些事情，但你的想法确实很棒。“我们把Ahmri也带上吧…… [aster.name]? [pc.isBimbo
        |我可以依偎在……身边。 [silly
            |preshus
            |珍贵的
        ] 巴布斯
        |我会让孩子们有事情可做，让他们保持娱乐状态。
    ]这样你就可以好好放松一下了。”

阿塔尼的眼睛亮了起来，马尾也欢快地摆动着：“我真的很想再有机会和她一起品茶、聊书，有孩子们在身边，我们见面的机会实在太少了。”她从枕头上伸开双臂，你便走了过去拥抱她——就像往常一样，你的脸上立刻被她的马尾蹭得满是马毛。“我去准备些茶，你可以帮我们选一个合适的地点，让我们都在那里等你吧。”

这位马族女首领简直高兴得不得了。[silly
        |-up
    ] 满怀兴奋，你立刻出发去寻找你的另一位马伙伴。

rows.original: You roll out the weighty blanket you've lugged along, before sprawling across it and waiting. It's not a long wait; both girls prove impatient to spend some time with both yourself, and one-another. Atani arrives first, with a copper pot of tea wrapped in a cozie, a basket of what you assume to be treats, and your daughter cradled in a sling. As though sensing her nearness to you, the mare baby giggles and babbles to herself, blowing little raspberries before she's delivered to your waiting lap. And then you get to watch her eyes open, and she reaches out to grab and squeeze your finger. Which you allow her to do, immediately, reveling in the strength your tiny daughter carries. When you're about to speak to Atani, you look up and see that she's put a hand to her brow, glancing out past the sun at the bright sunshine that is your taur-partner Ahmri. The milfy centaur takes her time with the approach, holding hands with [aster.name], who's shakily making the ascent onto the hill. It's a lot like watching twin sunrises get closer, the way their bright mops capture the daylight. Once he's close enough to have confidence back under his hooves, [aster.name] charges at you, attempting to barrel into you for a hug— right before he sees [piyari.name] has your hands occupied. Thankfully all of the combat you've faced in your time has you at least a little prepared for an abrupt multi-tasking, and you swap [piyari.name] off onto your shoulder, shield her with one arm, and catch your son in the crook of the other so that he can tumble into your recently-vacated lap. It takes a few moments for everything to register with poor [aster.name], and the toddler-taur looks torn between bashfulness at nearly bumping his sister-in-law, and excitement at being trapped in your lap. "Be careful," you chide, tickling his taur-tummy and waiting for him to squeal and scramble up again. "[pc.mf |Da! |Ma! ]" comes the equivalent of an apology, and he sucks his fingers before you reach out to rub his head. "You sure know how to spook your [pc.mf |mom and dad |moms ], don't you?" Atani grins, placing down her picnic basket and teapot, before opening her arms wide to give Ahmri a great big hug. The two giggle and stomp together a few times, before their own excited chatter speeds up. Ahmri gasps, before cantering over and giving you a great big blushing kiss. "Heh, sorry, I didn't forget about you love." Her excitement is infectious, and you're soon grinning and playing with the kids while they pick their spot on the blanket together. They make for a perfect sight; Ahmri lying down with all fours tucked, Atani leant up against her, both sipping tea with a book open between them. It's surprising the number of topics the duo have access to. You look down at the kids and smile, scruffling them both. "I guess that just leaves us, huh?" [aster.name] looks afraid to spook poor [piyari.name], stroking her hair so gingerly it might be as though the marelet might break. This won't do; he's clearly excited to be friends with his sister-in-law. Instead you help him get comfortable and accustomed, pulling out toys and sitting [piyari.name] between the two of you on the blanket. It doesn't take long after that; when it turns out that [aster.name] is capable of making the baby giggle and squeal by something as simple as jingling a couple of shiny bells or waving flowers around. Once he's happy, [aster.name] himself becomes a bouncing ball of sunshine, galloping in circles repeatedly flopping down into your lap, before protectively holding [piyari.name] against his horse-tummy. What an absolute heart-melter. The duo's seemingly-inexhaustible energy becomes abruptly... exhausted, flopping and sprawling out on both you, the blanket, and on eachother. Atani climbs to her hooves and saunters over, handing you a teacup and just about turning into a puddle of motherhood at seeing you with the cheery children. She hands you a cup of tea while Ahmri giggles and gives you softy-eyes too. "We'll finish up soon, if you can help us finish these. Then we need to get the kids home and tucked into bed for their naps." The tea has begun to cool by now, but it's rich, floral, and a little bit sweet... you didn't realize how thirsty you'd gotten playing with the kids, nor the ache in your cheeks from smiling so hard. Once everyone has finished their drinks and snacks, the girls trap you in a hug from both sides, practically smothering you between their combined hefty, milky tits until you need to tap out to catch your breath. "Thanks again for this, I had a wonderful time!" Ahmri smiles, holding a sleepy [aster.name]'s hand. She looks down at the minitaur and smiles, giving his hand a squeeze. "Did you have fun sweetie?" "Ma!" [aster.name] proudly announces, before giggling when it makes [piyari.name] burble and babble. "And it was nice to see you too," Ahmri continues, giving [piyari.name] a little nuzzle, nose-to-snoot. She gets a pat on the cheek from your mare-daughter, before giving you a slow kiss. "Love you!" "Love you too," you smile. Atani joins you, gathering up the empty picnic goodies while [piyari.name] is cuddled in your arms for the walk back to the mare village. "This was so nice, thank you." Atani blushes through her golden fur. The walk back is a short one, but a comfortable one, with the fingers of your free hands threaded together fondly. By the time you're back, [piyari.name] doesn't even stir when she's delivered to her cot. "You'll come back soon, right?" Atani asks before giving you a slow, tender kiss. [silly |Sure, you're only leaving for smokes. ]
rows.translation: 你铺开那条自己一直带着的厚重毯子，然后躺了上去等待。等待并没有持续太久——两个女孩都迫不及待地想要和你单独相处，同时也想和彼此在一起。阿塔尼先到了，她带来了一壶用布包好的铜茶壶，还有一篮子你猜想应该是些点心，而你的女儿则被放在背带里带着。 仿佛感应到了你就在身边，这只小母马宝宝咯咯地笑着，自言自语着，还发出轻轻的“嘶嘶”声，然后就被送到了你等待着的怀中。接下来，你就可以看着它的眼睛慢慢睁开，它还会伸出小手来抓住并捏你的手指。 你允许她这样做，立刻感受到了你那小小的女儿所拥有的力量。当你正准备与阿塔尼交谈时，你抬头一看，发现她正用手捂住额头，透过阳光望去，那里正站着你的金牛座伴侣——阿姆里，他正沐浴在灿烂的阳光下。 这个成熟迷人的半人马在靠近她的过程中十分从容，还牵着她的手。 [aster.name]那个人正摇摇晃晃地往山上爬去。这一幕很像在看着两场日出逐渐靠近，它们那明亮的光芒正在吞噬着整个世界。等到他爬得足够高，重新获得了稳定的立足点时…… [aster.name] 它朝你冲过来，试图猛地扑过来拥抱你——就在它看到你的那一瞬间。 [piyari.name] 手头的事情太多了，无暇他顾。 不过幸运的是，你迄今为止遇到的所有战斗任务，至少都让你有足够的时间来处理它们。 小的 你已经为突然需要进行多任务处理做好了准备，于是开始同时处理多项任务。 [piyari.name] 你用一只手臂护住她，另一只手臂则接住你的儿子，让他能够落入你刚刚腾出的怀中。对于这个可怜的孩子来说，需要一些时间才能完全理解发生了什么。 [aster.name]那个年幼的小孩看起来既因为差点撞到嫂子而感到害羞，又因为被困在你的腿上而感到兴奋，简直不知该怎么做才好。“小心点，”你一边说，一边挠他的小肚子，等着他发出尖叫然后又爬起来。[pc.mf |好！ |妈！ ]这简直就像是在道歉一样，而在你伸手去揉他的头之前，他还会先吮吸自己的手指。 “你确实很会惹恼别人啊…… [pc.mf |爸爸妈妈 |妈妈们 ]不是吗？”阿塔尼微笑着，放下野餐篮和茶壶，然后张开双臂给了阿姆里一个热情的拥抱。两人一起咯咯笑着，蹦跳了几下，随后他们兴奋的谈话声也越来越快。 阿姆里喘着气跑过来，然后脸红着给了你一个深深的吻。“嘿嘿，对不起，我可没忘记你哦，亲爱的。” 她的兴奋情绪具有感染力，不久之后，你也跟着笑了起来，和孩子们一起玩耍，他们一起在毯子上找好位置坐下。 他们组成的画面真是太完美了：阿姆里四肢蜷缩地躺着，阿塔尼靠在她身旁，两人一边喝茶，一边翻着同一本书。令人惊讶的是，这对搭档竟然有这么多话题可以讨论。 你低头看着这两个孩子，忍不住笑了起来，然后轻轻揉了揉他们的脑袋。 看来就只剩下我们了，嗯？ [aster.name] 看起来很害怕吓到那些可怜的动物。 [piyari.name]他极其轻柔地抚摸着她的头发，生怕那细软的头发会因此而断裂。这样不行——他显然非常高兴能和嫂子成为朋友。你应该帮他放松下来，让他逐渐适应这种新环境，比如拿出一些玩具，然后坐下来…… [piyari.name] 就你们两个在毯子上一起…… 没过多久，当结果揭晓的时候…… [aster.name] 仅仅通过摇动几枚闪亮的铃铛或挥动花朵这样简单的方法，就足以让婴儿发出咯咯的笑声和欢呼声。只要他开心了，…… [aster.name] 他自己就像一个充满活力的小太阳，不停地绕圈奔跑，然后扑通一声落在你的怀里，接着还会保护性地抱住你。 [piyari.name] 站在鼓起的肚子前…… 真是让人心里暖洋洋的场面啊。 这对搭档看似无穷无尽的活力，突然之间就……耗尽了，他们瘫软在地，倒在了毯子上，也倒在了彼此身上。 阿塔尼站起身来，大步走过来，递给你一杯茶。看到你和那些活泼可爱的孩子们在一起，她简直要融化为母性般的温暖了。她把茶递给你，而艾姆里则咯咯笑着，也用那双充满柔情的眼睛看着你。 我们很快就能忙完，如果你能帮我们把这些事情完成的话。之后我们就得送孩子们回家，让他们上床小睡一会儿。” 此刻茶已经稍微凉了一些，但它依然香气浓郁，带有花香的气息，而且还带有一丝甜味。…你根本没意识到，和孩子们一起玩耍后自己会变得如此口渴，也没注意到自己因为笑得太厉害而让脸颊感到疼痛。 当大家都喝完饮料、吃完零食后，那些女孩从两边抱住你，她们那丰满、乳白色的胸部几乎要把你挤得喘不过气来，直到你不得不拍拍手来让自己恢复呼吸。 再次感谢，我玩得非常开心！”阿姆里微笑着说道，手中还拿着一只困倦的小动物。 [aster.name]她握住了他的手，低头看着那个半人半牛的生物，微笑着轻轻捏了捏他的手：“玩得开心吗，亲爱的？” “妈妈！ [aster.name] 自豪地宣布——然后在发出咯咯笑声的同时说…… [piyari.name] 见到你也很高兴，”阿姆里继续说道。 [piyari.name] 她们轻轻碰了碰鼻子，鼻尖对鼻尖。你的继女轻拍了一下她的脸颊，然后缓缓吻了你一下：“爱你！” “我也爱你，”你微笑着说。 这时，阿塔尼走了过来，开始收拾那些空掉的野餐用品…… [piyari.name] 在返回母马村庄的路上，它依偎在你的怀里。“真是太美好了，谢谢你。”阿塔尼的金色皮毛下泛起了红晕。这段归途虽然不长，但却十分惬意，你空闲的双手紧紧地牵在一起。等到你们回到村子的时候…… [piyari.name] 即使被放到小床上，她也不会有任何反应。“你很快就会回来吧？”阿塔尼在轻轻吻了你一下之后问道。 [silly |当然，你出去只是去抽烟而已。 ]

rows.original:
A narrow, hoof-beaten path stretches down into a slight depression near the lake. At a glance, it would seem as if the path were chosen at random, with any part of the hill available for walking. On closer inspection it becomes apparent that the tall grass and flowering beds to each side hide jagged stones and loose earth that would be hell to maneuver. 

    The village of the marefolk people is easily visible, even from the top of the hill that obscures it from the valley proper. Sturdy tents frame a number of ancient Belharan scoutposts. The spattering of abandoned buildings have been fully appropriated by the marefolk, each sporting colorful hanging clothes and draperies that almost wholly disguise the decrepit stone. Some larger tents stand aside from the rest, forming a loose border for the village at large.
rows.translation:
一条狭窄的小路蜿蜒延伸，最终在湖边的一处低洼地带终止。乍一看，这条小路似乎是随意选择的——山上的任何地方都可能被用来行走。但仔细观察就会发现，路两侧的高草和花坛其实掩盖了那些锋利的石头和松软的泥土，要想在这些地方行走，确实会遇到很大的困难。 

    即使是从那座将村庄遮挡在山谷之外的小山上，也能轻易看到那些马人居住的村落。坚固的帐篷环绕着几座古老的贝尔哈兰侦察站，而那些零星分布的废弃建筑早已被马人们占为己有——每栋建筑上都挂满了五颜六色的衣物和帷幔，这些装饰几乎完全掩盖了那些破败的石墙。 一些较大的帐篷与其他帐篷分开摆放，形成了整个村庄的边界。
rows.raw:

    A narrow, hoof-beaten path stretches down into a slight depression near the lake. At a glance, it would seem as if the path were chosen at random, with any part of the hill available for walking. On closer inspection it becomes apparent that the tall grass and flowering beds to each side hide jagged stones and loose earth that would be hell to maneuver. 

    The village of the marefolk people is easily visible, even from the top of the hill that obscures it from the valley proper. Sturdy tents frame a number of ancient Belharan scoutposts. The spattering of abandoned buildings have been fully appropriated by the marefolk, each sporting colorful hanging clothes and draperies that almost wholly disguise the decrepit stone. Some larger tents stand aside from the rest, forming a loose border for the village at large."

rows.original:
The rising bastion of a Belharan scoutpost towers above the rest of the local dwellings. Up close, the building looks far from the decrepit ruin you'd expect from architecture that saw the Godswar first hand. The stone is still smooth, with nary a pockmark to denote its ancient status. Even the bountiful fabrics and cloth draperies that cover the windows and arrow slits don't seem to be covering any blemishes, simply placed to make the building look more at home in the field of tent-like yurts.

    You get the feeling that this and the handful of tents that seem directly attached to it are meant to form a single structure. A weathered sign hangs from a post above the heavy oak door, inscribed with words and symbols in numerous local languages, including an inscription in the common tongue labeled 'alchemist.' [pc.raMulti orc elf|You recognize some of the symbols to mean the same in orcish, or at least a slightly butchered variation of the word.|You recognize some of the symbols as elvish runes for various plants and potions.]
rows.translation:
这座贝尔哈兰侦察队的堡垒高耸于周围的住宅之上。从近处看，这座建筑丝毫没有你想象中那种因经历过神战而变得破败不堪的样子。它的石墙依然光滑，没有任何凹痕能够证明它的古老历史。 就连那些覆盖在窗户和箭孔上的丰富织物与布幔，似乎也并没有掩盖任何瑕疵，它们只是被简单地摆放在那里，只是为了让这座建筑在那些类似帐篷的蒙古包环境中看起来更加协调罢了。

你会觉得，这座建筑以及那几顶看起来与之紧密相连的帐篷，其实是被设计成同一个整体结构的。 一根木柱上悬挂着一块饱经风霜的标志牌，上面用多种当地语言刻着文字和符号，其中还用通用语言写着“炼金术士”这几个字。 [pc.raMulti orc elf|你认出其中一些符号，在兽人语中它们代表着相同的含义，或者至少是这些词语的某种简化变体。|你认出其中一些符号是代表各种植物和药水的精灵文字。]

Even the bountiful fabrics and cloth draperies that cover the windows and arrow slits don't seem to be covering any blemishes, simply placed to make the building look more at home in the field of tent-like yurts.

    You get the feeling that this and the handful of tents that seem directly attached to it are meant to form a single structure. A weathered sign hangs from a post above the heavy oak door, inscribed with words and symbols in numerous local languages, including an inscription in the common tongue labeled 'alchemist.' [pc.raMulti orc elf|You recognize some of the symbols to mean the same in orcish, or at least a slightly butchered variation of the word.|You recognize some of the symbols as elvish runes for various plants and potions.]"

rows.original:
You approach the statue of the ranger, drawing forth your waystone charm and holding it up towards his own gem-set ring. The moment you hold up your own charm, you feel a tension rising in the air, and the atmosphere crackles with power. You grit your teeth and step forward, forcing yourself towards the ancient idol.

        And then, suddenly the pressure breaks, and the wind howls through the village. The gemstone in the statue's old ring shines and begins to pulse with inner light... it's awake! You grin and close your fist around the charm, watching as the light fades. The idol is awakened once more...
rows.translation:
你走向那位护林员的雕像，取出自己的路标护身符，将其举向他那枚镶嵌宝石的戒指。就在你举起护身符的那一刻，你感觉到空气中弥漫着一种紧张的气氛，整个空间仿佛都被强大的能量所充斥。 你咬紧牙关，向前走去，强迫自己朝着那座古老的偶像走去。

就在这时，突然间，那种压迫感消失了，狂风开始在村庄中呼啸。雕像上那枚旧戒指中的宝石开始发光，内部仿佛有光在跳动。…它醒来了！你露出微笑，将那枚护身符握在拳头中，注视着光芒逐渐消失。这个神像又一次被唤醒了……
rows.raw:
"
        You approach the statue of the ranger, drawing forth your waystone charm and holding it up towards his own gem-set ring. The moment you hold up your own charm, you feel a tension rising in the air, and the atmosphere crackles with power. You grit your teeth and step forward, forcing yourself towards the ancient idol.

        And then, suddenly the pressure breaks, and the wind howls through the village. The gemstone in the statue's old ring shines and begins to pulse with inner light... it's awake! You grin and close your fist around the charm, watching as the light fades. The idol is awakened once more..."

rows.original: Say hi to the bouncy butt-bunny.
rows.translation: 向那只活泼可爱的小兔子问好吧。

rows.original: Say hi to Asani Naiyana, [atani.married|your wife's mother|Atani's mother].
rows.translation: 向阿萨尼·奈亚娜问好吧。 [atani.married|你妻子的母亲|阿塔尼的母亲].
rows.raw: "Say hi to Asani Naiyana, [atani.married|your wife's mother|Atani's mother]."

rows.original: Check in on the mothfolk thief.
rows.translation: 去看看那个蛾人盗贼吧。

rows.original: The forge is oddly quiet, with no smoke and no noise coming from within. A cursory glance through the door flap reveals a darkened room with nary an occupant. Zuzaan must be out.
rows.translation: 铁匠铺里出奇地安静，里面既没有烟雾，也没有任何声响。透过门缝匆匆一看，只见房间里一片漆黑，根本没有人。Zuzaan肯定在外面。
rows.raw: "\n        The forge is oddly quiet, with no smoke and no noise coming from within. A cursory glance through the door flap reveals a darkened room with nary an occupant. Zuzaan must be out."

rows.original: Meeting Zuzaan might be a little overwhelming right now, but you're sure you'll be fine.
rows.translation: 现在去见祖赞可能会让你感到有些压力，但你相信自己一定能应付得来。
rows.raw: "Meeting Zuzaan might be a little overwhelming right now, but you're sure you'll be fine."

rows.original: You're gonna need a cock to help diffuse Zuzaan's lust.
rows.translation: 你得找个男人来帮助缓解祖赞的欲望。
rows.raw: "You're gonna need a cock to help diffuse Zuzaan's lust."

rows.original:
Smoke billows from above the large tent closest to this section of path, and you can hear the odd clang of metal or hiss of hot steam from through the heavy flap. The housing yurts give this larger tent a generous berth, assumedly to avoid the smoke. 

    There's no sign near this buildings door, but [flags.ZUZAAN_MET|you know that this is the tent where Zuzaan works her magic on the various tools and weapons she smiths.|it's not too difficult to hazard a guess that this is the blacksmith's tent.]
rows.translation:
靠近这条小路的那顶大帐篷上方不断冒着烟，透过厚重的帐篷帘子，还能听到偶尔传来的金属碰撞声或是热蒸汽的嘶嘶声。那些圆形的蒙古包为这顶大帐篷留出了足够的空间，大概是为了避免被烟雾影响吧。

在这栋建筑的门口附近，没有任何标识或指示。 [flags.ZUZAAN_MET|你知道，这就是祖赞用来对她锻造的各种工具和武器施展魔力的地方。|不难猜测，这应该就是铁匠的帐篷了。]
rows.raw:
"
    Smoke billows from above the large tent closest to this section of path, and you can hear the odd clang of metal or hiss of hot steam from through the heavy flap. The housing yurts give this larger tent a generous berth, assumedly to avoid the smoke. 

    There's no sign near this buildings door, but [flags.ZUZAAN_MET|you know that this is the tent where Zuzaan works her magic on the various tools and weapons she smiths.|it's not too difficult to hazard a guess that this is the blacksmith's tent.]"

rows.translation: 进入 [flags.ZUZAAN_MET|祖赞的|铁匠的] 帐篷。

rows.original: See if Viv can explain how Zuzaan's enchanting works on a deeper level.
rows.translation: 看看Viv能否更深入地解释一下Zuzaan的这种魔法效果是如何发挥作用的。
rows.raw: "See if Viv can explain how Zuzaan's enchanting works on a deeper level."

rows.original: You'd need Viviane in your party to ask her anything.
rows.translation: 如果你们想询问任何问题，就需要让薇薇安加入你们的队伍。
rows.raw: "You'd need Viviane in your party to ask her anything."

rows.original:
The light of the forge illuminates enough of the room to give you a decent view. You can see Zuzaan hammering away at glowing crimson metal, shaping it into various implements for the village. A crate of already finished spearheads sits off to the side, waiting to be enhanced through her unique crafting talent. Waiting for someone to help.

    The smithy is a place of work and nothing more, with the extent of comfort being a few benches or stools, and buckets of water that [flags.KAVI_MET|are occasionally restocked by Kavi or her daughter, Tarah.|are occasionally restocked, mostly by a chunky bovine morph but sometimes by a shorter equine.] The buckets are used frequently, whether for drink, to cool the superheated metal, or just to cool off. Everything else is just a part of the process. Zuzaan pauses her work to smile at you, positioning herself to be most visible.
rows.translation:
铁匠铺里的灯光照亮了整个房间，让你能够清楚地看到里面的情景。你可以看到祖赞正在敲打那些散发着炽热红光的金属，将其塑造成各种村民所需的工具。一旁还放着一箱已经制作好的矛头，它们正等待着祖赞用她独特的工艺技艺对它们进行进一步的加工——等待着有人来帮助她完成这些工作。

这个铁匠铺只是一个工作场所而已，这里能提供的便利设施也就只有几张长凳或凳子，以及几桶水而已。 [flags.KAVI_MET|这些商品偶尔会由卡维或她的女儿塔拉重新补货。|这些物品偶尔会重新上架，通常是由体型庞大的牛形生物补货的，但有时也会由体型较短的马形生物来补货。] 这些水桶被频繁使用，无论是用来饮用、冷却过热的金属，还是仅仅用来解渴。其他所有的一切都只是这个过程中的环节而已。祖赞暂停了她的工作，微笑着向你招手，特意让自己处于最显眼的位置。
rows.raw:
"
    The light of the forge illuminates enough of the room to give you a decent view. You can see Zuzaan hammering away at glowing crimson metal, shaping it into various implements for the village. A crate of already finished spearheads sits off to the side, waiting to be enhanced through her unique crafting talent. Waiting for someone to help.

    The smithy is a place of work and nothing more, with the extent of comfort being a few benches or stools, and buckets of water that [flags.KAVI_MET|are occasionally restocked by Kavi or her daughter, Tarah.|are occasionally restocked, mostly by a chunky bovine morph but sometimes by a shorter equine.] The buckets are used frequently, whether for drink, to cool the superheated metal, or just to cool off. Everything else is just a part of the process. Zuzaan pauses her work to smile at you, positioning herself to be most visible."

rows.original: You open the flap of the smith's tent, and step back as the sweltering air inside buffets your face. The heat is staggering compared to the brisk Frost March plains. You stand by the door for a moment, listening to the hammering of metal on metal as you acclimate to the temperature. When you step inside, you're greeted by the smell of hot metal and burning coal. A compact forge takes up much of the space in one section of the yurt, along with various molds not currently in use. You can see some molds for weaponry, but most are for more mundane tools and a number of varied spearheads. An anvil and numerous buckets of water lie closer to your end, along with the forge-mistress responsible for the noise you've been hearing. The smith is a bulwark of a woman, and currently facing away from you. She must be almost eight feet tall, if not on the dot, and broad as a tower shield. You can see the muscular definition in her arms and back even in the dim light of the forge. Sweat drips down her rich brown hair as she pounds what looks like a new spearhead into shape. On her head and along her neck, similarly colored hair is tied into tight braids that hold it against her body. Her tail is tied up in an identical fashion, sticking straight up as she presides over her work. Her jutting tail perfectly reveals a puffy equine slit, the color of ground cocoa. You can see her clit winking out from your spot by the door, and more than sweat is dripping down her legs as she goes about her work. A shudder runs down her body as she pauses, turning to plunge the newly forged speartip into one of the nearby buckets. She notices you for the first time as she does so, grinning as she picks up one of the buckets and pours it over her body to wash away the sweat. Wow. "Can I help you? Or better, are you here to help me?" she asks. Her voice is as rich as her hair, deep and resonating. The strongwoman's front half is barely a step up in modesty. She wears a tightly bound strip of blue cloth that barely manages to hold her chest up. Huge, dusky nipples are plainly visible through the sheer material, stiff with arousal. A sash of blue and purple silk rests on her monstrous hips, not so much covering as drawing attention to the more feminine parts of her body. The water glistens on her body, but totally avoids her clothing. In fact, none of the coal dirt on her arms or the sparks you saw earlier seem to have touched the beautiful fabric at all. You'd guess your answer depends on what kind of help she needs, exactly. [pc.isBimbo|You have plenty of experience with hammering.|] "Help me with enchanting all these spearheads, of course," the bulky mare snorts, seating herself atop her anvil and gesturing to the pile of pointy bronze tips behind her. Her breath is still a little ragged, and her posture is openly suggestive. She sits with her legs open, giving you a plain view of both her sodden sex and powerful thighs. Below the chest, her features are softer, but still full of obvious strength. A wicked looking scar mars the earthy brown hair on her left leg, starting just below the thigh and twisting around till it splits right through the hoof. The injury is obviously healed, but looks like it would've looked far more gruesome when it was fresh. She takes notice of your [pc.weapon] and her smile widens. "If you do a good enough job I might even be tempted to reward you," she declares, standing and crossing over to you in a few short steps. The scent of metal and arousal hangs strong in the air around her, teasing your nose in a way that promises you'll have more. She takes a deep breath of the air around you, smiling wide. [party.hasCompanions|She hardly seems to notice anyone but you, giving your companion[party.som|||s] a passing glance.] "You certainly seem compatible," the bulky smith mulls in little more than a whisper. She certainly seems to know what she's talking about, but you'd still like to know the specifics first. When you still give her a curious look after a few seconds, she takes a step back and gives you a more full lookover. A bit of the sultry behavior leeches out of her, replaced by relaxed confidence. "Sorry! I've been a bit overworked since those damn centaurs started going crazy. Our huntresses go through spears almost faster than I can keep up. I get so used to working in the day that I assume everyone knows how it works. I don't get all that much work from outside the tribe, but you would not be the first." She returns to her forge, stretching tall and retrieving her smithing hammer. So she's both a smith and an enchanter? "Ha, as if someone who was merely 'both a smith and an enchanter' could do what I do. I am Zuzaan, the magesmith! I'm sure some southern enchanter could waggle his fingers over your weapon and do all manner of spectacular tricks, but here in the north things require work, and the best work springs from the most... passionate sires," she explains, turning toward her anvil and giving one mighty asscheek a squeeze. Oh. Is that the kind of help she wants? "Emotion is a powerful force, why not tap it? I think the peak of desire is best for crafting strong bonds. Sure, the same thing could be done with rage or another powerful feeling, but I prefer to have fun while I work," she shrugs. It looks like the door's open for some special help, but you could also just ask about something else.
rows.translation: 你掀开铁匠帐篷的帘幕，顿时被里面灼热的空气扑面而来，不由得后退了几步。与寒冷的霜冻三月平原相比，这里的炎热简直令人难以忍受。你在门口站了一会儿，听着金属相互撞击发出的声响，逐渐适应这种高温环境。 当你走进去时，首先迎面而来的是炽热金属和燃烧煤炭散发出的气味。在蒙古包的某个区域，一个紧凑的铁匠铺占据了大部分空间，那里还摆放着一些目前并未被使用的模具。你可以看到一些用于制作武器的模具，但大多数都是用来制造一些普通的工具以及各式各样的矛头。 在你这一端，靠近你的地方，放着一把铁砧和许多水桶，还有那位制造出你一直听到的噪音的铁匠女士。 这位铁匠是一位身材魁梧的女性，此刻她正背对着你。她的身高肯定有八英尺左右，甚至可能更高，而她的体型也宽得像一面塔盾。即使在铁匠铺昏暗的光线下，你也能清楚地看到她手臂和背部肌肉的分明轮廓。 汗水从她那浓密的棕色头发上滴落，而她正在努力将一根看起来像是新制作的矛头敲打成形。她的头上和脖子上，同样颜色的头发被紧紧地编成辫子，固定在她的身体上。她的尾巴也被同样地扎了起来，笔直地竖立着，而她则全神贯注地投入到自己的工作中。 她那凸出的尾巴清晰地露出了那处呈深巧克力色的部位。从你站在门边的位置，你可以看到她的阴蒂微微一闪而现。当她忙碌着工作时，汗水不止地从她双腿上滴落下来。当她停下来，将新锻造的矛头插入附近的一个桶里时，一阵颤栗从她身体上掠过。就在这时，她第一次注意到了你的存在，她微笑着拿起一个桶，将水浇在自己身上，洗去汗水。哇…… 需要帮忙吗？或者，其实你是来帮助我的吧？”她问道。她的声音如同她的头发一样充满韵律，深沉而回荡。这位强壮的女子在外表上显得极为端庄谦逊——她只系着一条紧紧束住的蓝色布带，那布带几乎只能勉强托住她的胸部。 巨大的、略带暗色的乳头透过透明的布料清晰可见，因兴奋而变得坚硬。一条由蓝色和紫色丝绸制成的腰带系在她那丰满的臀部上，它并非真正地遮盖这些部位，反而更加突出了她身体中那些更具女性魅力的地方。 水在她身上闪烁着光芒，但却完全没有弄湿她的衣物。事实上，她手臂上的煤灰，以及你之前看到的那些火花，似乎都根本没有碰到那块漂亮的布料。其实，你的答案取决于她究竟需要什么样的帮助。 [pc.isBimbo|你在使用锤子进行敲击作业方面拥有丰富的经验。|] 当然，帮我把这些矛头都加上魔法效果吧，”那匹魁梧的母马哼了一声，然后坐到了铁砧上，同时指向她身后那堆尖锐的青铜矛头。她的呼吸仍然有些急促，而她的姿势也明显带着挑逗意味。 她坐着时双腿分开，让你清晰地看到她湿润的私处以及结实的大腿。在胸部以下，她的五官显得更加柔和，但依然充满了力量感。她左腿上有一道难看的疤痕，从大腿下方开始，蜿蜒延伸，最终贯穿了整个腿部。 伤口显然已经愈合了，但刚受伤的时候，情况肯定要惨烈得多。她注意到了你的…… [pc.weapon] 她的笑容变得更加灿烂。 “如果你做得足够好，我甚至可能会考虑奖励你，”她说道，站起身来，几步就走到了你的面前。空气中弥漫着金属的气息与兴奋的情绪，这种气息刺激着你的嗅觉，让你预感到还会有更多美好的事情发生。她深深地吸了一口你周围的空气，然后露出了灿烂的笑容。 [party.hasCompanions|她似乎几乎只注意你，而完全忽略了你的同伴。[party.som|||s] 随意一瞥。] 你们俩确实似乎很合得来，”那个魁梧的铁匠低声说道。她显然很清楚自己在说什么，但你还是想先了解一些具体的细节。几秒钟后，当你仍然好奇地注视着她时，她后退了一步，再次仔细打量了你一番。 她身上那种撩人的气质渐渐消失了，取而代之的是一种从容自信的神情。 “对不起！自从那些该死的半人马开始发狂之后，我的工作量确实太大了。我们的女猎手们使用长矛的速度快得让我根本跟不上…… 我已经习惯了在白天工作，以至于以为大家都明白这种工作方式。从部落外部接到的工作并不多，但你也不是第一个遇到这种情况的人。”她回到自己的铁匠铺，伸了个懒腰，然后拿起了铁匠锤。 所以她既是铁匠又是法师？ “哈，难道那些只是‘既是铁匠又是法师’的人就能做到我所能做的事情吗？我是祖赞，这位魔铁匠！当然，某些南方的法师可能会用手指一挥，让你的武器展现出各种惊人的效果，但在北方，一切都需要付出努力，而最出色的成果往往来自于最不懈的努力。.. 充满热情的 各位先生们，”她解释道，一边转向自己的铁砧，一边用力捏了捏自己的屁股。哦……原来她是想用这种方式来获得帮助啊？ “情感是一种强大的力量，为什么不加以利用呢？我认为，强烈的欲望才是建立深厚感情的最佳途径。当然，愤怒或其他强烈的情绪也能达到同样的效果，但我更喜欢在工作的过程中享受乐趣。”她耸了耸肩。看来是可以请求一些特别的帮助了，不过你也可以随便问其他事情啊。

I get so used to working in the day that I assume everyone knows how it works. I don't get all that much work from outside the tribe, but you would not be the first." She returns to her forge, stretching tall and retrieving her smithing hammer. So she's both a smith and an enchanter? "Ha, as if someone who was merely 'both a smith and an enchanter' could do what I do. I am Zuzaan, the magesmith! I'm sure some southern enchanter could waggle his fingers over your weapon and do all manner of spectacular tricks, but here in the north things require work, and the best work springs from the most... passionate sires," she explains, turning toward her anvil and giving one mighty asscheek a squeeze. Oh. Is that the kind of help she wants? "Emotion is a powerful force, why not tap it? I think the peak of desire is best for crafting strong bonds. Sure, the same thing could be done with rage or another powerful feeling, but I prefer to have fun while I work," she shrugs. It looks like the door's open for some special help, but you could also just ask about something else."

rows.original: Zuzaan is showing off, it would be impolite not to take her all in.
rows.translation: 祖赞正在炫耀呢，如果不接受她的邀请，那就太没礼貌了。
rows.raw: "Zuzaan is showing off, it would be impolite not to take her all in."

rows.translation: 可以向祖赞询问各种问题。

rows.original: Help Zuzaan out at the forge.
rows.translation: 帮祖赞在铁匠铺里忙忙吧。

rows.original: See if Zuzaan can help you upgrade your wayfort.
rows.translation: 看看Zuzaan是否能帮你升级你的wayfort。
rows.raw: "See if Zuzaan can help you upgrade your wayfort."

rows.original: Ask Zuzaan to make a heating rune for the dragon's bath. This will cost you 125 EC!
rows.translation: 请让祖赞为龙的浴池制作一个加热符文。这将会花费你125枚EC！
rows.raw: "Ask Zuzaan to make a heating rune for the dragon's bath. This will cost you 125 EC!"

rows.original:
Zuzaan strikes an impressive figure, a full eight feet of amazonian mare. There's no denying the raw strength in her build, with muscle that ripples as she flexes her arms and back. She probably carried her anvil in here by herself. Coal dirt accumulates on her lower arms, seemingly the only place it's able to penetrate whatever magic she uses to protect herself from the heat. A knowing smile appears on her face as she sees you watching, and she turns to give you a better look.

    The smith's front is just as impressive. Two quaking GG-cups strain visibly against the sheer silk wrap she wears for a top, each tipped by a dusky nipple. [zuzaan.pregStage 0 1 2 3|Her stomach looks more like a barrel than a board,[flags.ZUZAAN_TALK_HOBBIES| rounded by the onslaught of many pregnancies,] but even that is still taut with obvious strength|Her stomach has begun to swell with child. The roundness of her belly has noticeably increased, but she doesn't seem any less enthusiastic in her work|Any doubts about her pregnancy are long past. Her belly swells noticeably, even from behind. Instead of slowing, she seems even more invested in her work, staring at you with longing eyes between swings of her hammer|Zuzaan is absolutely gravid. She hardly works the forge anymore, stopping to whinny and cum after every couple strikes of her hammer. The need in her eyes when she looks at you is enough to set your heart to racing]. Beneath the belt her brown hair gives way to the dark chocolate of her sex. Puffy lips that seem to be in a near permanent state of arousal during her work wink constantly to reveal her clit and bright pink insides.
rows.translation:
祖赞的身高十分惊人，足有八英尺，简直就像一位亚马逊女战士。她的体格中蕴含着惊人的力量，每当她弯曲手臂或背部时，肌肉都会明显地跳动着。恐怕就连那个铁砧，她也是独自把它搬进来的吧。 她的手臂上积满了煤灰，看来这是唯一能够穿透她用来抵御高温的魔法的地方。当你注意到这一点时，她露出会心的微笑，然后转过身来，让你能更清楚地看到这一幕。

    铁匠的前胸同样令人印象深刻。两颗微微凸出的乳头在她穿着的丝绸上衣下若隐若现，显得格外诱人。 [zuzaan.pregStage 0 1 2 3|她的肚子看起来更像一个桶，而不是平坦的腹部。[flags.ZUZAAN_TALK_HOBBIES| 在接连不断的怀孕经历中，她的生活被彻底改变了。] 但即便如此，它依然充满了明显的力量感。|她的腹部已经开始因为怀孕而隆起，肚子的圆润程度明显增加了，但她的工作热情似乎丝毫没有减弱。|关于她是否怀孕的任何疑虑早已烟消云散。她的腹部明显隆起了，甚至从后面也能看出来。然而，她的工作热情非但没有减弱，反而更加投入了——在挥动锤子的同时，她还会用充满渴望的眼神注视着你。|祖赞现在真的怀孕了。她几乎不再去铁匠铺工作了，每次敲几下铁锤后就会停下来，发出呜咽声。当她看着你的时候，她眼中的那种神情足以让你的心跳加速。]她的棕色头发向下延伸，遮住了私处的部分。那双饱满的嘴唇似乎总是在工作中处于兴奋状态，不断眨动，露出她的阴蒂以及鲜粉色的内部组织。

rows.original:
Does the boisterous forge-mistrees have some time to talk? Or is she all work? She chuckles, looking back over her shoulder.

    "Working doesn't prevent me from talking. I don't use my mouth to hold the hammer," she quips, tossing a smile in your direction.
rows.translation:
那些吵闹的铁匠们有没有时间聊聊天呢？还是说他们一直都在工作？她回头笑了笑，说道：

“工作并不会妨碍我聊天。我又不是用嘴巴来拿锤子的，”她开玩笑地说道，同时朝你的方向抛了一个微笑。
rows.raw:
"
    Does the boisterous forge-mistrees have some time to talk? Or is she all work? She chuckles, looking back over her shoulder.

    "Working doesn't prevent me from talking. I don't use my mouth to hold the hammer," she quips, tossing a smile in your direction."

rows.original:
You ask Zuzaan about what she does when she's away from the forge. Surely there must be something she does when she's not working.

        "Get pregnant," she says simply, going about her work. When your incredulous gawking demands further explanation, she snorts.
        
        "What? Those contraceptive herbs Kavi blends muck with my magic. Since my magic relies on... feeling good I spend a lot of time pregnant," she clarifies. That's certainly an explanation, but you aren't sure if you'd count it as a hobby.
        
        "Most of my time not spent at the forge is spent helping out at the nursery. I, let's say, contribute a lot to their workload, so I help out. There are always hunters who don't have time for things like breastfeeding," she explains. An absent hand reaches for one of her nipples, tracing around the dark teat as she continues.
        
        "These days I have to get a potion from Kavi to stop lactating. If I don't, the milk just doesn't stop. Some mares would envy me, but it's... irritating for me to deal with." Her hand drops back to her side. 
        
        "A long time ago I enjoyed traveling. Seeing the parts of the world that are considered 'more civilized.' I saw Jassira, hunted a dune behemoth. Didn't manage to kill it, but a few of its teeth hang on my bow," She smirks, indicating an immense greatbow that leans against the far side of the tent. Teeth, hide scraps, and other macabre trophies hang from various ties along its length, standing out against the smooth black wood.
        
        "I think I liked Bel Carn best, especially the hanging gardens. Big place, lots of rolling fields like home. It's interesting to see cities where people don't worship the gods. No good for hunting though. Monsters in Bel Carn are sneakier," Zuzaan half-explains, her grip tightening on her blacksmith's hammer. 
        
        "I can't travel much anymore with my leg, and being here is plenty entertaining with people like you around," she remarks, giving you a wink. The equine smithy taps absently on her hip, trying to think.
        
        "I'm pretty simple, I guess, nowadays. Is there anything else you'd like to know about?"
rows.translation:
你问祖赞在离开铁匠铺的时候会做些什么。她不工作的时候，肯定会有其他事情要做吧。

“怀孕吧，”她简单地回答着，继续她的手头工作。当你难以置信地盯着她看，要求她进一步解释时，她只是哼了一声。
        
        什么？卡维配制的那些避孕草药破坏了我的魔法。因为我的魔法依赖于……那种愉悦的感觉，所以我就总是处于‘怀孕’的状态，”她解释道。这确实是一个解释，不过你也不确定是否该把这种状况算作一种“爱好”吧。
        
        我在铁匠铺里度过的时光并不多，大部分时间都是用来帮忙照顾幼崽的。可以说，我为他们分担了大量的工作，因此我才会主动帮忙。总有一些猎人没有时间去照顾这些幼崽，”她解释道。 她的一只手伸向自己的乳头，轻轻抚摸着那突起的乳晕，同时继续做着其他动作。
        
        这些天我必须从卡维那里拿到一种药水来停止泌乳。如果不这么做，乳汁就会一直分泌下去。有些母马可能会羡慕我，但对我来说……处理这种问题真的挺烦人的。”她的手又垂回到了身体两侧。

“很久以前，我真的很喜欢旅行。 我去了世界上那些被认为‘更加文明’的地方。我在贾西拉见到了那些生物，还猎杀了一头沙丘巨兽。虽然没能把它杀死，但它的一些牙齿还挂在我的弓上呢。”她笑着说，同时指了指靠在帐篷另一侧的那一把巨大的长弓。 沿着它的长度，各种绳索上悬挂着牙齿、残骸以及其他令人毛骨悚然的战利品，这些在光滑的黑色木头上显得格外醒目。
        
        我觉得我最喜欢贝尔卡恩了，尤其是那些悬空花园。那里面积很大，有一片片连绵的田野，让人感觉就像在家一样。看到那些人们不崇拜神明的城市，还挺有意思的。不过，那里不太适合打猎——贝尔卡恩的怪物们更加狡猾。”祖赞一边说，一边紧紧握住手中的铁匠锤。 
        
        我的腿现在不方便经常出门旅行了，有你们这样的人在身边，这里已经足够让我感到有趣了，”她说道，同时向你眨了眨眼。那位马匠则心不在焉地轻拍着她的臀部，试图思考着什么。

“我想，现在我的生活已经变得很简单了。还有其他你想了解的事情吗？

rows.original: Ask the forge mistress what she does in her spare time.
rows.translation: 去问问铁匠铺的女主人，她业余时间都做些什么。
rows.raw: "Ask the forge mistress what she does in her spare time."

rows.original: You ask Zuzaan where she got her leg injury. Considering how it looks now it must have been nasty when it was fresh. The bay marefolk looks absently over her shoulder, regarding the twisting map of scar tissue with about as much interest as an errant fly. "Wyrm hunting," she says, with the same lack of enthusiasm. "Like dragons, but without the brains, cunning, or shapeshifting. Just teeth, muscle, and fire. That was the last hunt I ever went on. Me and two hunters I befriended in Jassira went up into the Gaovod Mountains hunting, woke the dumb thing up. Before we even knew we were standing on it my leg looked like meat on a spit. It gave me a great big lick with its serrated tongue," she makes two hooks with her fingers for emphasis, dragging them up her shin in jerking tugs. Yikes, that sounds painful. "Eh, the body forgets pain when you have a chance to take quarry like that. I didn't even notice until I landed after putting an arrow in both his eyes and my leg didn't hold me. Lucky for me, my friends were competent. I wasn't much help after that initial blinding, but the beast died all the same. Even luckier for me, one of them was a healer. The state of my leg speaks for how bad it was. Poor man almost threw up seeing my muscles hanging like strips of jerky on the bone." She chuckles at the memory. "It looks bad, but I hardly notice it anymore. It's become natural, as much a part of me as my magic," she concludes, giving you a smile of finality.
rows.translation: 你问祖赞她的腿伤是怎么弄成的。看现在的伤势，当初受伤的时候肯定非常严重。那位海湾马人女子心不在焉地回头看了一眼，那片扭曲的疤痕组织，对她来说，大概就如同一只飞来飞去的苍蝇一样，毫无兴趣。 猎巨蛇，”她说道，语气中依然毫无热情。 “和猎龙差不多，只不过这些巨蛇没有智慧、狡猾，也不会变形。它们只有牙齿、肌肉和火焰。那是我最后一次参加这样的狩猎。我和在贾西拉结识的两位猎人一起去了高沃德山脉狩猎，结果把那头巨蛇给吵醒了。 甚至在我们意识到自己正站在上面之前，我的腿就已经像烤肉架上的肉一样了。那东西用它那锯齿状的舌头狠狠地舔了我一下，”她用手指做出两个钩状的动作来强调这一过程，然后把手指沿着自己的胫骨向上滑动，模拟那种拉扯的感觉。 哎呀，那听起来可真疼啊……” “嗯，当你有机会以那样的方式捕获猎物时，身体就会忘记疼痛了。直到我把箭射进他的双眼，然后落地时，我才感觉到疼痛，那时我的腿已经无法支撑我的身体了。 幸运的是，我的朋友们都很能干。在最初的混乱中，我确实帮不上什么忙，但那只怪物最终还是被消灭了。更幸运的是，他们当中有一个人是治疗专家。我的腿伤情况就足以说明事情的严重性了…… 是那个可怜的人看到我的肌肉像干肉一样挂在骨头上，差点吐出来呢。”她回忆起这件事，忍不住笑了起来。 “看起来确实有点难看，但我现在已经几乎注意不到这一点了。它已经变得很自然，就像我的魔法一样，成为了我身体的一部分。”她最后微笑着说道。

rows.original: Ask how Zuzaan got her scarring.
rows.translation: 问问祖赞是如何留下那些伤痕的。

rows.original:
[flags.ZUZAAN_HELPED
        |How would you like to help Zuzaan?
        |"Does your magic work on anything? How exactly does it work?" you ask, looking over the maresmith's shoulder. She currently has a wooden club on the anvil. Wait... She snorts at the confused look on your face.

        "I'm working with magic. Material means little as long as the feeling is there. I learned smithing before my mother found I had inherited the gift. I'm told there are more efficient ways to do it, but the heat of the forge keeps my mind occupied," she shudders in thought, and you see her dusky nipples begin to stiffen under her sash. 
        
        "Didn't you have a teacher?" you ask.
        
        "Heh. My teacher was a need for my work. I'm the first to be born with the gift in generations. Merchants tell me magesmithing is a dead art. There haven't been teachers of magesmithing since the Godswar, over a hundred years before I was even born. I've had over twenty children myself and none of them so far have shared my gift," she explains. Wow.
        
        "As for how it works, hmmm. The best way to describe it would be hammering the overflowing passion of the world into the weapon. The more passionate the wielder, the better the enchantment responds to them." She looks you up and down with a hungry grin.
        
        "[pc.libidoRange 50|You look like you could make great use of it|With a little help you could make good use of it]," she remarks, turning back to her work. Maybe you'll be able to get in on an enchantment like that for yourself.
    ]
rows.translation:
[flags.ZUZAAN_HELPED
        |你打算如何帮助祖赞呢？
        |你的魔法对任何东西都有效吗？它是如何发挥作用的呢？”你问道，同时从马尔斯mith的肩膀后面望去。她此刻正把一根木棍放在铁砧上加工。等等……看到你困惑的表情，她轻哼了一声。

“我就是在运用魔法而已。”她说道。 只要那份情感存在，物质其实并不重要。在我母亲发现我拥有这种天赋之前，我就已经开始学习铁匠工艺了。有人告诉我，其实还有更高效的方法来从事这项工作，但熔炉里的高温让我整个人都沉浸其中，无暇顾及其他。”她若有所思地轻声说道，此时你可以看到她那略带深色的乳头在衣襟下开始变得坚硬起来。 
        
        你以前不是有老师吗？”你问道。

“呵呵。我的老师只是我学习这门技艺时所需要的引导而已。我是几代人中第一个天生就拥有这种天赋的人。商人们都说，法师锻造术已经是一门濒临灭绝的艺术了。自从神战之后，就已经有一百多年没有法师锻造术的老师出现了，而我在出生之前很久，这种技艺就已经没有老师来传授了。 我自己已经有了二十多个孩子，但到目前为止，没有一个孩子继承了我的这种天赋，”她解释道。哇，真是不可思议。

“至于这种天赋的具体运作原理呢，嗯……最好的描述方式就是，将世界上那些充沛的热情、激情融入到这种武器之中。 使用者的热情越强烈，这种魔法的效果就会越好。”她用一种充满渴望的眼神上下打量着你。[pc.libidoRange 50|你看起来很需要它呢。|在一点帮助下，你完全可以充分利用它。]也许你也能有机会获得这样的魔法吧，”她边说边继续着手她的工作。
    ]

rows.translation: 进入 [flags.KAVI_MET|卡维的|炼金术士的] 帐篷。

rows.original: Speak with the bubbly bimbo mare.
rows.translation: 去和那个活泼可爱的女孩聊聊吧。

rows.original:
The mythically endowed [silly|alcowmist|alchemist] searches her shelves, occasionally stopping to open a jar and check the contents, sometimes gauging their freshness, and other times checking the amount. She tosses a smile in your direction when she notices you.

    "Here for anything specific today?"
rows.translation:
那些被赋予神话般力量的角色 [silly|酒馆|炼金术士] 她翻找着架子上的物品，偶尔会停下来打开一个罐子查看里面的内容，有时会判断这些食物的新鲜程度，有时则会检查数量。当她注意到你的存在时，会朝你方向投去一个微笑。

“今天有特别想要的东西吗？
rows.raw:
'
    The mythically endowed [silly|alcowmist|alchemist] searches her shelves, occasionally stopping to open a jar and check the contents, sometimes gauging their freshness, and other times checking the amount. She tosses a smile in your direction when she notices you.

    "Here for anything specific today?"'

rows.original: You step up to the heavy wood door of the herbalist's tower, surprising yourself with how easily the door swings open, feeling much lighter than such a thing has any right to. Could it be enchanted? Regardless, the door opens to reveal an open stone-worked room with naught but a thick wooden counter and a rack of shelving. Three connected rooms blocked off by hanging silks frame each wall. The countertop and shelves alike are chock-full of alchemical implements. Nothing as grandiose as bubbling potions and living homunculi, but still rather impressive. Exotic plants and jars of colorful herbal mixtures catch your eyes most of all. You jump as the heavy wooden door slams shut behind you, hard enough to shake the leaves on some of the plants that sit out on the counter. Guess whatever enchantment makes it easy to open doesn't apply when it swings shut of its own accord. "Velun's mercy, I told you to be careful with the door! The magic doesn't last if no one's touching it! Do you want to clean another broken jar of dye from the floo-" a deep voice echoes from the leftmost drape. The thud of hooves on dirt sounds just long enough to alert you to someone approaching the door before the entry to the second room is thrown open, revealing a tall northern minotaur who looks every bit the village matron. Her eyes shoot wide when she sees you, but it's hard to take your eyes off the rest of her. The woman you assume is the alchemist makes for an impressive figure. Her bust immediately commands your attention, with a pair of titanic breasts that must be at least Z-cups, if not larger. Despite their tremendous size, they hardly seem to sag at all, with just enough gravidic droop to emphasize their weight. The thick dress she wears is perfectly sized to fit them, leaving a near literal valley of natural cleavage meant to be held in place by two ivory clasps. One such clasp is undone, giving you a tantalizing view of one gigantic breast and the soft pink areola of a nipple. She quickly buckles the clasp, wiping hands that drip creamy white liquid. You can smell the sweet scent of milk from across the room. Oh. "Oh! An outsider! Forgive me, I... Tarah! Where has that girl gone off to? Bring a snack for our guest! Sorry about that. Are you here on business, or just visiting?" She finds her composure, standing tall and giving you a warm smile. It looks good on her, wrenching your attention from her chest to the ocean blue of her eyes. She walks behind the counter, righting a couple of jars that were shifted into precarious positions by the vibrations. You recover enough to reply as she corrects their positions; you are just visiting for now. Does she get much business from outside the village? "Occasionally! Though usually my outside customers consist of mousefolk who ran afoul of particularly rowdy gnolls. Most days I deal with local affairs, from medicine for allergies to dye for hair. Lately there have been more and more hunting parties coming back injured after running into encroaching centaur raiders. They've always been a boastful bunch, but before now it was mostly in jest. Never with this much malice." She shakes her head. "But that's not something for a visitor to be worried about! I am Kavi, and somewhere around here is my daughter, Tar-" she begins, smiling warmly. As if on cue, another round of hoofbeats and a jingling of cowbells comes scampering through door behind the counter, seeming to pause just beyond it for a moment, before a slender, roan mare steps through the door, huffing gently from exertion and holding a tray of small glazed treats. The newcomer (Tarah?) is bright and excited, with an infectious smile and a steely gray-blue coat. She wears a similarly colored dress, but on her the loose upper portion falls around her chest, leaving her modest (in comparison at least) D-cups fully exposed. Twin piercings, silver horseshoes with tiny gold cowbells hanging at the bottom, jingle merrily on each of her bright pink teats. Curls of platinum blonde hair fall like waterfalls over her shoulders, making her countenance all the more sunny. "I got the snacks, momma! They weren't done cooking so I had to wait and they took soooooo long so I couldn't come see the visitor and... is this [pc.himHer]? Hi there, I'm Tar-ahhh!" The bubbly mare takes a step toward you, moving too quickly off the stone step by the door and falling square on her butt with a meaty thunk. The tray of sweets clangs against her chest before clattering to the ground, leaving a coating of sugar and ruined pastry that drips off her in clumps. She looks more shocked than hurt, giving you an embarrassed look. "Sorry, I should've been more careful." You assure her that there's nothing to be ashamed of, anyone could make a slip like that. She brightens instantly, nodding her head and standing. A bovine tail of equally metallic brightness swishes behind her hips as she pulls a sticky bit of confectionery from her chest and pops it into her mouth. Savoring the taste, she plucks another up and holds it in your direction. "Thanks. They still taste pretty good if you want one, even if they're squished," she offers with a grin. Before you can make a decision, though, Kavi shoos the slimmer girl back through the door. "Go wash yourself up before that sugar solidifies! Velun's mercy... Anyway, what can we help you with?"
rows.translation: 你走到那位草药医生的塔楼前，那扇沉重的木门竟然如此轻松地打开了，它的重量似乎比想象中要轻得多。难道这门被施了魔法吗？不管怎样，门打开后，你看到的是一个空荡荡的石砌房间，里面只有一张厚厚的木制柜台和一排架子。 三间相互连通的房间，每面墙都用悬挂的丝绸帘子隔开。 台面和架子上摆满了各种炼金器具。虽然没有那些会冒泡的药剂或会活动的侏儒人那么壮观，但依然相当令人印象深刻。 最吸引你目光的，无疑是那些异国植物以及那些装满五颜六色草药的罐子。当你听到那扇沉重的木门在身后砰地关上时，你不由得一惊——那关门的力量之大，甚至让一些摆放在柜台上的植物的叶子都晃动了起来。看来，无论是什么魔法让这门门能如此轻松地被打开，当它自动关上时，那种魔法显然就失效了。 维伦的慈悲啊，我早就告诉你们要小心那扇门！如果没有人去触碰它，魔法效果就会消失的！你们是想把门弄得一团糟吗？ 另一个 打碎的染料罐……”一个低沉的声音从最左边的帘子后面传来。马蹄踩在泥土上的声音持续了短短一会儿，刚好让你注意到有人正在朝门口走来。紧接着，第二个房间的门被猛地推开，一个高个子的北方牛头人出现在那里，她看起来简直就像这个村庄的管家婆一样。当她看到你时，眼睛立刻瞪得大大的，但你的目光却无法从她的身上移开。 你认为那位是炼金术士的女性，确实是个引人注目的人物。她的胸部立刻吸引了你的目光——那对巨大的乳房，至少有Z罩杯的尺寸，甚至可能更大。尽管体积如此庞大，但她的胸部却丝毫没有下垂的迹象，只是带着那种怀孕时期特有的微微下垂，更加凸显了它们的重量。 她穿的这件厚裙子的尺寸恰到好处，将她的胸部完美地凸显出来，那两片天然的乳沟仿佛被两枚象牙色的扣子紧紧固定着。其中一枚扣子已经解开了，因此你可以看到她那巨大的胸部以及乳头周围柔软的粉红色乳晕。 她迅速扣上了扣环，同时擦了擦手上那些沾着乳白色液体的手。即使在房间的另一头，也能闻到那甜美的牛奶香气。哦…… 哦！有位外来的客人啊！对不起，我……塔拉！那个女孩去哪儿了？快给我们这位客人拿点零食来！实在不好意思。您是来办事的，还是只是来参观的？”她很快恢复了镇定，挺直身子，向你露出了温暖的微笑。 她穿上它看起来非常漂亮，这一身装扮让你的注意力从她的胸部转移到了她那双海洋般湛蓝的眼睛上。她走到柜台后面，把那些因为震动而位置发生偏移的罐子重新摆正。当她把罐子放回原位时，你也终于回过神来，能够跟她说话了——毕竟你现在只是来拜访而已。 她从村外获得了很多业务吗？ 偶尔会有吧！不过通常我的外地顾客都是那些与那些特别吵闹的豺狼人发生了冲突的鼠人。大多数时候，我处理的都是一些本地事务，比如治疗过敏或者提供染发剂之类的。最近，越来越多的狩猎队回来时都受了伤，因为他们遇到了那些入侵的半人马袭击者。这些家伙向来都以爱吹嘘著称，但以前他们说的那些话大多只是开玩笑而已，从来没有这么恶意过。”她摇了摇头。 但这一点不必让来访者担心！我是卡维，我的女儿塔尔应该就在附近……”她微笑着开始说道。恰在这时，一阵马蹄声和铃铛的叮当声从柜台后面的门那里传来，似乎在门口停了一下，然后一匹身材纤细的栗色母马走了进来，它因为奔跑而微微喘着气，手里还端着一盘闪闪发亮的小点心。 这位新来的女孩（塔拉？）聪明活泼，笑容灿烂，穿着一件银灰蓝色的外套。她也穿了一条颜色相同的裙子，但裙子的上半部分较为宽松，垂落在她的胸前，因此她那至少属于D罩杯的胸部完全暴露在外。她的双乳上各戴着一对银色的马蹄形耳环，耳环的末端悬挂着小小的金色铃铛，每当她移动时，这些铃铛就会欢快地叮当作响。一头铂金色的卷发像瀑布一样披洒在她的肩上，使得她的容貌显得更加明媚动人。 妈妈，我拿到零食了！那些零食还没做好，所以我得等着，等了太久了，以至于没能去见那位访客……这是…… [pc.himHer]嗨，大家好，我是塔拉啊！”这只活泼可爱的母马朝你走了过来，但由于动作太快，从门边的石阶上摔了下去，重重地坐在了地上。托盘里的甜点撞到了她的胸口，然后纷纷掉落在地上，糖粉和碎掉的糕点粘在她身上，一块一块地往下掉。 她看起来更像是感到震惊而非受伤，还向你投来了尴尬的目光。 “对不起，我本应该更小心的。”你向她保证，这种事情没什么可羞愧的，任何人都有可能犯这样的错误。她立刻露出了笑容，点了点头，然后站了起来。 当她从胸前取出一块粘粘的糖果放进嘴里时，一条同样闪着金属光泽的牛尾状物在她的臀部后面摇摆着。她细细品味着糖果的味道，又取出一块，朝你的方向递了过来。 谢谢。就算被压扁了，吃起来还是挺不错的，如果你想吃的话……”她笑着说。然而，在你来得及做出决定之前，卡维已经把那个身材较瘦的女孩赶回了屋里。 “快去洗洗吧，不然那些糖块就会凝固掉啦！ 维伦的恩惠……不管怎样，我们能为您做些什么呢？

rows.original: Ask Kavi about a number of topics.
rows.translation: 可以向卡维询问许多话题。
rows.raw: "Ask Kavi about a number of topics."

rows.original:
She said some mares prefer the drug in a tea, is it perhaps possible to taste it?

            "I don't see why not," she says, blindly reaching under her herb counter and pulling out a packet of dried leaves. She talks over her shoulder as she finds a pot and fetches water from a well built into the wall of the building. 

            "Barley tea is favored by mares, even when they don't require their medicine. I prefer to take it with milk, but it's still good alone," she explains as the tea steeps, quietly humming a tune as she pours a cup.
rows.translation:
她说有些母马更喜欢将这种药物加入茶中服用，那么是否可以尝一尝这种茶的味道呢？

“我觉得没什么不可以的，”她边说边随手从药草架下拿出一包干草药。她一边找锅，一边从建筑物墙壁上凿出的水井里取水，边走边说话。 

            麦茶很受母马们的喜爱，即使它们并不需要用药。我更喜欢用牛奶搭配着喝，不过单独喝也不错，”她一边说，一边等待茶泡好，一边轻轻哼着曲子，一边倒茶。
rows.raw:
'
            She said some mares prefer the drug in a tea, is it perhaps possible to taste it?

            "I don't see why not," she says, blindly reaching under her herb counter and pulling out a packet of dried leaves. She talks over her shoulder as she finds a pot and fetches water from a well built into the wall of the building. 

            "Barley tea is favored by mares, even when they don't require their medicine. I prefer to take it with milk, but it's still good alone," she explains as the tea steeps, quietly humming a tune as she pours a cup.'

rows.original: Ask Kavi to try the barley tea she mentioned.

rows.translation: 去问问卡维关于她喝的牛奶的事吧。

rows.original: Ask the plush cow if she'd like to praise Mallach.
rows.translation: 问问那只毛绒奶牛，她是否愿意称赞马拉克。
rows.raw: "Ask the plush cow if she'd like to praise Mallach."

rows.original: Kavi the alchemist is roughly eight and a half feet of northern minotaur. Her thick fur coat is mostly brown, with intermittent splotches of white that share a contrast with her deep blue eyes. Dark brown hair is interlaced with colorful beads and stone rings. She doesn't make a point to show off, but her every movement seems to invite your eyes to feast on a new facet of her figure. The thick and colorful cloth of her dress does nothing to conceal the curve of her ample bottom, and little more to cover her chest. The twin mountains of her breasts quake and quiver with the slightest motion, and you can just spy the pale pink flesh of her areola at the hem of her dress. [flags.KAVI_MILK_TRIED|You happen to know that her nipples match the scale, too big to fit your mouth around and dripping with creamy milk. ]Each pillar of boobflesh is big enough around to hug, but the bovine matron manages to handle herself as gracefully as any catfolk dancer. The most bizarre part of it is that despite their size, her breasts maintain a healthy bounciness. The rest of Kavi's body is sturdy enough to carry her milky burdens. Broad shoulders, broad hips, and a strong back give her the impression of a very comfortable bed. A thick tail with a long tuft of chocolate fur swishes behind her, long enough to brush the stone tiles as she walks. [pc.isTrap|[pc.isHeight 60||As if reading your mind, the motherly minotaur tosses a hungry smile in your direction, presenting an unspoken invitation.]]
rows.translation: 炼金术士卡薇身高大约八英尺半，属于北方米诺陶人种。她那厚厚的毛皮主要是棕色的，其间散布着一些白色的斑点，这些白色斑点与她深蓝色的眼睛形成了鲜明的对比。她的深棕色头发上还编织着各种彩色珠子和石环。 她并没有刻意炫耀，但她的每一个动作似乎都在吸引人们的目光，让人们得以欣赏她身形的每一个动人之处。她那件色彩鲜艳、质地厚实的连衣裙，既无法掩盖她那丰满臀部的曲线，也几乎无法遮住她的胸部。 她那双饱满的乳房稍一移动就会微微颤动，从裙摆处还能隐约看到她乳晕处那淡粉色的肌肤。 [flags.KAVI_MILK_TRIED|你是不是知道，她的乳头也和那个比例完全吻合——太大，根本无法用嘴巴含住，而且还会分泌出乳白色的乳汁来。 ]这些丰满的胸部每一处都大到足以让人拥入怀中，但这位身材高大的女性却能像任何猫人舞者一样优雅地移动。最奇怪的是，尽管她的胸部如此丰满，它们依然保持着令人羡慕的弹性。 卡维的身体其他部位也都非常结实，足以承受她怀中的婴儿。宽厚的肩膀、丰满的臀部以及强健的背部，让她看起来就像…… 非常 一张舒适的床。她的身后拖着一条浓密的尾巴，尾巴上长着一簇长长的巧克力色毛发，走路时，这些毛发甚至能够擦到石板地面。 [pc.isTrap|[pc.isHeight 60||仿佛读懂了你的心思，这只充满母性关怀的米诺陶尔向你投来了一个充满渴望的微笑，仿佛在无声地邀请你。]]
