rows.original:
A northern minotaur this far south? Why, she must be melting in this weather.

		"Feh. If that were all it took, we'd never get any trading done. This last winter was very refreshing. It was fun watching the mares bundle themselves in layer after layer. I couldn't stop giggling. Poor Tarah looked like a wrapped present!" The tall matron laughs, shaking her head in amusement. Seriously though, you'd imagine seeing some northern minotaurs in Khor'minos, perhaps, but how does one wind up living with the marefolk? She gives you a simple shrug.

		"The biggest export the north has is herbs. Plants with very specific growing conditions that require attention and know-how are particularly prized. The elder marefolk alchemist wanted to buy knowledge as well as plants, and paid well for me to stay and teach her. The other marefolk were... persuasive. My baby girl even more so. I had entertained thoughts of returning north some day, after finding an apprentice. Tarah did not so much kill my hopes as banish those thoughts from my mind," she says with undeniable conviction, smiling at a memory as she thumbs one of the more crude looking beads in her long hair.

		"So I stayed, learned alchemy from the elder, and took her place when she passed some years ago. I wound up being rather skilled at mixing the[flags.KAVI_TALK_MALES| feminizing drugs and] various medicines that the marefolk require. We don't really have alchemists in the Far North, so learning was like skinning a thick king seal. My hands learned faster than my head, completing mixtures while I shouted at my teacher for better explanations. Eeesh, the smug looks she gave me; still haunting my dreams," the fluffy beast-woman makes an exaggerated show of shuddering, one that does wonderful things for her bust.

		"Is there anything else you'd like to know?"
rows.translation:
一个北方迷宫牛出现在这么南边的地方？天啊，在这种天气里，它肯定早就融化了。

“呸。如果真只是因为这个原因，我们就永远无法进行任何交易了。上个冬天可真是太有趣了——看着那些母马一层又一层地裹上厚厚的毛毯，真是太好笑了。 我忍不住咯咯直笑。可怜的塔拉看起来就像一个被包装好的礼物啊！那位高个子的妇人笑着，连连摇头。说真的，你可能会想象在科尔米诺斯看到一些北方的牛头人，但究竟是怎么会有人和马人一起生活的呢？ 她只是简单地耸了耸肩，说道：“北方出口最多的商品就是各种草药。那些生长条件极为特殊、需要精心照料和专业知识的植物尤其受到重视。那位年长的马人炼金术士不仅想要购买这些草药，还愿意付出丰厚的报酬，让我留下来教导她。 其他那些马人……真的很有说服力。尤其是我的女儿，她的说服力更是强得惊人。我曾经想过，等找到一个学徒后，有朝一日会回到北方去。但塔拉并没有彻底打消我的这个念头，而是让这些想法彻底从我的脑海中消失了。”她边说边微笑着，一边用拇指拨弄着自己长发中那颗看起来较为粗糙的珠子，语气中充满了坚定的信念。

		所以我留了下来，向那位长者学习了炼金术，几年后她去世后，我就接替了她的位置。最终，我在调配各种材料方面变得相当熟练。[flags.KAVI_TALK_MALES| 使女性化的药物] 马人族所需的各类药物。在极北之地，我们确实没有炼金术士，所以学习这些知识简直就像剥制一头厚厚的海豹皮一样困难。我的双手学得比我的头脑快，一边完成配药工作，一边还冲着老师大声要求更详细的解释。哎呀，她当时那副得意的表情……至今还时常出现在我的梦中呢。”这位毛茸茸的兽人女子夸张地打了个寒颤，这一动作让她的胸部显得更加丰满。

“还有其他你想了解的事情吗？

rows.original: Ask the northern minotaur how she came to the valley.
rows.translation: 去问问那个北方的弥诺陶洛斯，她是怎么来到这个山谷的。
rows.raw: "Ask the northern minotaur how she came to the valley."

rows.original:
You've heard the stories, but do they really do the Far North justice? What's it like to actually live there?

		"It's cold," she says, without a hint of a joke. Her explanation continues before you get a chance to laugh.

		"The natives here think their winters are dangerous, things like that blizzard that came through the Marches. I could walk in such weather naked and manage to overheat without much effort at all. I strove to make sure the inside of my snow house reached such temperatures. One of my husbands could freeze to death in minutes alone outside without a full wrapping of warming garments, and I wouldn't last much longer. The thought of it..." A pallor clouds her features for a scant moment, resolving into a warmer smile than the one she had before.

		"But no, cold is not enough a word to describe the weather in the north. Your people have a word that comes closer, if I remember... frigid. Even that sounds silly on my tongue, most unlike a word that describes something that can kill with such ease. We survive it. I was unused to the rivalry with the centaurs when I first came to live here. The centaurs in the Far North are much fluffier and more compact, but hardier. Working together comes as easily as eating. If you squabble over something as petty as who shares a bed with another, you won't have time to make a bed in the first place," she laughs.

		"The more bodies you have in a home, the warmer it is. Some minotaurs take as many as five or six husbands, keeping them warm at night and letting them keep each other company during the day while they're out hunting. The most prized husband always sleeps nestled against her chest, snug and safe. In coastal homesteads the men even help with fishing. They're more suited to the subtle intricacies of it, and fishing together is a common method of bonding," the shaggy cow matron describes, growing more exuberant as she reaches the end of her tale.

		"But it is nice here. It is nice being able to sleep with a lover without fretting if others are warm enough. There weren't towns like this in the North, but they have been a welcome adjustment to make. Here, there is a whole community to rely on for food, protection, everything. Back home you might meet another hunting party, but your home is you and your family. Here, home is for everyone. I like it." She nods with a touch of finality. 

		"Is there anything else?"
rows.translation:
你肯定听说过这些故事，但它们真的能公正地描绘远北地区的真实面貌吗？真正生活在那里会是怎样的体验呢？

“那里很冷，”她说道，语气里没有半分开玩笑的意味。在她让你有机会笑出来之前，她就已经继续解释下去去了。

		这里的原住民认为他们的冬天非常危险，就像三月份那场暴风雪一样。在那种天气里，我就算光着身子走路，也完全不会觉得冷，反而很容易就热过头。所以我一直努力让我的雪屋内部保持这样的温度。 我的其中一个丈夫，如果只穿着薄薄的衣服独自待在户外，几分钟内就会冻死，而我也不会比他坚持得更久。一想到这个……她的脸色瞬间变得苍白，但很快又恢复了往常的微笑，甚至比之前更加温暖。

		但是，‘寒冷’这个词远远不足以形容北方的天气。如果我没记错的话，你们那里有個更贴切的词……‘严寒’。不过这个词在我嘴里说出来，反而觉得有些奇怪，因为它听起来根本不像是一个用来形容能够如此轻易地夺去生命的天气的词。 我们挺过来了。刚来到这里的时候，我还不习惯与半人马们之间的竞争关系。远北地区的半人马体型更加圆润、结实，但也更加坚韧。与他们合作就像吃饭一样自然。如果你们为了一些琐碎的事情争吵，比如谁该和谁同床共枕，那么你们根本就不会有时间去整理床铺了，”她笑着说。

		在一个家里，人数越多，环境就会越温暖。有些米诺陶洛斯会同时拥有五六个丈夫，这样在夜晚他们可以互相保暖，而在白天外出狩猎时，这些丈夫也可以互相陪伴。其中最受宠爱的丈夫总是会依偎在她的胸前睡觉，既温暖又安全。 在沿海地区的定居点里，男人们甚至也会帮忙捕鱼。他们更擅长处理捕鱼过程中那些细微而复杂的环节，而一起捕鱼也是增进彼此感情的常见方式，”这位头发蓬乱的妇女边讲述边越说越兴奋。

		但这里真的很不错。能够和爱人一起睡觉，而不用担心别人是否够暖和，这种感觉真的很棒。在北方并没有这样的地方，但这样的生活方式确实让人感到非常舒适。在这里，有一个完整的社区可以为你提供食物、保护，以及一切你需要的东西。在家里，你可能会遇到其他的狩猎队，但你的家只有你和你的家人；而在这里，家是属于每个人的。我喜欢这里。”她轻轻点了点头，语气中带着一丝坚定的意味。 

		还有其他事情吗？

rows.original: Ask Kavi about the Far North.
rows.translation: 去问问卡维关于远北地区的事情吧。

rows.original:
"So what happens to male marefolk? When do they become crazed monsters? They can't be like that from birth, can they?" you ask, genuinely curious. The chesty cow gives you a relieving chuckle.

		"No, they're born no different. I've been here long enough to see that first hand. The change happens during or very soon after puberty. The changes that turn them into men also cloud their minds. The most intelligent child will have his knowledge reduced to a cruel cunning. They can function enough to speak, but their thoughts are always on the next fuck. Maybe one or two in history have retained their manners, but it's a bad chance to take for ones so young. So the elders of long ago decided not to gamble." She shrugs.

		"They developed a drug that allowed male marefolk to grow in the same way as women do, while still retaining their... virility. They grow breasts, their hips fill out, their physique softens, but most importantly, their minds are cleared. This is not to say they are forcibly indoctrinated against their wills. You may have seen the males rampaging out across the valley," she gestures vaguely north.

		"When a male reaches puberty he is given the choice to take the mare's barley or be exiled. He is given a period of time to feel the madness setting in. If he decides that the feeling is welcome, then that is his choice. Otherwise, he takes the drug, either boiled in a tea or chewed directly. At first it must be taken daily, but once the changes begin to set in the requirements become much more lax. Most adult mares only need it once every handful of months, or longer." She smiles, taking a sidelong glance at her daughter as the shorter girl rushes off to finish some chore or other. When she's gone she turns back to you.

		"That's how it was with my daughter, you know? I fretted so much in the months before she was to make her choice, but when it was offered she didn't even consider letting herself become like that. She also took exceptionally well to the barley, which is a... mixed blessing, I think." She lets out an exasperated sigh.

		[flags.TARAH_STATE
		    |"She is rather high-energy, isn't she?" you confirm, getting a small chuckle from the matronly alchemist.

		    "That's certainly one way to put it,"
		    |"What do you mean? Isn't that a good thing?" you ask, netting an amused grunt from the matronly alchemist.

            "Maybe. Speak with her a little, and you'll see what I mean,"
        ] she replies.

		"Is there anything else you wanted?"
rows.translation:
那么，雄性马人会怎么样呢？他们是在什么时候变成那些疯狂的怪物的？他们不可能从出生起就是那样的吧？”你出于真正的好奇问道。那头胸大腰圆的母牛听后，给出了一个让你感到宽慰的笑声。

“不，他们出生时和雌性马人并没有什么不同。 我在这里待了足够长的时间，亲眼见证了这一变化。这种变化发生在青春期期间或之后不久。那些使他们变成男人的变化，也会使他们的心智变得混乱。即使是最聪明的孩子，他的知识也会被削弱，只剩下一种残忍的狡猾。 他们虽然能够正常说话，但心思却总是想着下一件该做的事情。历史上或许有一两个例外，保持了良好的举止，但对于这么年轻的人来说，这种可能性实在太小了。因此，很久以前的长者们决定不冒险尝试让这些年轻人保持礼貌举止。她耸了耸肩。

		他们研制出了一种药物，使得雄性马人能够像女性一样成长，同时依然保持他们的……雄性特征。他们的胸部会发育，臀部会变得丰满，体态也会变得柔和，但最重要的是，他们的思想也会变得清晰明了。这并不是说他们被强行灌输了某种思想而违背了自己的意愿。你们可能已经看到那些雄性马人在山谷中肆意奔腾了吧，”她朝北方模糊地指了指。

		当男性进入青春期时，他可以选择服用‘母马大麦’这种药物，否则就会被流放。他会有一段时间来感受这种药物带来的影响。如果他认为这种感觉是可接受的，那么这就是他的选择；否则，他就需要服用这种药物——要么将其煮沸后饮用，要么直接咀嚼。 起初，必须每天服用，但一旦开始看到效果，使用频率就可以大大降低了。大多数成年母马每隔几个月才需要服用一次，甚至更久。”她微笑着，侧眼瞥了瞥自己的女儿——那个个子较矮的女孩正匆匆跑去完成某项家务。 当她离开后，她又会回到你身边。

		我女儿也是这样，你知道吗？在她做出选择的那些个月里，我忧心忡忡，但当那个机会真正出现时，她甚至都没有考虑过要变成那样。而且她对大麦也适应得非常好，不过我觉得，这其实是个……喜忧参半的结果。”她无奈地叹了口气。

		[flags.TARAH_STATE
		    |她确实精力非常充沛，不是吗？”你说道，这位像母亲一般的炼金术士轻声笑了起来。

“这么说倒也确实。
		    |你是什么意思？这不是件好事吗？”你问道，这位像母亲一样的炼金术士听后只是发出了一声有趣的哼声。

“也许吧。和她聊一会儿，你就会明白我的意思了。
        ] 她回答道：“还有其他什么你想要问的吗？

The most intelligent child will have his knowledge reduced to a cruel cunning. They can function enough to speak, but their thoughts are always on the next fuck. Maybe one or two in history have retained their manners, but it's a bad chance to take for ones so young. So the elders of long ago decided not to gamble." She shrugs.

		"They developed a drug that allowed male marefolk to grow in the same way as women do, while still retaining their... virility. They grow breasts, their hips fill out, their physique softens, but most importantly, their minds are cleared. This is not to say they are forcibly indoctrinated against their wills. You may have seen the males rampaging out across the valley," she gestures vaguely north.

		"When a male reaches puberty he is given the choice to take the mare's barley or be exiled. He is given a period of time to feel the madness setting in. If he decides that the feeling is welcome, then that is his choice. Otherwise, he takes the drug, either boiled in a tea or chewed directly. At first it must be taken daily, but once the changes begin to set in the requirements become much more lax. Most adult mares only need it once every handful of months, or longer." She smiles, taking a sidelong glance at her daughter as the shorter girl rushes off to finish some chore or other. When she's gone she turns back to you.

		"That's how it was with my daughter, you know? I fretted so much in the months before she was to make her choice, but when it was offered she didn't even consider letting herself become like that. She also took exceptionally well to the barley, which is a... mixed blessing, I think." She lets out an exasperated sigh.

		[flags.TARAH_STATE
		    |"She is rather high-energy, isn't she?" you confirm, getting a small chuckle from the matronly alchemist.

		    "That's certainly one way to put it,"
		    |"What do you mean? Isn't that a good thing?" you ask, netting an amused grunt from the matronly alchemist.

            "Maybe. Speak with her a little, and you'll see what I mean,"
        ] she replies.

		"Is there anything else you wanted?"
        '

rows.translation: 去问问卡维关于雄性马人族的事情吧。

rows.original:
Kavi's eyes go wide, and she practically trips right over you in her rush to reach you. When she does, without falling, she inspects you thoroughly, pinching various parts of your body and squeezing others.
    
        "Velun's mercy... How did you do that? Your body just... changed! Is this some kind of curse?" she exclaims, flabbergasted. You explain that you don't think so, and give the simplest possible explanation of Kasyrra's arrival. Kavi takes the info with raised eyebrows.
    
        "I had heard about this 'demon' from the foragers. She has the centaurs wrapped around her fingers, but it seems like even being close to her has an effect. This changing you've acquired is... fascinating, but I would be careful of anything related to something like her. Seeing the effects of her magic on the centaurs is terrifying." She shudders, rubbing your shoulders before releasing you.
    
        "In the meantime, I would be very interested in this capability of yours. I can't give away the barley for free, but I would be happy to sell it, and you could always get it from mares who get too forceful in the field." She rolls her eyes, giving you one last look-over before returning to the counter.
rows.translation:
卡维的眼睛瞪得大大的，她急切地想要走到你身边，结果差点撞到你。不过她没有摔倒，而是仔细地检查了你一番，捏了捏你身体的各个部位，又按了按其他地方。

“真是维伦的恩典啊……你是怎么做到的？你的身体竟然……发生了变化！这是某种诅咒吗？”她惊愕地问道。你解释说并不认为是这样，然后用最简单的方式说明了卡西拉的出现原因。卡维听完后，挑起了眉毛，似乎对这一情况感到非常疑惑。
    
        我之前从那些采集者那里听说过这个‘恶魔’。她似乎能让半人马们对她言听计从，而且似乎只要靠近她，就会受到她的影响。你身上发生的这种变化……实在令人着迷，但我还是建议你对与她有关的一切保持警惕。 看到她的魔法对半人马们产生的影响，真是令人毛骨悚然。”她颤抖着，轻轻拍了拍你的肩膀，然后放开了你。

“顺便说一下，我对你这种能力非常感兴趣。虽然我不能免费把大麦送给别人，但我很乐意出售它——而且你总可以从那些在田里行为过于粗暴的母马那里得到这些大麦。她翻了个白眼，最后再扫了你一眼，然后才回到柜台后面去。
rows.raw:
"
        Kavi's eyes go wide, and she practically trips right over you in her rush to reach you. When she does, without falling, she inspects you thoroughly, pinching various parts of your body and squeezing others.
    
        "Velun's mercy... How did you do that? Your body just... changed! Is this some kind of curse?" she exclaims, flabbergasted. You explain that you don't think so, and give the simplest possible explanation of Kasyrra's arrival. Kavi takes the info with raised eyebrows.
    
        "I had heard about this 'demon' from the foragers. She has the centaurs wrapped around her fingers, but it seems like even being close to her has an effect. This changing you've acquired is... fascinating, but I would be careful of anything related to something like her. Seeing the effects of her magic on the centaurs is terrifying." She shudders, rubbing your shoulders before releasing you.
    
        "In the meantime, I would be very interested in this capability of yours. I can't give away the barley for free, but I would be happy to sell it, and you could always get it from mares who get too forceful in the field." She rolls her eyes, giving you one last look-over before returning to the counter."

rows.original: You nod politely, taking the cup from her outstretched hands and sipping the hot beverage. The taste is decidedly bready, but leaves you feeling warm both inside and out. As you drink you feel a sudden change come about you, welling up within till it forces itself to the surface!
rows.translation: 你礼貌地点了点头，从她伸过来的手中接过杯子，开始品尝这杯热饮。它的味道确实带有明显的面包香气，但喝下去后，你会感到全身都暖和起来。在喝的过程中，你突然感觉到自己体内发生了一些变化，这些变化逐渐积累，最终涌上了表面！
rows.raw: "\n\t\tYou nod politely, taking the cup from her outstretched hands and sipping the hot beverage. The taste is decidedly bready, but leaves you feeling warm both inside and out. As you drink you feel a sudden change come about you, welling up within till it forces itself to the surface!"

rows.original: Drink the tea as-is. This will trigger a random equine transformation.
rows.translation: 就这个样子喝茶吧。 这将触发一次随机的马形变身。
rows.raw: "Drink the tea as-is. This will trigger a random equine transformation."

rows.original: You ask if you can have the tea with milk, feeling a little disappointed when the matronly cow woman pulls a small container from behind the counter and pours a short stream of milk into your cup before handing it to you. Despite that, the milk-infused tea is heaven on your tongue, cooling the heat just enough while also blunting the bready taste with sweet cream. As you drink you feel a sudden change come about you, welling up within till it forces itself to the surface!
rows.translation: 你询问是否可以加牛奶来喝这种茶，当那位面容和蔼的女服务员从柜台后面拿出一个小容器，往你的杯子里倒入少量牛奶后递给你时，你感到有些失望。不过，这种加入了牛奶的茶在口中带来的滋味简直如同天赐之物——它刚好能缓解口中的燥热，同时甜美的奶油也中和了茶中略带麦香的口感。随着你继续饮用，突然间，一种奇妙的感觉在体内逐渐涌动，最终强烈地显现了出来！
rows.raw: "\n\t\tYou ask if you can have the tea with milk, feeling a little disappointed when the matronly cow woman pulls a small container from behind the counter and pours a short stream of milk into your cup before handing it to you. Despite that, the milk-infused tea is heaven on your tongue, cooling the heat just enough while also blunting the bready taste with sweet cream. As you drink you feel a sudden change come about you, welling up within till it forces itself to the surface!"

rows.original: Ask to take the tea with milk. This will trigger a random bovine transformation.
rows.translation: 要加牛奶的茶。 这将触发随机的牛形变体生成。
rows.raw: "Ask to take the tea with milk. This will trigger a random bovine transformation."

rows.original:
On second thought, the tea might suit the mare's taste buds for a reason. You're fine for now. Kavi shrugs, sipping at the tea herself as she scoots back around the counter.

		"Suit yourself. It will be here if you'd like to try some." She shrugs noncommittally, sipping the drink herself.
rows.translation:
仔细想想，这种茶或许确实符合那匹母马的口味。你暂时也没什么问题。卡维耸了耸肩，一边自己小口喝着茶，一边往柜台后面挪了挪。

“随你便。如果你想尝尝的话，茶还在这里。”她漫不经心地耸了耸肩，继续喝着自己的茶。
rows.raw:
"
		On second thought, the tea might suit the mare's taste buds for a reason. You're fine for now. Kavi shrugs, sipping at the tea herself as she scoots back around the counter.

		"Suit yourself. It will be here if you'd like to try some." She shrugs noncommittally, sipping the drink herself."

rows.original: On second thought, maybe barley isn't for you.
rows.translation: 仔细想想，也许大麦并不适合你。
rows.raw: "On second thought, maybe barley isn't for you."

rows.original:
You ask Kavi if you could have another drink of her milk. 

        "You seem to have a knack for asking just when I feel most pent-up. Must be some kind of clairvoyant," she says with a grin, gesturing for you to follow as she shuffles toward the back room.
rows.translation:
你问卡维是否可以再喝一杯她的牛奶。

“你似乎总能在我最想喝的时候提出这样的请求。你该不是有什么预知能力吧？”她笑着说，一边笑着一边示意你跟在她后面，然后朝后面的房间走去。
rows.raw:
'
        You ask Kavi if you could have another drink of her milk. 

        "You seem to have a knack for asking just when I feel most pent-up. Must be some kind of clairvoyant," she says with a grin, gesturing for you to follow as she shuffles toward the back room.'

rows.original: In the most polite way you can muster, you ask Kavi what she does with her milk. After all, with the size of her assets, there must be a ton of it. That gets a full-chested guffaw out of the sturdy bovine. "There is a ton of it, but you underestimate how much milk a whole tribe of marefolk can drink. None of the stores here are unaccounted for, but that isn't to say I don't have any milk left. We up north are of sturdy stock, and it would take more than a gaggle of thirsty mares to drain me. I can show you how it goes, if you'd like." She leans down on the counter, letting her tail swish from side to side as she shows off the literal valley of her cleavage.
rows.translation: 你用最礼貌的方式询问卡维她把那些牛奶都用来做什么了。毕竟，以她拥有的财富来看，她肯定拥有大量的牛奶。这个问题让这只健壮的牛发出了响亮的笑声。 “那些牛奶啊…… 是 确实有那么多，但你完全低估了一整个马人部落能喝掉多少牛奶。这里的商店里卖的牛奶都没有被遗漏，不过这并不意味着我剩下的牛奶已经不多了。我们北方人的体格可都很强壮，就算有一群口渴的马也需要很多时间才能把我这里的牛奶喝光。如果你愿意，我可以给你演示一下到底是怎么回事。”她把身体靠在柜台上，尾巴左右摇摆着，露出了那令人惊叹的胸部曲线。
rows.raw: " In the most polite way you can muster, you ask Kavi what she does with her milk. After all, with the size of her assets, there must be a ton of it. That gets a full-chested guffaw out of the sturdy bovine. "There is a ton of it, but you underestimate how much milk a whole tribe of marefolk can drink. None of the stores here are unaccounted for, but that isn't to say I don't have any milk left. We up north are of sturdy stock, and it would take more than a gaggle of thirsty mares to drain me. I can show you how it goes, if you'd like." She leans down on the counter, letting her tail swish from side to side as she shows off the literal valley of her cleavage."

rows.original:
You follow Kavi into one of the large watchpost's adjoined yurts, one that you now see is packed with large barrels filled to the brim with milk. The containers are neatly divvied into sections for mares to pick up at their leisure, with varying amounts that assumedly correspond to the size of a family. Though it seems clean of spills for now, the smell of sweet milk seems deeply suffused into the very being of the room.

        The stout bovine checks a few containers before seating herself before an empty one, gesturing to a stool on the opposite side of the barrel for you to sit on. [flags.KAVI_MILK_TRIED |You take your seat with [a] [pc.mf|schoolboy's|schoolgirl's] anticipation, keeping your mouth shut to stop from drooling as you watch the busty bovine undo the sash that ties her dress together. A single hefty mammary slips free under her ministrations, and she cradles its bulk in her arms before resting it on the edge of the barrel. She heaves a sigh of relief as she begins to massage the massive teat, biting her lower lip.|You sit with a little confusion, tapping your fingers around the solid wood rim. It's plain that the herbalist has breasts fit for a giant, but wouldn't it be more comfortable to nurse closer together? The northern minotauress, halfway through undoing the sash on her dress, pauses, staring at you in bewilderment for a scant few seconds before bursting into a hearty bout of laughter that sets her chest to quaking. She slaps the side of the chest she sits on, wiping tears from her eyes as she beams at you.

        "Ahh, dear child. You'll not be nursing. The barrel is here to make sure at least some of the milk is not wasted. I assure you it will be needed." Even as she speaks, her hands are busy shifting apart the dress that you now realize was making much more of an effort to contain her than you thought. Her chest somehow manages to look even grander as the confining garment loosens up, and as she pulls one heaving breast from its place you understand what she meant.

        The bubblegum pink nipple that tips her titanic tit is bigger than your head! This one alone is easily as big as the largest plate you've seen at the Frost Hound, and already dripping with creamy white milk. You find your mouth watering as the first thick droplet splashes succinctly into the bottom of the barrel. She heaves a sigh of relief as she begins to massage the massive teat, biting her lower lip.]

        "Ready? Here it comes!" You break out of your boob-induced stupor just in time to take a blast of creamy milk to the face. You [pc.isBimbo|giggle|sputter] and open your mouth, catching some of the bovine bounty even as the majority runs down your face and chest in rivers that drain into the bottom of the bucket. It's a struggle to shield your eyes enough to wipe them clear against the ebbless tide of white that assaults your face. The taste is another obstacle, as you're caught between wiping your eyes and not blocking the torrent of sweetness that makes love to your taste buds.

        A brief reprieve presents itself as Kavi adjusts her grip, giving you the opportunity to shield your eyes from the next spray. You glance through your fingers, seeing the pleased grin on Kavi's face and laughing as you swallow another mouthful. Waste indeed, your clothes are already soaked to the skin, and the bucket isn't even half full! Milk sprays from the cow matron's giant teat like a fountain, curving in a handful of gentle arcs that patter against your chest. 

        Now that the pressure has been released a little the spray is much more manageable. You're able to lower your hands and bob to catch separate streams on your tongue. An errant stream tickles the roof of your mouth, leaving you giggling after you swallow, unable to shake the feeling. 

        "Ha, a reaction like that. [flags.KAVI_MILK_TRIED|Like a child drinking for the first time|It's always so fun to watch you drink]," Kavi laughs, shaking her head as she continues to bathe you in liquid ivory. At this point bath is an apt word, what with streamers dripping from your elbows and trickling down your legs. The barrel is nearly full as well, and the steady spray from the busty bovine's mountainous breast has slowed significantly. 

        "Much better. I'll be full again in a few hours, but it's always good to get a breather. Come then, let me help you with that." She grins, mopping you up with a towel. You can still feel milk in your nooks and crannies by the time she finishes, but outwardly you seem to be mostly dry. And inside you feel full and rested, ready to kick demon ass! No wonder the mares like to drink this stuff, if it's this potent all the time.

        "Ha, it has to be! How else would my husbands stay warm in the cold?" Kavi says as she brings you back through the tent to the stone entryway. She speaks as if it were obvious, and you honestly can't say it isn't with how you're feeling.

        "Now that you've drunk your fill, is there anything else you'd like?" the bovine woman asks, her tail swishing absently back and forth.
rows.translation:
你跟随卡维走进了其中一个大型瞭望哨旁边搭建的蒙古包，里面堆满了装满牛奶的大桶。这些容器被整齐地分成了若干区域，让母马们可以随时取用牛奶，而不同数量的牛奶显然对应着不同规模的家庭需求。 虽然目前看起来没有液体溢出的痕迹，但那种甜奶的气味似乎已经渗透到了这个房间的每一个角落。

那只健壮的牛检查了几个容器，然后坐在了一个空容器旁边，同时示意你坐在桶对面的凳子上。 [flags.KAVI_MILK_TRIED |你坐到自己的位置上。 [a] [pc.mf|男学生的|女学生的] 当你看着那个胸部丰满的女性解开束紧她裙子的腰带时，你只能强忍住口水，不敢发出任何声音。在她的一番操作下，一个硕大的乳房从衣服中露出了出来，她将这个丰满的乳房抱在怀里，然后把它放在桶的边缘。她松了一口气，开始轻轻按摩这个巨大的乳房，同时咬着下唇。|你坐在那里，心中充满疑惑，手指轻轻敲打着实木制成的边缘。很明显，这位草药医生的胸部大得仿佛属于一个巨人，但这样哺乳的话，难道不会更加不舒服吗？那位北方的女弥诺陶洛斯在解开自己裙子的腰带时停了下来，困惑地盯着你看了几秒钟，然后突然爆发出一阵爽朗的笑声，使得她的胸部都开始颤抖起来。 她拍了拍自己坐着的胸膛，一边擦去眼角的泪水，一边微笑着对你说道：

“啊，亲爱的孩子。你不需要再喂奶了。这个桶的作用就是确保至少有一部分牛奶不会被浪费掉。我向你保证，这些牛奶肯定会派上用场的。就在她说话的时候，她的双手正在忙着拉开那件裙子——你现在才意识到，这件裙子其实一直在努力束缚她的身体，其束缚力比你想象的要大得多。当这件束缚她的衣物被拉开后，她的胸部看起来更加丰满迷人，而当她将其中一只隆起的乳房从衣物的束缚中解放出来时，你终于明白了她的意思。

        那颗呈泡泡糖粉色的乳头，耸立在她那巨大的乳房上，其大小甚至超过了你的头部！单单这一颗乳头的体积，就足以与你曾在“霜猎犬”餐厅见过的最大号盘子相媲美，而且此刻它正不断地分泌出乳白色的乳汁。当第一滴浓稠的乳汁溅落到桶底时，你不禁感到口水直流…… 她松了一口气，开始按摩那巨大的乳房，同时咬着下唇。]

        准备好了吗？来了！”你刚好从那由胸部引起的呆滞状态中恢复过来，就立刻被一股奶油状的牛奶喷到了脸上。你…… [pc.isBimbo|轻笑|喷溅] 张大嘴巴，试图捕捉那些落下来的颗粒，然而大部分颗粒却顺着你的脸和胸膛流了下来，最终汇聚到桶底。在这种白色颗粒不断冲击你的情况下，要想好好保护自己的眼睛并将其擦干净，实在是一件非常困难的事情。 这种味道也构成了另一个障碍——因为你既想擦眼睛，又不想错过那些令你的味蕾为之愉悦的甜蜜滋味。

然而，当卡维调整了自己的握持方式时，你终于得到了一丝喘息的机会，可以暂时遮挡住那些即将喷涌而出的甜蜜液体，保护自己的眼睛不受刺激。 你透过手指望去，看到卡维脸上洋溢着愉悦的笑容，不禁笑了起来，又咽下了一口。真是浪费啊——你的衣服都已经湿透了，而那个桶甚至还没装满一半呢！牛奶从那位奶牛妈妈的巨大乳房中喷涌而出，如同喷泉一般，形成一道道柔和的弧线，洒在你的胸口上。 

        现在压力稍微缓解了一些，这种喷射液就容易控制多了。你可以把手放低，轻轻晃动舌头，让液体分别流到不同的位置。有时候，会有少量的液体误触到上颚，让你在吞下后仍会忍不住发笑，这种感觉实在让人难以忘怀。 

        哈，竟然会有这样的反应。 [flags.KAVI_MILK_TRIED|就像一个第一次喝水的孩子一样|看着你喝酒，总是这么有趣。]哈哈，”卡维笑着摇着头，继续用那种乳白色的液体为你洗澡。此刻，用‘洗澡’这个词来形容确实再合适不过了——你的肘部挂着液滴，液体顺着你的双腿缓缓流下。那个装满液体的桶也差不多快满了，而那只胸部丰满的牛儿不断喷出的液体，其流量也已经明显减弱了许多。 

        好多了。再过几个小时我就又会饿了吧，不过偶尔休息一下总是好的。来吧，让我帮你擦干吧。”她笑着说，用毛巾把你擦干。等她擦完后，你身上那些隐蔽的地方可能还沾着奶渍，但外表上看起来已经差不多干透了。 喝下它之后，你会感到浑身充满力量，精神焕发，随时准备与恶魔战斗！难怪那些母马这么喜欢喝这种东西，如果它真的有这样的效果的话。

“哈，肯定是这样的！不然我的丈夫们怎么能在寒冷的天气里保持温暖呢？”卡维一边说，一边带你穿过帐篷，走向那扇石制的入口。 她说话的时候，语气仿佛这一切都是理所当然的；而考虑到你现在的感受，确实也觉得没什么可质疑的。

“既然你已经喝够了，还想要些什么吗？”那个体型粗壮的女人问道，她的尾巴漫不经心地来回摆动着。

The containers are neatly divvied into sections for mares to pick up at their leisure, with varying amounts that assumedly correspond to the size of a family. Though it seems clean of spills for now, the smell of sweet milk seems deeply suffused into the very being of the room.

        The stout bovine checks a few containers before seating herself before an empty one, gesturing to a stool on the opposite side of the barrel for you to sit on. [flags.KAVI_MILK_TRIED |You take your seat with [a] [pc.mf|schoolboy's|schoolgirl's] anticipation, keeping your mouth shut to stop from drooling as you watch the busty bovine undo the sash that ties her dress together. rows.original:
[flags.MARE_STYLISTS_MET
        |You walk into Ponytails and see the two proprietors. Aunora stands straight and bows slightly to greet you, while Ikora waves you in. "Welcome back! What can I do for you today?"
        |If for whatever reason you thought the inside of the yurt would be any less extravagant than the outside, then you'd be disappointed. The floor is decorated with furs that are colored in the same patterns as the tent outside. The walls are covered in different, colorful paintings, cloths, and various charms adorned with multi-colored feathers and jewels.
        
        You spend so much time admiring the decorations that you don't notice the large marefolk woman standing behind the store counter. She stands and watches you, completely silent with a shy smile on her face. You approach the counter, but she remains silent.
        
        "Hello," you say to her.
        
        She responds by mouthing a quiet greeting back. The counter isn't stocked with much, just a few different colored potions in a variety of glass vials on a shelf behind the marefolk woman. Speaking of her; she's a bit of an odd one. She's fairly typical as far as her people go; tall, distinguished but perhaps less confident than most you've seen, quite beautiful, though she lacks the large breast size of her sisters. Her dress is extravagant, fairly similar to many others you've seen in the village. It's made of silk and primarily red and black with a matching bandana and a white under-dress. White lines and intricate patterns decorate her clothing, giving her a more noble look.
        
        She's still just standing there, though. "Uh, hello?" you call out again.
        
        "Hello."
        
        You jump a little when you realize the voice didn't come from her. You look around and don't see anyone else. Before you fully commit to the idea that the tent is haunted, a small horse face peers over the counter. "Apologies, I seem to have misplaced my stool. Welcome to Ponytails! Keeping everyone beautiful for four generations! I'm Ikora and this is my little sister Aunora."
        
        Little in age only, obviously.
        
        "We offer a wide variety of services for fashion-minded adventurers such as yourself, at a modest price. Dyes, hair cuts, beard trims, the works! So, what'll you be having today?"
    ]
rows.translation:
[flags.MARE_STYLISTS_MET
        |你走进“马尾辫”店，看到了两位店主。奥诺拉站得笔直，微微鞠躬向你致意，而伊科拉则示意你进来。“欢迎回来！今天有什么可以帮到您的吗？
        |如果出于某种原因，你认为蒙古包的内部会比外部显得朴素些，那么你一定会大失所望。地板上铺着与外部帐篷图案相同的毛皮；墙壁上挂满了各种色彩斑斓的画作、布料，还有装饰着五颜六色羽毛和宝石的饰品。
        
        你花了太多时间欣赏那些装饰品，以至于完全没有注意到站在商店柜台后面的那位高个马人女性。她静静地站在那里，注视着你，脸上带着一丝羞涩的微笑。你走到了柜台前，但她依然保持着沉默。
        
        你好，”你对她说。

她轻声回应了一声问候。柜台上的商品并不多，只有几个颜色各异的药剂，它们被放在那位马人女性身后的架子上，装在各种玻璃小瓶里。 说到她，她确实有点与众不同。就她所属的族群而言，她算是相当典型的代表：身材高挑，容貌出众，但可能没有你们见过的那些人那么自信；她确实很漂亮，不过她的胸部尺寸没有她姐妹们那么丰满。 她的裙子非常华丽，与你在村里见过的许多其他裙子颇为相似。这条裙子是由丝绸制成的，主要采用红色和黑色作为色调，还配有一条同色的头巾以及一件白色的内裙。白色线条和复杂的图案装饰在她的衣服上，使她看起来更加高贵典雅。
        
        然而，她依然只是站在那里。“呃，你好吗？”你又喊了一声。

“你好。”

当你意识到那个声音并不是从她那里发出来的时候，你不禁吓了一跳。你环顾四周，却看不到其他人。就在你开始认为这个帐篷确实有鬼的时候，一个小马头的形象从柜台后面探了出来：“抱歉，我好像把我的凳子放错地方了。欢迎来到‘马尾辫店’！我们让四代人都保持美丽哦！我是伊科拉，这是我的妹妹奥诺拉。
        
        年纪当然还小。

“我们为像您这样热衷于时尚的冒险者们提供各种服务，价格也非常实惠。染色、理发、修胡子，应有尽有！那么，您今天想要做什么呢？
    ]

Her feminine muzzle is topped by a pair of large, glossy red lips. Her bright blue eyes shimmer and shine as she looks at you. Her torso is covered by a long dress that hangs down to her calves. rows.original:
"How are things around the village?"
            
            "A little on edge, but mostly the same as usual. Things don't really change too much around here, I think even grandma said things weren't that different before she passed on. It's not the most exciting place, sure, but I guess change isn't always a good thing..."
            
            She seems uneasy as she says that. 
            
            "Is something wrong?" you ask.
            
            "... There's an uneasy feeling around the village lately. Nobody can really say what it is, but there's something coming and I don't think any of us are going to like it."
rows.translation:
村子里的情况怎么样？”

“有点紧张，但总体上还是和平时一样。这里的情况其实没什么变化，我想就连奶奶在去世前也说过，这里并没有什么不同。 这个地方确实不是最令人兴奋的地方，不过我想，改变并不总是好事吧……

她说这话的时候，看起来有些不安。

“出了什么问题吗？”你问道。

“……最近，整个村庄都弥漫着一种不安的气氛。没有人能确切地说这种不安源于什么，但显然有什么事情即将发生，而我觉得我们当中没有人会喜欢这件事的。

rows.original:
"What's your mom like?"
            
            "Brave to the point of being impulsive, if you didn't figure that out already. People always told me while I was growing up that I was so tame compared to her that they couldn't believe we were related."
            
            "What'd she do?"
            
            "Climb around on roofs, get into fights, run around outside the village by herself, the usual. She admits she was a huge handful and basically had to be looked after constantly to make sure she wasn't about to do something crazy."
            
            "Wow."
            
            "Yeah, I know. She's always been really nice though. Not many people around the village would say anything bad about her these days. Of course, she's been gone so long I'm starting to worry people are going to forget about her..."
rows.translation:
你妈妈是个怎样的人呢？”

“她非常勇敢，甚至有点冲动，如果你还没猜到的话。在我成长的过程中，总有人说，和她相比，我实在太温顺了，他们简直不敢相信我们其实是亲姐妹。她都干了些什么？”
“在屋顶上爬来爬去，打架闹事，还独自在村子外面乱跑，就是那些平常会做的事。她自己也承认自己很难管教，基本上总是需要有人照看，才能确保她不会做出什么疯狂的事情来。哇。”

“是啊，我明白。不过她一直以来都人很好。这些天，村里几乎没人会说她的坏话。当然，她已经离开这么久了，我开始担心人们会渐渐忘记她。.."

rows.raw: "Your hair is braided on both sides of your head upward. They meet at the top of your head creating a large braid in the style of a pompadour. If your hair is particularly long the braid in the middle also turns into a ponytail."

rows.original: Get your hair slicked and gelled into a Pompadour.
rows.translation: 把头发梳得笔直，再用发胶固定成蓬巴杜发型。
rows.raw: "Get your hair slicked and gelled into a Pompadour."

rows.original: Your hair flows back into fluffy spikes behind your head. Two large bangs hang down and outline your face.
rows.translation: 你的头发向后飘散，在脑后形成蓬松的尖刺状。两束长长的刘海垂下来，勾勒出你的脸型。
rows.raw: "Your hair flows back into fluffy spikes behind your head. Two large bangs hang down and outline your face."

rows.original: "Just wanna talk? Sure. Aunora isn't much of a talker though, so I'll be answering most of the questions."
rows.translation: 只是想聊聊而已？当然可以。不过Aunora不太爱说话，所以大部分问题应该由我来回答。
rows.raw: "\n    \"Just wanna talk? Sure. Aunora isn't much of a talker though, so I'll be answering most of the questions.\"\n    "

rows.original:
"Let's start simple. Tell me a bit about yourselves."
        
        "That's it? I'm afraid there's not much for me to say about that." Ikora struggles to think of something to say while Aunora just stands there quietly. "Well, I was born here in the village, naturally. Mom left a while ago, just a bit after we took over the shop. Always was an adventurer type. She used to visit pretty often, but we've been seeing less of her lately. I guess she's going out pretty far these days, or at least I hope that's all it is."
        
        You decide to change the subject quickly before they start worrying too much. "What about your dad?"
        
        "Never met him. I'm not sure if you know how it is for us marefolk, traveler, but our men aren't exactly... domesticated." You notice Aunora getting a little antsy at that. "We're raised communally, for the most part. Mom still took the most responsibility, but I swear I wound up calling Kavi mommy as many times as my actual mom. Anyway, adult males aren't allowed into the village unless they're being used to breed. When we got old enough, Mom would tell us about how she caught her mate herself and fucked him all the way back to the village... it was a weird dinnertime conversation, but that was Mom, I guess."
        
        "You're a little... different from most marefolk I've met."
        
        "I'm not afraid to admit I'm a runt. That's how I came out, that's how I am. If someone wants to judge me for that, then that's their business. At least I've still got the curves to go with it!" Ikora shakes her torso-covering tits before twirling around and giving her rear a little wiggle. Even through her loose dress, you can see her generous globes bounce.
        
        "Is that an invitation?"
        
        "Hmmmm, maaaaaybe..." she says teasingly, swinging her chest one last time.
        
        "What about her?" You point toward Aunora, causing the taller marefolk to look away in embarrassment. "She seems a little shy."
        
        "Uhm, there's a story to that, but I'd just rather not say anything unless she's okay with it."
        
        Reasonable, you think.
        
        "Anything else you wanted to ask?"
rows.translation:
我们先从简单的事情开始吧。请你们介绍一下自己吧。”

“就这些吗？恐怕我没什么可说的。”伊科拉绞尽脑汁想些什么好说，而奥诺拉则只是静静地站在那里。 嗯，我当然是在这里的村庄里出生的。妈妈在我们接手这家店铺后不久就离开了。她本来就是个喜欢冒险的人，以前经常来家里拜访，但最近我们见她的次数越来越少了。我想她这些天应该是去了一些比较远的地方吧，至少我是这么希望的。"
        
        你赶紧改变了话题，以免他们过于担心。“那你爸爸呢？”

“我从没见过他。我不知道你是否了解我们海族的情况，旅行者，但我们的男性并不像你们那样…………被驯化了。”你注意到奥诺拉听到这里有些坐立不安。“我们大多数时候都是集体生活的。妈妈仍然承担了最多的责任，但我发誓，我叫卡维‘妈妈’的次数，其实和叫我亲生妈妈的次数差不多。 总之，成年男性除非被用来繁殖，否则不允许进入这个村庄。当我们长大到一定年龄时，妈妈会告诉我们她是如何自己找到伴侣，然后一路把他带到村庄里的……这种谈话在晚餐时间进行，听起来有点奇怪，但我想，这就是妈妈的风格吧。"
        
        你和我遇到的大多数海洋族人有点……不一样。”

“我毫不害怕承认自己是个长相普通的人。我就是这样的，事实就是如此。如果有人想因此来评判我，那那是他们的事。不过至少，我还有足够的曲线来弥补这一点！”伊科拉摇晃着包裹在身躯上的胸部，然后转过身来，轻轻扭动了一下臀部。即使穿着宽松的连衣裙，也能看到她那丰满的臀部在晃动。
        
        那是邀请吗？”

“嗯……也许吧……”她调皮地回答，最后还晃了晃胸脯。

“那她呢？”你指向奥诺拉，那个高个子的马人女孩顿时尴尬地移开了视线。“她看起来有点害羞啊。
        
        嗯，这件事背后其实有个故事，但除非她本人同意，否则我宁愿什么都不说。”

你觉得，这理由挺合理的吧。

“还有其他你想问的吗？

rows.original: Start simple, ask about the duo.
rows.translation: 从简单的事情开始，先了解一下这个双人组合吧。

rows.original:
"Can I ask about your sister again?"
        
        Instead of answering right away, Ikora looks to Aunora for approval. The tall marefolk looks between you and her before giving a gentle nod.
        
        "Ok, if she's alright with it then I can tell you. Do you remember when I said our males weren't... domesticated? Once they reach puberty they become slaves to their own desires, practically unable to think as they rut near constantly. Aunora... wasn't always my sister. At one time she was my brother. She was going to get converted but while she and Mom were out gathering herbs for Kavi to make our dye they were ambushed by a group of males. Now, Mom was no stranger to dealing with wild males, she'd been a guard before grandma passed the shop to her. But with three at once, she wasn't able to keep them all off of Aunora. The males kidnapped her, took her away. At the time we presumed they did it to make her into fucktoy, or worse. I've asked Aunora what they really did, but her memory of it is too spotty to tell for sure, and I don't want to push her to remember something like that..."
        
        "What happened next?"
        
        "Most gave up on her, but my mother and aunts were determined to bring her back, even after a year with no sign of her. They succeeded, obviously, but by the time they'd found her she'd 'matured' into a beast that had to be dragged back in chains. Kavi tells me Aunora was one of the largest males she'd ever had to deal with. Of course, the males roaming around these days put even her to shame. Quite worrying."
        
        "How'd you deal with her?"
        
        "It wasn't easy, or so Mom told us. The chief wanted her thrown back out until Aunora managed to speak and beg to stay."
        
        "Is that rare?"
        
        "As I said, most of them turn almost completely savage when they leave. It's not like they're animals or anything, but they're just so damn horny all the time that they're almost no better. There are only legends of males who keep their lust in check, and while Aunora wasn't quite that, the fact that she even had moments of clarity convinced them to give my Mom a chance."
        
        "How'd she do it?"
        
        "When she brought Aunora back she came with an outsider; some priestess who worked with Kavi to make a potion powerful enough to convert Aunora. A full day and night passed while it was going through her system. The potion worked wonders, even if it calmed her down so much that I swear it was months before she said a peep and even now she's pretty quiet."
        
        Aunora just stands there, trying to keep a straight face but visibly shaking. "Oh, sorry, did I say too much?"
        
        The taller sister simply shakes her head, "It's fine," she says softly.
        
        "If she was that bad off, does that mean they had to..."
        
        "Oh gods, no, that almost never happens! She kept it and I swear she's either the luckiest girl ever or they made it bigger when they converted her because she's hung like a...." Ikora looks over and sees Aunora shaking with her eyes wide, the taller marefolk's hands trying and failing to cover a huge bulge in her dress. "... Ok, now I've said too much. Let's just calm down here."
        
        Despite Ikora's words, Aunora is doing the opposite. Her bulge shoots up harder than the shy giantess can handle and in no time flat, her massive horse member grows long enough to escape the confines of her skirt. "Oh no, oh no..." The thick head of her mare member peeks out, drooling out a thick string of pre onto the floor of the shop. 
        
        Aunora is completely frozen, looking like she's trying to decide if she should run away or jerk off right there. Before she can make up her mind, Ikora swoops into action, grabbing her sister by the hem of her dress and drags her off into a back room. "Not in front of the customers, please!" She comes back quickly, embarrassment and a hint of lust evident on her face. "S-sorry about her. She's still a little wild even after the conversion. It doesn't help that our family has a history of that sort of thing."
        
        "What sort of thing?"
        
        A muffled, high-pitched moan roars out from the room which Aunora entered, followed by the sound of a lot of liquid splattering on the ground. The taller horse sister peers back in with a look of shame on her face. "Sister, I... made a mess again..."
        
        "I told you to cum in the bucket!"
        
        "... It overflowed..."
        
        "It was big enough before, how did you... Nevermind, just get in here." Aunora steps back behind the counter, shaking in embarrassment.
        
        "You know... libido 'problems' and that sort of thing. Just, let's not talk about that right now. I need to calm down a bit... anything else?"
rows.translation:
我可以再问一下关于你妹妹的事情吗？”

伊科拉并没有立刻回答，而是先看向奥诺拉，寻求她的同意。那位高个子的马人女性在你们两人之间看了看，然后轻轻点了点头。

“好吧，如果她没有意见的话，我可以告诉你。 你还记得我曾经说过，我们的雄性生物其实并没有被“驯化”吗？一旦它们进入青春期，就会成为自己欲望的奴隶，几乎无法进行正常的思考，因为它们会不断地陷入交配的状态。而Aunora……她也不是一开始就是我的妹妹。曾经有一段时间，她其实是我的兄弟。 她本来打算接受转变，但当她和妈妈外出采集草药为卡维制作染料时，她们遭到了一群男性的伏击。妈妈对付这些野性男性早已驾轻就熟——在奶奶将店铺传给她之前，她曾经是一名护卫。 但是同时面对三个男人，她根本无力将他们全部挡在阿诺拉身边。那些男人绑架了她，将她带走了。当时我们以为他们这么做是为了把她变成玩物，甚至更糟的东西。我曾经问过阿诺拉他们到底做了什么，但她的记忆太模糊了，无法确定真相，而我也不想强迫她去回忆那些事情。.."
        
        接下来发生了什么？”

“大多数人都放弃了她，但我的母亲和阿姨们决心一定要把她找回来。尽管过了整整一年，仍然没有任何她的消息。显然，她们最终成功了，但当她们找到她的时候，她已经‘进化’成了一头必须用链条才能牵住的野兽。卡维告诉我，阿诺拉是她曾经遇到过的最大的雄性个体之一。当然，如今这些四处游荡的雄性们，甚至连她都显得相形见绌了。真是令人担忧。
        
        你是怎么处理她的？”

“妈妈告诉我们，这并不容易。负责人本来想把她赶出去，直到奥诺拉出面求情，才让她留了下来。”

“这种情况很罕见吗？”

“就像我说的，大多数人在离开后都会变得几乎完全野性化。 他们又不是动物什么的，但他们的欲望实在太过强烈，几乎没什么区别。只有传说中有些雄性能够控制自己的欲望，而虽然奥诺拉并不是那种类型，但至少她也有过一些清醒的时刻，因此他们决定给我的母亲一个机会。"
        
        她是怎么做到的？”

“当她把奥诺拉带回来的时候，还带了一个外人一起；那个女祭司和卡维一起配制了一种药水，这种药水的力量足以让奥诺拉发生变化。整个过程持续了一整天一夜，药水在她的体内发挥了作用。这种药水真的创造了奇迹，它让奥诺拉变得如此安静，以至于我发誓，有好几个月她都没有说过一句话，而现在她依然非常安静。
        
        奥诺拉只是站在那里，努力保持面无表情，但显然在颤抖。“哦，对不起，我是不是说得太多了？”

高个姐姐只是轻轻摇了摇头，说道：“没关系。”

“如果她的情况真的那么糟糕，那么是不是意味着他们不得不……
        
        哦，天啊，不，这种事几乎从来不会发生！她把那个东西留了下来，我发誓，她要么是世界上最幸运的女孩，要么就是在被转化的时候他们把那个东西弄得更大了一些，因为她的衣服上明显有个……”伊科拉转头望去，看到奥诺拉正瞪大眼睛，浑身颤抖着，那个高个子的马人女孩的手试图遮住自己衣服上那个明显的凸起。“……好吧，我现在说得太多了。我们还是冷静下来吧。
        
        尽管伊科拉说了那些话，但奥诺拉却做了完全相反的事。她的阴部迅速肿胀起来，速度之快让这位害羞的巨型女子根本无法控制。不一会儿，她那巨大的阴部就已经长得足以从裙子里露出来。“哦不，哦不……”她的阴部顶端探了出来，一股浓稠的分泌物顺着地面流到了商店的地板上。 
        
        奥诺拉整个人都僵住了，看起来仿佛在犹豫是应该逃跑，还是当场做出那种举动。还没等她想清楚，伊科拉就迅速采取了行动，抓住她妹妹的裙摆，把她拉进了后面的房间。“请不要在顾客面前这样做！”她很快就回来了，脸上既带着尴尬，也透露出一丝欲望。“对……对她来说，这种事情还是有点难以接受。即使她已经接受了转变，但我们的家族确实有这样的传统……
        
        到底发生了什么？”

当奥诺拉走进房间时，一阵低沉而尖锐的呻吟声从里面传来，紧接着是许多液体溅落在地上的声音。那位身材较高的马族姐妹羞愧地回头看着她：“姐姐，我又搞砸事情了……
        
        我早就告诉过你，把精液弄到桶里去！”

“……结果桶都溢出来了……”

“之前这个桶也够大的啊，你是怎么做到的……算了，快进来吧。”奥诺拉尴尬地退到柜台后面，不停地颤抖着。

“你知道的……就是那些性欲方面的问题之类的。现在先别谈这个吧，我需要冷静一下……还有其他事情吗？

rows.original: Ask what she means when she says Aunora is %"different".
rows.translation: 当她说Aunora“与众不同”时，问问她到底是什么意思。
rows.raw: 'Ask what she means when she says Aunora is %"different".'

rows.original:
"Tell me about this shop of yours."
        
        "I suppose you want a bit more than just the marketing spiel. Our great-grandmother started Ponytails a little over a hundred years ago. Before that, everyone was on their own with styling. Of course, the shaman still made dyes, just like Kavi does today. She passed it on to grandma, and then she passed it on to Mom and then Mom passed it down to us."
        
        "Who decided on the... decorations?"
        
        "It's a lot, isn't it? Everyone who takes over gets to add their own touches. I think grandma was the one who started painting the mural onto the tent. Mom and Aunora did all the hanging banners. Aunora did some of these when she was a kid!"
        
        Aunora nods along and then speaks up in a moment of rare confidence, for her. "I think they turned out pretty well." The tall horsewoman doesn't say any more than that and fades back into the background once she's done.
        
        "Who trained you to cut hair?"
        
        "Our Mom, and grandma taught her, and her mother taught her. Great-grandma learned from an outsider while she was out traveling."
        
        "Do you travel a lot for your job?"
        
        "No, great-grandma was just an adventuring type. Mom is too. We're more like grandma was; the furthest we go out is the fields in order to pick herbs for Kavi."
        
        "What are the herbs for?"
        
        "Dyes, mainly. The stuff the shamans make can't be beaten! Just one bottle could dye a minotaur completely pink! Trust me, I did that. It even works on scales, so [pc.hasScales|you|those] scaly folks are in luck!"
        
        "Do you like working here?"
        
        She thinks for a moment. "Yeah, for the most part. I get urges to get out every now and then; I suppose I get that from Mom. I think Aunora is fine being here, but I haven't really asked her."
        
        The smaller horse sister stares up her sibling, silently asking for an answer. "Oh, um, yes, I do quite like it here."
        
        "That settles that. Any more questions?"
rows.translation:
跟我讲讲你们这家店吧。”

rows.raw:
'
        "Tell me about this shop of yours."
        
        "I suppose you want a bit more than just the marketing spiel. Our great-grandmother started Ponytails a little over a hundred years ago. Before that, everyone was on their own with styling. Of course, the shaman still made dyes, just like Kavi does today. She passed it on to grandma, and then she passed it on to Mom and then Mom passed it down to us."
        
        "Who decided on the... decorations?"
        
        "It's a lot, isn't it? Everyone who takes over gets to add their own touches. I think grandma was the one who started painting the mural onto the tent. Mom and Aunora did all the hanging banners. Aunora did some of these when she was a kid!"
        
        Aunora nods along and then speaks up in a moment of rare confidence, for her. "I think they turned out pretty well." The tall horsewoman doesn't say any more than that and fades back into the background once she's done.
        
        "Who trained you to cut hair?"
        
        "Our Mom, and grandma taught her, and her mother taught her. Great-grandma learned from an outsider while she was out traveling."
        
        "Do you travel a lot for your job?"
        
        "No, great-grandma was just an adventuring type. Mom is too. We're more like grandma was; the furthest we go out is the fields in order to pick herbs for Kavi."
        
        "What are the herbs for?"
        
        "Dyes, mainly. The stuff the shamans make can't be beaten! Just one bottle could dye a minotaur completely pink! Trust me, I did that. It even works on scales, so [pc.hasScales|you|those] scaly folks are in luck!"
        
        "Do you like working here?"
        
        She thinks for a moment. "Yeah, for the most part. I get urges to get out every now and then; I suppose I get that from Mom. I think Aunora is fine being here, but I haven't really asked her."
        
        The smaller horse sister stares up her sibling, silently asking for an answer. "Oh, um, yes, I do quite like it here."
        
        "That settles that. Any more questions?"
        '

rows.original: Kavi is at the herb counter when you open the door, her brow knit with concern and anxiety. Her expression jumps between hopeful, crestfallen, and then hopeful again when she recognizes you. "Oh, Treefather be praised, [pc.name]," she says, sounding relieved. "You wouldn't happen to have a free moment, would you dear?" "What for? Is something wrong?" you ask. "Something like that. I think you're just the person to help, though, now that I think about it." You wander over and take a seat on one of the chairs near the counter. Whatever's happening, it's got the poor cow woman fretting something fierce. "You see, Tarah's got in her head that she needs to go find a partner, and she ran off yesterday talking about this great hero being spotted in the valley. I'm certain those stories were just the news of your escapades here and abroad, but I didn't get the chance to tell her such before she left. I thought she'd be back within the day, but she still hasn't come back. I wouldn't presume to ask that you indulge her, but would you please check on her to see if she's ok? And bring her back home if she isn't. She's... not really the type to do well alone." "I'm sure I can find her. I'll be on the lookout," you say, rubbing your chin. "Do you have any idea where she would have gone?" "She hadn't even been out of the village much before now, except maybe to accompany me on a few gathering trips," Kavi says, rubbing her temples and letting out a sigh. "Hmm. Maybe the river? She might be somewhere near there. I named her for it, and I told her all the stories, so she might try to stick close to it." "That gives me a place to start. Hopefully you won't have to worry for too long," you say, putting a hand on her shoulder. "Thanks, hun. Figured I could count on you." Looks like you've got something new to look out for. "Did you need anything in the meantime?"
rows.translation: 当你打开门时，卡维正在草药柜台前，她的眉头紧锁，满脸忧虑与担心。当她认出你时，她的表情在希望、失望，又重新转为希望之间不断变化。 “哦，愿树之父受到赞美…… [pc.name]这么说来，你应该有空吧？”她的语气听起来松了一口气，“亲爱的，你有没有空呢？” “有什么事吗？出什么问题了吗？”你问道。 “算是吧……不过现在想来，你应该正是能帮忙的人。你走过去，在柜台附近的椅子上坐了下来。不管发生了什么，这件事显然让那位可怜的女子非常焦虑。 “你知道的，塔拉一直认为自己必须找到一个伴侣，所以昨天她一听说在山谷里看到了那位伟大的英雄，就立刻跑掉了。 我敢肯定，那些故事只不过是一些传闻罢了。 你的 我在国内外的种种冒险经历，可惜在她离开之前，我没有机会告诉她。我原本以为她当天就会回来，但直到现在她还是没有出现。我不敢冒昧地请求你帮忙照顾她，但能否请你去看看她是否安好呢？ 如果她不在那里，就把她带回家吧。她……其实不太适合独自待着。” “我肯定能找到她的。我会留意着她的动向的，”你说着，揉了揉下巴，“你有没有猜到她可能会去哪里？直到现在，她其实也没怎么离开过村子，除了有几次是陪我一起去参加一些聚会活动，”卡维一边揉着太阳穴，一边叹了口气说道，“嗯……也许是在河边吧？她应该会在那附近某个地方。 我以它的名字为她命名，还把所有的故事都告诉了她，这样她就会努力去遵循它的精神了。” “这至少给了我一个出发点。希望你们不用再担心太久。”你一边说，一边把手放在她的肩上。 谢谢，亲爱的。我就知道你可以依靠我。” 看起来你得留意一些新情况了。 “这段时间你还需要什么帮助吗？
rows.raw: ' Kavi is at the herb counter when you open the door, her brow knit with concern and anxiety. Her expression jumps between hopeful, crestfallen, and then hopeful again when she recognizes you. "Oh, Treefather be praised, [pc.name]," she says, sounding relieved. "You wouldn't happen to have a free moment, would you dear?" "What for? Is something wrong?" you ask. "Something like that. I think you're just the person to help, though, now that I think about it." You wander over and take a seat on one of the chairs near the counter. Whatever's happening, it's got the poor cow woman fretting something fierce. "You see, Tarah's got in her head that she needs to go find a partner, and she ran off yesterday talking about this great hero being spotted in the valley. I'm certain those stories were just the news of your escapades here and abroad, but I didn't get the chance to tell her such before she left. I thought she'd be back within the day, but she still hasn't come back. I wouldn't presume to ask that you indulge her, but would you please check on her to see if she's ok? And bring her back home if she isn't. She's... not really the type to do well alone." "I'm sure I can find her. I'll be on the lookout," you say, rubbing your chin. "Do you have any idea where she would have gone?" "She hadn't even been out of the village much before now, except maybe to accompany me on a few gathering trips," Kavi says, rubbing her temples and letting out a sigh. "Hmm. Maybe the river? She might be somewhere near there. I named her for it, and I told her all the stories, so she might try to stick close to it." "That gives me a place to start. Hopefully you won't have to worry for too long," you say, putting a hand on her shoulder. "Thanks, hun. Figured I could count on you." Looks like you've got something new to look out for. "Did you need anything in the meantime?" '

rows.original:
The farm is close enough to the river, so you might as well check there. Luckily, you don't even need to make it there before your decision pays off. You can see Tarah, or at least a slightly bedraggled but hale looking marefolk who looks like her, coming up the path in your direction. As you get closer, you can confirm that it's her. She still looks a bit sleepy, but it looks like her raggedness comes from sleep itself rather than the lack of it.

    "Tarah? Are you ok there? Your mom asked me to come bring you back home."
    
    The bubbly horse-girl brightens as she recognizes you, and all that exhaustion disappears in a moment. Her painterly puff of a tail swishes back and forth, and she grins.
    
    "Omigosh [pc.name]! Hi! I'm sorry she worried, but I, like, just can't go back yet. I've gotta remember what I was looking for! I looked by the river, and I looked in this farm. They were really nice, they let me sleep in there and drink all the milk I wanted. It felt, like, just like home and I totally forgot what I was looking for. It was... the hero! If I bring somebody like that back to the village, then I'll be totally cool and stuff and mom won't have to worry anymore! Can you help me find them?"
    
    "Uhhh..."
rows.translation:
那个农场离河流很近，你不妨去那里看看。幸运的是，你甚至不需要等到到达那里，就能得到你想要的结果。你会看到塔拉，或者至少是一个看起来有些狼狈但依然精神矍铄的、与塔拉长得相似的女马人，正沿着小路朝你的方向走来。 当你靠近一些时，你可以确认那就是她。她看起来还是有点困倦，但她的疲惫似乎是因为睡眠不足，而不是真的缺乏睡眠。

“塔拉？你没事吧？你妈妈让我来接你回家的。当那匹活泼的马女孩认出你时，她的脸上立刻露出了笑容，所有的疲惫瞬间都消失了。她那像画作一样漂亮的尾巴欢快地摇来摇去，同时她也露出了笑容。

“天啊！ [pc.name]嗨！很抱歉让她担心了，但我真的还不能回去。我必须记住自己要找的东西！我在河边找过，也在这个农场里找过。他们人都很好，让我在那里住下，还想喝多少牛奶就喝多少。那里的感觉就像家一样，我完全忘记了自己要找什么了……是那个英雄！如果我能把这样的人带回村子，那我就会变得很了不起，妈妈也就不会再担心了！你能帮我找到他吗？”

“呃……

If I bring somebody like that back to the village, then I'll be totally cool and stuff and mom won't have to worry anymore! Can you help me find them?"

rows.original: Ah, what the hell. She's cute, and who are you to deny a cute girl who's literally hunting you down. Or trying to, at least... "Listen, [pc.isDK |[silly |trash |Tarah ] |Tarah ], I'm pretty sure the hero you're looking for is just me. I talked with your mom, and all those things she said you were looking for are things I did, with help in some cases." You can see the molasses of the bimbish horse-girl's thoughts as she tries to wrap her head around this, and you're about to find a way to clarify further when she gasps. "Oh. My. GOSH! You're the hero all those people were talking about!" she says, bouncing once and clapping her hands together. "That's, like, so awesome! I'm glad I found you!" There are many ways that could have gone, and this is certainly one of them. "Yeah, so how about we go b-" "So do I have to, like, kick your butt if I want you to claim me as a mate? Do you have to kick my butt? I fall a lot so my butt is pretty tough," she says proudly. She's... really serious about this. A battle has traditional relevance to the marefolk, but Tarah herself doesn't appear to know what she's doing. You could probably spin this several ways.
rows.translation: 啊，真是的。她这么可爱，你有什么资格拒绝一个明明在主动追求你的可爱女孩呢？至少应该是这样吧…… “听着， [pc.isDK |[silly |垃圾 |塔拉 ] |塔拉 ]我敢肯定，你一直在寻找的英雄就是我。我和你妈妈谈过了，她提到的那些你想要的东西，其实都是我做过的事情，有些也是在其他人的帮助下完成的。” 你可以看到，这个年轻女孩正在努力理解这些话，她的思绪显得有些混乱。就在你准备再进一步解释的时候，她突然惊呼道： “哦，我的天啊！ 你真是…… 就是大家一直在谈论的那个英雄啊！”她兴奋地跳了起来，拍着手说道，“真是太厉害了！能遇到你真是太好了！” 事情本可能有很多不同的发展方向，而这个结局也只是其中之一而已。 是啊，那我们一起去吧……” “那么，如果我想让你承认我是你的搭档，我就必须打败你吗？真的必须打败我吗？我经常摔倒，所以我的屁股已经变得相当结实了哦，”她自豪地说。 她对这件事……真的是非常认真。对于马人来说，战斗具有重要的传统意义，但塔拉自己似乎并不清楚自己在做什么。这件事其实可以有多种解读方式。

I talked with your mom, and all those things she said you were looking for are things I did, with help in some cases." You're the hero all those people were talking about!" she says, bouncing once and clapping her hands together. "That's, like, so awesome! I'm glad I found you!" There are many ways that could have gone, and this is certainly one of them. "Yeah, so how about we go b-" "So do I have to, like, kick your butt if I want you to claim me as a mate? Do you have to kick my butt? I fall a lot so my butt is pretty tough," she says proudly. She's... really serious about this. A battle has traditional relevance to the marefolk, but Tarah herself doesn't appear to know what she's doing. You could probably spin this several ways."

rows.original:
"Fighting is a tradition, so I guess it can't be avoided," you say, and when Tarah's ears fall you keep going. "But, uh, that doesn't mean it has to be nasty. [pc.dcb
                |I'm not in the business of hurting romantic partners. At least in ways they don't want.
                |I'm not about to try and actually hurt a cutie like you.
                |We can just like fight a little bit and have fun!
            ]"
            
            "Oh! Ok ok! If it's gonna be fun then I think I can handle it! In that case I'll, like, start with one of these!"
rows.translation:
争斗是一种传统，所以我想这是不可避免的，”你说道，当塔拉的耳朵耷拉下来时，你继续说：“但是，呃，这并不意味着争斗就一定要很激烈、很残酷。 [pc.dcb
                |我的目的绝不是去伤害自己的恋爱对象，至少不会以他们所不希望的方式去伤害他们。
                |我可不会真的去伤害像你这样的可爱女孩的。
                |我们可以随便打闹一下，开开心心地玩一玩嘛！
            ]哦！好吧好吧！如果这会很有趣的话，我想我应该能应付得来！那么，我就先从这些当中选择一个开始吧！

                |I'm not about to try and actually hurt a cutie like you.
                |We can just like fight a little bit and have fun!
            ]"
            
            "Oh! Ok ok! If it's gonna be fun then I think I can handle it! In that case I'll, like, start with one of these!""

rows.original: You'll have to be careful, but you're sure you can make a duel end well for Tarah.
rows.translation: 你必须小心行事，但你有信心能为塔拉让这场决斗有一个好的结局。
rows.raw: "You'll have to be careful, but you're sure you can make a duel end well for Tarah."

rows.original: Attempt to convince Tarah through [pc.isBimbo|impeccabooble logic|conversation].
rows.translation: 试图说服塔拉。 [pc.isBimbo|毫无漏洞的逻辑|对话].

rows.original: Confess that you are the hero. This will result in horse romance.
rows.translation: 承认你就是那位英雄吧。这样你就会迎来一段浪漫的恋情。
rows.raw: "Confess that you are the hero. This will result in horse romance."

rows.original: "Well, I don't know if anyone specific comes to mind," you say, seeing the tail swish wilt for a moment. "But I'm sure I can help you find someone cool to bring back home and make your mom stop worrying." "Really!? Oh my gosh, you're so cool [pc.name]. You're, like, my hero! So where do we look? I've already looked everywhere I can think of, and I'm all out of ideas," she says, rubbing her temples and pouting. Where indeed. Your best bet would be to find one of the huntresses from the village, and it's all the better if they're also out hunting for a mate. You take the young mare's hand, guiding her off in the direction of a copse of thicker brush and trees. It's as good a place as any to start looking. Thankfully, Tarah stays mostly quiet while you search, piping up with the occasional energetic squeak when she sees a squirrel and stamping her hooves excitedly when she sees a pretty flower. You don't find anything for a good hour and a half of searching, but then you happen upon a particularly thick mess of brush. Behind it, you can hear the crunch of twigs and leaves. There's less of both on your side, so you can probably manage to sneak far enough up to sneak a peek through the plant-cover. There's no chance that Tarah could (her bell piercings alone make sure of that), so you signal for her to stay as still and silent as she can manage. She nods five times in quick succession and wobbles once, but then goes still while you creep closer. On the other side of the fronds, a sleek bay mare is checking a trap set in the nook of a larger tree. She's turned sidelong from the angle you've got, and you can see the fit muscle in her thighs as she crouches to handle the snare. There's a knife at her hip and a bow on her back, and her DD-cup breasts are bound by cloth. She hasn't noticed you, but her ears swivel at the forest noises as they happen. At least till you hear a snap from behind you, and her head pivots in your direction. "Who's there?" she calls, drawing her knife but leaving the bow. "Come out quietly." As silently as you can, you turn back to Tarah. She's standing on the largest branch in the small clearing behind you, hands clasped over her mouth and frozen still. You let out a mental sigh and direct her to follow the woman's instruction. You'd have liked to give her a look to make sure she's ok with giving this person a chance, but this'll have to do. Letting her take your place and giving her an encouraging nod, you watch her slip through the brush. Once she's through, you sneak back long enough to make sure she's ok. "The Alchemist's daughter? What are you doing all the way out here?" she asks, softening marginally and sheathing her dagger. "Oh my gosh, you know who I am?" Tarah gasps, clapping her hands together. "I'm out searching for a partner. I got lost and went to this, like, really cool farm, but then I... totally snapped out of it and made it over here all by myself without any secret helpers!" You rub your brow in frustration, but the bimbish outburst only prompts a chuckle from the larger mare. "If you insist, and of course I know you. I get bad headaches sometimes, and Kavi always knows exactly what I need to drive them away," she says, relaxing further and looking Tarah over from afar. "I'll tell you what. This place is quite secluded. How about you come over here and we find out if we're compatible?" It doesn't look like Tarah catches the meaning behind her words, but you sure do. You'll probably be treated to quite the show if you stay and watch, but it also seems like she's going to be fine from here.
rows.translation: 嗯，我一时想不起具体是哪位了，”你说着，看到那条尾巴瞬间失去了活力。“不过我肯定能帮你找到一个很棒的人，让你带回家，让妈妈不再担心。” “真的吗！？天啊，你太棒了！ [pc.name]你，就是， 我的 英雄啊，那我们该去哪里找呢？我想到的地方都已经搜过了，实在想不出办法了。”她边说边揉着太阳穴，撅着嘴。 “确实啊……最好的办法就是去找村里的那些女猎人吧。如果她们也在寻找伴侣的话，那就更理想了。 你握住那匹年轻母马的手，引导它朝着一片灌木丛和树木繁茂的地方走去。这个地方倒是开始搜寻的不错选择。幸运的是，在你搜寻的过程中，塔拉大多时候都保持着安静，只有当它看到松鼠时才会发出兴奋的叫声，而当它看到一朵漂亮的花朵时，也会兴奋地用蹄子踩踏地面。 你搜索了整整一个半小时，却什么也没找到，直到后来你偶然发现了一片特别茂密的灌木丛。在灌木丛的后面，你能听到树枝和树叶被踩碎的声音。而在你这一侧，这类东西要少得多，因此你应该能够悄悄地靠近，然后透过这些植物丛偷看一眼。 塔拉绝对不可能做到这一点（光是她的耳洞就足以说明这一点），所以你示意她尽可能保持静止和安静。她迅速点了点头五次，然后又摇晃了一下，但在你慢慢靠近时，她终于完全静止了下来。 在那些蕨叶的另一边，一匹线条流畅的母马正在检查一棵大树角落里设置的陷阱。从你现在的视角来看，她正侧身站着，因此你可以看到她蹲下身子处理陷阱时大腿上紧实的肌肉。她的腰间别着一把刀，背上背着一支弓，而她那D罩杯大小的乳房则被布条紧紧包扎着。她还没有注意到你的存在，但当森林里传来各种声响时，她的耳朵会立刻转向声源方向。直到你身后突然传来一声断裂声，她的头才猛地转向你的方向。 谁在那里？”她喊道，拔出了刀，但仍然没有放下弓。“安静地出来吧。” 你尽可能地悄无声息地转过身，看向塔拉。她站在你身后那片小空地中最大的一根树枝上，双手捂住嘴巴，一动不动地站在那里。 你在心中暗自叹了口气，然后示意她按照那位女性的指示去做。你其实很想看看她的反应，确认她是否真的愿意给这个人一个机会，但眼下也只能这样做了。你让她代替自己去执行任务，同时给了她一个鼓励的点头，然后目送她穿过灌木丛消失了。 等她忙完之后，你悄悄溜回去，确认她是否一切都好。 炼金术士的女儿？你大老远跑到这里来干什么？”她问道，语气稍微缓和了一些，同时也收起了手中的匕首。 “天啊，你居然认识我？”塔拉惊呼道，双手拍得啪啪作响，“我是出来寻找合作伙伴的。结果迷路了，偶然来到了这个非常棒的农场，不过后来……我突然想通了，就独自一人来到了这里，根本没有什么秘密帮手哦！ 你沮丧地揉着额头，但那个年轻女孩的爆发反而让那位年长的女性忍不住笑了起来。 “如果你坚持的话……当然，我了解你。我有时候会头痛得厉害，而Kavi总是能准确地知道我需要什么来缓解头痛，”她说道，语气渐渐放松下来，远远地望着Tarah，“这样吧，这个地方相当僻静。你过来陪我一会儿，我们看看是否合得来吧？ 看起来塔拉并没有理解她那些话背后的含义，但你却明白了。如果你留下来继续看的话，可能会看到一场相当精彩的表演，不过看起来她从现在起应该也不会有什么问题了。

You're glad to see the two hit it off so swimmingly, and you don't need to stay around to make sure they get back to the village. Instead, you trot off to continue your adventures. You should probably check in with Kavi some time just to make sure, but you aren't in any major rush. "

rows.original: [var0 |"Owie!" Tarah cries as your last blow knocks her onto her butt. "That's too rough! I can't keep up." She pouts as you wander over and place a hand around her shoulder. Instead, she's smiling again by the time you've gotten up to booping her on the nose. "You did great. I'd be hard pressed to find a more determined opponent in my day-to-day fighting." "Aww gee," she says, blushing bright. "You gotta be joking with that, but thanks." "I mean it. You've got a lot of determination in here," you say, tapping her above her heart. "That's the most important part." She gives you a stare of the most adorably bewildered belief, and then averts her eyes with a bashful smile. "Gosh. You're making me feel, like, all funny inside." "Oh? If you aren't comfortable, I can stop." "I dunno if, like, uncomfortable is the right word, but maybe if we were someplace a little more home-like. Like my house!" "In that case, how about I princess carry you back there?" |"W-wait, hold on. I, um, don't think I can fight anymore. It feels kinda, like, weird and I don't know what'll happen if we keep going," Tarah says, holding up her hands and fidgeting nervously. It doesn't take a hawk to notice that she's grown a tiny tent in her dress from your teasing. You wander over and pull her into a hug, conscious of her hesitance and careful to avoid rubbing her in the wrong (technically right place, but wrong time) places. You just hold her and brush her hair till you feel her heart stop racing, and then pull away till she can look you in the eyes. "It's ok," you say, squeezing her shoulder. "Well then, maybe we can continue later. In the meantime, how about I princess carry you back home?" ]

rows.original: [var0 |Despite her best efforts to the contrary, Tarah's final strike knocks the wind out of you. You fall backwards and land on your ass, stunned at how you could possibly have lost to the bubbly mare. For her part, she shouts with glee, canter-skips over to your side, and drops to her knees next to you. She looks equally worried and happy all at once, peering over every inch of you to inspect for injuries. "Wow! I didn't expect to get this far, so I have, like, no idea what to do next! Is this where you carry me off? I'm not strong at all so I don't think I can carry you, but I don't think I'm that heavy." "I'll need a second to rest first, either way. You're all for getting to know her better and more, but you'd kinda rather not have to beat her up or get beaten up over it. All you've gotta do is find a way to convince her that this is the best way to go about it. How do you plan to do so?

    ]等等！我的意思是，如果你愿意的话，你可以稍微给我展示一下吧。”

“好的！”你说道，一边穿上衣服。 [pc.breasts] 它悄悄地进入了她的视线。

那只可爱的小马用那种带着羞涩天真的眼神注视着你，完全被吸引住了，直到你片刻后将它们收起来。值得称赞的是，它恢复得很快，摇摇头，然后害羞地对你笑了笑。

“好……如果你不想的话，我们不必吵架，但你还愿意带我回家吗？”

rows.original: "Do you wanna go watch some birds or other animals instead of fighting? Getting roughed up doesn't sound like that fun of a way to choose a lover." "That's an option!?" the bimbish mare exclaims. "I-I mean sure! I'd love to!" She giddily trot-skips over to your side and hugs your arm tight enough that you can feel one of her cowbell piercings through her top. It's good that you found her before any corrupt cultist or hungry monster, because the poor girl doesn't have much of a survivalist streak. She's content to let you lead the way, and you guide her toward the nearby river first. Birds are a little tougher with the sparse tree cover, but fish should be easy enough to find! Sure enough, you spot a few river fish darting through the portions of the river less affected by the rapids. Tarah points, whinnying with excitement and bouncing over to the edge of the water. She watches the fish with curious glee, trying to move her head and scrunch her eyes when the [dayNight |sun's glare obscures the water |moon fails to pierce the water's surface. ] Curiosity aside, the little fishies want nothing to do with her. Much to her dismay, they dart away with haste whenever she gets close. "Don't fall in!" you say when she wobbles over the river's edge. "You'd end up freezing." "I won't! It's not slippery, and I'm watching my hooves!" Luckily she manages not to jinx herself in the promise, and you're happy to see her not have tumbled into the water by the time she turns and returns to your side. Next, you lead her off in search of birds and other small critters of the valley. You're careful to avoid busy spots and anywhere you know to be frequented by ne'er do wells, and manage a pretty lucrative haul of watchery. First, you see an eagle's nest in a tall and scraggly tree. There are no birds you can see inside it, but you do spot an eagle flying far in the distance. It circles around, searching for prey across the rolling hills of the valley. Unfortunately for it, there doesn't seem to be any lesser beasties out and about. Neither of you see any small critters flitting about in the scarce brush that dots the landscape. "Oh! What's that!" Tarah gasps and points, grabbing your arm with her free hand. "That's a rock, [pc.mascFem |dear |sweetie ]." "Really? What's that fuzzy stuff on it, then? I didn't know rocks could have fur." "That's moss. It's like a plant that can grow on rocks. That kind is very soft, though. You can touch it if you want. It's perfectly safe." "Maybe I will! I've seen moss, and this looks nothing like it! Moss is all brown and crumbly. Mom puts it in potions all the time and even let me crumble it up a few times and- ooo it is super soft!" The bubbly mare brushes both hands excitedly over the moss, gently so as not to tear it from its home. She turns back to you with a bright-eyed and giddy smile, and then stands again. The two of you keep on walking, and you point out the prettiest flowers you can spot for her to examine in greater detail. [pc.bg ranger |Her eyes don't even glaze over as you tell her their names and common uses for them. It helps that her mother is the alchemist, but she looks proud to have visual reference to connect to the various plants she's seen dried or crushed. |Her mom's line of work even helps her name some of the ones you didn't recognize. At the very least those that look the same dried and pressed as they do fresh are no trouble for her. You even find some mint that she can recognize by smell alone! ] Eventually, your wanderings bring you back around to the outskirts of the Pupperidge Farms, and Tarah's tail gives a happy swish as she walks ahead of you to sit on a fence. "Whew. I'm kinda tired out. You wanna, like, go back to my house?" she asks. "Sure. I'll even princess carry you back so you don't tire yourself out more."
rows.translation: 你们不想去观察观察鸟儿或其他动物，而不是打架吗？被揍一顿听起来可不像是个挑选恋人的好办法啊。” “这也是一种选择啊！？”那位花枝招展的姑娘惊呼道，“我、我是说当然可以！我非常愿意去！她兴奋地小跑着来到你身边，紧紧搂住你的手臂，力度之大以至于你能感觉到她身上的牛铃耳洞几乎穿透了她的上衣。你能在那些腐败的邪教徒或饥饿的怪物找到她，真是太幸运了——因为这个可怜的女孩根本没有任何生存能力。 她很乐意由你来带路，于是你首先带着她走向附近的河流。由于树木稀疏，捕捉鸟类有点困难，但钓鱼应该会很容易吧！ 果然，你在那些受急流影响较小的河段看到了几条游动的鱼。 塔拉兴奋地指着水面，欢快地叫着，然后蹦跳着跑到水边。她怀着好奇和喜悦的目光注视着那些鱼，每当鱼儿移动时，她都会努力转动头部，还紧紧地眯起眼睛来看。 [dayNight |阳光的刺眼光芒使得水面变得看不清。 |月亮的光芒无法穿透水面的黑暗。 ] 说真的，那些小鱼根本不想和她有任何瓜葛。令她极为沮丧的是，每当她靠近时，它们都会迅速游开。 “别掉进河里啊！”当你看到她在河边摇摇晃晃时，你会这样提醒她。“否则你会被冻死的。” “我不会的！这里并不滑，而且我也在注意自己的脚步呢！” 幸运的是，她没有因为这个承诺而惹上麻烦，看到她平安无事，你也很高兴。 不是 等她转过身回到你身边时，那些东西早已掉进了水里。接下来，你带着她去山谷里寻找鸟类和其他小型动物。你小心翼翼地避开人迹繁忙的地方，以及那些你知道经常有那些不怀好意的人出没的地方，最终收获了不少有趣的观察结果。 首先，你看到一棵高而杂乱的树上有一个鹰巢。虽然看不到里面有鸟，但你能看到远处有一只鹰在飞翔。它盘旋着，在山谷中的连绵丘陵上寻找猎物。 不幸的是，似乎并没有任何体型较小的生物在周围活动。你们俩也没有看到有任何小生物在那些零星分布在景色中的灌木丛中飞来飞去。 “哦！那是什么！”塔拉惊呼着，一边指着那个方向，一边用空着的手抓住了你的手臂。 那是一块石头。 [pc.mascFem |亲爱的 |甜心 ]真的吗？那上面覆盖的那些绒毛状的东西是什么呢？我以前从来不知道石头上也会长出毛来。” “那是苔藓。它是一种可以生长在石头上的植物。 是 不过，它非常柔软，你可以随意触摸，完全不会有什么危险。 “也许我会试试的！我本来就…… 看到过 苔藓，可这跟苔藓完全不一样啊！苔藓应该是棕色的，而且质地松软易碎的。妈妈经常把苔藓加到药水里，还让我试着把它弄碎几次呢——哦，原来是这样啊…… 是 超级柔软啊！” 那匹活泼的马儿兴奋地用双手轻触着苔藓，动作非常轻柔，生怕把苔藓从它的生长环境中扯下来。它转过头来，用充满活力、满脸喜悦的笑容看着你，然后又站了起来。你们继续前行，你会指给它看那些最漂亮的花朵，让它仔细观察。 [pc.bg ranger |当你告诉她这些植物的名称以及它们的常见用途时，她的目光甚至没有丝毫的茫然。她的母亲本身就是一位炼金术士，这一点确实帮了大忙；但看到这些视觉资料后，她显得非常自豪，因为她能够通过这些图像来回忆自己曾经见过的那些被晒干或碾碎的植物。 |她妈妈的职业背景甚至帮助她辨认出那些你们无法识别的植物。至少，对于那些干燥后仍然与新鲜状态时外观完全相同的植物，她完全能够区分它们。甚至还有一些薄荷，她仅仅通过气味就能认出来！ ] 最终，你的漫游将你带回了帕珀里奇农场的边缘。塔拉走在你前面，她的尾巴欢快地摇动着，然后她坐在了一道围栏上。 “呼，我有点累了。你想不想回我家休息一下？”她问道。 “当然想。我甚至可以像公主一样抱你回去，这样你就不会更加累了。

rows.original:
"Hmm. Would you rather play rock paper scissors?"

    "What's that? A game?"
    
    "Yeah, you make these shapes with your hand for rock, paper, and scissors," you explain with visual aids. "Rock crushes scissors, scissors cuts paper, and paper covers rock. It's really simple."
    
    "Oh my gosh! That sounds, like, super fun! Let's do it!"
    
    She does a giddy bounce as she steps closer to you, and holds one of her hands in the air, clenched into a fist.
    
    "Ok. Rock, paper, scissors, go!"
rows.translation:
嗯，你想玩石头剪刀布吗？”

“什么？一个游戏？”

“对，就是用手做出石头、剪刀和布的形状来玩，”你边说边用动作示范。“石头能砸碎剪刀，剪刀能剪破纸，而纸能包住石头。真的很简单哦。”

“天啊！听起来超级有趣！我们开始吧！”

她兴奋地跳起来，走到你跟前，把一只手举到空中，握成了拳头。

“好的，石头剪刀布，开始！

rows.original:
You choose to throw rock, balling your hand into a fist and thrusting it out before you.

        Tarah does the exact same thing, picking rock and smiling happily.
        
        "Ok, we tied. That means we-"
        
        "Both win, right!? Yay!"
        
        "I... You know, sure, that means we both win."
        
        "Woo! I wanna play more, but I think I'm ready to go now. You can have me as your prize!"
        
        "I can princess carry you back, if you want?"

rows.raw:
'
        You choose paper, flattening your hand and presenting it. Tarah is a moment slower, but still thrusts her hand out in a balled up fist presenting rock. When you cover her fist, she firmly grips your hand.

        "I knew you could do it. You're, like, really good at games and stuff."
        
        "[pc.dcb
            |I'm... glad you think so?
            |Thank you. You're not too bad yourself.
            |Noooo it was tough. I think you almost had me there.
        ]"
        
        "[pc.isDK
            |Me too,
            |Aww, thanks.
        ] I think I'm ready to go now. You can have me as your prize!"
        
        "I can princess carry you back, if you want?"
        
        '

rows.original:
Tarah looks blatantly ready to throw down rock, and is doing a terrible job of hiding it, so you pick scissors.

        Tarah makes an excited 'squee,' and baps your fingers with her fist.
        
        "Yay! That was tough, but I think I like it!"
        
        Right...
        
        "I guess I win you as the prize, then?"
        
        "That's certainly one way to think about it," you [pc.mascFem
            |chuckle
            |giggle
        ].
        
        "Yay! I think I'm ready, then."
        
        "I can princess carry you back, if you want?"
rows.translation:
塔拉明显已经做好了用石头砸你的准备，而且她根本没怎么掩饰这一点，所以你选择了剪刀。

塔拉兴奋地叫了起来，还用拳头轻敲你的手指。

“耶！虽然有点紧张，但我觉得还挺有意思的！”

是吧……

“那我想，我就赢了你当奖品吧？”

“这么说也确实有道理。”你说道。 [pc.mascFem
            |轻声笑起来
            |轻声笑
        ]耶！我想我现在已经准备好了。”

“如果你愿意，我可以像公主一样抱你回去哦？

rows.original: "I'm callin' you out, Tarah, or should I call you by your REAL name... Terror AHHH!" you say, hand on the hilt of your Myth & Western 1911 revolver. Tarah grins, suddenly dressed in a poncho and assless chaps, and fingers her own pistol. "Well well well. I, like, didn't expect anybody to find me in these parts. What gave it away?" "Well that's obvious. Nobody can be that cute. It's illegal." "Gosh diggity darn it! I shoulda known I needed to tone it back a little bit. Aww well. There's no way you'll defeat me, and after I finish you off I'll go back to hiding out in this idyllic little town!" So that's how it is on this bitch of a Savarra. You turn your back on the dastardly outlaw, hand on your gun as you walk ten paces in the other direction.
rows.translation: 我叫你出来吧，塔拉，还是应该用你的真名来称呼你呢…… 真实 名字……恐怖啊！”你一边说着，一边握住了你的Myth & Western 1911左轮手枪的枪柄。 塔拉咧嘴笑了起来，她突然穿上了一件雨披和一条没有裤腿的短裤，同时指了指自己手中的手枪。 “哎呀，真没想到会有人在这附近找到我。是什么暴露了我的位置呢？” “这个嘛，其实很明显啊。 没有人 可以这么可爱啊。真是太…… 非法的天啊，真见鬼！我就知道应该稍微收敛一点自己的言行。算了，反正你根本不可能打败我，等我解决了你，就会继续躲在这个宁静的小镇里了！” 在这个该死的萨瓦拉镇上，就是这样的。你只要背弃那个卑鄙的无赖，拿起枪，然后朝另一个方向走十步就行了。

Tarah grins, suddenly dressed in a poncho and assless chaps, and fingers her own pistol. "Well well well. I, like, didn't expect anybody to find me in these parts. What gave it away?" "Well that's obvious. Nobody can be that cute. It's illegal." "Gosh diggity darn it! I shoulda known I needed to tone it back a little bit. Aww well. There's no way you'll defeat me, and after I finish you off I'll go back to hiding out in this idyllic little town!" So that's how it is on this bitch of a Savarra. You turn your back on the dastardly outlaw, hand on your gun as you walk ten paces in the other direction."

rows.original:
She spins first, drawing her weapon and blasting the wobbly ten gallon novelty cowboy hat off your noggin.
                
                "Gosh darn it," you say, stomping your cowboy boot. "Ya got me. You were the fastest draw in the west."
                
                "Yippee ki yay!!" she says with a happy clap. "I guess that means we gotta go back to normal, I dun reckon."
                
                "Yeah. We can't always be clownin' in this silliest of modes. I do think you're one of the gods' silliest clowns, though. You wanna go back to your home with me?"
                
                "Sure!"
                
                "I'll even princess carry you the whole way back," you promise, striding over to meet her.
rows.translation:
她先转身拔出武器，一枪就把你头上那顶摇摇晃晃的十加仑大容量牛仔帽打掉了。

“该死，”你一边说，一边狠狠地踩着你的牛仔靴，“你真厉害……你确实是西部拔枪最快的人啊。耶耶耶！！”她高兴地拍着手说道，“看来我们得恢复到正常状态了，我想是这样。”

“没错。我们不能总是以这种滑稽的方式来度过时间。 不过，我确实觉得你是众神中最滑稽的小丑之一。你想和我一起回家吗？

“当然想！”

“我甚至会像公主一样抱着你一路送你回家，”你承诺道，然后大步走向她。

rows.original:
You spin first, drawing your weapon and blasting the novelty cowboy hat right off Tarah's head.
    
            "Aww, I was hopin' I was faster. Shucks, now we gotta go back to normal, I dun reckon."
            
            "Yeah. We can't always be clownin' in this silliest of modes. I do think you're one of the gods' silliest clowns, though. You wanna go back to your home with me?"
            
            "Sure!"
            
            "I'll even princess carry you the whole way back," you promise, striding over to meet her.
rows.translation:
你先旋转身体，拔出武器，将那顶新奇的牛仔帽直接从塔拉的头上打掉。

“哎呀，我本来还盼着自己能动作更快些呢。真可惜，现在看来我们得恢复到正常状态了。”

“是啊。 我们总不能一直以这种愚蠢的方式来玩闹吧。不过，我确实认为你是众神中最愚蠢的小丑之一。你想和我一起回家吗？

“当然想！”

“我甚至会像公主一样抱着你一路送你回家，”你承诺道，然后大步走向她。
