rows.original: "Hey Kavi, did Tarah make it back ok?" you ask as you walk through the door. "I helped her find somebody, but I just want to make sure." "Ah! So it was you. She did indeed, and with a mate to boot. Thank you for helping her out, and I'm sorry again if she caused you any trouble." "It was nothing. I'm happy she made it back safely." "As am I. Now, is there anything I can help you with today?"
rows.translation: 嘿，卡维，塔拉终于回来了吗？”你一边走进门一边问道。“我帮她找到了一个人，不过还是想确认一下。” “啊！原来是这样…… 是 你……她确实做到了，而且还找到了一个伴侣。感谢你帮助她，如果她给你带来了任何麻烦，我再次表示歉意。” “没什么，我很高兴她能安全回来。” “我也很高兴。那么，今天还有什么我可以帮你的吗？
rows.raw: ' "Hey Kavi, did Tarah make it back ok?" you ask as you walk through the door. "I helped her find somebody, but I just want to make sure." "Ah! So it was you. She did indeed, and with a mate to boot. Thank you for helping her out, and I'm sorry again if she caused you any trouble." "It was nothing. I'm happy she made it back safely." "As am I. Now, is there anything I can help you with today?" '

rows.original: "Gosh, I'm flattered but I don't expect a whole princess to carry me back," she says with a bashful giggle. "N-no, It's a way of carrying you like a princess," you try to explain. "Oh! Ok! Show me how it works!" she says, and her tail gives an excited bob. With gentle care, you scoop her under the knees and lift her into the air. She clutches tight to your shoulders, and laughs excitedly as you set off back toward the marefolk village. Her grip doesn't ease up until you get back to the rocky path into town, at which point you set her down and walk beside her the rest of the way. You hold her hand till the alchemist's shop is in sight, and then let her rush ahead of you. By the time you get through the door, you're just in time to see Tarah getting smothered in a gigantic hug from her mom. "Thank the Greenfather you're ok, girl. You gave me such a fright, running off like that," she says, brushing Tarah's hair and squeezing her tight. "And thank [pc.name] as well. Thank you for bringing her back home." "Moooom," Tarah says, giggling as she pushes herself free of the mammoth plushness. "I was fine I swear! [pc.name] helped with my hunt so now we're like married and stuff." You [atani.married |know it's not exactly that simple |aren't certain if it's exactly that simple ], but you're not about to spoil her excitement. Kavi grins even wider at that, crossing the room to wrap you in an equally huge hug. "And who better for you. May you keep her safe, so I don't have to worry all the time," the massive moo says, breaking into a deep laugh. "Don't let me keep you too long, then. I can get back to my work now, without this cloud of worry." She turns and wanders back into the depths of the building, stopping once more to smile back at the two of you before disappearing. You're left alone with Tarah, who smiles cheerily and swishes her tail back and forth for a full minute before her eyes go wide. "Oh! We should probably, like, go to my room! Sorry, I just got kinda happy there and spaced out!" she says, grabbing your hand with both of hers and tugging you toward the door to the back rooms. "That's nothing to apologize for. It's kinda cute, actually," you say, prompting another tail bob. The half-moo leads you down a short corridor, turning to travel up the stairs instead of out back into the tented portions of the structure. Up a short flight of stairs, she leads you out through a door and into a room that must take up the entirety of the second floor. In ages past, the place might have been a strategy room for the scout-post's inhabitants to make plans. Now, it's been transformed into a comfy home. Soft fur rugs cover every inch of the stone floor, with the various colors somehow managing to harmonize. There are a couple tables with clean but haphazardly-arranged beauty products, and one with a bevy of stone-carved statues, each depicting one of the seven gods. There are seven that show their most common depictions, and you assume the rest to be regional variations. "Mom doesn't like stairs too much, so she let me have the whole second floor! This is my stuff, and these are my rugs, and this is my bed!" Tarah says, moving to each spot and jazzing her hands excitedly as she shows it off. When she's done showing off, she plops down on the bed with a tired huff. It's an extremely comfortable looking thing, plush and cushioned with even more furs. She sits up as you sit down, leaving you perched together on the edge of the bed. You're all too aware of the expected outcome here, and Tarah's air-headedness doesn't stop her from being equally aware. "Are you nervous?" you ask, gently rubbing up and down her back. "Yeah, a little." "Is this your first time?" "Nah. I get nervous all the time, even for little decisions. This one's just kinda big." Gods she's precious.
rows.translation: 天哪，我真是受宠若惊，不过我可没指望一位真正的公主会来背我回去呢，”她害羞地笑着说。 “不、不是的，这只是个搬运的方式而已。 你 就像公主一样，”你试图向她解释。 “哦！好的！快告诉我这是怎么用的！”她说道，她的尾巴兴奋地摇动着。 你小心翼翼地把她抱起，让她的双膝离地。她紧紧抓住你的肩膀，当你朝着马人村庄的方向走去时，她兴奋地笑了起来。 直到你们重新回到通往城镇的崎岖小路上，她才松开你的手。这时你把她放下，然后陪在她身边继续前行。你牵着她的手，直到炼金术士的店铺出现在视线中，之后才让她走在你前面。 当你走进门的时候，正好看到塔拉被她的妈妈紧紧拥抱在怀里。 “多亏了绿父，你没事吧，女儿。你那样突然跑掉，可把我吓坏了，”她的妈妈一边说，一边轻抚塔拉的头发，紧紧地抱住她。 那么，感谢…… [pc.name] 也是呢。谢谢你们把她带回家。” “妈妈，”塔拉笑着说，一边努力从那柔软的抱枕中挣脱出来。“我真的没事啦，真的！ [pc.name] 你帮我找到了那个东西，所以现在我们就像夫妻一样了。 [atani.married |知道事情并没有那么简单。 |不确定事情是否真的有那么简单。 ]但你肯定不会破坏她的兴奋之情吧。 听到这话，卡维的笑容更加灿烂了，他穿过房间，给了你一个同样热情的拥抱。 “还有谁比这个人更适合你呢？希望你能保护好她，这样我就不用一直担心了，”这个魁梧的大汉笑着说，然后突然放声大笑起来，“那我就不耽误你太久了。现在我可以回去继续工作了，再也不用为这件事担心了。 她转身，重新走进大楼的深处，在消失之前又停下来，朝你们两个人笑了笑。于是你们就只剩下塔拉一个人了。塔拉开心地笑着，她的尾巴来回摆动了好一会儿，足足有一分钟，直到她的目光突然变得呆滞起来。 哦！我们或许应该去我的房间吧！对不起，我在那里突然变得很开心，有点走神了！”她一边说，一边用双手抓住你的手，拉着你朝着后面的房间走去。 “没什么好道歉的。其实，这样还挺可爱的呢。”你说，这句话让她又开心地跳了起来。 那只半大的牛犊带你穿过一条短走廊，然后转身向上楼梯走去，而不是往后方通往那些由帐篷搭建而成的区域。爬上一段短短的楼梯后，它带你穿过一扇门，进入了一个显然占据了整个二楼的房间。 在遥远的过去，这个地方或许曾是侦察站居民们制定计划的战略会议室。如今，它已经被改造成了一个舒适的家。柔软的毛皮地毯覆盖了整个石质地面，那些五颜六色的地毯竟然奇妙地融为了一体，营造出了和谐的氛围。 有几张桌子，上面摆放着整洁但摆放随意的美妆用品，还有一张桌子摆满了石雕像，每一座雕像都代表着七位神明中的一位。其中有七座雕像展示了这些神明最常见的形象，而其余的雕像应该属于不同地区的变体。 妈妈不太喜欢爬楼梯，所以她把整个二楼都让给了我！这些都是我的东西，这些是我的地毯，还有这张床也是我的！”塔拉一边说着，一边兴奋地跑到每个地方，挥舞着手来展示自己的“领地”。 当她玩够了炫耀之后，便疲惫地坐倒在床上。那张床看起来极其舒适，柔软蓬松，还铺着更多的毛皮。当你坐下时，她也会跟着坐起来，于是你们就一起坐在床边。 你们都很清楚这里会迎来什么样的结果，而塔拉的愚蠢行为也并没有让她忽视这一点。 你紧张吗？”你轻声问道，一边轻轻抚摸着她的后背。 “嗯，有点。” “这是你第一次经历这种事吗？” “不是。其实每次做决定时我都会紧张，哪怕是些小事。只不过这次的事情确实有点重要罢了。” 天啊，她真是太可爱了。

rows.original: "Then maybe we don't need to make that decision right away," you say, hugging her around the shoulder and pulling her close. "Would you rather just kiss and cuddle this time?" "That sounds awesome, I think," Tarah says, sighing with relief and relaxing in your arms. "I've never really done that before, either." "Then I'll go nice and slow, so you don't miss it." You take her chin in your hand and turn her head till she's facing you. First, you plant a chaste little smooch on the top of her equine nose. That prompts a giggle, and you wait till it ends before guiding her lips to yours. Your hand transitions to her cheek, and you brush her silky coat with your thumb as you kiss her. She only stays tense and awkward for the first moment, and then melts into your kiss with natural grace. A curious tongue slips out to meet yours, whorling in a slow tango as hot breaths from her nose tickle your face. Her hands come up to squeeze your shoulders, and her eyes close as she savors every moment of this first kiss. After a solid minute of kissing and building up tension, she pulls away with a shaky gasp and then giggle-laughs with her hands crossed over her mouth. "Wow, gosh. It's so different from, like, greeting kisses. I feel, like, really super good. Like all these butterflies are dancing around my tummy and my heart and my head!" she says, frantically indicating the parts of herself that are fluttering. "Is that normal?" [pc.isBimbo |"Yep! It happens, like, every time and it's super fun," you say with a huge grin. "I'm super glad you feel that way too." "Me too! Can... how many times can we do it in a row?" |"It is for some people," you say with a [pc.dcb |proud smirk |genuine smile | ]. "I'm glad you're one of them." "Me too. That wasn't, like, scary at all, either! Can we do it some more?" ] "We can do it as many times as you'd like." You see her tail give an excited swish at the prospect. "Even like ten times?" she whispers, eyes wide with awe. “嗨，宝贝，嗨，宝贝……”她用欢快的语调唱着，经过你的肚脐时，还在那里轻轻地吻了一下。 哈喽，宝贝，哇哇，哈喽哈喽，哇哇！”

你忍不住笑了起来，而她也是笑得像朵桃花一样灿烂，跳起来继续笑着。

“谢谢，”她说，“但你到底来这里是干什么的呢？"
        |你将注意力转向那只活泼的半马生物，走过去轻轻碰了碰它的鼻子。

它开心地咯咯笑了起来，注意力完全集中在你身上。

不过，你究竟想做什么呢？
    ]
rows.raw:
'
    [var0
        |You turn your attention to the bubbly she-mare, walking over and giving her a boop on the nose to her giggly surprise.

        "Hi, [pc.name]. Oh my gosh!" she says, noticing your round tummy for the first time. "[silly
            |Can I rizz you up?
            |Can I say hi to the baby?
        ]"
        
        "Of course, silly."
        
        The happy mare plops down on her knees and gives your tummy a gentle rub.
        
        "Hello baby hello baby hello hello hello baby," she says in a cheery sing song voice, planting a bubbly kiss right on your navel as she passes it by. "Hello baby mwah mwah hello hello mwah!"
        
        You can't help but giggle, and she's bright as a peach and giggling as well when she hops back to her feet.
        
        "Thanks," she says. "But what did you actually come for?"
        |You turn your attention to the bubbly half-equine, walking over and giving her a boop on the nose.
    
        She giggles in response, her attention totally focused on you.
        
        But what did you actually want to do?
    ]
    '

rows.original: Give the roan mare a lookover.
rows.translation: 去检查一下那匹赤褐色的母马吧。
与那个古怪的人聊天吧。

rows.original: Ride, or get ridden by, that pony.
rows.translation: 要么驾驭那匹小马，要么被它牵着走。
rows.raw: "Ride, or get ridden by, that pony."

rows.original: You want to cuddle with your lovely mare-mate, but where?
rows.translation: 你想和你的可爱伴侣依偎在一起，但该去哪里呢？
rows.raw: "You want to cuddle with your lovely mare-mate, but where?"

rows.original:
Tarah is a lean and soft pony, standing around 5'10" when she's at her best attention. A steely gray blue-roan coat covers her entire body, splotched with lots of darker coloration like an artist flicked ink all over a canvas. She sports a similarly dark equine nose at the end of her face, and her bright green eyes glow with bubbly excitement. A wavy waterfall of platinum blonde hair falls around her shoulders, and a similarly colored tuft sits at the end of a long bovine tail that continually swishes about behind her. That, combined with the constant swivel of her ears toward new stimuli, adds to her constant look of bubbly curiosity.

    A little further down, it's plain to see that Tarah did not inherit her mom's prodigious bust. Her choice of dress leaves a pair of charming [var0
        |DD
        |D
    ]-cups on constant display, with a pair of gaudy but adorable piercings drawing your eyes to them. They consist of silver horseshoes with tiny gold cowbells hanging from the bottom. The bells jingle when she makes sudden movements, which is any time she gets too excited, which is the majority of the time she's doing anything... [var0
        |Since you've gotten pregnant with her baby, her tits have also somehow recognized the change, swelling with milk till it leaks out and drips off her piercings when she's not conscious of keeping them dry.
        |Despite not being ridiculously large like her mother, they're still perfectly big enough to fit in her palms when she occasionally gives them a happy honk.
    ]
    
    Continuing down, you can see that Tarah's plush hips and long legs end in two equine hooves. Those hips also connect to a big soft butt, the plushest and most spankable part of her body. It's big enough to jiggle when she idly bounces in place, and even more when she's walking with purpose. She's constantly smoothing out her dress with her hands, or idly twirling a lock of her hair, and it shows off her slender and dexterous fingers.
    
    Between her legs, you know Tarah has a tiny four-inch long horsecock and a big ol pair of balls to go with it. Behind that, she's got a puffy donut that gently parts her cheeks and rests just under the base of her tail. Everything between her thighs is colored with the dusky black of fine coal, and glistens like obsidian when she sweats.
    
    Tarah tends to wear dresses that leave her breasts on full display, but otherwise provide good coverage. She has them in a number of colors, but prefers brighter ones that contrast swimmingly with her dark coat. When she sees where your eyes are straying, she spreads the skirt of her dress and proudly shows off the embroidered patterns that dance and snake along its fabric. Smiling at the opportunity to show off, your perusal leaves her looking even more happy and bubbly than she was at the start.
rows.translation:
塔拉是一匹体型纤瘦、性格温顺的小马。当它保持最精神的状态时，身高大约为5英尺10英寸。它的全身覆盖着铁灰色的毛皮，上面还散布着许多深色的斑点，就像艺术家在画布上随意泼洒的墨水一样。 她的脸庞末端也长着同样深色的马鼻状突起，那双亮绿色的眼睛里闪烁着兴奋的光芒。一缕波浪般的铂金色长发披散在她的肩头，而她那条长长的、颜色相同的尾巴末端也长着一簇同样的头发，不断在身后摆动着。 再加上她的耳朵总是会转向新的刺激源，这些特点使得她总是显得充满好奇心，活力四射。

再往下看，就会很明显地发现，塔拉并没有继承她母亲那迷人的胸部。她选择的服装，反而凸显出了她那双迷人的…… [var0
        |DD
        |D
    ]那些杯子一直都摆在显眼的位置，上面有一对虽然俗气但十分可爱的穿孔装饰，立刻吸引了你的目光。这些穿孔是由银色的马蹄形饰品组成的，底部还悬挂着小小的金色铃铛。每当她突然做出动作时，这些铃铛就会叮当作响——而她几乎总是在情绪过于激动的时候才会这样，事实上，她做任何事情的时候，大部分时间都处于兴奋状态…… [var0
        |自从你怀上了她的孩子，她的胸部似乎也察觉到了这种变化，开始充满乳汁，甚至在没有注意保持干燥的情况下，乳汁会渗出，从她的穿孔处滴下来。
        |虽然它们没有她妈妈那么大，但大小还是刚好适合她把它们放在手掌里，偶尔轻轻按一下的时候，会发出愉快的声响。
    ]
    
    继续往下看，你会发现塔拉那圆润的臀部与修长的双腿末端长着两只马蹄。她的臀部还连接着一颗柔软的大屁股，这是她身上最柔软、最适合被拍打的部位。当她闲散地蹦跳时，这个屁股会微微晃动；而当她有目的地行走时，这种晃动会更加明显。 她总是不停地用手整理自己的裙子，或者闲闲地捻弄着一缕头发，这些动作都凸显出她那修长而灵巧的手指。

你知道的，塔拉的生殖器非常小，阴茎只有四英寸长，而睾丸则相当大。 在她的背后，有一个鼓鼓的圆环，轻轻地将她的脸颊分开，位于她尾巴的根部下方。她大腿之间的部位呈现出细腻煤炭般的深黑色，当她出汗时，这些部位会像黑曜石一样闪闪发光。
    
    塔拉喜欢穿那些能够将她的胸部充分展现出来的连衣裙，但其他部分则能提供良好的遮盖效果。她拥有许多不同颜色的这类连衣裙，但更偏爱那些颜色鲜艳、能与她深色的外套形成鲜明对比的款式。当她注意到你的目光被什么吸引时，她就会轻轻展开裙摆，自豪地展示那些印在裙料上的刺绣图案——那些图案在布料上跳跃着、蜿蜒着，显得格外漂亮。 一看到有机会炫耀自己的本领，你那专注的神情让她的笑容更加灿烂，整个人也显得比刚开始时更加活泼开朗。

rows.original: What kind of stuff did you want to talk with Tarah about?
rows.translation: 你想和塔拉谈论些什么事情呢？
rows.raw: "\n    What kind of stuff did you want to talk with Tarah about?"

rows.original: "What about those little statues upstairs? You've got[pc.isBimbo |, like, | ] a ton of them!" you ask. "Oh yeah! Come see!" she says, grabbing your hand and happily tugging you up the stairs. When you get there, she indicates the table with a little 'ta-da' gesture. "I get them, like, every time a trader comes through town. I just love seeing the way people think the gods look like. Some of them don't even look like people. Like this one," she says, picking up a tiny statuette that looks more like a smooth orb than a person. You can faintly make out some points along the arms that might be analogous to feathers. "The trader said this one was from some really far off jungle place... Iscandy I think. It's one of their aspects of Lumia! A big ol' harpy who's too round to fly 'cause she's always full of eggs!" "[pc.isValk |I'm sure she'd be flattered by the depiction, |I can see it. Fertility is a major part of her portfolio, ]" you say with a [pc.mascFem |chuckle |giggle ]. "I know, right! I've also got this one for Velun, and this one for Sorra!" she says. She plucks statues from the table, showing you a very tall bit of sculpted stone that looks like a mountain with a face, and then a fish with wide and broad fins at its sides. Continuing through her collection, she shows off more and more. Among the fancier ones are a statuette of a serpent with a book for a hood representing Nareva, a mysterious glass orb meant to represent Keros, a half-melted thick candle that contains a tiny statue of Tira holding a torch, and a statuette of Lumia in her more standard guise holding a large goose. They're all pretty cool, but your mind keeps straying back to... "Was that a statue of Sorra as a fish?" you ask, raising an incredulous eyebrow. "Yeah! The guy said they were fishes in the ocean -which is like a lake but huge huge- that can fly like birds! They skip on top of the water and wait for big wind gusts, and they can travel like a bajillion hundred feet when it catches their wing fins! I thought it sounded neat so I bought a little statue of it." "It's certainly a unique representation of her. I don't know that I would've expected a sky goddess to have a fish in her portfolio." "Yeah! I love the weird ones like that. The rest are just kinda normal, but we can still look if you want." "[tarah.nickName], I could listen to you talk about these things all day." That brings an infectious smile to the young mare's lips, and she dives into explanations of her favorites from among the more plain looking statuettes. It doesn't quite go on all day, as she gets tired after around an hour. Still, you're surprised by how much she remembers about the little things. By the time you return to the front room with her hand in yours, you've heard enough godly facts to assuredly pass some flavor of religious test. For now, though, you give Tarah a thank-you kiss and ready yourself for the return to your adventures.
rows.translation: 楼上那些小雕像怎么办？你得……[pc.isBimbo |就像，比如说…… | ] 有好多呢！”你问道。 “哦，对啊！快来看吧！”她说着，抓住你的手，开心地拉着你上楼。到了楼上，她指了指那张桌子，还做了个“看吧”的手势。 “每次有商人来到这个小镇，我就能买到这些东西。”她解释道。 我就喜欢看人们想象中的神明是什么样子的。有些神明看起来甚至根本不像人类。就像这个，”她说着，拿起一个看起来更像是一个光滑的球体，而不是人的小雕像。你可以隐约看到它手臂上有些类似羽毛的突起。 那个商人说，这个怪物来自某个遥远的丛林地区……我记得是叫伊斯坎迪吧。它是Lumia系列中的其中一个角色！那是一只体型巨大的女妖，因为肚子总是装满了蛋，所以太圆了，根本飞不起来！[pc.isValk |我相信她一定会为这样的描述感到荣幸的。 |我明白了。生育能力确实是她业务的重要组成部分。 ]你是这么说的…… [pc.mascFem |轻笑 |轻笑 ]我知道的，对吧！我也有为Velun准备的这个，还有为Sorra准备的这个！”她说道。 她从桌上拿起了那些雕像，向你展示了一块非常高大的石雕——那块石头看起来像一座长着人脸的山，然后又展示了一条两侧长着宽大鳍状的鱼。 继续展示她的收藏品，她陆续拿出了更多有趣的物品。其中一些较为精美的藏品包括：一个蛇形小雕像，它的“兜帽”部分实际上是一本书，象征着纳雷瓦；一个神秘的玻璃球体，用来代表凯罗斯；一支半融化的粗蜡烛，里面藏着一尊手持火炬的蒂拉的小雕像；还有一个卢米娅的小雕像，她以较为传统的形象出现，手中拿着一只大鹅。 它们都挺不错的，但你的思绪总是不由自主地回到…… 那是一尊索拉变成鱼形态的雕像吗？”你难以置信地挑了挑眉毛问道。 “没错！那个人说那些是生活在海洋里的鱼——其实海洋就是很大的湖泊——它们能像鸟一样飞翔！它们会在水面上跳跃，等待强风的来临，当风势足够大时，它们就能飞到极高的高度！我觉得这个故事很有趣，所以就买了一尊这样的小雕像。 这确实是对她形象的一种独特诠释。我真没想到，一位天空女神的‘作品集’里会有一条鱼。” “没错！我就喜欢这种有点奇怪的设计。其他的虽然还算普通，但如果你想看的话，我们也可以看看。 "[tarah.nickName]我真可以一整天都听你讲述这些事情呢。” 年轻母马脸上立刻浮现出灿烂的笑容，她开始详细解释那些外观较为普通的小雕像中她最喜欢的那些。虽然并没有真正持续一整天，因为大约一个小时后她就开始感到累了，但你还是会被她对那些细节如此熟悉的程度所惊讶。当你牵着她的手回到客厅时，你已经听到了足够多的有趣故事，这些故事肯定足以让你感到满足。 一些 带有宗教测试性质的暗示。不过，现在你还是应该亲吻塔拉，然后准备好继续你的冒险吧。

rows.original: Ask about Tarah's little god statues.
rows.translation: 问问塔拉那些小神像的事吧。

rows.original: "Would you be ok with a pet name?" you ask, reaching out and giving the bubbly bimbo a pat on the nose. When she looks confused, you hastily add: "Like a nickname, I mean. Not like you're a pet." "Oooooh! I'd love to! Like honey or [silly |sweetie |dumpling ] or something?" What kind of nickname are you planning to give Tarah?
rows.translation: 你愿意接受一个昵称吗？”你问道，一边伸手轻拍了一下那个活泼可爱的女孩的鼻子。看到她一脸困惑，你赶紧补充道：“就是那种昵称啦，并不是说你真的是宠物哦。” “哦哦哦！我当然愿意啦！比如叫我‘甜心’什么的…… [silly |甜心 |饺子 ] 还是别的什么名字呢？” 什么样的昵称呢？ 是 你打算把塔拉送给别人吗？

Not like you're a pet." "Oooooh! I'd love to! Like honey or [silly |sweetie |dumpling ] or something?" What kind of nickname are you planning to give Tarah?'

rows.original:
"That's just my normal name, silly, not a nickname!" she giggles.

                She's got you there.
rows.translation:
那只是我的普通名字而已，傻瓜，又不是昵称！”她咯咯笑着。

她可真把你给骗到了。
rows.raw:
"
                "That's just my normal name, silly, not a nickname!" she giggles.

                She's got you there."

rows.original: No. You're not even going to bring that one up. You'd make her cry.
rows.translation: 不，你甚至都不该提那个话题。那样只会让她哭起来。
rows.raw: "\n                No. You're not even going to bring that one up. You'd make her cry."

rows.original: "Silly, you can't just call me somebody's name," she giggles. Right. That would be silly.
rows.translation: 傻瓜，你不能随便就用别人的名字来称呼我吧，”她咯咯笑着说。 对吧。就是这个意思。 会 真是太傻了。
rows.raw: " "Silly, you can't just call me somebody's name," she giggles. Right. That would be silly."

rows.original:
[var0
                |"Whoa, are you, like, psychic?" she asks with awe. "Mom used to call me that sometimes. Not that I mind! I think it's really cute."

                "I had no idea, but I'm happy for the coincidence," you say, giving her a quick peck on the cheek.
                |"How about [tarah.nickName]?"
    
                "I love it! I dunno if I'd be able to, like, remember and keep track of a nickname, so I hope you don't mind if I just keep calling you by name."
                
                "I don't mind," you say, giving her a quick peck on the cheek.
            ]
rows.translation:
[var0
                |哇，你该不会是有什么超能力吧？”她惊讶地问道，“我妈妈以前有时候也会这么叫我。不过我并不介意哦，我觉得这样挺可爱的。”

“我之前完全不知道，不过能遇到这种巧合，我真的很高兴。”你说着，轻轻在她脸颊上吻了一下。
                |怎么样…… [tarah.nickName]太好了！我不知道自己是否能够记住并一直使用那个昵称，所以希望你不会介意我继续直接叫你的名字。”

“我不介意，”你说道，同时轻轻吻了她的脸颊一下。
            ]

rows.translation: 在塔拉的床上依偎在一起，亲吻彼此。
沐浴时光中的亲密拥抱

rows.original: Cuddle and clean up in one of the giant water tubs downstairs.
rows.translation: 在楼下的巨大浴缸里一边玩耍一边洗澡吧。
rows.raw: "Cuddle and clean up in one of the giant water tubs downstairs."

rows.translation: 你的权限不足，无法查看此消息。
rows.raw: "You don't have sufficient clown clearance to view this message."

rows.original:
[var0
        |You sidle over to the ditzy marefolk and lace your fingers through hers. She smiles cheerily, letting her hands rock with yours between you.

        "Hey, [tarah.nickName]. Wanna go cuddle for a bit? I'm out of energy and only your cuteness can restock my stores."
        
        "Oh! I was just thinking about cuddling! How did you know!?" she asks. "I would love to."
        
        As you follow her up the stairs, you idly muse that there's probably always some part of her brain thinking about cuddling. You make it up to her room, and follow her down as she plops onto the bed. Once she's good and comfortable, you snuggle in close and scoot and adjust till both of you are delightfully intertwined.
        
        
        
    ]Situated at last, you give her a gentle smooch right on the collarbone. For now you're content to lie like this, together, and enjoy the closeness. One of your hands rubs her back, idly stroking her silky coat and keeping her held safe and tight. More kisses follow that first one, interspersed with nuzzling and squeezing. It continues till your lips have graced her neck, her cheeks, and the underside of her chin.

    "Not fair!" she pouts. "I can't reach you good for kissing!"
    
    She can hardly reach you at all when you're this close, but you pull away long enough for her to get some kisses in. Her lips pepper your forehead and chest with happy giggles betwixt. There's no real method to it, but she does inevitably swing more and more towards just regular cuddly kisses. Whenever she needs it, she returns to intertwine her tongue with yours. Your cuddling is also definitely doing a good job of relaxing her, and you've melted into each other's combined embrace after mere minutes.
    
    You've not bothered to remove your clothes, but you can still feel the cool pressure of her metal piercings against your chest. Pressed this tightly against you, there's no ringing to hear from them for now. Instead, you're treated to her gently humming now that she's had her turn at smooches. Utter content oozes off her in comforting droves, spilling into you like the waters of an overflowing dam. All the worries drift out along with the tension, and both are replaced with simple adoration.
    
    It's warm up in Tarah's room, and warmer in bed with her. Nothing approaching discomfort, of course, but rather quite the opposite. All the chill air of the Marches is banished while you're together, and you alternate evenly between whose face is buried in whose chest. There are breaks for kissing, of course, but the two of you settle into a half dozing state of pure comfort. Your carefree mare-mate actually falls asleep in your arms, head over your shoulder and arms wrapped loosely around your shoulders.
    
    You let her rest, silently enjoying her warmth and softness while you get some much-needed rest of your own. Your bed partner only stays sleeping for an hour or so, finally waking with a stretch. While she's stretching her head back, you smooch the underside of her chin till she's a giggling mess. Then, you wake each other from grogginess in much the same way you tired each other out in the first place.
    
    A storm of kisses on either end has you both laughing and squeezing right up till you push yourself up and help her to stand. Traveling back down to the main room with her hand in yours, you cup her chin and give her one last lasting smooch on the nose before you get ready to return to your adventures.
rows.translation:
[var0
        |你悄悄走到那个有点迷糊的海洋族女子身边，将手指与她的手指交织在一起。她开心地笑了起来，你们的手在彼此的牵动下轻轻摇晃着。

“嘿， [tarah.nickName]想一起抱抱吗？我有点没力气了，只有你的可爱才能让我恢复精力呢。”

“哦！我刚才也在想抱抱呢！你怎么知道的！？”她问道，“我也很乐意哦。”

当你跟着她上楼的时候，你不禁心想：她的大脑里，大概总有那么一部分时刻都在想着拥抱吧。 你跟着她来到她的房间，看到她一屁股坐在床上。等她安顿好后，你便依偎在她身边，轻轻调整姿势，直到你们俩的身体完美地交织在一起。
        
        
        
    ]最终，你轻轻在她锁骨处吻了一下。此刻，你满足于就这样和她依偎在一起，享受这份亲密。你的一只手轻轻抚摸着她的背部，随意地滑过她柔软的毛发，让她感受到你的关爱与保护。在最初的那个吻之后，更多的吻接踵而至，其间还伴随着轻触和捏捏她的动作。这个吻吻之旅一直持续着，直到你的嘴唇抚过了她的脖子、脸颊，以及下巴的下侧。

    不公平！”她撅着嘴说道，“这样我根本没法好好亲到你啊！”

明明你离她这么近，她几乎根本碰不到你；但你却故意拉开一些距离，让她终于能够亲到你。她的嘴唇轻触着你的额头和胸口，而她那快乐的笑声，也在这一个个吻之间不断响起。 其实并没有什么特定的方法，但她确实会逐渐变得更加喜欢那些普通的、亲密的吻。每当她需要的时候，她就会再次将她的舌头与你的舌头交织在一起。你们的拥抱确实也有助于让她放松下来，短短几分钟之后，你们就已经完全融入了彼此的怀抱之中。
    
    你甚至都没有费心脱掉衣服，但依然能感受到她那些金属饰品贴在胸前的清凉触感。它们紧紧贴在你的身上，此刻并没有发出任何叮当声，相反，当她轮到亲吻你的时候，你会听到她轻柔的哼唱声。她满脸满足，这种愉悦之情如潮水般涌出，源源不断地注入你的心中。所有的烦恼和紧张都随之消散，取而代之的，只有纯粹的喜爱与倾慕。
    
    塔拉的房间里温暖舒适，而与她一起躺在床上时，这种温暖更是无与伦比。当然，丝毫没有不适的感觉，恰恰相反——当你们在一起时，那些来自边境地区的寒冷空气都被彻底驱散了。你们轮流将脸埋在对方的胸前，享受这种亲密的接触。当然，也会偶尔停下来亲吻一下，但随后你们又会陷入一种半睡半醒的状态，沉浸在这种纯粹的舒适之中。你那无忧无虑的伴侣，最终竟然在你怀里睡着了，她的头靠在你的肩上，手臂也松松地搭在你的肩上。
    
    你让她休息，静静地享受她的温暖与柔软，同时自己也得到了急需的休息。你的床伴只睡了大约一个小时，最后伸了个懒腰醒了过来。当她把头仰起来的时候，你轻轻吻了吻她的下巴下方，逗得她咯咯直笑。然后，你们就用最初那种让彼此疲惫的方式，一起从睡意中清醒过来。
    
    你们互相拥吻，笑声不断，紧紧相拥着，直到你站起身来，帮助她也站起来。手牵着手回到主房间后，你捧起她的下巴，在她的鼻子上留下了最后一个深长的吻，然后便准备继续你们各自的“冒险”了。

rows.original:
"Would you like to take a bath? I could use one, and it could save water."

    "[flags.TARAH_CBATH
        |Sure! Follow me! We've got plenty of water."
        |Sure! We have a supply of cleansed lake water to use! Follow me!"
    ]
    
    You follow the ditzy mare into one of the back tents, curling through them till you reach one with several metal tubs of varying sizes. The room is additionally stocked with several more milk cans, though on further inspection they prove to be filled with water rather than the usual stock. Tarah eases one of them over to the larger tub and begins filling it to a scratch-indicated fill line. It takes two cans worth to reach it, and Tarah dutifully watches every ounce of water spill in.
    
    When she's done, her tail gives a happy swish and she immediately begins stripping out of her clothes. First, she removes her bell piercings and sets them on the countertop. Then, she simply shirks her entire dress down over her hips, [weightedRand 90 10
        |letting it drop into a pile on the ground.
        |or tries tom it gets caught on the poof of her tail and she has to wiggle waggle a bit to get the last bit disconnected.
    ] With that out of the way, she leans against the edge of the tub to wait for you... and promptly jumps up after sitting her naked butt on the metal.
    
    "Ah, chilly! The inside warms up pretty quick from the water, but this top bit never does. You think I'd know by now," she says, twirling a lock of her platinum blonde hair.
    
    "I think it's [flags.TARAH_CBATH
        |just as adorable every time
        |adorable
    ]," you say, stepping closer with every article of clothing removed.
    
    "Gosh, you're a big flatterer, you know that? I believe you, but still. Now spread out a bit so I can scrub you down before we get in the tub."
    
    You spread your arms and legs, letting your dutiful mare-mate dip a sponge in the water and apply a soapy scrub to your body. Despite the easy access to your naked body, the beauteous bimbo does a perfectly chaste job of scrubbing you clean. Even when she's around your crotch, she's focused entirely on making sure you're clean and soapy, and then on rinsing the suds away.
    
    "I think... that should be good!" she says when she's finished. "Except your face, but would you do me before that?"
    
    You oblige, soaping Tarah up with the same sponge and scrubbing her silvery-blue coat clean. It's an easy job, as she isn't that dirty in the first place, but you're anything but completely chaste. Her tits get a playful squeeze, and so does one of her ass cheeks, and she giggles with every exploratory touch. Beyond that, you plant a kiss on her navel as the rinsing water washes over it. Still, the mood never progresses beyond teasing, and you help her to fill a final bucket that you both use to wash your hair and faces.
    
    When you're thoroughly scrubbed clean, you take the first step into the tub. Like she said, it's plenty warm on the inside, and even the metal beneath the water only feels cool because of how comfortably warm the water itself is. Once you've gotten settled, the happy half-mare joins you. She's careful not to step on you with her hooves, and as she sinks down into your lap it brings the water level right up to your chests. 
    
    Since you got clean before you got in the tub, the only thing left to do is soak and enjoy the warmth of the fair-haired horsegirl in your lap. She giggles as you hold her around the tummy, kissing her neck and hugging her tight. There's absolutely no chance she's gonna reach you at this angle, so all the cuddle-advantage is on you this time. You take full advantage of that fact, lavishing her with as much love as her pretty pony body can hold. 
    
    "Taking baths is more fun like this. I usually try to get out as quick as possible when I'm alone, but [flags.TARAH_CBATH
        |I never want to get out when I'm with you.
        |now I don't wanna leave
    ]"
    
    "We've still got a little time left," you say. "We don't need to get out while it's still comfortable."
    
    You wait until you absolutely have to leave. The Ideal soak time comes and eventually goes, leaving the water to go from warm and comfortable to just plain lukewarm. After your cuddles, you help her out first, and then extricate yourself from the bath in the same fashion you entered. As you look around for towels, you hear Tarah gasp with excitement and kneel beside the tub. She pulls a small plug out of its bottom, and the water rushes out through a small furrow in the earth at the tent's edge.
    
    "I love that part," she says, still completely soaked herself. "Pulling the plug and watching the water go 'woosh.'"
    
    You both grab towels, and dry each other off with the same dutiful energy with which you scrubbed each other clean. When you're all dry, you gather your clothing and dress yourselves before heading back to the main room hand in hand. You give her a smooch, and ready yourself to return to your adventures feeling much cleaner than before.
rows.translation:
你想洗澡吗？我也正需要洗澡，这样还能节约用水呢。[flags.TARAH_CBATH
        |当然！跟我来吧！我们这里有足够的水。
        |好的！我们有经过处理的湖水可以使用了！跟我来吧！
    ]
    
    你跟着那匹傻乎乎的马走进了后面的一个帐篷，穿过一连串的帐篷，最终找到了一个里面摆放着几个大小不一的金属桶的房间。房间里还放着几罐牛奶，但仔细一看，里面装的是水，而不是平常的牛奶。 塔拉把其中一只动物带到那个较大的水盆旁，开始往里面灌水，直到水达到标记线为止。总共需要两罐水才能达到这个量，塔拉认真地观察着每一滴水被倒进去的过程。

当她完成这项工作后，它的尾巴开心地摆动了几下，然后立刻开始脱掉自己的衣服。 首先，她取下了耳环，把它们放在柜台上。然后，她 simply把整条裙子往下拉，让裙子落在臀部位置。 [weightedRand 90 10
        |把它扔在地上，堆成一堆。
        |否则，当它试图触碰到她尾巴上的绒毛时，就会被缠住，于是她就得扭动尾巴，把最后一小部分绒毛弄断。
    ] 把这件事解决了之后，她靠在浴缸边缘等着你……结果刚把裸露的屁股坐到金属浴缸上，就立刻跳了起来。

“啊，好凉！浴缸里的水很快就能让身体变暖和，但这个上部区域却从来都不热。你以为我现在还不知道吗？”她一边说，一边捻着自己那一绺铂金色的头发。

“我觉得应该是…… [flags.TARAH_CBATH
        |每次看起来都一样可爱
        |可爱极了
    ]你说得对，”他一边说着，一边脱下一件件衣服，一步步靠近她。

“天哪，你真会夸人啊，你知道吗？我相信你，不过还是……现在请稍微分开一点，这样我才能在你们一起泡澡之前把你擦洗干净。
    
    你四肢摊开，任由那位尽职的伴侣将海绵浸入水中，然后用肥皂泡沫为你擦拭身体。尽管她可以轻松接触到你的裸体，但这位美丽的姑娘依然以极其端庄的方式将你擦洗得干干净净。 即使她站在你的裆部附近，她也会全神贯注地确保你身上充满泡沫，然后再把那些泡沫冲洗干净。
    
    我觉得……这样应该挺好的！”她说完之后补充道，“除了你的脸……不过在这之前，你能先帮我处理一下吗？”

你照做了，用同一个海绵把塔拉的身体擦洗干净，把她那银蓝色的外皮洗得干干净净。这项工作其实挺简单的，因为她本来就不是特别脏，不过你嘛……可就完全不是“纯洁”的状态了。 她的胸部被轻轻地捏了捏，她的臀部也被触碰了一下，每一次这样的探索性触碰都让她咯咯地笑起来。除此之外，当冲洗的水流经过她的肚脐时，你还在那里吻了她一下。不过，气氛始终没有进一步发展，你只是帮她把最后一个水桶装满水，然后你们一起用这些水来洗头和洗脸。
    
    当你被彻底清洗干净后，你就走进了浴缸。正如她所说，浴缸里的水温非常适宜，就连水下的金属部分，也因为水温的高温而不会让人感到寒冷。当你安顿好后，那匹快乐的半马也会来到你身边。它会小心地避免用蹄子踩到你，当它坐到你腿上时，水的高度正好会淹到你的胸口。 
    
    既然你在泡澡前已经洗干净了，现在要做的就是尽情享受这个金发小马女孩带来的温暖吧。当你轻轻抱住她的肚子，亲吻她的脖子，紧紧地将她搂在怀里时，她会开心地咯咯笑起来。在这个姿势下，她绝对不可能碰到你，所以这次所有的拥抱机会都掌握在你手中。你充分利用了这个优势，用尽你全部的爱去呵护她，让她的美丽小马身躯能够感受到满满的爱意。 
    
    这样洗澡确实更有趣。通常当我独自洗澡时，都会尽量尽快结束洗澡过程，但是…… [flags.TARAH_CBATH
        |当你在我身边时，我根本不想离开。
        |现在我可不想离开。
    ]我们还有点时间呢，”你说，“既然现在还挺舒服的，没必要现在就离开。”

你一直等到真的不得不离开的时候。最理想的浸泡时间总会到来，然后也会过去，到时候水就会从温暖舒适变得只是微温而已。 在你们拥抱过后，你先帮她离开浴缸，然后以同样的方式从浴缸中爬出来。当你四处寻找毛巾时，听到塔拉兴奋地倒吸一口气，然后跪在浴缸旁边。她从浴缸底部拔出一个小塞子，水便从帐篷边缘地面上的一个小沟槽中流了出去。
    
    我就喜欢那个环节，”她说，身上还湿淋淋的，“拔掉插头，然后看着水‘呼’地流出去。”

你们俩都拿起了毛巾，用之前互相擦洗时那种认真负责的态度，一起把对方擦干。 等你们都擦干身体后，便收拾好衣物，一起回到主房间。你亲了她一下，然后准备继续开始你的冒险之旅，此时你感觉自己比之前干净多了。

Like she said, it's plenty warm on the inside, and even the metal beneath the water only feels cool because of how comfortably warm the water itself is. Once you've gotten settled, the happy half-mare joins you. She's careful not to step on you with her hooves, and as she sinks down into your lap it brings the water level right up to your chests. 
    
    Since you got clean before you got in the tub, the only thing left to do is soak and enjoy the warmth of the fair-haired horsegirl in your lap. She giggles as you hold her around the tummy, kissing her neck and hugging her tight. There's absolutely no chance she's gonna reach you at this angle, so all the cuddle-advantage is on you this time. You take full advantage of that fact, lavishing her with as much love as her pretty pony body can hold. 
    
    "Taking baths is more fun like this. I usually try to get out as quick as possible when I'm alone, but [flags.TARAH_CBATH
        |I never want to get out when I'm with you.
        |now I don't wanna leave
    ]"
    
    "We've still got a little time left," you say. "We don't need to get out while it's still comfortable."
    
    You wait until you absolutely have to leave. The Ideal soak time comes and eventually goes, leaving the water to go from warm and comfortable to just plain lukewarm. After your cuddles, you help her out first, and then extricate yourself from the bath in the same fashion you entered. As you look around for towels, you hear Tarah gasp with excitement and kneel beside the tub. She pulls a small plug out of its bottom, and the water rushes out through a small furrow in the earth at the tent's edge.
    
    "I love that part," she says, still completely soaked herself. "Pulling the plug and watching the water go 'woosh.'"
    
    You both grab towels, and dry each other off with the same dutiful energy with which you scrubbed each other clean. When you're all dry, you gather your clothing and dress yourselves before heading back to the main room hand in hand. You give her a smooch, and ready yourself to return to your adventures feeling much cleaner than before."

rows.original: "What if we cuddled somewhere super crazy. I'm talking way out there!" "Omigosh, I totally trust you! Where were you thinking?" "Just close your eyes and believe." She closes her eyes and grabs your hands. You close your eyes as well, and believe really hard till you can't believe anymore. There's a rush of air, and a thundercrack that sounds awfully similar to two roughly human-sized bodies breaking the sound barrier. Then, that rushing feeling subsides as quickly as it came, and you're able to open your eyes. All you can see is a barren white landscape as far as the eye can see. Then you look up. All of Savarra is arrayed in the sky above you, like you were looking at your world map except it's the real thing now. That, combined with the bleak terrain around you, can only mean one thing... You're on Savarra's moon! "Whoaaaaaaaaaaa," says Tarah. "Are we at the North Pole!?" "No Tarah, we're on the moon." "Huh? But the moon is up in the- Oh gosh! That's not the moon!" "No, that's where we live." "Whoooaa! Where's that, and that, and that!?" she asks, pointing around every bit of the world. It's a little tough to see from this high, but you try to make things out as best you can. "That bit must be Jassira and the deserts beyond. That vast green part must be the jungles of Izkanti. I think that purple bit is the hidden kingdom of Worpletingra." "What's that other place? The big yellow one." "That's the sun, [tarah.nickName]. Don't stare too hard." "Oh... Well the moon is made of cheese, right? We can have a cheese date!" Before you can stop her, Tarah breaks off a chunk of soft moonrock and tosses it into her mouth. She frowns, and then spits it out with an emphatic 'blech.' The next minute is spent brushing moon dust off her tongue, and trying her best to get awful rock taste out of her mouth. Still, she can't help but giggle when she sees your expression. The combination giggle-cough that escapes her lips makes your concern crack into a wide smile. "Sorry I couldn't warn you, but luckily I happen to have a wheel of Belharan mild cheddar on hand for just this kind of occasion." "Omigosh I love Belharan mild cheddar!" You surreptitiously pull an entire seventy five pound cheese wheel from your pocket, slicing a chunk out of the middle with your knife. While Tarah spreads a blanket out on the ground, you plop the wheel atop it and hand that first chunk to her. She nibbles it with gusto, and you slice another chunk for yourself. This stuff has got to be the tastiest cheese you've ever had the good fortune to imbibe. It's creamy and mild without any of that acrid sharpness they love hyping up in the sharper cheddars, or any of the stench of some varieties of softer cheeses. "Mmm, yummy. I love you, [pc.name]." "Love you too, [tarah.nickName]." You cuddle up next to her on the blanket, eating cheese and watching the world spin in a slow circle. Unfortunately due to budgetary and creative plot constraints, you can't actually describe much of the world beyond the Frost Marches and several select areas deemed ok to share. Of course the hidden kingdom of Worpletingra is fair game, but when isn't it? Despite being in an airless void, the air is wonderful and warm, and you snuggle the hours away up and above everything. "Ok, I think we should head back now," you say, brushing some moon dust off Tarah's shoulder. "Yeah. There isn't really much to do up here besides cuddle, is there?" she asks. "Especially now that the cheese is gone." The two of you lock hands and close your eyes again, and you feel the telltale woosh of cosmic power as you're instantaneously teletransportated back to the apothecaries' home. You open your eyes, holding both Tarah's hands and with your forehead against hers. Did any time really pass at all? Were you really on the moon? That's for you to decide. For now, Tarah giggles and gives you a final smooch before you get ready to return to your adventures.
rows.translation: 要是我们去一个超级疯狂的地方拥抱一下会怎么样？我是说那种真正远离常规的地方哦！” “天啊，我完全信任你！你到底在想什么地方呢？” “只要闭上眼睛，相信我就好。” 她闭上了眼睛，握住了你的手。你也闭上了眼睛，开始相信她的话。 真的很难 直到你再也无法相信自己的眼睛为止。一阵气流袭来，紧接着是一声雷鸣般的巨响——那声音简直就像两个体型与人类相近的物体突破了音障一样。然后，那种急速流动的感觉就像来时一样迅速消失了，你终于能够睁开眼睛了。 你所能看到的，是一片荒芜的白色景观，一眼望不到边。然后你抬头望去…… 整个萨瓦拉地区都展现在你头顶的天空之中，就像你在看世界地图一样，只不过现在这一切都是真实的。而周围这片荒凉的地形，只能够说明一件事情…….. 你们现在在萨瓦拉的卫星上！ “谁啊………………”塔拉惊叫道，“我们是在北极吗！？” “不，塔拉，我们是在月球上。” “哈？但是月球应该在天上啊——哦天啊！那根本不是月球！” “不，那就是我们居住的地方。哇哦！那些东西都在哪里啊？！”她一边说着，一边指向四周的每一个方向。 从这么高的地方来看，确实有点难以分辨清楚，但你还是尽力去辨认那些东西的位置。 “那片地方应该就是贾西拉以及那片广袤的沙漠吧。 那片广阔的绿色区域肯定是伊兹坎蒂的丛林了。我觉得那片紫色的地方应该是沃普林特格拉的隐秘王国。 “那另一个地方是什么？那个黄色的大东西。” “那是太阳。 [tarah.nickName]别盯着看太久了。” “哦……那月亮应该是用奶酪做的吧？我们可以来一场‘奶酪约会’吧！” 你还没来得及阻止她，塔拉就掰下一块柔软的‘月岩’，塞进了嘴里。她皱了皱眉头，然后立刻吐了出来，同时发出一声“呸”。下一分钟，她忙着把舌头上的“月尘”刷掉，拼命想把嘴里那难闻的岩石味弄掉。不过，当她看到你的表情时，还是忍不住笑了起来。她那既笑又咳嗽的声音让你的担忧瞬间化为灿烂的笑容。 很抱歉没能提前提醒你，不过幸运的是，我正好手头有一块贝尔哈兰淡切达奶酪，正好可以用来应对这种场合。” “天啊，我…… 爱 贝拉兰淡味切达奶酪！” 你悄悄地从口袋里掏出一整块重达75磅的奶酪，用刀从中间切下一大块。当塔拉把毯子铺在地上时，你把那块奶酪放在毯子上，然后把第一块递给了她。 她兴致勃勃地啃着它，于是你又切了一块给自己。这种奶酪绝对是你有幸尝过的最美味的奶酪了——它口感细腻、味道温和，完全没有那些硬质切达奶酪所具有的辛辣味道，也没有某些软质奶酪那种难闻的气味。 嗯，真好吃。我爱你…… [pc.name]我也爱你， [tarah.nickName]你依偎在她身边，一起躺在毯子上，吃着奶酪，看着这个世界缓缓旋转。可惜，由于预算和剧情创意的限制，你实际上无法描述除了霜冻边境以及那些被认为可以公开分享的几个特定区域之外的其他地方。 当然，隐秘的沃普林特拉王国也是我们的目标之一，不过这样的地方又有多少不是我们的目标呢？尽管它位于一个没有空气的虚空中，但那里的空气依然温暖而宜人，你可以在那里舒适地度过许多时光。 “好了，我想我们现在应该回去了，”你说着，轻轻拍去塔拉肩上的月尘。 是啊。在这里除了依偎在一起，真的没什么别的事情可做了，对吧？”她问道，“尤其是现在奶酪都没了。” 你们俩手拉手，再次闭上眼睛，随即感受到那股熟悉的宇宙能量，瞬间被传送回了药剂师的家。 你睁开了眼睛，双手握着塔拉的手，额头也紧贴着她的额头。究竟有没有真正流逝过时间呢？你真的去过月球吗？这个答案只能由你自己来决定。此刻，塔拉咯咯地笑了起来，给了你最后一个吻，然后你就准备继续去开启你的冒险之旅了。

rows.original: [var0 |You focus on Tarah as soon as you enter the apothecaries' home, rushing over when she comes down the stairs and smiles as she begins to approach. Intercepting her halfway, you pull her into a deep kiss and a tight hug. "[pc.n]-[pc.name]? Hi, why are you being so lovey all of a sudden? Did you, like, come to-" she pauses, looks at her mom, and then whispers in your ear. "Do sexy stuff?" "No, well, maybe, but no," you say, giving her a squeeze. "I came to tell you something important. I'm pregnant, [tarah.nickName], and you're the sire." Kavi gasps and makes a squeal of excitement that sounds not unlike her daughter. The beautiful bimbo takes a bit longer to process the information, looking a little confused for a few moments before something clicks and her eyes go wide. "Pregnant! Like with a baby!? Omigosh, are you gonna get round? Am I gonna get round?" "Yes, yes, probably, and no sweetie that's not how that works. You are adorable, though." Before you can continue, the matronly alchemist scoops you both up into the same gigantic bear hug. "Aaaahhh, this is wonderful! I cannot wait to see my grandchildren. You come by anytime you need help." "Thanks, Kavi. I'll be sure to bring them by, but I have a daycare in Hawkethorne where they can be safe otherwise." "That's kinda like here in the village!" Tarah says. "I stayed with mom mostly 'cause I kept causing trouble for the caretaker, but that's normally how it works." "You? Causing trouble?" you ask, incredulous. "She liked climbing on top of things she shouldn't have," Kavi explains, ruffling her daughter's hair. "Almost falling off the lakeside cliffs when she wanted to go swimming was the final straw. I haven't minded having her around." "The water's so pretty though!" Tarah pouts, but then smiles again. "I'm glad I got to be here a bunch, though." "Then I'll be sure to bring the baby around to meet you. I'm sure they can't wait." Tarah's tail gives a happy little swish, and Kavi returns to her work humming a peppy tune. Did you have anything else planned for this visit? |You focus on Tarah as soon as you enter the apothecaries' home. Kavi glances over with curiosity as you intercept the bubbly half-bovine midway through coming to greet you by the door. "Hi [pc.name]! Omigosh you're getting all round! Do you, like, have a baby in there?" she asks, completely and adorably oblivious. "Can I rub your tummy?" "Yes, you can, but there's something important you should know about this baby, [tarah.nickName]," you say, guiding her hand to your burgeoning belly. Kavi gasps, making the connection her daughter can't. "It's yours." "Huh? Like, o-oh! Like we made a baby!? Omigosh, that's wonderful! We're gonna be moms! But what d-" She's interrupted by her mother scooping the both of you into a colossal bear hug. "Aaaahhh, this is wonderful! I cannot wait to see my grandchildren. You come by anytime you need help." "Thanks, Kavi. I'll be sure to bring them by, but I have a daycare in Hawkethorne where they can be safe otherwise." "That's kinda like here in the village!" Tarah says. "I stayed with mom mostly 'cause I kept causing trouble for the caretaker, but that's normally how it works." "You? Causing trouble?" you ask, incredulous. "She liked climbing on top of things she shouldn't have," Kavi explains, ruffling her daughter's hair. "Almost falling off the lakeside cliffs when she wanted to go swimming was the final straw. I haven't minded having her around." "The water's so pretty though!" Tarah pouts, but then smiles again. "I'm glad I got to be here a bunch, though." "Then I'll be sure to bring the baby around to meet you. I'm sure they can't wait." Tarah's tail gives a happy little swish, and Kavi returns to her work humming a peppy tune. Did you have anything else planned for this visit? ]
rows.translation: [var0 |你一走进药剂师的家，就立刻把注意力集中在塔拉身上。当她走下楼梯时，你迅速冲过去，看到她脸上带着笑容朝你走来，便在半路上截住了她，将她紧紧拥入怀中，给了她一个深情的吻。[pc.n]-[pc.name]嗨，你怎么突然变得这么亲热起来啊？是不是……”她停顿了一下，看了看她的妈妈，然后在你耳边低声说道：“做了什么亲密的事情吗？” “没有，嗯，也许有点吧，但也不是。”你一边说，一边轻轻捏了捏她的手。“我是来告诉你一件重要的事情的——我怀孕了。 [tarah.nickName]原来你就是孩子的父亲。” 卡维惊讶地尖叫起来，那声音听起来和她的女儿一模一样。而那位漂亮的女子则需要更长的时间来消化这个消息，她看起来有些困惑，过了好一会儿才突然明白过来，顿时瞪大了眼睛。 “怀孕了！真的要生孩子了吗！？天啊，你真的要当爸爸了吗？ 我 打算怎么解决这个问题呢？” “嗯，应该可以吧……不过，亲爱的，事情并不是那么简单的。不过你真的太可爱了。” 还没等你说完，这位像母亲一样的炼金术士就把你们俩都紧紧抱在了怀里。 啊，太棒了！我迫不及待想见到我的孙子们了。你需要帮助的时候随时都可以来找我。” “谢谢，卡维。我一定会带他们来的，不过在霍克索恩有一家日托中心，他们在那里也会很安全。这跟我们村子的情况有点像呢！”塔拉说，“我大部分时间都是跟着妈妈住的，因为我会给看门人带来很多麻烦，但通常情况就是这样的。” “你？还会惹麻烦？你难以置信地问道。” “她总喜欢爬到那些她根本不应该去的地方，”卡维一边解释，一边轻抚着女儿的头发，“有一次她想去湖边游泳，结果差点从悬崖上掉下去，这件事终于让她忍无可忍了。 有她在身边，我并不介意。” “不过这水真的太美了！”塔拉撅了撅嘴，但很快又笑了起来。“不过能来这里玩，我真的很开心。” “那我一定会让宝宝也来见见你。 我敢肯定，他们一定迫不及待了。” 塔拉的尾巴开心地摇动着，卡维一边哼着欢快的曲调，一边继续她的工作。这次来访，你还安排了其他事情吗？ |你一走进药剂师的家，目光立刻被塔拉吸引住了。当你在门口截住那个活泼好动的半牛人，准备向他打招呼时，卡维也好奇地瞥了你一眼。 “嗨…… [pc.name]天啊，你肚子圆滚滚的，是不是怀了宝宝啊？”她天真地问道，“我可以摸摸你的肚子吗？” “可以，不过关于这个宝宝，有件事你必须要知道…… [tarah.nickName]就是这个，”你说着，将她的手放在自己逐渐隆起的腹部上。卡维惊讶地倒吸一口凉气，而她的女儿却完全没明白其中的含义。“这是你的孩子。” “啊？也就是说，我们真的有孩子了！？天啊，太棒了！我们都要当妈妈了！但是……” 她的母亲突然将她们俩紧紧抱在怀里，打断了她的话。 啊，太棒了！我迫不及待想见到我的孙子们了。你需要帮助的时候随时都可以来找我。” “谢谢，卡维。我一定会带他们来的，不过在霍克索恩有一家日托中心，他们在那里也会很安全。” “这和咱们村子的情况差不多啊！”塔拉说，“我以前大多时候都待在家里，因为我会给看护人带来很多麻烦，但通常情况下就是这样的。 你？惹麻烦的人居然是你？”你难以置信地问道。 “她总喜欢爬到那些她不该去的地方，”卡维一边解释，一边轻抚着女儿的头发，“有一次她想去湖边游泳，差点从悬崖上掉下去，这终于让我忍无可忍了。不过之前我倒也没觉得她有什么不好。 不过这水看起来真漂亮！”塔拉撅了撅嘴，但很快又笑了起来。“能来这里几次，我真的很开心。” “那我一定会带宝宝来见见你。他们肯定已经等不及了。” 塔拉的尾巴开心地摇动着，卡维则继续一边哼着欢快的曲子一边继续工作。这次来访，你还安排了其他事情吗？ ]

Did you have anything else planned for this visit? |You focus on Tarah as soon as you enter the apothecaries' home. Kavi glances over with curiosity as you intercept the bubbly half-bovine midway through coming to greet you by the door. "Hi [pc.name]! Omigosh you're getting all round! Do you, like, have a baby in there?" she asks, completely and adorably oblivious. "Can I rub your tummy?" "Yes, you can, but there's something important you should know about this baby, [tarah.nickName]," you say, guiding her hand to your burgeoning belly. Kavi gasps, making the connection her daughter can't. "It's yours." "Huh? Like, o-oh! Like we made a baby!? Omigosh, that's wonderful! We're gonna be moms! But what d-" She's interrupted by her mother scooping the both of you into a colossal bear hug. "Aaaahhh, this is wonderful! I cannot wait to see my grandchildren. You come by anytime you need help." "Thanks, Kavi. I'll be sure to bring them by, but I have a daycare in Hawkethorne where they can be safe otherwise." "That's kinda like here in the village!" Tarah says. "I stayed with mom mostly 'cause I kept causing trouble for the caretaker, but that's normally how it works." "You? Causing trouble?" you ask, incredulous. "She liked climbing on top of things she shouldn't have," Kavi explains, ruffling her daughter's hair. "Almost falling off the lakeside cliffs when she wanted to go swimming was the final straw. I haven't minded having her around." "The water's so pretty though!" Tarah pouts, but then smiles again. "I'm glad I got to be here a bunch, though." "Then I'll be sure to bring the baby around to meet you. I'm sure they can't wait." Tarah's tail gives a happy little swish, and Kavi returns to her work humming a peppy tune. Did you have anything else planned for this visit? ] '

rows.original:
"Hey, [tarah.nickName]. Do you have any names you think would be good for the baby?"

    "Well, um, I think you should be the one to choose, 'cause you're, like, the mom mom."
    
    "You're gonna be just as much a mom, you goof. Don't make me smooch you silly," you reply, refusing to let her talk herself down. "Surely there are some names you like."
    
    "I don't know, really! But, um, I like flowers. Can you name babies after flowers?"
    
    "I'm pretty sure you can name babies after anything you want to. If you want flowers, then I'll think about picking a flowery name."
    
    She smiles at that, and you pull her into a brief kiss that makes her tail swoosh back and forth.
    
    "Thanks. I know I'll like it no matter what you pick, though." 
    
    "I'm glad."
rows.translation:
嘿， [tarah.nickName]你有没有觉得哪些名字适合这个宝宝呢？”

“嗯，我觉得应该由你来决定，因为你是妈妈啊。”

“你以后也会成为一位妈妈的，傻瓜。别想让我亲你哦，否则我就不理你了。”你这样回答，坚决不让她说服自己改变主意。 肯定有些名字是你喜欢的吧。”

“其实我也不太确定！不过，嗯，我喜欢花。能不能用花来给宝宝起名字呢？”

“我敢肯定，你可以用任何你喜欢的东西来给宝宝起名字。如果你喜欢花，那我就会考虑选一些与花相关的名字。她听到这话笑了起来，你便牵着她吻了她一下，这个吻让她的尾巴不停地来回摆动。

“谢谢。不过不管你选什么，我都知道自己一定会喜欢的。”

“我很高兴。

    "I'm pretty sure you can name babies after anything you want to. If you want flowers, then I'll think about picking a flowery name."

rows.original: Tarah is hanging around the entry room when you enter the apothecaries' home, but she's looking significantly more morose than you're used to seeing her look. You wander over and put an arm around her shoulder. Her tail gives a half-hearted swish, and she tries to smile for you, at the very least. "Hey, [pc.name]," she says, shifting uncomfortably. "What's wrong, [tarah.nickName]?" you ask. "You look like you're having a terrible day." "It's nothing big. I don't wanna bother you with it." "If you don't tell me in the next three seconds, you're going to smooch prison." "O-ok, I'll tell. It's just, um, like... My titties hurt and I don't know why," she says, and all the worry leaks out of her. "I'm worried there's something wrong 'cause they've never felt like this and nothing's really changed. I don't know who I'd ask about it." You give the poor girl a lookover, and think you have a very good idea what's wrong just from that. To confirm your suspicions, you reach out and give one of the fretting mare's boobs the gentlest squeeze you can manage. The bimbish mare gasps as a shower of milk sprays a good five feet from her teat, even through the semi-blockage of her piercing. Your eyes go wide, and you smile. Judging by how stiff and full her boobs look, you'd assumed she was overfull on milk, but this seems like she hasn't drained them at all. "Tarah, sweetie, haven't you gotten any of this milk out recently?" "Huh? But I don't, like, think that's it? It's never been this bad before. I used to just drink it when they got too full, but it wouldn't stop this time!" "Oh, [tarah.nickName]. You're so precious, but that's not the only way. Come on, let me show you." Tarah follows as you take her hand and lead her into one of the back rooms. You grab a milk can, much smaller than the ones Kavi uses, and place it on one of the small stools at the side. Pulling up two more seats, you direct Tarah into one of them and scootch up behind her. At first you just make sure she's comfortable, hugging her around the middle and giving her a smooch on the neck. Very gently, you help her remove her piercings and set them aside, setting her milk-dripping teats free. "Alright. I'm going to show you some helpful techniques for the first one, and then you can try it yourself, ok?" "Ok! I'll try anything if it helps them feel better." You cup under her breast with one hand, while the second maneuvers to milk her teat. Tucking two fingers beneath her areola, you press from the other end with your thumb till showering sprays of milk are jetting from her breast and into the can. The immediate relief the poor girl shows is as adorable as it is obvious, with a sigh and a soft nicker as she's drained. When the flow begins to weaken, you squeeze from the sides till the milk resumes. Eventually, the overfull pressure is reduced to the same rare trickle she usually maintains, and then to nothing. "There. Think you can do that with the other one?" "Yeah..." she says, cheeks flushed a deep red. "A kiss would help, though, I think." "[pc.dcb |Cheeky, aren't you? |Of course. |It definitely helps me. ]" You help her get her hands in place first, and then use yours to turn her by the chin and give her a deep kiss. While she squeezes the milk free from its lactic confines, she closes her eyes and breathes slowly through her nose. This one takes about as long as its twin, and you're left holding and chastely smooching a half-naked pony by the end of it. She pulls away of her own volition after kneading on empty for a minute or two, and her tail gives a happy little swish. "Thanks, [pc.name]! That feels much better," she says. "Any time, [tarah.nickName]. It's good to know your body knows to make milk for the baby," you laugh. "Though I don't know how consistent it'll be." "I dunno either, but it's better now that I know how to make them feel better." You finish cleaning up together, placing the small pail of milk aside from the other cans as you do so. When you're done, you return to the front room hand in hand. "Were you here for anything else?" Tarah asks when you get back. Well, were you?
rows.translation: 当你走进药剂师的住所时，塔拉正在入口处闲逛，但她此时的神情比你平时见到的要忧郁许多。你走过去，搭上了她的肩膀。她的尾巴无力地摆动了一下，至少她试图对你露出微笑。 “嘿，”你说道。 [pc.name]怎么了，”她说，显得有些不自在地挪动着身子。 [tarah.nickName]怎么了？”你问道，“看你的样子，今天过得一定很糟糕吧。” “没什么大事，只是不想麻烦你。” “如果你在接下来的三秒钟内不告诉我，那你可就要进监狱了。” “好、好吧，我告诉你。 就是，嗯，感觉……我的胸部有点疼，但我不知道为什么，”她说道，所有的担忧都从她的话语中流露了出来。“我很担心是不是出了什么问题，因为以前从来没有这种感觉，而且我的生活也没有发生任何变化。我不知道该向谁咨询这个问题。你仔细观察了那个可怜的女孩，仅仅通过这一观察，你就觉得自己非常清楚她到底出了什么问题。为了验证自己的猜测，你伸手轻轻捏了捏那匹焦躁不安的马的一只乳房。 那头丰满的母马发出一声惊呼，一股乳汁从她的乳头喷出，喷射距离竟然有五英尺远，尽管她的乳头被部分堵塞了。你瞪大了眼睛，然后笑了起来。从她那坚挺而饱满的乳房来看，你本以为她的奶水已经满了，但显然她还没有把奶水全部挤出来。 一点也不塔拉，亲爱的，你最近有没有把这些牛奶倒掉啊？” “哈？但我觉得不应该啊……从来都没有这么严重过。以前只是在他们喝得太多时把多余的牛奶倒掉，但这次这种情况怎么就停不下来呢！” “哦，…… [tarah.nickName]你太珍贵了，但其实还有其他方法的。来吧，让我带你看看。” 你牵着塔拉的手，将她带进了其中一间后面的房间。你拿了一个牛奶罐，这个罐子比卡维用的那些要小得多，然后把它放在旁边的一个小凳子上。 你又拉出了两把椅子，让塔拉坐在其中一把上，然后自己坐在她身后。首先，你确保她坐得舒服，把她搂在怀里，还在她的脖子上轻轻一吻。然后，你非常轻柔地帮她取下了那些耳洞饰品，把它们放在一边，这样她那两颗圆润的乳头就暴露了出来。 好的，我先教你们一些有用的技巧，然后你们就可以自己尝试了，好吗？” “好的！只要能让他们感觉好一些，我什么方法都愿意试试。” 你用一只手托住她的乳房，另一只手则开始进行挤奶操作。 将两根手指放在她的乳晕下方，然后用拇指从另一侧施加压力，这时乳汁就会喷涌而出，流入罐子中。这个可怜的女孩在排空乳汁后表现出的那种如释重负的神情，既可爱又显而易见——她会轻轻叹气，还会发出一声轻柔的笑声。 当奶流开始变弱时，你需要从两侧施加压力，直到奶流重新恢复。最终，那些过高的压力会逐渐减弱，直到恢复到她平时那种稀疏的滴落状态，然后彻底停止。 就是这个。你觉得用另一个也能做到吗？” “嗯……”她说道，脸颊顿时涨成了深红色，“不过我觉得，亲一下会更有帮助吧。”[pc.dcb |真大胆啊，不是吗？ |当然可以。 |这确实帮了我大忙。 ]你先帮她把双手摆好位置，然后用自己的手托住她的下巴，深深地吻了她一下。当她把奶挤出来时，她闭上了眼睛，慢慢地通过鼻子呼吸。这个过程和它的“双胞胎”版本差不多长，最后你只是抱着这个半裸的小马，轻轻地亲吻着她。过了一两分钟，她自己主动拉开距离，她的尾巴开心地摇动着。 “谢谢。 [pc.name]这样感觉好多了，”她说。 “随时都可以。 [tarah.nickName]知道自己的身体会为宝宝产生乳汁，这真是件好事，”你笑着说，“不过我还不确定这种乳汁的分泌会不会一直保持稳定。” “我也不知道，不过现在我知道该如何让宝宝们感觉更舒适了，所以这也算是个进步吧。” 你们一起完成了清理工作，把那小桶乳汁和其他罐子放在一起。清理完毕后，你们手牵着手回到了客厅。 “你来这里还有其他事情吗？”当你回到客厅时，塔拉问道。 嗯，你呢？你还有其他事情要办吗？

rows.original: A sudden contraction hits you—a real contraction. You're going into labor! You gasp and immediately [atFH |start inching your way to the nursery. Before you even make it halfway to the door, Garth's by your side to help you along. He helps ferry you to the nursery, where he and Gwyn lay you down. |begin the return journey to the Frost Hound and its adjacent nursery. [party.som |You travel as fast as you can on your own, but you're lucky to get back when you do |[comp.name] does [comp.hisHer] best to assist you on the trek back |Both of your companions do everything in their power to ease your burden throughout the trip ]. As soon as [party.solo | |the [party.sizeText] of ]you enter the tavern, Garth is rushing over to you. He does his best to get you into Gwyn's care, where they lay you down and the real work begins. ] [var0 |Surprisingly, the birthing is over in less than half an hour. You were steeled and ready to push, but you feel the baby slip out on the second or third round. It's still exhausting, and you have trouble keeping track of exactly which one it was, but you know the baby is out. |All sense of time fades as you spend hours with Gwyn and Cait tending to you as best they can through the struggle of childbirth. ] After a few minutes of letting you rest and making sure the baby is cleaned up and wrapped in a bundle, Gwyn comes over and hands it to you. You have a perfect view of the little equine face of your foal, with its tongue stuck out in an adorable 'blep.' "Congratulations, [pc.name]. It's a boy." [var1] You accept the bundle, moving the baby to your nipple and letting him get used to drinking. While he does, you lean back to rest, and try to think of a name. [flags.TARAH_PREG_NAME |You know Tarah wanted something flowery or planty, but she was ok with it being your choice. |You don't know what kind of name Tarah would want, but hopefully she likes whatever you pick. ]
rows.translation: 突然，一股强烈的收缩感袭来—— 真实的 收缩了。你开始进入分娩阶段了！你倒吸一口气，立刻…… [atFH |你开始慢慢地走向婴儿房。还没走到门的一半，加思就已经站在你身边帮你了。他帮你一起走进婴儿房，然后他和格温一起把你放下来。 |开始返回霜猎犬及其附近栖息地的旅程吧。 [party.som |你独自以最快的速度前进，但能够成功返回已经算是非常幸运了。 |[comp.name] 做 [comp.hisHer] 最好能在你回归的途中为你提供帮助。 |在这段旅程中，你的两位同伴都在竭尽全力地帮助你减轻负担。 ]一有机会就…… [party.solo | |那个 [party.sizeText] 的 ]你走进酒馆，加斯立刻跑过来迎接你。他竭尽全力地将你交给格温照顾，随后他们将你安置下来，真正的救治工作才刚刚开始。 ] [var0 |令人惊讶的是，整个分娩过程在不到半个小时内就结束了。你原本已经做好了全力用力的准备，但在第二或第三次用力时，你就感觉到宝宝已经出生了。尽管过程仍然让人感到疲惫不堪，你也很难准确记住是哪一次用力让宝宝出生的，但你知道，宝宝已经安全地来到了这个世界。 |当你在分娩的艰难过程中，花费数小时的时间让格温和凯特尽她们所能地照顾你时，所有的时间概念都会消失殆尽。 ] 等了你几分钟，确保你休息好了，同时也确保小马驹已经被清理干净并包好之后，格温走过来把它交给了你。你可以清楚地看到自己小马驹那张可爱的小马脸，它的舌头还吐了出来，显得格外有趣。 “恭喜你， [pc.name]是个男孩。 [var1] 你接过这个包裹，将婴儿放在自己的乳头上，让他慢慢适应吮吸母乳。在他吮吸的过程中，你则向后靠去休息，同时努力思考一个适合他的名字。 [flags.TARAH_PREG_NAME |你知道，塔拉本来希望设计得更加花哨一些，或者融入一些植物元素，但她也同意由你来决定最终方案。 |你不知道塔拉会想要什么样的名字，但希望无论你选择什么，她都会喜欢。 ]
