rows.original: You can't name your baby that!
rows.translation: 你不能给你的宝宝取那样的名字！
rows.raw: "\n                You can't name your baby that!"

rows.original: You can't just name your baby after your friends!
rows.translation: 你不能仅仅因为和朋友关系好，就给自己的孩子取和他们一样的名字啊！
rows.raw: "\n                You can't just name your baby after your friends!"

rows.original:
"I think you look like a [tarah.basil], little guy. What do you think of- ow! Hey!" you say, giggling as the eager tyke bites a little too hard. "Well I think it fits you just fine."
        
        You stay there a while and let him nurse till he falls asleep, and then drift off yourself for a quick nap that turns into a couple hours of good sleep. When you wake, Gwyn is there to take the still-sleeping bundle of baby and place him in a nearby crib. Content with the knowledge that she'll keep him safe in the meantime, you shake off the bindings of exhaustion and re-gear yourself, ready to head out and make the world a safer place for your bundle of joy.
rows.translation:
我觉得你看起来像…… [tarah.basil]小家伙，你觉得怎么样——哎哟！嘿！”你一边笑着说，一边看着那个急切的小孩用力过猛地咬了一下。“嗯，我觉得它很适合你哦。”

你就在那里陪着他，让他继续吸奶，直到他睡着，然后你自己也小睡了一会儿，结果却睡了好几个小时。 当你醒来时，格温已经在那里，她将还在熟睡的婴儿抱起来，放在附近的婴儿床里。想到有她会在这段时间里保护好宝宝，你便摆脱了疲惫的束缚，重新振作起来，准备出门去，让这个世界变得更加安全，让你的宝贝能够在一个充满爱的环境中成长。
rows.raw:
'
        "I think you look like a [tarah.basil], little guy. What do you think of- ow! Hey!" you say, giggling as the eager tyke bites a little too hard. "Well I think it fits you just fine."
        
        You stay there a while and let him nurse till he falls asleep, and then drift off yourself for a quick nap that turns into a couple hours of good sleep. When you wake, Gwyn is there to take the still-sleeping bundle of baby and place him in a nearby crib. Content with the knowledge that she'll keep him safe in the meantime, you shake off the bindings of exhaustion and re-gear yourself, ready to head out and make the world a safer place for your bundle of joy.
        '

rows.original:
[flags.BASIL_VISIT
        |"Hey Gwyn! Has [tarah.basil] been behaving? I Think I'm gonna take him to visit Tarah and his grandma."
        
        "Ok! He's pretty wonderful most of the time, nice and quiet and easy. He likes to bite when he's nursing, though. Still haven't got him to stop that. He's been changed and fed and burped, though, so he should be all good for travel."
        
        "Thank you, Gwyn. I'll be back later."
        [var1]
        You scoop up the little equine bundle and cart him off to the waystone. After covering his eyes to prevent overstimulation, you step into the ways and travel all the way to the marefolk village. [tarah.basil] coos happily when you uncover him after stepping out, excited to see the marefolk milling about. Several women stop you on the way to the alchemist's home, fawning over your little foal and showering both him and you with compliments. By the time you make it inside, you're happy to see Tarah coming down the stairs to greet you.
        
        "[pc.name]! Omigosh [tarah.basil]! Hello!" she says, rushing over with a happy swish of her tail.
        
        [tarah.basil] coos and holds his arms out, and you hand him off to the bubbly she-mare. As you watch, she immediately puts her finger in one of his hands and then giggles as it closes tight around her. You can't help but pull her into a distracting kiss, and then tickle [tarah.basil]'s nose till he sneezes. Kavi comes out at exactly that moment, grinning wide and sweeping all three of you into a hug.
        
        "Our brightest bundles of joy. What kind of visit have you come on today?"
        
        Well...
        
        [var0
            |This time you've come to hang out with everyone together! You take turns holding [tarah.basil] while whoever's turn it isn't dotes on him like he could disappear at any moment. You play right up until he can't keep his eyes open, and then continue to dote on him after he zonks out in Tarah's arms. His little tongue bleps out when he breathes, and you all have to silence your excited squee-ing so as not to wake him. 
            
            You continue to share chances to hold him while he naps, carefully exchanging hands and keeping him as comfortable as possible. He doesn't wake once, at least, not until Kavi shuffles off to prepare some food for you. The smells wake him, and he wakes up hungry. Tarah sits down with you as you feed him, leaning her head on your shoulder and humming softly. That almost lulls the little guy right back to sleep, and you have to brush his nose to wake him back up to keep drinking. When he's finally had his fill, he does fall right back to sleep.
            
            Kavi brings you and Tarah some hot food, and you enjoy it along with some conversation while watching the tiny foal rest.
            |This time you came to make sure she stays accustomed to Tarah. She gets the majority of the hold time, though that doesn't mean you and Kavi aren't there to dote on him. The two of you are also there to direct her on how to do various things like changing and swaddling. She handles it well, not needing too much assistance for the easier things and handling the tougher things with none of her usual ditz. 
            
            She even tries her hand at feeding when he grows hungry, sitting down with you and humming softly as he drinks. Her reserves aren't nearly as deep as yours, however, and she has to pass him off to you when her supply is drained. Still, she leans her head on your shoulder and keeps humming while he drinks his fill. He ends up nodding off to sleep while nursing, his suction slowing to nothing as he completely zonks out.
            
            Kavi brings in a plate of warm food for the three of you to eat, and you enjoy it along with some conversation while watching the tiny foal rest.
            |This time you came to give him some playtime with his grandma! Kavi is more than happy to watch after the little tyke while you and Tarah catch up on your adventures. You can hear her spoiling him rotten as she carries him around and shows off pretty-colored flowers and several of the soft tapestries around the tents and rooms of the [silly
                |mootronly
                |matronly
            ] bovine's home. From what you can hear, the foal is unintentionally spoiling her just as much, cooing and reaching for everything she nears.
            
            Eventually, Kavi walks back with a very exhausted bundle of joy snoozing softly betwixt her cleavage. You take him back, and chat with both of them in hushed tones till he awakens once more. He's hungry once he's fully aware, so you feed and burp him while Kavi cooks up some snacks for you as well. When she comes back, you enjoy the food and some light conversation while you wait for [tarah.basil] to fully rouse from his tired stupor.
            
            Once he's up, you give Tarah some time holding him as well, grinning at her reactions and the happy swishing of her tail.
        ] You can only stay for so long, however, and soon you have to take leave of your bubbly mare-mate. 
        
        "See ya next time, lil' guy. Don't forget about me over there," Tarah says, holding his hoofies and bobbing them back and forth.
        
        "I'd never let that happen," you say, cupping her chin and smooching her nose. 
        
        "Good. Don't you forget about me over there, either," she replies, but she's grinning happily the whole time she says it.
        
        "Never."
        
        "The both of you had best never forget each other," Kavi chimes in. "But come now. Let's let [pc.name] be on [pc.hisHer] way."
        
        The matronly alchemist staves off your loving she-mare for long enough that you can get free, and you make your way back to the waystone. Little [tarah.basil] falls asleep again on your way back through the village, so you don't have to cover him up during your trip through the ways between. He's still napping when you hand him back to Gwyn, and you head back to your adventures with a renewed fervor.
        |[flags.TARAH_PREG_REVEAL
            |You scoop up [tarah.basil], being sure to warn Gwyn of where you're taking him and how long you plan to be gone. Once she's been informed, you take your adorable bundle and head off to the marefolk village through the ways between. While you travel through the ways themselves, you cover [tarah.basil]'s eyes with a cloth to prevent overstimulation. He doesn't seem to mind, cooing softly and fidgeting as you tickle his nose with your fingers. It doesn't take long at all to reach the village, and you uncover his eyes to let him take in the village before heading off to the alchemist's home.
            
            Tarah is the first person to greet you when you come through the door, beaming with excitement and happiness when she sees the bundle in your arms.
            [var1]
            "Omigosh omigosh omigosh! You had the baby! That's ours, right? We made that? Look at his little hoofies sticking out!" she says and asks, coming right up close as her tail swishes happily behind her. 
            
            "Yes, this is [tarah.basil], and he's ours. You can hold him if you want."
            
            "Yes! I want to! Super a lot," she says, struggling to stay calm enough to accept the bundle.
            
            [silly
                |"You made this?" she asks when the baby is in her hands, staring at him with blank adoration for a few seconds. "I made this..."
            ]
            
            [tarah.basil] gives one or two grumples at the sudden exchange of holdership, but giggles when she brushes her nose against his. That makes her giggle, which starts a chain reaction that doesn't stop until you're all giggling and Kavi comes sweeping through one of the back entrances.
            
            "What's all this laughter about? Ah, [pc.name], and- AH!" she says, clapping a hand to her mouth and pointing when she sees the bundle in her daughter's arms. 
            
            You brace yourself as she rushes over to scoop all three of you into a careful hug, squeezing till little [tarah.basil] ends up tucked snugly in her cleavage. A chuckle escapes you when you think about how envious most men would be of such a vantage point, and then pluck him free when he reaches out for you with a smile.
            
            "Is he doing ok at the daycare you mentioned before? If your caretaker ever needs a break, he's welcome here anytime."
            
            "I'll be sure to let them know, and I'm glad to hear it. He's been wonderful so far, though."
            
            "Good, then he's already behaving better than one of his mothers," Kavi says, playfully ruffling Tarah's hair as she teases.
            
            "Mooom, I wasn't that bad."
            
            "No, and neither will he be, I imagine."
            
            "I still plan to bring him by as much as I can," you interject.
            
            "Please do. As often as your world saving allows."
            
            You stay for a little while longer to get [tarah.basil] acquainted with the rest of his family, and then say your goodbyes.
            
            "Good luck, [pc.name]," Tarah says, giving you a goodbye smooch on the cheek.
            
            "Thank you," you reply, pulling her into a deeper kiss before heading back out into the village.
            
            With your goodbyes said, you return to the waystone and travel all the way back to the daycare with [tarah.basil] in your arms. You drop him off with Gwyn, and return to your adventures with a renewed fervor.
            |You scoop up [tarah.basil], being sure to warn Gwyn of where you're taking him and how long you plan to be gone. Once she's been informed, you take your adorable bundle and head off to the marefolk village through the ways between. While you travel through the ways themselves, you cover [tarah.basil]'s eyes with a cloth to prevent overstimulation. He doesn't seem to mind, cooing softly and fidgeting as you tickle his nose with your fingers. It doesn't take long at all to reach the village, and you uncover his eyes to let him take in the village before heading off to the alchemist's home.
            
            Tarah is the first person to come see who's there when you step inside, and she brightens when she sees you're holding a baby.
            [var1]
            "Omigosh! That's such a cute baby! Is it yours? Who's the mommy and or daddy? Can I give them a smooch on the nose?" she asks all at once, her bovine tail swishing around behind her.
            
            "One thing at a time, [tarah.nickName]. Let's start with the most important one. This is [tarah.basil], he's your son."
            
            "M-mine? You mean we- when we? Omigosh..." she says, a billion thoughts racing as her swishing slows. "You didn't tell me? I promise I'm ready, and I'm, like, not gonna mess it up. I can't do much, but I'm good at helping out."
            
            "Hush, [tarah.nickName], hush," you say, crossing what little space is left between you to hug her with your free arm. The baby coos happily as you rub up and down her back. "I didn't leave you in the dark because I thought you couldn't handle it. I'm in a dangerous line of work, and I didn't want you to be worrying about me even more than I'm sure you already do. Now that you know, I want you involved as much as you want to be. He's ours, and yes you can smooch him on the nose."
            
            Her spirits are restored bit by bit as you talk, and she can't help but lean in and give the little bundle a big smooch on the nose. That makes him giggle, which makes her giggle, which sets off a chain reaction that only stops after all three of you are laughing and cheerful. She looks at you with renewed joy and hope, and gives you a smooch on the nose as well.
            
            "I love you, [pc.name], and I love little [tarah.basil] too. Does he have a place to stay? I think we've got room here but I'd have to ask mom."
            
            "It's fine. I have a daycare back home where he's taken good care of."
            
            "Oh good, that's just like here, then. At least I think. I mostly stayed here 'cause I kept causing trouble for the caretaker."
            
            "I can't imagine you causing trouble. They must have been getting you confused with a different adorable pony."
            
            That makes her fluster and giggle all over again, blushing up a storm. Before she can actually muster up a further response, Kavi enters from one of the back rooms.
            
            "What's all this I've been hearing about daycare? Ah! [pc.name], welcome! Have you come to- AH!" she says, clapping a hand over her mouth when she sees the bundle in your arms. "Is that? Is it yours? Both of yours?"
            
            "He is, yes," you say, grinning wide.
            
            "Tree-father bless us! May I?" she says, plodding closer and holding out her arms.
            
            You nod, handing [tarah.basil] up to receive some love. He grumbles a little at the sudden exchange of holdership, but is right back to issuing happy noises as she plays with his hooves and tickles his nose.
            
            "Gods be praised. He's adorable! What is his name?"
            
            "[tarah.basil]."
            
            "A wonderful name for a wonderful babe."
            
            "I'm glad you think so. I'll try to bring him by to visit as often as I can."
            
            "Yes, well, if the caretaker of that daycare you spoke of ever needs a break, feel free to bring him as often as you need. I'll spoil him rotten," she says, brushing her great bovine nose against his much smaller equine one and then simply tucking him feet first into her cleavage. Held snugly in place, he can look out at both you and Tarah.
            
            You idly muse about how most grown men would probably kill to be in such a position, and pluck him out when he begins reaching for you.
            
            "We'd best be getting back home now, but I'll be sure to bring him for another visit soon."
            
            "I can't wait," Tarah says. "And good luck saving the world and stuff."
            
            "Yes, go, make the world safe." Kavi seconds.
            
            "Thanks. I'll do my best."
            
            With your goodbyes said, you return to the waystone and travel all the way back to the daycare with [tarah.basil] in your arms. You drop him off with Gwyn, and return to your adventures with a renewed fervor.
        ]
    ]
rows.translation:
[flags.BASIL_VISIT
        |嘿，格温！有……吗？ [tarah.basil] 他最近的表现怎么样？我想我要带他去看看塔拉和他的奶奶。”

“好的！大多数时候他都挺乖的，安静又听话。不过在吃奶的时候他喜欢咬人，到现在还没办法让他改掉这个习惯。不过他已经换过尿布、吃过了东西，也打了嗝，所以应该适合出门旅行。”

“谢谢你，格温。我晚点就会回来。
        [var1]
        你把那个小马驹抱起来，带着它前往路标石那里。为了防止它受到过度的刺激，你遮住了它的双眼，然后踏入道路，一路前行，最终来到了马人村落。 [tarah.basil] 当你走出门外，揭开小马驹的盖子时，它高兴地呜呜叫着，看到周围那些马人忙碌地来来去去，显得格外兴奋。在前往炼金术士家的路上，有几位妇女拦住了你，她们对你的小马驹赞不绝口，同时也对你表示了许多赞美之词。当你终于走进屋内时，看到塔拉从楼梯上走下来迎接你，你感到非常开心。[pc.name]天啊！ [tarah.basil]嗨！”她一边说着，一边欢快地摇着尾巴跑了过来。
        
        [tarah.basil] 他轻声细语地说着，还伸出了双臂，于是你便将他交给了那个活泼开朗的母马。当你看着她们时，她立刻把手指放在他的手中，而当他紧紧握住她的手指时，她竟然咯咯笑了起来。你忍不住吻了她一下，然后开始逗她痒…… [tarah.basil]他的鼻子一直痒，直到终于打了个喷嚏。就在这时，卡维走了出来，脸上洋溢着灿烂的笑容，然后将你们三个人都搂进了怀里。

“我们最可爱的孩子们，今天是来探望我们的吗？”

嗯……
        
        [var0
            |这次你是来和大家一起聚聚的！你们轮流来主持活动吧。 [tarah.basil] 而那些轮不到照顾他的人，也会像害怕他会随时消失一样悉心照料他。你会一直照顾他，直到他无法保持清醒，然后即使他在塔拉的怀里睡着了，你也会继续照顾他。他呼吸时，小小的舌头会微微伸出，而你们所有人都必须压住兴奋的欢呼声，以免吵醒他。 
            
            在他小睡的时候，你不断轮流抱着他，小心翼翼地更换手的位置，尽量让他保持舒适。至少他一次都没有醒来，直到卡维走开去为你准备食物。食物的香味把他吵醒了，他醒来时已经饿极了。 当你喂塔拉的时候，他会坐在你身边，把头靠在你的肩膀上，轻轻哼着小曲。这种氛围几乎能让这个小家伙再次入睡，因此你得轻轻拍拍他的鼻子，把他弄醒，让他继续喝奶。等他终于喝饱了，他就会再次沉沉睡去。
            
            卡维为您和塔拉准备了一些热食，你们一边边吃边聊天，一边观察那匹小马驹的休息情况。
            |这次你来的目的是确保她能够习惯照顾塔拉。虽然大部分时间都是由她来照顾塔拉，但这并不意味着你和卡维就不会去陪伴他、关爱他。你们俩也在那里指导她如何进行各种护理工作，比如换尿布和包裹婴儿等等。 她处理得很好，对于那些比较简单的事情，她不需要太多帮助；而对于那些比较困难的事情，她也没有表现出平时那种犯傻的行为。 

甚至当宝宝饿的时候，她还会试着喂宝宝，她会和你一起坐下来，轻轻哼着歌，让宝宝安静地喝奶。 不过，她的储备远没有你那么多，当她的储备用尽时，就不得不把那个人交给你来照顾。即便如此，她还是会把头靠在你的肩膀上，一边继续哼着小曲，一边让他喝个够。最终，他在喝奶的过程中渐渐睡着了，吸吮的动作也慢慢停止了，整个人彻底进入了梦乡。
            
            卡维端来一盘热腾腾的食物，你们三个人边吃边聊天，同时观察着那只小马驹的休息情景。
            |这次你来看他，让他能和奶奶一起玩耍呢！当你和塔拉一起回顾那些冒险经历的时候，卡维非常乐意帮忙照看这个小家伙。你可以听到她一边抱着他，一边给他展示那些色彩鲜艳的花朵，以及帐篷和房间里那些柔软的挂毯时，是如何把他宠得不可开交的…… [silly
                |莫特隆利式地
                |像母亲一样慈爱地
            ] 牛妈妈的家。从你听到的声音来看，小马驹也在无意中把她宠坏了——它不停地轻声哼哼，还会去触碰妈妈身边的一切东西。

最终，卡维走回来，怀里抱着一个已经累得昏昏欲睡的小家伙，它正安静地躺在卡维的胸前呢。 你把他带回去，然后用轻声细语的方式和他们两个人聊天，直到他再次醒来。等他完全清醒后，他会感到饥饿，于是你喂他吃东西并帮他拍嗝，而卡维也会为你准备一些零食。等她回来后，你们一边享用食物，一边进行一些轻松的交谈，同时等待…… [tarah.basil] 让他彻底从那种疲惫的状态中清醒过来。

等他醒来了，你也让塔拉陪他一会儿，观察她的反应，以及她那欢快地摇动尾巴的样子吧。
        ] 然而，你只能待上这么短的时间，很快就必须和你的这位活泼可爱的马伙伴告别了。

“下次见吧，小家伙。别忘了我在那边哦，”塔拉一边说着，一边握着他的小蹄子，轻轻地上下晃动着。
        
        我绝对不会让那种事情发生的，”你说道，同时捧起她的下巴，轻轻吻了吻她的鼻子。

“太好了。不过你也别把我忘在一边哦，”她回答道，说这话的时候脸上始终挂着幸福的笑容。
        
        永远不要。”

“你们俩最好永远都不要忘记彼此，”卡维插话说，“不过现在，让我们继续吧…… [pc.name] 在运行中 [pc.hisHer] 好吧。”

这位像母亲一样的炼金术士成功挡住了你那热情奔放的雌性伙伴，让你有足够的时间逃脱，于是你便朝着路标的方向赶了回去。 [tarah.basil] 在返回村庄的路上，他又睡着了，因此你在穿过那些小路时就不必再给他盖毯子了。当你把他还给格温时，他仍在小睡，而你则带着重新燃起的热情继续去追寻你的冒险吧。
        |[flags.TARAH_PREG_REVEAL
            |你把它们全部收了起来。 [tarah.basil]一定要告诉格温你要带他去哪里，以及你打算离开多久。等她知道了这些信息后，你就带着你那个可爱的小家伙，通过那些隐蔽的小路前往马人村庄吧。在旅行的过程中，你要小心谨慎，注意周围的环境。 [tarah.basil]你用布遮住他的眼睛，以免他受到过度刺激。他似乎并不介意，当你用手指轻轻挠他的鼻子时，他会发出轻柔的叫声，还不停地扭动身体。很快我们就来到了村庄，你便揭开他的眼睛，让他看看这个村庄，然后我们便朝着炼金术士的家走去。

当你走进门时，塔拉是第一个迎接你的人。看到你怀里抱着那个包裹，她眼中充满了兴奋和喜悦。
            [var1]
            天啊，天啊，天啊！你生下宝宝了！这是我们的孩子，对吧？是我们一起努力的结果吧？看看他那小小的蹄子，都露出来了！”她一边说着，一边凑了上来，她的尾巴开心地在身后摇来摇去。

“是的，这就是我们的孩子。 [tarah.basil]他现在是我们的人了。如果你想的话，可以抱抱他。”

“好啊！我真的很想！非常想！”她说道，努力让自己保持冷静，以便接过那个孩子。
            
            [silly
                |这是你做的吗？”当她把婴儿抱在怀里时，她盯着他看了几秒钟，眼中充满了无比的赞叹。“这是我做的……
            ]
            
            [tarah.basil] 对于这种突然发生的所有权变更，她先是抱怨了一两句，但当她的鼻子碰到他的鼻子时，却忍不住笑了起来。这个举动让她发笑，进而引发了一连串的笑声，直到大家都笑得前仰后合，这时卡维才从后面的某个入口匆匆走了进来。

“你们都在笑什么啊？啊…… [pc.name]啊——！”她惊叫道，手忙脚乱地捂住嘴，看到女儿怀里抱着那个包裹时，立刻指了过去。

你紧张地等着，只见她冲过来，小心翼翼地将你们三个拥入怀中，紧紧地抱住，直到你们三个都觉得有点喘不过气来…… [tarah.basil] 最终，它被紧紧地放在她的胸前。当你想到大多数男人都会多么羡慕这样的位置时，不禁会轻笑出声；而当它伸出手来想要触碰你时，你也会微笑着将它拿开。

“你之前提到的那个日托中心，他在那里过得还好吗？ 如果你的照顾者需要休息，他随时都可以来这里。”

“我一定会告诉他们的，听到你这么说我很高兴。不过，到目前为止，他的表现确实非常出色。”

“那就好，他的表现已经比他的某个母亲还要好了呢。”卡维开玩笑地拨了拨塔拉的头发，逗着她说道。
            
            妈妈，我并没有那么糟糕吧。”

“不，我想他也不会那么糟糕的。”

“我还是会尽量经常带他来的，”你插话道。

“请一定要这么做。只要你的工作允许的话，尽量多带他来吧。你再留一会儿吧，这样就能…… [tarah.basil] 先与他的其他家人相识，然后再道别。

“祝你好运， [pc.name]再见，”塔拉说着，在你的脸颊上留下一个吻作为告别。

“谢谢，”你回应道，然后将她拉进一个更深的吻中，之后才一起回到村庄。

道别之后，你回到了路标处，然后一路返回到日托中心。 [tarah.basil] 在你的怀抱中。你把他还给格温，然后带着重新燃起的热情继续你的冒险之旅。
            |你把它们全都收了起来。 [tarah.basil]一定要告诉格温你要带他去哪里，以及你打算离开多久。等她知道了这些信息后，你就带着你那个可爱的小家伙，通过那些隐蔽的小路前往马人村庄吧。在旅行的过程中，你要小心谨慎，注意周围的环境。 [tarah.basil]你用布遮住他的眼睛，以免他受到过度刺激。他似乎并不介意，当你用手指轻轻挠他的鼻子时，他会发出轻柔的声响，还不停地扭动身体。很快我们就来到了村庄，你便揭开他的眼睛，让他看看这个村庄，然后我们便朝着炼金术士的家走去。

当你走进门时，塔拉是第一个过来看看到底是谁的人。看到你怀里抱着一个婴儿，她的脸上立刻露出了笑容。
            [var1]
            天啊！这个宝宝太可爱了！这是你的吗？妈妈或爸爸是谁呢？我可以亲亲它们的鼻子吗？”她一连串地问道，她那条像牛尾巴一样的尾巴在身后摇来摇去。

“一件事一件事来吧。 [tarah.nickName]让我们先从最重要的那个开始。这就是…… [tarah.basil]他是你的儿子。”

“我的……你是说我们……当时我们……天啊……”她说道，脑海中思绪纷乱，脚步也渐渐慢了下来。“你之前没有告诉我吗？我保证我已经准备好了，而且我绝对不会搞砸的。我可能帮不上太多忙，但我很乐意帮忙的。”

“安静点， [tarah.nickName]安静点，”你说道，穿过你们之间仅存的那点距离，用空着的胳膊抱住了她。你轻轻抚摸着她的背部，婴儿开心地发出呜呜声。“我把你留在黑暗中，并不是因为觉得你无法承受。 我从事的工作本身就充满风险，我并不希望你再为我担心了——其实你现在已经很担心我了。既然你已经知道了，那我希望你能根据自己的意愿积极参与进来。他现在是我们的了，当然，你完全可以亲亲他的鼻子。随着你与她交谈，她的情绪逐渐好转，她忍不住凑过去，在那个小家伙的鼻子上亲了一下。这让他咯咯笑了起来，她也跟着笑了起来，于是引发了一场连锁反应，直到你们三个人都开怀大笑、心情愉悦为止，这场笑声才渐渐停止。 她带着重新焕发的喜悦与希望看着你，还亲了亲你的鼻子。

“我爱你。 [pc.name]，而且我非常喜欢小东西。 [tarah.basil] 也是啊。他有没有地方住呢？我想我们这里应该有空房间，不过我得先问问妈妈。”

“没关系。我家里有日托中心，他在那里会得到很好的照顾。”

“哦，那就好，跟我们这里的情况差不多嘛。 至少我是这么认为的。我之所以一直待在这里，就是因为我总会给看护人带来麻烦。”

“我简直无法想象你会惹麻烦……他们肯定把你和另一只可爱的小马弄混了。这让她再次慌忙起来，忍不住咯咯笑了起来，脸上顿时红得像熟透的苹果。还没等她想出什么回应，卡维就从后面的一个房间里走了出来。

“我最近一直听到的关于日托中心的事情，到底是怎么回事？ 啊！ [pc.name]欢迎！你来了吗——啊！”她看到你怀里抱着那个包裹，立刻捂住嘴巴说道，“那是吗？是你的吗？你们的吗？”

“是的，都是他的。”你咧开嘴笑道。

“树父保佑我们吧！我可以抱抱吗？”她说着，慢慢走过来，伸出了双臂。

你点了点头，把包裹递给了她。 [tarah.basil] 它迫不及待地想要得到一些关爱。当她开始抚摸它的蹄子、挠它的鼻子时，它虽然有点抱怨这种突然的变化，但很快又重新发出欢快的声音。

“真是太可爱了！它叫什么名字呢？[tarah.basil]多么美好的名字，多么可爱的宝宝啊。”

“我很高兴你这么认为。我会尽量经常带他来拜访你。”

“嗯，如果你提到的那个日托中心的看护人员需要休息的话，随时都可以带他来哦。 我会把他宠坏的，”她说着，用自己那宽大的鼻子轻轻触碰他那小得多的马鼻子，然后干脆地把他的脚放在自己的胸前。这样，他就可以同时看到你和塔拉了。
            
            你不禁心想，大多数成年男人肯定都会不惜一切代价想要处于这样的位置，而当他开始试图接近你时，你便立刻制止了他。

“我们最好现在就回家吧，不过我一定会尽快再带他来拜访你一次的。我等不及了，”塔拉说，“祝你们在拯救世界的过程中一切顺利。”

“没错，去吧，让世界变得安全吧。”卡维也附和道。

“谢谢，我会尽我最大的努力的。
            
            道别之后，你便返回路标处，然后一路返回日托中心。 [tarah.basil] 在你的怀抱中。你把他还给格温，然后带着重新燃起的热情继续你的冒险之旅。
        ]
    ]
rows.raw:
'
    [flags.BASIL_VISIT
        |"Hey Gwyn! Has [tarah.basil] been behaving? I Think I'm gonna take him to visit Tarah and his grandma."
        
        "Ok! He's pretty wonderful most of the time, nice and quiet and easy. He likes to bite when he's nursing, though. Still haven't got him to stop that. He's been changed and fed and burped, though, so he should be all good for travel."
        
        "Thank you, Gwyn. I'll be back later."
        [var1]
        You scoop up the little equine bundle and cart him off to the waystone. After covering his eyes to prevent overstimulation, you step into the ways and travel all the way to the marefolk village. [tarah.basil] coos happily when you uncover him after stepping out, excited to see the marefolk milling about. Several women stop you on the way to the alchemist's home, fawning over your little foal and showering both him and you with compliments. By the time you make it inside, you're happy to see Tarah coming down the stairs to greet you.
        
        "[pc.name]! Omigosh [tarah.basil]! Hello!" she says, rushing over with a happy swish of her tail.
        
        [tarah.basil] coos and holds his arms out, and you hand him off to the bubbly she-mare. As you watch, she immediately puts her finger in one of his hands and then giggles as it closes tight around her. You can't help but pull her into a distracting kiss, and then tickle [tarah.basil]'s nose till he sneezes. Kavi comes out at exactly that moment, grinning wide and sweeping all three of you into a hug.
        
        "Our brightest bundles of joy. What kind of visit have you come on today?"
        
        Well...
        
        [var0
            |This time you've come to hang out with everyone together! You take turns holding [tarah.basil] while whoever's turn it isn't dotes on him like he could disappear at any moment. You play right up until he can't keep his eyes open, and then continue to dote on him after he zonks out in Tarah's arms. His little tongue bleps out when he breathes, and you all have to silence your excited squee-ing so as not to wake him. 
            
            You continue to share chances to hold him while he naps, carefully exchanging hands and keeping him as comfortable as possible. He doesn't wake once, at least, not until Kavi shuffles off to prepare some food for you. The smells wake him, and he wakes up hungry. Tarah sits down with you as you feed him, leaning her head on your shoulder and humming softly. That almost lulls the little guy right back to sleep, and you have to brush his nose to wake him back up to keep drinking. When he's finally had his fill, he does fall right back to sleep.
            
            Kavi brings you and Tarah some hot food, and you enjoy it along with some conversation while watching the tiny foal rest.
            |This time you came to make sure she stays accustomed to Tarah. She gets the majority of the hold time, though that doesn't mean you and Kavi aren't there to dote on him. The two of you are also there to direct her on how to do various things like changing and swaddling. She handles it well, not needing too much assistance for the easier things and handling the tougher things with none of her usual ditz. 
            
            She even tries her hand at feeding when he grows hungry, sitting down with you and humming softly as he drinks. Her reserves aren't nearly as deep as yours, however, and she has to pass him off to you when her supply is drained. Still, she leans her head on your shoulder and keeps humming while he drinks his fill. He ends up nodding off to sleep while nursing, his suction slowing to nothing as he completely zonks out.
            
            Kavi brings in a plate of warm food for the three of you to eat, and you enjoy it along with some conversation while watching the tiny foal rest.
            |This time you came to give him some playtime with his grandma! Kavi is more than happy to watch after the little tyke while you and Tarah catch up on your adventures. You can hear her spoiling him rotten as she carries him around and shows off pretty-colored flowers and several of the soft tapestries around the tents and rooms of the [silly
                |mootronly
                |matronly
            ] bovine's home. From what you can hear, the foal is unintentionally spoiling her just as much, cooing and reaching for everything she nears.
            
            Eventually, Kavi walks back with a very exhausted bundle of joy snoozing softly betwixt her cleavage. You take him back, and chat with both of them in hushed tones till he awakens once more. He's hungry once he's fully aware, so you feed and burp him while Kavi cooks up some snacks for you as well. When she comes back, you enjoy the food and some light conversation while you wait for [tarah.basil] to fully rouse from his tired stupor.
            
            Once he's up, you give Tarah some time holding him as well, grinning at her reactions and the happy swishing of her tail.
        ] You can only stay for so long, however, and soon you have to take leave of your bubbly mare-mate. 
        
        "See ya next time, lil' guy. Don't forget about me over there," Tarah says, holding his hoofies and bobbing them back and forth.
        
        "I'd never let that happen," you say, cupping her chin and smooching her nose. 
        
        "Good. Don't you forget about me over there, either," she replies, but she's grinning happily the whole time she says it.
        
        "Never."
        
        "The both of you had best never forget each other," Kavi chimes in. "But come now. Let's let [pc.name] be on [pc.hisHer] way."
        
        The matronly alchemist staves off your loving she-mare for long enough that you can get free, and you make your way back to the waystone. Little [tarah.basil] falls asleep again on your way back through the village, so you don't have to cover him up during your trip through the ways between. He's still napping when you hand him back to Gwyn, and you head back to your adventures with a renewed fervor.
        |[flags.TARAH_PREG_REVEAL
            |You scoop up [tarah.basil], being sure to warn Gwyn of where you're taking him and how long you plan to be gone. Once she's been informed, you take your adorable bundle and head off to the marefolk village through the ways between. While you travel through the ways themselves, you cover [tarah.basil]'s eyes with a cloth to prevent overstimulation. He doesn't seem to mind, cooing softly and fidgeting as you tickle his nose with your fingers. It doesn't take long at all to reach the village, and you uncover his eyes to let him take in the village before heading off to the alchemist's home.
            
            Tarah is the first person to greet you when you come through the door, beaming with excitement and happiness when she sees the bundle in your arms.
            [var1]
            "Omigosh omigosh omigosh! You had the baby! That's ours, right? We made that? Look at his little hoofies sticking out!" she says and asks, coming right up close as her tail swishes happily behind her. 
            
            "Yes, this is [tarah.basil], and he's ours. You can hold him if you want."
            
            "Yes! I want to! Super a lot," she says, struggling to stay calm enough to accept the bundle.
            
            [silly
                |"You made this?" she asks when the baby is in her hands, staring at him with blank adoration for a few seconds. "I made this..."
            ]
            
            [tarah.basil] gives one or two grumples at the sudden exchange of holdership, but giggles when she brushes her nose against his. That makes her giggle, which starts a chain reaction that doesn't stop until you're all giggling and Kavi comes sweeping through one of the back entrances.
            
            "What's all this laughter about? Ah, [pc.name], and- AH!" she says, clapping a hand to her mouth and pointing when she sees the bundle in her daughter's arms. 
            
            You brace yourself as she rushes over to scoop all three of you into a careful hug, squeezing till little [tarah.basil] ends up tucked snugly in her cleavage. A chuckle escapes you when you think about how envious most men would be of such a vantage point, and then pluck him free when he reaches out for you with a smile.
            
            "Is he doing ok at the daycare you mentioned before? If your caretaker ever needs a break, he's welcome here anytime."
            
            "I'll be sure to let them know, and I'm glad to hear it. He's been wonderful so far, though."
            
            "Good, then he's already behaving better than one of his mothers," Kavi says, playfully ruffling Tarah's hair as she teases.
            
            "Mooom, I wasn't that bad."
            
            "No, and neither will he be, I imagine."
            
            "I still plan to bring him by as much as I can," you interject.
            
            "Please do. As often as your world saving allows."
            
            You stay for a little while longer to get [tarah.basil] acquainted with the rest of his family, and then say your goodbyes.
            
            "Good luck, [pc.name]," Tarah says, giving you a goodbye smooch on the cheek.
            
            "Thank you," you reply, pulling her into a deeper kiss before heading back out into the village.
            
            With your goodbyes said, you return to the waystone and travel all the way back to the daycare with [tarah.basil] in your arms. You drop him off with Gwyn, and return to your adventures with a renewed fervor.
            |You scoop up [tarah.basil], being sure to warn Gwyn of where you're taking him and how long you plan to be gone. Once she's been informed, you take your adorable bundle and head off to the marefolk village through the ways between. While you travel through the ways themselves, you cover [tarah.basil]'s eyes with a cloth to prevent overstimulation. He doesn't seem to mind, cooing softly and fidgeting as you tickle his nose with your fingers. It doesn't take long at all to reach the village, and you uncover his eyes to let him take in the village before heading off to the alchemist's home.
            
            Tarah is the first person to come see who's there when you step inside, and she brightens when she sees you're holding a baby.
            [var1]
            "Omigosh! That's such a cute baby! Is it yours? Who's the mommy and or daddy? Can I give them a smooch on the nose?" she asks all at once, her bovine tail swishing around behind her.
            
            "One thing at a time, [tarah.nickName]. Let's start with the most important one. This is [tarah.basil], he's your son."
            
            "M-mine? You mean we- when we? Omigosh..." she says, a billion thoughts racing as her swishing slows. "You didn't tell me? I promise I'm ready, and I'm, like, not gonna mess it up. I can't do much, but I'm good at helping out."
            
            "Hush, [tarah.nickName], hush," you say, crossing what little space is left between you to hug her with your free arm. The baby coos happily as you rub up and down her back. "I didn't leave you in the dark because I thought you couldn't handle it. I'm in a dangerous line of work, and I didn't want you to be worrying about me even more than I'm sure you already do. Now that you know, I want you involved as much as you want to be. He's ours, and yes you can smooch him on the nose."
            
            Her spirits are restored bit by bit as you talk, and she can't help but lean in and give the little bundle a big smooch on the nose. That makes him giggle, which makes her giggle, which sets off a chain reaction that only stops after all three of you are laughing and cheerful. She looks at you with renewed joy and hope, and gives you a smooch on the nose as well.
            
            "I love you, [pc.name], and I love little [tarah.basil] too. Does he have a place to stay? I think we've got room here but I'd have to ask mom."
            
            "It's fine. I have a daycare back home where he's taken good care of."
            
            "Oh good, that's just like here, then. At least I think. I mostly stayed here 'cause I kept causing trouble for the caretaker."
            
            "I can't imagine you causing trouble. They must have been getting you confused with a different adorable pony."
            
            That makes her fluster and giggle all over again, blushing up a storm. Before she can actually muster up a further response, Kavi enters from one of the back rooms.
            
            "What's all this I've been hearing about daycare? Ah! [pc.name], welcome! Have you come to- AH!" she says, clapping a hand over her mouth when she sees the bundle in your arms. "Is that? Is it yours? Both of yours?"
            
            "He is, yes," you say, grinning wide.
            
            "Tree-father bless us! May I?" she says, plodding closer and holding out her arms.
            
            You nod, handing [tarah.basil] up to receive some love. He grumbles a little at the sudden exchange of holdership, but is right back to issuing happy noises as she plays with his hooves and tickles his nose.
            
            "Gods be praised. He's adorable! What is his name?"
            
            "[tarah.basil]."
            
            "A wonderful name for a wonderful babe."
            
            "I'm glad you think so. I'll try to bring him by to visit as often as I can."
            
            "Yes, well, if the caretaker of that daycare you spoke of ever needs a break, feel free to bring him as often as you need. I'll spoil him rotten," she says, brushing her great bovine nose against his much smaller equine one and then simply tucking him feet first into her cleavage. Held snugly in place, he can look out at both you and Tarah.
            
            You idly muse about how most grown men would probably kill to be in such a position, and pluck him out when he begins reaching for you.
            
            "We'd best be getting back home now, but I'll be sure to bring him for another visit soon."
            
            "I can't wait," Tarah says. "And good luck saving the world and stuff."
            
            "Yes, go, make the world safe." Kavi seconds.
            
            "Thanks. I'll do my best."
            
            With your goodbyes said, you return to the waystone and travel all the way back to the daycare with [tarah.basil] in your arms. You drop him off with Gwyn, and return to your adventures with a renewed fervor.
        ]
    ]'

rows.original:
As you enter the apothecaries' home, Tarah is the first to come down and see who's at the door. She brightens instantly when she sees you, tail swishing as she approaches and grabs your hand.

    "Oh! Oh! [pc.name]! Come quick, I found something super cool! Come see!" she says, bouncing in place in a way that makes her cowbells clink cutely.
    
    You follow, swept up in her whimsy as she leads you all the way up to her room. It's adorable, watching her pause at the top of the stairs as she remembers where this wonderful thing she wants to show you is, and then the almost-visible lamplight in her eyes as she sees it and runs over to a small chest near the bed. Opting not to follow right away, you instead enjoy the view as her rump shakes beneath her dress.
    
    "I know it's in here somewhere! I put it with the rest of my cool stuff so I wouldn't lose it!" she says.
    [var0]
    An errant stretch into the box causes her tail to flip her dress all the way up over her hips, and you're treated to the sight of her panty-less ass. Her perfectly round donut and her smooth ebony balls are on full display, and she's still ruffling through her chest of treasures without a care in the world. It would be so incredibly easy to take advantage of your ditzy mare-mate at this moment. You could go absolutely feral and descend upon her vulnerable bits with oral attention. On the other hand, you could just wait to see what she wants to show you. Surely she's on the cusp of finding it.
rows.translation:
当你走进药剂师的家时，塔拉是第一个下来迎接访客的人。看到你时，她的脸上立刻露出了笑容，摇着尾巴走过来，握住了你的手。

“哦！哦！ [pc.name]快过来，我发现了超级酷的东西！你们快来看吧！”她一边说，一边蹦蹦跳跳地走着，那动作让她的铃铛发出可爱的叮当声。

你被她的兴致所感染，跟着她一路来到了她的房间。看着她在楼梯顶端停下来，努力回忆着想要给你展示的东西在哪里，然后当她找到它时，眼中闪烁着兴奋的光芒，跑向床边的一个小箱子，这一切都显得如此可爱。 你没有立刻跟着去做，而是欣赏着她裙子下那晃动的臀部所呈现的美景。

“我知道它肯定就在这里某个地方！我把它和其他我的宝贝东西放在一起，这样就不会弄丢了！”她说。
    [var0]
    她不小心触到了那个箱子，结果她的尾巴一甩，裙子一下子被掀到了臀部以上，于是你便看到了她没有穿内裤的屁股。她那圆润如甜甜圈般的臀部以及光滑如乌木般的阴部都一览无余，而她却依然毫不在意地继续翻找着她的“宝物”。 现在，利用你那个有点迷糊的伴侣简直太容易了。你可以完全放纵自己，用各种亲密举动来刺激她那些敏感的部位。当然，你也可以选择等待，看看她想向你展示什么。 她肯定快要找到它了。
rows.raw:
"
    As you enter the apothecaries' home, Tarah is the first to come down and see who's at the door. She brightens instantly when she sees you, tail swishing as she approaches and grabs your hand.

If I find anything else, you'll be the first to know. Unless I tell mom first, but then you'll be the second to know." She threads her fingers through yours, and you both make your way back to the main room hand in hand.
rows.translation: 你应该做得更好。等了几秒钟后，就会很明显地发现她其实…… 就是有点傻乎乎的……她甚至都没有费心去整理它，直到最后她双手紧握着某样东西，重新直立起来，同时发出兴奋的欢呼声。她的裙子又重新落在了她的屁股上，然后她转过身来，向你展示她发现了什么。 [silly |快看这个！” 你低头一看，她的手正做出那种倒立的“OK”手势——你记得很多年前孩子们也经常这样做的。对于你来说，一切都变得如此模糊不清了。 塔拉咯咯笑着，轻轻拍了拍你的肩膀。说“拍打”可能有点夸张，因为其实更像是一个友好的碰触；但从比喻的角度来说，这个动作就有点像那些在贝尔哈尔陨落之前，那些幽灵对时空造成的冲击。不过，你还是强装出一副勇敢的表情。她或许…… 被狠狠教训了一顿但这并不意味着一切都结束了。 “真是太棒了！我是从当地的一个小家伙那里学会这个的。” “太好了，”你一边说着，一边努力修复自己受伤的自尊心，“你真幸运，这么可爱，而且这件事其实并没有发生。 |[rand |看这块石头吧！它真的非常漂亮！”她说道。 她将这块有裂纹的石头捧在手中，石头内部的美丽图案和色彩清晰可见。她把这块晶洞举起来，让你能够看到里面的那些闪闪发光的颗粒，同时也让你看到它那朴实无华的外表。 我在河边发现了它，我觉得它是掉下来后被某个瀑布弄碎的。” “真有趣！”你说道，凑近仔细观察里面的晶体结构，“这些颜色太漂亮了。" |看看这个，简直就像动物的头骨！我觉得它应该属于熊或者龙之类的动物吧！” 你看着她手中捧着的那个头骨，它大概有她的两只手掌那么大，你甚至不确定自己是否有勇气告诉她，这个头骨根本不可能是熊或龙的头骨。不过，它肯定属于某种体型较小的掠食动物，也许是一只狐狸之类的…… [silly |海猪油 |狡猾的人 ] 它被半埋在土里，但我把上面的泥土都洗掉了，现在它已经干干净净了。” “对于一只熊或者一条龙来说，这个东西确实有点小，”你仔细观察后说道，“但这也确实是个非常有趣的发现。 |看看这根棍子！它看起来不就像一把超酷的剑吗？” 她用一只手握住这根棍子，握得非常稳当；棍子上有一个小小的凸起，弯曲起来就像护手一样。棍子的其余部分则弯曲成波浪状的形态，就像一把短剑一样，甚至…… [pc.bg nobleScion soldier barbarian |看起来比你见过的某些真实武器要更加平衡。 |比起你见过的某些真正的武器来说，它握在手里感觉更加舒适。 ]她拿着这个假武器练习了几下挥动动作，同时咯咯地笑着，她的尾巴也开心地来回摆动着。 “使用这个武器让我感觉自己简直就像维伦的圣骑士一样！” “哇！你看起来真的太像了，简直再合适不过了。”你说道。 [pc.isDK |让自己都感到惊讶的是，你竟然真的觉得这份赞美是发自内心的。 |钦佩她那令人钦佩的坚韧不拔的精神。 ] 不过，实际情况要危险一些。 ] ] 呵呵，很高兴你喜欢。谢谢你给我这个机会让你看看。” “随时都可以。 [tarah.nickName]你继续去找这些东西，而我则会继续查看它们。 [flags.TARAH_ROCK_W |而这就是你为这个角色准备的吻。 |也许我还会为每一个亲你一下。 ]你俯身凑过去，迅速给了她一个深吻，让她的脸颊立刻泛起了红晕。 “呵呵，要是我再发现什么，你一定会是第一个知道的人。当然，如果我先告诉妈妈的话，那你就是第二个知道了。” 她将手指与你的手指交织在一起，然后你们手牵着手一起走回了主房间。
rows.raw: ' You're better than that. After a few seconds of waiting it becomes obvious that she is just that ditzy, and she doesn't even bother to fix it till she finally shoots back upright with something clenched in her hands and a triumphant squeal of excitement. Her dress falls back down over her butt, and she spins around to show you what she's discovered. [silly |"Check this out!" You look down. Her hand is doing that upside down 'ok hand' gesture you remember the kids doing so many years ago. All is lost for you. Tarah giggles as she punches you in the shoulder. Punch is a strong word, because it's more like a happy bump, but metaphorically it's like the punch the Wraith's delivered to space time just before the fall of Belhar. Still, you put on a brave face. She may have got your ass so hard, but that doesn't mean it's over. "Isn't that neat!? I learned it from one of the local foals!" "That's wonderful," you say, nursing your damaged ego. "You're lucky you're so cute and that this isn't really happening. |[rand |"Look at this rock! It's, like, super pretty!" she says. Cupped in her hands is a cracked stone with beautiful patterns and colors revealed inside. She holds the geode so you can see the inside, and lets you see all the sparkly bits as well as the drab stone exterior. "I found it by the river, and I think it fell down and got broke by one of the waterfalls." "Interesting!" you say, getting close enough to see the crystalline shapes inside. "The colors are so pretty." |"look at this, like, animal skull! I think it's like a bear or a dragon or something!" You look at the skull cupped in her hands, maybe big enough to fit in both palms, and aren't sure you have the strength to tell her that there's probably no way it could be one of those things. Still, it's definitely some sort of smaller predator, perhaps a fox or a [silly |sea lard |weasel ] of some kind. "It was kinda half-buried in the dirt, but I washed it off pretty good so now it's all clean." "Pretty small for a bear or dragon," you say, getting a closer look. "But that's still a very cool find." |"Look at this stick! Doesn't it look like a cool sword!?" Held in one hand, the giddy mare has a stick with a near-perfect grip and a tinier node that curls around like a handguard. The rest of its length curls like a wavy dagger or particularly short sword, and it even [pc.bg nobleScion soldier barbarian |looks more well-balanced than some real weapons you've seen |looks more comfortable to hold than some real weapons you've seen ]. She gives it a couple practices swishes and giggles, her tail swishing happily back and forth in tandem with the false weapon. "It makes me feel kinda like a paladin of Velun!" "Wow! You look the part and then some," you say, [pc.isDK |surprising yourself with how genuine you feel the compliment is |admiring her adorable tenacity. ] "Though the real thing is a bit more dangerous." ] ] "Hehe. I'm glad you like it. Thanks for letting me show you." "Anytime, [tarah.nickName]. You just keep on finding things and I'll keep on looking at them. [flags.TARAH_ROCK_W |And here's your kiss for this one. |Maybe I'll even give you a kiss for each one. ]" You lean over and give her a big, swift smooch that makes her cheeks flush. "Heh. If I find anything else, you'll be the first to know. Unless I tell mom first, but then you'll be the second to know." She threads her fingers through yours, and you both make your way back to the main room hand in hand.'

rows.original: You want to see this cool thing.
rows.translation: 你一定要看看这个超酷的东西。
rows.raw: "You want to see this cool thing."
